speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Happy? I don't think so.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie! Are we glad to see you!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh you are, huh? Why? Need a good laugh?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie? What do you suppose has her so upset? It's not like her.

speaker: Applejack
content: I didn't notice anything strange about Pinkie.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Weird. Better pick up the pace before the stress of this gets the better of all of us.

speaker: Rarity
content: I was expecting an audience with the Princess, not outdoor sport. Agh. Oh my...

speaker: Discord
content: Welcome to your lucky day, Rarity. You've found the one thing in Equestria that could rival my face for sheer beauty. What do you think? You like?

speaker: Rarity
content: Yes... I like very much... No! No, I shan't succumb to such fabulousness. Must... get to the center... to meet... the others. Mine!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rarity! Are we glad to see... Why are you carrying a humongous boulder?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Okay, I can do this. I can... Oh, wait a minute... Butterflies? Wait! Don't leave me here!

speaker: Butterflies
content: Fluttershy, looks like you've been left behind by your so-called friends, huh?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, no. I'm certain they're doing their best to find me.

speaker: Butterflies
content: Well, it must be so upsetting to know how weak and helpless they think you are.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Not at all. I am weak and helpless and I appreciate their understanding.

speaker: Butterflies
content: Yes... Well, surely it burns you up... I mean, that they're always pointing out your flaws, right?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Not really. In fact, I think I'm awfully lucky to have friends who want me to be the best I can be.

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, for goodness sake! You've been kind for far too long, my dear. Time to be cruel. Arrivederci!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fluttershy! I'm so glad to see a friendly face. This awful labyrinth is getting to everypony.

speaker: Applejack
content: Grrr...

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Aw, boo-hoo-hoo! Why don't you wave your magic little horn and make everything all right?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh...

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, that's right, you can't. You don't have one.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What is happening to my friends?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And what are you laughing at?

speaker: Applejack
content: Chocolate milk.

speaker: Rarity
content: Little help here! Thanks, Twilight.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're welcome<U+0096>

speaker: Rarity
content: But don't get any ideas about my gem! I know where you live.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I've got you now, element.

speaker: Discord
content: Oh. I can see why you like these clouds so much. Very plush.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Get off there and put 'em up! Come on! Let's go!

speaker: Discord
content: Hey, I'm here to deliver a message.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I've got a message for you too!

speaker: Discord
content: Listen closely, this is important. A weighty choice is yours to make:<U+00A0>the right selection or a big mistake. If a wrong choice you choose to pursue, the foundations of home will crumble without you.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Cloudsdale? Crumble... without me? No!

speaker: Discord
content: That box contains your wings. You can take them and leave the game, or you can carry on aimlessly wandering this maze. Your choice.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Must... find... Rainbow Dash. As a team... we're unstoppable. Rainbow Dash won't let us down.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, looky there. Rainbow Dash is flying away. She's abandonin' us.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Now I know that's a lie. How can it be?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess Celestia, we came as fast as we could.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I need you to wield the Elements of Harmony once again and stop Discord.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The Elements! They're gone!

speaker: Discord
content: Everypony has to play, or the game is over and I win.

speaker: Applejack
content: Our friendship...over?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Who are you talking to?

speaker: Applejack
content: Nopony! Nopony whatsoever.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie! Are we glad to see you!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Why? Need a good laugh?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What is happening to my friends?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And what are you laughing at!?

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, you ponies are just the most fun I've had in aeons.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Well, quit it! You'd better think before you laugh at the Pink...ie Pie!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, yeah? Well ha, ha.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Quit it!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: No. Ha, ha.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Quit it!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: No. Ha ha-ha ha ha.

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh... Rarity? This here diamond of yours? Twilight said we should split it six ways since we, uh, found it together.

speaker: Rarity
content: HI-YAH! Try it, punk. He's mine. All mine! Ya! Ya! Ya!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Girls, why are you all acting like this?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Quit it! Stop it!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We need to stick together.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Ha, ha.

speaker: Discord
content: It's just too entertaining.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Stop it, Discord. You're not playing fair.

speaker: Discord
content: I'm not playing fair? Perhaps we haven't met. I'm Discord, spirit of chaos and disharmony. Hello?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How are we supposed to find the Elements of Harmony when you took away the labyrinth before we could get to the end?

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, wait, did you...? How funny! You thought the Elements were in the labyrinth?

speaker: Flashback Discord
content: Twists and turns are my master plan. Then find the Elements back where you began.

speaker: Discord
content: I never said they were in the labyrinth.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But...but...

speaker: Discord
content: Keep trying, Twilight Sparkle. Maybe the magic of friendship can help you. Now if you'll excuse me, I have some chaos to wreak.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Chocolate milk? I hate chocolate milk!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Think, Twilight, think! "Find the Elements back where you began." Back where you began.

speaker: Rarity
content: Don't touch my gem!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm touching your gem, Rarity. Ha, ha.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: What 'chu laughin' at?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ugh. I just want to go home... Wait a minute... Home! "Back where you began!" The Elements must be in... Ponyville! Come on, girls. I'm certain this is what Discord's riddle really meant. If we get back to the library, I have a book that I just know can give us a clue. Ah!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Good boy, Angel. Mama's so proud.

speaker: Applejack
content: Wow, I can see so much better now. Whoa! I meant to do that.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wah! Ahh! Whoa! Discord's turned our dirt roads into soap!

speaker: Discord
content: Beautiful, isn't it? This is the new and improved Ponyville, and these are only my first of changes.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: This may look like fun, but it's not.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ugh.

speaker: Discord
content: Picture it. The chaos capital of the world.

speaker: Discord
content: Well, wait a few minutes and you'll see it in the beautiful light of day. Or not.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ponyville, the chaos capital of the world? Not if I have anything to say about it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, we're here. Everyone please, please, please just go inside, please?

speaker: Applejack
content: I absolutely refuse.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: With pleasure.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I hate libraries!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pleeeease, we gotta hurry!

speaker: Rarity
content: Forget it, Twilight. I know what you're up to. The second I go in, you'll have your little minion Spike come and take Tom!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Tom?

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, it's not going to work.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're not going in without him, are you?

speaker: Rarity
content: Mm-mm.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fine!

speaker: Spike
content: Ah! Brrr! What did you do that for, Fluttershy?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: 'Cause you just looked so peaceful.

speaker: Spike
content: I...uh...huh?

speaker: Rarity
content: Careful, Twilight! You'll ruin his beautiful finish.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, for the love of...

speaker: Spike
content: Twilight, what's going on? Why does everybody look so...gray?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Don't ask. I need you to help me find something.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Hey, Twilight, what's soaking wet and clueless?

speaker: Spike
content: What's happened to everypony?

speaker: Applejack
content: I guess you just bring out the worst in us, Spike.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ugh. No time to explain. We've got to find the reference guide to the Elements of Harmony before somepony does something she'll regret!

speaker: Spike
content: The Elements of Harmony? Oh, I know exactly where that book is. Found it!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Hah!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fluttershy, you'd better give me that book!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Keep away!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hey! Applejack, give me that book!

speaker: Applejack
content: I don't have any book.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie! You guys! Stop it right now!

speaker: Spike
content: Ugh!

speaker: Rarity
content: Mine!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hey, do you even know what you just stole?

speaker: Rarity
content: No, but if you want it, I want it!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: GIVE ME THAT BOOK!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Where is she? Where's Rarity?

speaker: Applejack
content: Beats me.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Lies!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Get back! All of you! This is my book, and I'm going to READ IT! The Elements!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The Elements! They were here all along!

speaker: Spike
content: This is great! Now you guys can defeat Discord and put everything back to normal!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: See, girls? We did it! We found the Elements of Harmony! Together!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You don't even care, do you?

speaker: All
content: No!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I never thought it would happen. My friends... have turned into complete JERKS! Necklace! Necklace! Necklace! Necklace! And... big crown thingy! Come on, everypony, let's go!

speaker: Spike
content: But Twilight, aren't you missing somepony?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Nope. We've got the liar, the grump, the hoarder, and the brute. That just about covers it.

speaker: Spike
content: But what about Rainbow Dash?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Congratulations, Spike, you're the new Rainbow Dash. Now let's go!

speaker: Spike
content: Me? B-b-but what if she finds out I've been impersonating her? That won't end well.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Too bad, you're Rainbow Dash. Now let's go defeat Discord so we don't ever have to talk to each other again!

speaker: All but Rarity
content: Yeah! Woo-hoo!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Move! Look out, here comes Tom!

speaker: Discord
content: Well, well, well, I see you've found the Elements of Harmony. How terrifying!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Discord! I've figured out your lame riddle. You're in for it now!

speaker: Discord
content: I certainly am. You've clearly out-dueled me, and now it's time to meet my fate. I'm prepared to be defeated now, ladies. Fire when ready.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Formation, now!

speaker: All
content: Eh.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "Rainbow Dash", get over here.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: All right, let's get this over with. What's going on?

speaker: Applejack
content: Mine's workin'. There must be somethin' wrong with yours.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I HATE the Elements of Harmony!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Hmph! Garbage.

speaker: Rarity
content: MINE!

speaker: Spike
content: Sorry, Twilight. I guess I'd better get back upstairs and clean up the library. Good luck with all this<U+0096> whoa!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: It's your fault it didn't work.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Who are you talking to?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Any of you! ALL OF YOU! I'm outta here!

speaker: Applejack
content: I better go, too. I've got new better friends waiting for me at the farm.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Yeah! I'm sick of you losers.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: FINE! Leave! See if I care! I don't need you guys either! With friends like you, who needs...enemies...?

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, my stomach! Twilight, you've got to see what I just did.

speaker: Discord
content: It's priceless! Come now, Twilight Sparkle. You've got to get into the spirit of things! After all, this is your new home.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Not anymore...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pack your things, Spike, we're leaving.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Don't ask where we're going, 'cause I don't know yet. Just not here.

speaker: Spike
content: Can't...move. The princess...has been sending these...since I came back upstairs. Make it stop!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: These are all the letters I've written to the princess since I've lived in Ponyville. But why would she send them back?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "Real friends don't care what your cover is."

speaker: Others
content: "Friendship is a wondrous and powerful thing."

speaker: Others
content: "And like the path cut through the orchard, there will always be a way through."

speaker: Others
content: "The best thing to do is stay true to yourself."

speaker: Others
content: "Everypony has a special magical connection with her friends. Maybe even before she's met them."

speaker: Others
content: Spike! Spike, it's all so clear! Can't you see? Discord's trying to distract us from what's important. He knows how powerful our friendships are, and he's trying to keep us from seeing it. Do you remember what I said the first day we arrived in Ponyville? I told you that the future of Equestria didn't rest on me making friends. But the opposite is true! The friendships I've made since I've been here are what saved Equestria from Nightmare Moon. And now they need to save it from Discord!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're right, Spike. I've got to fight for my friendships. For them. For me. For Equestria!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh...uh...why don't you just stay here and rest? I'll take care of the whole fighting for friendship thing myself.

speaker: Applejack
content: And so I tried to defeat Discord, but none of my so-called "friends" would lift a hoof to help me.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Applejack, I'm here to fight for our friendship.

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, now you want to fight. Where you went when I was battlin' Discord?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Snap out of it. This isn't you! You're not a liar.

speaker: Applejack
content: Wh-what happened? Twilight! I saw a vision of us feudin' and fightin'. I couldn't face the truth, so I started tellin' lies. Can you ever forgive me?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I already have. Come on!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh no! Twilight, Applejack, I just had the worst dream!

speaker: Rarity
content: What do you think you're doing? Get away from my gem! Get away--! Let us never speak of this again.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And I-I turned gray! Can you believe it?!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Uh? She's not here.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Without Rainbow Dash, we can't use the Elements.

speaker: Applejack
content: She could be anywhere by now! We're never gonna find her.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Yeah, we will, 'cause she's right there!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rainbow Dash!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hey, guys!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We've been looking everywhere for you!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: That's nice.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Discord's still on the loose! We need you to help us defeat him with your element, Loyalty!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Pfft. Loyalty, schmoyalty! Have you guys seen Ponyville? It's a disaster! I'm staying here in Cloudsdale where everything's awesome.

speaker: Rarity
content: How in Equestria can she think that tiny patch of clouds is Cloudsdale?

speaker: Applejack
content: The same way he got you to think that cheap rock was a bona fide diamond.

speaker: Rarity
content: I thought we agreed never to speak of that again.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Time for Plan B.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, Fluttershy, you grab Rainbow Dash and hold her down. Applejack will lower me down from this rope so I can cast the memory spell on her.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Got it!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Um...I'm just wondering if it's okay if I hold you down against your will for a little bit?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ugh...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Nice try! Ponyville's your problem, not mine.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Come on, Fluttershy, we've got to catch her. Hyah! Applejack!

speaker: Rarity and Pinkie Pie
content: WHOA!

speaker: Rarity
content: PINKIE! You were supposed to secure the ROPE!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oops.

speaker: Applejack
content: Rarity, Pinkie, hold on! Y'all are slowing her down!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Fluttershy, would you be a dear and FLY FASTER, please?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I can't!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: If you can't catch her, Discord wins!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: That big... dumb... MEANIE!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, Applejack, last rope! Make it count!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Lemme go! I don't need you guys! Leave me alone! Wh-what happened? How's Ponyville? Where are the Elements?! Did we stop Discord?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Maybe it's a little early for a group hug.

speaker: Discord
content: Chaos is a wonderful, wonderful thing.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Not as wonderful as friendship.

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, this again?

speaker: Applejack
content: That's right. You couldn't break apart our friendship for long.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'll tell you what we've learned, Discord: we've learned that friendship isn't always easy, but there's no doubt it's worth fighting for!

speaker: Discord
content: Ugh, gag. Fine, go ahead. Try and use your little Elements. Friend me. Just make it quick. I'm missing some excellent chaos here.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: All right, ladies, let's show him what friendship can do!

speaker: Discord
content: Huh. What's this? No. NO!!!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: We are gathered here today to once again honor the heroism of these six friends who stood up to the villain Discord and saved Equestria from eternal chaos.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Quill.

speaker: Spike
content: Check.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Parchment.

speaker: Spike
content: Check.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Extra ink.

speaker: Spike
content: Check.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Extra extra ink.

speaker: Spike
content: Check.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Is that everything on the checklist?

speaker: Spike
content: Yep.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Great. Now that we've completed the checklist of things we need to create a checklist, we can make my checklist of the things I have to get done by the end of the day. Ready?

speaker: Spike
content: Ready!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Item one: create checklist of the things I have to accomplish by the end of the day.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How are we doing, Spike?

speaker: Spike
content: Let's see... We've already dropped off your cape at the cleaners, returned the blackboard you borrowed from Cheerilee, ordered new parchment and quills from the stationery shop...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hmm... Seems like we just placed an order for those a few days ago.

speaker: Spike
content: Can't imagine why we go through so many of them.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sounds like we're ahead of schedule. What's next?

speaker: Spike
content: Cupcakes!

speaker: Spike
content: Whoa...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh, I only ordered twelve.

speaker: Mrs Cake
content: Oh, I know, dear, but I had an extra. So I thought I'd make it a baker's dozen.

speaker: Spike
content: Uhhh-no!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, that was very thoughtful of you. It's just some of the icing from the extra cupcake is getting all over the one next to it. See?

speaker: Mrs Cake
content: Ohh... sure...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's just that I'm planning on sharing these at a picnic later and I don't want anypony to feel like somepony else is getting more icing.

speaker: Mrs Cake
content: Oh, no... of course not.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Not to worry, I'll just move some of this one to... hmm... I think I may have scooped too much... oops! Now those two have more. Let's just try this again... Hmm, no, that won't do. Let me just... hmm... put some here, and... no, that's not right. A little more on this one, a little bit... and wait... I'll just... ooh, a little bit here, and here, and... perfect!

speaker: Mrs Cake
content: Hmm, oh yes... much better...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, time to tackle the next item on our-- oops! Looks like we're going to have to add 'give a baby dragon a bath' to our list.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Very efficient! And a little bit gross.

speaker: Spike
content: Eh.

speaker: Spike
content: Looks like that's everything!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Almost everything.

speaker: Spike
content: "Triple-check checklist to make sure we didn't miss anything when we double checked the checklist!" Uh... check! Ugh... I've been holding that quill so long, I've got a claw cramp! Well, good thing we don't have anything to report to Princess Celestia this week... I don't think I could write another word!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We haven't sent a letter to Princess Celestia this week?!

speaker: Spike
content: Why? Is that bad?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Bad? BAD? Of course it's bad! I'm supposed to send Princess Celestia a letter every week, telling her about a lesson I've learned about friendship! Not every other week, not every ten days, every... single... week!

speaker: Spike
content: Huh?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ohh... Where's my calendar, where's my calendar?!

speaker: Spike
content: Where it.. always is?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: When did we send the last one?

speaker: Spike
content: Last... Tuesday?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And today is...

speaker: Spike
content: Tuesday?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Argh! Nononononononono! If I don't send her a letter by sundown, I'll be... tardy!

speaker: Spike
content: What's that now?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Tar-dy, Spike! Late, I'll be late! Oh, how could I let this happen? I'm usually so organized. I've never been late with an assignment.

speaker: Spike
content: Oh, please! You're the most studious student ever! I'm sure the Princess will forgive you if you miss one little deadline.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm afraid to take that chance, Spike. This is the ruler of all of Equestria we're talking about. The pony who holds my fate in her hooves! What if she doesn't forgive me?

speaker: Spike
content: Yeah... I don't think she--

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What if instead she starts thinking I'm not taking my studies on friendship seriously?

speaker: Spike
content: Why would she--

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What if she makes me come back to Canterlot and puts me back in school and makes me prove I've been taking them seriously by giving me a test?! What if I don't pass?!

speaker: Spike
content: Well, why wouldn't you pass--

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: She's my teacher. Do you know what teachers do to students who don't pass? They send them back a grade! But she won't just send me back a grade. She'll send me back to... magic kindergarten.

speaker: Spike
content: Twilight? Twilight!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Huh?

speaker: Spike
content: That is the most ridiculous thing I've ever heard! You're not going to be sent back to magic kindergarten.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're right. I have no reason to worry. Because I'm going to solve a friend's problem and get that letter to Princess Celestia before sundown!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: So... got any problems, troubles, conundrums, or any other sort of issues, major or minor, that I as a good friend could help you solve?

speaker: Spike
content: Huh. Hmm. Huunh. Huh... I got nothin'.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Then it looks like I'm going to have to find somepony who does.

speaker: Spike
content: This won't end well.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You've got this, Twilight. You still have plenty of time to get that letter to Princess Celestia! Has to be somepony who needs the help of a good friend!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rarity!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Don't worry, Rarity! I'm here!

speaker: Rarity
content: Why me-e-e-e-e-ee... WHYYYY?! Why? Why-y?! And of all the worst things that could happen, this is THE. WORST. POSSIBLE. THING!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What's happened? Are you alright?

speaker: Rarity
content: I've lost my diamond-encrusted purple ribbon! I have searched high, and I have searched low. Low and high! High and low! But I can't find it anywhere! Anywhe-e-e-e-ere! How can I possibly finish my latest creation if I can't find it?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Never fear, Rarity. As your friend I'll do my best to help you fi--

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, there it is. Isn't it always just the last place you look?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: So... you just lost your ribbon?

speaker: Rarity
content: Mm-hm!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But now you've found it?

speaker: Rarity
content: Yuh-huh.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And nothing else is bothering you? Nothing that I, as a good friend, could help you with?

speaker: Rarity
content: Hmm... there is one thing.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yes?

speaker: Rarity
content: I think I left my measuring tape under the fabric over there. Could you get that for me?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Measuring tape? Sure.

speaker: Rarity
content: Twilight? Is there something bother-- Twilight?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No need to panic. Rarity is just one pony. I'm sure one of my other friends will need me.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What in the world...? Rainbow must be angry with Applejack! She must hate her guts! How wonderful! Rainbow Dash! Stop! Listen, Rainbow. I know you're upset with Applejack, but don't worry. Whatever it is that has come between you two, I'm sure that I, as a good friend, can help you resolve your problems.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh, what are you talking about?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, Rainbow Dash, you don't have to hide your feelings from me! I can tell you two must've had a terrible fight.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Now, why don't you tell me all about your issues with Applejack.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I don't have any issues with Applejack.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You don't? Then why are you destroying her property?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Because she asked me to. Right, Applejack?

speaker: Applejack
content: Yes, ma'am. I wanted to put up a new barn, but this one's gotta come down first. Hehe. Now get back to it, R.D.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You got it, boss!

speaker: Applejack
content: I'd take cover if I were you.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I can't believe I wasted all that time. I should have just come here first. Fluttershy always has some fear she's trying to get over. As a good friend, I'll be able to help her.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fluttershy?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How can this be happening? Of all the days she had to stop being such a scaredy-pony, she had to pick today?! What am I going to do?!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: You really should have come to me sooner. You were carrying so much tension in that shoulder.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's fine. It'll all be fine. The day isn't over yet. But it will be over soon!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It'll be all over! My time in Ponyville! My advanced studies! Nono. You're a good student. You can do this. Ooh! But what if I can't? You can! You just have to keep it together. Keep. It. Together!

speaker: Spike
content: Are you talking to... yourself? Twilight?

speaker: Spike
content: Snap out of it!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Huh?

speaker: Spike
content: Are you okay?

speaker: Spike
content: Twilight, I'm really worried. I mean this letter thing is really getting to you. Here. You've been so anxious all day that you completely forgot about the picnic. Why don't you just relax and go hang out with--

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The picnic! I should go see my friends!

speaker: Spike
content: I'm glad you've come to your senses.

speaker: Rarity
content: Please tell me I did not forget the plates. I did. I totally forgot them. Of all the worst things that could happen, this is THE. WORST. POSSIBLE. THING! Why, why, why... Uh... What? You didn't expect me to lay on the grass, did you?

speaker: Applejack
content: You alright, hun?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No! I am not alright.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's just terrible.

speaker: Others
content: Applejack, Fluttershy, Pinkie Pie, Rainbow Dash, Yes?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Simply awful.

speaker: Others
content: Applejack, Fluttershy, Pinkie Pie, Rainbow Dash, Yes?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's the most horrific trouble I've ever been in and I really really really need your help!

speaker: Others
content: Applejack, Fluttershy, Pinkie Pie, Rainbow Dash, YES?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: My letter to Princess Celestia is almost overdue, and I haven't learned anything about friendship!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, thank goodness. I thought something really awful had happened.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Something awful has happened! If I don't turn in the letter on time, I'll be tardy! TARDY!

speaker: Applejack
content: No offense, sugarcube, but it looks like somepony's gettin' themselves all worked up over nothin'.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: This is not nothing. This is everything. I need you guys to help me find somepony with a problem I can fix before sundown! My whole life depends on it!

speaker: Applejack
content: Come on now. Have a seat and stop sweatin' the small stuff.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Wow. I've never seen Twilight so upset before.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, what a drama queen. Mm. Relatively speaking...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Clock is ticking, Twilight. Clock. Is. Ticking. Keep it together. If I can't find a friendship problem... I'll make a friendship problem!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Oh, hi, Twilight. How's it go--

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Gr-eat. Just great. You three look like you're doing great too! Looks like three good friends who obviously don't need the help of another good friend. This is Smarty Pants. She was mine when I was your age, and now I want to give her to you!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Uhh... she's... great.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Yeah. Great.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I really... like her... mane.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: She even comes with her own notebook and quill, for when you want to pretend she's doing her homework!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: That's... um... great.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Yeah... great.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I really like her... mane?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I just hope the fact that there are three of you and only one of her doesn't become a problem! I'd hate to cause a rift between such good friends. So, who wants to play with her first?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Uh... You should play with her first, Sweetie Belle. Y'know, 'cause you like her mane so much.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Nonononononono. I think Scootaloo should get to play with her first.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: I'd love to, but, um, you take her, Apple Bloom.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Applejack says it's important to share.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I gotta think of something! Thinkthinkthinkthinkthink Twilight, think! That's it! Ooh, you're going to like Smarty Pants. And you're going to like her more than anything.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: I want it.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: I need it.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I really like her mane!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The 'want it, need it' spell. Works every time. Okay, okay, let's break it up. I think we can all see that there is an important lesson to be learned here about-- Ugh! C'mon, girls, we're all friends here, right? Don't you think you ought to share?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: No way!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Big McIntosh! Thank goodness! You've gotta help me get that doll away from those girls!

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Eeyup.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, thank you so much. Now if you could just give her to me?

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Nnnope.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh no!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Give her back!

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: What's all the commotion about?

speaker: Orange Swirl
content: They're fighting over that doll!

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: That incredible, amazing doll!

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: Gimme!

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Nope.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, what have I done?!

speaker: Applejack
content: Y'all hear that? What in the name of all things oats 'n apples is goin' on here?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Don't look at it!

speaker: Rarity
content: Don't look at what?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: My Smarty Pants doll! I enchanted her and now everypony is fighting over her!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Why would you enchant your doll?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, I had to do something! I had nothing to report to Princess Celestia! I thought if I couldn't find a problem, I'd make a problem! The day is almost over!

speaker: Applejack
content: Not almost!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Twilight Sparkle!

speaker: Applejack
content: Whoa nelly.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Meet me in the library.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Goodbye, girls. If you care to visit, I'll be in magic kindergarten, back in Canterlot.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Magic kindergarten?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Canterlot?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: We're never gonna see Twilight again!

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, what are we gonna do, y'all?

speaker: Rarity
content: Of all the worst things that could happen, this is THE. WORST. POSSIBLE. THING! What? I really mean it this time!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But...but... I'm supposed to send you a letter about friendship every week. I missed the deadline. I'm a bad student! I'm... tardy!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: You are a wonderful student, Twilight. I don't have to get a letter every week to know that.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Really?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Wait!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You can't punish her!

speaker: Applejack
content: It wasn't her fault!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I'm listening.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Please, your Highness. We all saw that Twilight was upset.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: But we thought that the thing she was worrying about wasn't worth worrying about.

speaker: Applejack
content: So when she ran off all worked up, not a single one of us tried to stop her.

speaker: Rarity
content: As Twilight's good friends, we should have taken her feelings seriously and been there for her!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Please don't take her away from us just because we were too insensitive to help her.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Looks like you all learned a pretty valuable lesson today.

speaker: Others
content: Applejack, Fluttershy, Pinkie Pie, Rainbow Dash, Mm-hmm.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Very well. I'll forget Twilight's "punishment" on one condition.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: From this day forth, I would like you all to report to me your findings on the magic of friendship when, and only when, you happen to discover them.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess Celestia, wait! How did you know I was in trouble?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Your friend Spike made me aware that you were letting your fears get the best of you. I commend him for taking your feelings seriously. Now, if you will all excuse me, I must return to Canterlot. I'm expecting some mail.

speaker: Applejack
content: Y'all heard the Princess. Spike, take a letter.

speaker: Applejack
content: Dear Princess Celestia,

speaker: Applejack
content: We're writin' to you because today we all learned a little somethin' about friendship.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: We learned that you should take your friends' worries seriously.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Even if you don't think that she has anything to worry about.

speaker: Rarity
content: And that you shouldn't let your worries turn a small problem...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: ...into an enormously huge entire-town-in-total-chaos Princess-has-to-come-and-save-the-day problem.

speaker: Applejack
content: Signed, your loyal subjects.

speaker: Spike
content: P.S. Obviously Spike did not have to learn a lesson, because he is the best, most awesome friend a pony could ask for. Unlike everypony else, he took things seriously, and- Eheh... uh... yeah... I'll just, um...

speaker: Spike
content: Ugh, come on, Twilight. We're gonna be late for the Nightmare Night festival. Huh? Are you that one kooky grandpa from Ponyville Retirement Village?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm Star Swirl the Bearded! Father of the amniomorphic spell? Did you even read that book I gave you about obscure unicorn history?

speaker: Fillies
content: Nightmare Night! What a fright! Give us something sweet to bite!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hi, everypony. Great costumes. Happy Nightmare Night, Granny Smith.

speaker: Granny Smith
content: I should have been asleep five hours ago.

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Pipsqueak the pirate, at your service. It's my very first Nightmare Night.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Since you moved here from Trottingham?

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: No, my very first Nightmare Night ever!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Enough chitchat! Time is candy!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie, aren't you a little old for this?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Too old for free candy? Never.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Do you like it?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Yeah! Great costume, Twilight! You make a fantastic weirdo clown!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: A clown? Look at the borders on these robes. These are hoof-stitched!

speaker: Spike
content: It's a great costume! Huh! Grandpa!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Star Swirl the Bearded is only the most important conjurer of the pre-classical era.

speaker: Background ponies
content: Yeah! Whoo-hoo!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: He created more than two hundred spells! He even has a shelf in the Canterlot library of magic named after him. Maybe I should start up a pony group to teach ponies about history. I bet everypony would love it! Don't you, Spike?

speaker: Spike
content: Mm-hmm! I love it!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hey look, we're here already! Should we get something to eat?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Twilight, Twilight! Look at our haul! Ah! Can you believe it? And then, we went to Cheerilee's house, and got a bunch more goodies. Didn't we, Pip?

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Sure did!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And then, we had to stop and wait for Granny Smith, and -<U+0096>

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rainbow Dash, that wasn't very nice.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Lighten up, old-timer. This is the best night of the year for pranks!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Look what you did to Spike!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: It's all in good fun. Oh! Oh! There's another group over there!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Happy Nightmare Night, Applejack!

speaker: Applejack
content: Howdy, Spike! Hey, Twilight! Nice costume.

speaker: Spike
content: Thanks! I'm a dragon.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: She means me, Spike.

speaker: Applejack
content: With that beard, I reckon you're some sorta country music singer.

speaker: Applejack
content: While y'all are here, ya' feel like bobbin' for an apple?

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: Thank you, everypony, and welcome to the Nightmare Night festival!

speaker: Spike
content: Spooky voice might work better if she wasn't dressed like that.

speaker: Zecora
content: Follow me, and very soon, you'll hear the tale of Nightmare Moon.

speaker: Zecora
content: Listen close, my little dears, I'll tell you where you got your fears of Nightmare Night, so dark and scary. Of Nightmare Moon, who makes you wary.

speaker: Zecora
content: Every year, we put on a disguise, to save ourselves from her searching eyes.

speaker: Zecora
content: But Nightmare Moon wants just one thing: to gobble up ponies in one quick swing!

speaker: Zecora
content: Hungrily, she soars the sky. If she sees nopony, she passes by. So if she comes and all is clear, Equestria is safe another year!

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Uh, Miss Zecora, if we wear costumes to hide from Nightmare Moon, so she won't gobble us up, how come we still need to give her some of our candy?

speaker: Zecora
content: A perfect question, my little friend. For Nightmare Moon you must not offend. Fill up her belly with a treat or two, so she won't return to come eat you!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Everypony! Just dump some candy and get out of here!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: It's Nightmare Moon! Run!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess Luna!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Citizens of Ponyville! We have graced your tiny village with our presence, so that you might behold the real Princess of the Night! A creature of nightmares no longer, but instead a pony who desires your love and admiration! Together we shall change this dreadful celebration into a bright and glorious feast!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Did you hear that, everypony? Nightmare Moon says she's gonna feast on us all!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: What? No, children, no! You no longer have reason to fear us! Screams of delight is what your princess desires, not screams of terror! Madame Mayor, thy Princess of the Night hath arrived.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: What is the matter with you? Very well, then. Be that way. We won't even bother with the traditional royal farewell.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm gonna go talk to her.

speaker: Spike
content: You can't talk to her! She's Nightmare Moon!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No, she's not. I saw the Elements of Harmony change her back to good. But it seems like she's having some trouble adjusting after being gone for a thousand years.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess Luna? Hi, my name is-

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Star Swirl the Bearded. Commendable costume! Thou even got the bells right.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Thank you! Finally! Somepony who gets my costume! Uh, I just came to welcome you to our celebration! My actual name is-

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Twilight Sparkle. It was thou who unleashed the powers of harmony upon us and took away our dark powers!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And that was a good thing, right?

speaker: Princess Luna
content: But of course. We could not be happier. Is that not clear?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, you kinda sound like you're yelling at me.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: But this is the traditional royal Canterlot voice! It is tradition to speak using the royal "we", and to use this much volume when addressing our subjects!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You know, that might explain why your appearance was met with... mixed results. I think if you just changed your approach a bit, you might be met with a warmer reception.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Change our approach?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Lower the volume?

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Ohhh. We have been locked away for a thousand years. We are... not sure we can.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Go away! No candy here! Visitors not welcome on Nightmare Night!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fluttershy, it's me, Twilight!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wait right here.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fluttershy... you remember Princess Luna?

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Charmed.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Likewise.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Twilight Sparkle hath spoken of the sweetness of thy voice. We ask thou teachest to us to speak as thou speakest.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Okay.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Shall our lessons begin?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Okay.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Shall we mimic thy voice?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Okay.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: How is this?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Perfect, lesson over!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: A little quieter, princess.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: How is... this?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Better. Right, Fluttershy?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Yes.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: How... about... now?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Now you're getting it.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: And... how about now?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yes! Well done.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: I thank thee, dear Fluttershy! Our normal speaking voice shall surely win us the hearts of thy fellow villagers.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Fluttershy! You've gotta hide us! Nightmare Moon is here and... Ah! She stole Fluttershy's voice so she can't scream when she gobbles her up!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Nay, children, wait! I mean... nay, children, no, wait.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Come on, princess. Time for plan B.

speaker: All
content: Hurray!

speaker: Sassaflash
content: Aah!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: It is of no use, Twilight Sparkle. They have never liked us and they never shall.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: My friend Applejack is one of the most likable ponies around. I'm sure she'll have some ideas.

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Heee...!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh... Applejack, the princess is looking for a little advice on how to fit in around here.

speaker: Applejack
content: "Fit in"? Really?

speaker: Applejack
content: I mean... that's easy! All you gotta do is have the right attitude. Loosen up a bit, be positive, play a few games, have some fun.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Fun? What is this "fun" thou speakest of? Pray tell, what purpose do these serve?

speaker: Cherry Berry
content: Try to land the sp-sp-spiders on the web.

speaker: Applejack
content: You can do it, princess!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Ha! Your princess enjoys this "fun"! In what other ways may we experience it?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fire away, princess!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Ha ha! The fun has been doubled!

speaker: Applejack
content: Why don't you try bobbin' for apples? We got the best apples in Equestria here, princess.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: I ask that thou call us... me... Luna, fair Applejack. Hear me, villagers! All of you! Call me Luna!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Show me to these bobbing apples.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hey, gals. Anypony seen Pip? We lost him the last time we had to run<U+0096> Aaah! Nightmare Moon is gobbling Pipsqueak! Everypony run!

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Help! My backside has been gobbled!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: 'Tis a lie! Thy backside is whole and ungobbled, thou ungrateful whelp! Fair villagers, please do not back away. Let us join together in... fun!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Not enough fun for you? What say you to this?!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Huzzah! How many points do I receive?

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Do not run away!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: As your princess, we command you!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Be still!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess, remember! Watch the screaming!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: No, Twilight Sparkle! We must use the traditional royal Canterlot voice for what we are about to say. Since you choose to fear your princess rather than love her, and dishonor her with this insulting celebration, we decree that Nightmare Night shall be canceled! Forever!

speaker: Applejack
content: Shoot. We had everything goin' our way. Luna was happy, everypony in town was happy, now look at 'em.

speaker: Noi
content: But I wanted to be a zombie next year.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's not over yet.

speaker: Applejack
content: What are you gonna do?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm going to do what I do best. Lecture her!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess?

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Leave me be, Twilight Sparkle.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess, I'm sorry it hasn't worked out how we wanted. But you have to believe me when I tell you that Nightmare Night is one of the most popular celebrations we have.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Yes. I can tell. By all the adoring shrieks of the children as they run away.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No! No shrieking. No screaming or squealing either. Okay?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Okay.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There's something I want you to see. And I promise that it's safe, but you really, really, really can't shriek. Do you promise not to shriek?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie, you remember Princess Luna, right?

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Ah. The ringleader of the frightened children. Hast thou come to make peace?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rainbow!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: She's changed, Pinkie! She's not evil or scary anymore! And she definitely doesn't want to gobble you up!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Well, duh.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Huh?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I know that. Sheesh, Twilight. I'm almost as big as her, how's she gonna gobble me up?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: So why do you keep running away and screaming?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Sometimes it's just really fun to be scared!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fun? Pinkie Pie, you're a genius!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess Luna! I've finally figured out why you're having so much trouble being liked!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Forgive me if I withhold my enthusiasm.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Come with me. I'll explain everything on the way.

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Gosh. I never thought my very first Nightmare Night would be my very last.

speaker: Zecora
content: Come, little Pip. Now don't you fret. Nightmare Night's not over yet. We still have candy left to give, so Nightmare Moon might let us live.

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: Yes. Come on, little ponies. What's Nightmare Night without the annual candy offering? You don't want Nightmare Moon to gobble you up, do you?

speaker: Spike
content: Aw, the rainbow wig just kills it for me.

speaker: Applejack
content: Come on, kids! Doesn't that sound like fun?

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Goodbye, Nightmare Night. Forever.

speaker: Nightmare Moon
content: Citizens of Ponyville! You were wise to bring this candy to me. I am pleased with your offering. So pleased that I may just eat it... instead of eating you!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: I am not certain that did what you meant for it to do, Twilight Sparkle.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Just wait.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: For what? For... for them to scream some more?

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Um... Princess Luna. I know there's not gonna be any more Nightmare Night, but do you suppose maybe you could come back next year and scare us again anyway?

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Child. Art thou saying that thou... likest me to scare you?

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: It's really fun! Scary, but fun!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: It... is?

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Yeah! Nightmare Night is my favorite night of the year.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Well then. We shall have to bring Nightmare Night back!

speaker: Pipsqueak
content: Whoa! You're my favorite princess ever! She said yes, guys!

speaker: Foals
content: YAY!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: See? They really do like you, princess.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Can it be true? Oh, most wonderful of -- I mean... Oh, most wonderful of nights.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Dear Princess Celestia,

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: When you first sent me to Ponyville, I didn't know anything about friendship. I met somepony tonight who was having the same problem -- your sister, Princess Luna! She taught me that one of the best things you can do with friendship is to give it to others, and help them find it themselves! And I'm happy to report that all of Ponyville has learned that even if somepony seems a little intimidating, even scary, when you offer them your friendship, you'll discover a whole new pony underneath. And even if my Star Swirl the Bearded costume didn't go over, this still turned out to be the best Nightmare Night ever!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Rarity! Rrgh, you ruined the surprise! I was gonna serve you breakfast in bed!

speaker: Hondo Flanks
content: Well! G'mornin', Rarity!

speaker: Rarity
content: Father! Mother!

speaker: Hondo Flanks
content: I'll have you know that Sweetie Belle here cooked this yummy lookin' breakfast all on her own.

speaker: Rarity
content: I... figured. I didn't know you could burn juice.

speaker: Cookie Crumbles
content: I've been giving her lessons. I wouldn't be surprised if she's got a cutie mark in fancy cooking by the time we get back from our vacation.

speaker: Rarity
content: Vacation? Is that this week? As in 'starting this very instant' this week?! Uurh. Let me guess: apple sauce?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Nope. Toast! We're gonna have the bestest time two sisters could ever have! I'm gonna go grab my stuff from Dad's wagon.

speaker: Rarity
content: So, now, when you say 'a week'... is that, um, seven whole days?

speaker: Cookie Crumbles
content: And six nights, I know! Such a short time to spend with your little sis.

speaker: Hondo Flanks
content: You gonna eat that?

speaker: Rarity
content: But I've got such a long to-do list. Oh well, I suppose 'spend time with your sister' will just have to be added to the list.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Just a few necessities.

speaker: Rarity
content: Now, let's get that kitchen all cleaned up.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Cleaned up? But we haven't even eaten yet.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well now, Sweetie Belle, I appreciate the gesture, but we simply can't eat this breakfast; it's burnt.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: It's not that burnt.

speaker: Rarity
content: Never fear, my dear, I'll get a proper breakfast going.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Can I help?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, er, of course, er, in one moment, Sweetie Belle. Let me just get things started.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Rarity! I thought you said I was gonna help!

speaker: Rarity
content: You are! You... can... put the garnish on the plates.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: You mean this parsley?

speaker: Rarity
content: Okay, now, easy! It has to be just right! No need to rush. No! That's too slow. Careful! Back up! Looking for perfection here...

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Whoa, whoa!

speaker: Rarity
content: Not... bad.

speaker: Rarity
content: There are some things I must attend to. Can you take the dirty towels to the laundry room?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: No problem, I'll make myself useful!

speaker: Rarity
content: Sweetie Belle!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I told you I'd make myself useful. Surprised?

speaker: Rarity
content: Am I? You washed my incredibly expensive one-of-a-kind designer crocheted wool sweater! Do you know how hard these things are to come by?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: What's the big deal?

speaker: Rarity
content: The big deal is that in the heat of the sun, wool... shrinks.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Oh. Sorry.

speaker: Rarity
content: Nng... Well. Back to work. I must create.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Sorry?

speaker: Rarity
content: Huh. Stay out of trouble, okay? Please?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I just wanted to do something nice for my sister.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Raargh, I'm so bored! When is Rarity gonna finish her work?

speaker: Rarity
content: Stay out of trouble, okay?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I never got in trouble for drawing. Hmm. This needs something...

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Hi, Rarity! I made a special drawing for y<U+0096>

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh no! Did you use these gems?!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Well, yes, but I know you'll have more in your work room...

speaker: Rarity
content: But, but these are extremely rare baby blue sapphires! I need them for an outfit for an extremely important client!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Oh. Sorry.

speaker: Rarity
content: Sweetie Belle, what am I going to do with you?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Oh! We could paint together, we could ride bikes, play chess, sing a song, catch frogs, pillow fight<U+0096>

speaker: Rarity
content: That's not what I meant!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Oh.

speaker: Rarity
content: Now I have to go and find some more of these gems!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I'll go with you and help!

speaker: Rarity
content: No! No thank you. You can help by picking up these papers and stacking them, neatly. Put the pens and pencils back exactly where you found them, and please find something to do that doesn't create a large mess for me to clean up!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Geez Louise, can't I do anything right?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Surprise!

speaker: Rarity
content: My- ee- bleh- My inspiration room! What did you do? What did you do?!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: When I saw the big mess in your room, I thought I'd clean it up for you.

speaker: Rarity
content: This wasn't a mess! It was organized chaos! I was just about finished planning my new fashion line, and, and you, you, you went and, and you<U+0096> and you put everything away!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: But every time I make a mess, you get upset!

speaker: Rarity
content: But this was my mess in my house! And now I have to start from scratch!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: But, I thought it would make you happy!

speaker: Rarity
content: Happy?! Happy?! I<U+0096> I just need some time alone. Hm!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: How's the sleepover at Rarity's goin'?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Why, it's smashing!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Huh?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I just wish we could do something special together that didn't include me goofing anything up.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: The Sisterhooves Social! Applejack an' I do it every year! You an' Rarity can compete against other sister teams in all these neat events!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: That sounds like the perfect way for us to hang out! Rarity will think it's an excellent idea.

speaker: Rarity
content: What a ridiculous idea. A contest at Sweet Apple Acres? It doesn't sound... very... clean.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: So, what, now you're back to hating messes?

speaker: Rarity
content: Sweetie Belle, watch your tone! I am still your big sister.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Right! And any sister who cares about her sister goes!

speaker: Rarity
content: Sweetie Belle...! Honestly! Playing silly little games in the dirt is just... uncouth! With or without a sister.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Well then! Maybe, maybe I'll try the Sisterhooves Social without a sister! In fact, I think I'll try the rest of my life without a sister!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, I'm the one who's ruining your life?! Really?! Have you looked around this place? I'm the one who'd be better off with no sister!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Well it looks like we finally agree on something! Neither of us needs a sister!

speaker: Rarity
content: Deal!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Deal! Goodbye, un-sister!

speaker: Rarity
content: Hmph!

speaker: Applejack
content: 'Uncouth'? She said the Sisterhooves Social was 'uncouth'?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Yeah! Uncouth? Wait. What's uncouth?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: It's not just the Social. She thinks I'm uncouth.

speaker: Applejack
content: Honey, Rarity thinks everything's uncouth.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: What's uncouth?

speaker: Applejack
content: It means uncivil. Y'know, bad mannered?

speaker: Applejack
content: Exactly. Sweetie Belle, just give Rarity some time. She'll come around. Sisters always do.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Not sisters like Rarity.

speaker: Applejack
content: Come on, now. Apple Bloom and I got some chores to finish up on. Maybe you can help!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: You sure you want me to help? I just mess everything up!

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, come on, that's just stinkin' thinkin'. Watch!

speaker: Applejack
content: Good catch there, Apple Bloom! Whoo!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: This is a chore?

speaker: Applejack
content: Since we can't sell the bruised apples, we gotta collect them all for the pigs to eat.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: It's a lot of work, so we make a game of it. Wanna try?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Um, okay. Ow! You're right, it is hard work.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: That's why we do it...

speaker: Applejack and Apple Bloom
content: Together!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Huh, Rarity never wants to do chores together.

speaker: Rarity
content: Ugh, all that work ruined, thanks to Sweetie Belle. Oh my. It's usually a big mess in here. Id-ee-a! This is genius! I shall call it 'full spectrum fashions'! If Sweetie Belle hadn't<U+0096> Well, no matter. She still shouldn't have touched my things without permission. Hm!

speaker: Applejack
content: Apple Bloom! You're up!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: You're... making... grape juice? Rarity would call the fashion police on me if I got grape juice anywhere near her precious outfits.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Well, that's silly!

speaker: Applejack
content: Apple Bloom...

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Please, Applejack, she didn't mean<U+0096>

speaker: Applejack
content: How d'you like them grapes, y'little whippersnapper!

speaker: Rarity
content: Now to get these fabrics washed for my fabulous new line. Ooh, my favorite sweater... I just can't believe that Sweetie Belle.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Opal-wopal! It's as if Sweetie Belle knew the sweater was perfect for you. And Sweetie Belle should consider herself perfectly lucky that this thoughtless mishap turned out all right. Hm.

speaker: Applejack
content: Apple Bloom!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Got it, sis!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Wow. It's as if they were just one pony.

speaker: Applejack and Apple Bloom
content: Yee-haw!

speaker: Applejack
content: Way to corral some critters, sis!

speaker: Sheep
content: You coulda just a-a-a-asked.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Rarity never high-hoofs me.

speaker: Rarity
content: Perfect! Just one more, and this ensemble is fini! Rrgh, Sweetie Belle! Where's her silly little arts and crafts project?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Sweetie Belle! My one and only sister! What have I done? All the time I could have spent with you was wasted complaining and wishing you were gone! Woe is me! No! I must get her back! I must! As Celestia is my witness, I shall never be sisterless again!

speaker: Rarity
content: Sweetie Belle! Oh, I have been galloping all over looking for you. I<U+0096>

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Oh hello, un-sister. What are you doing here? Better be careful, you might get some dust on you.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Sweetie Belle, I want to apologize. I am not better off without a sister.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I'm not better off without a sister either. Spending the day with Applejack and Apple Bloom made me realize that.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Sweetie, you don't know how happy I am to hear<U+0096>

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: And that's why I'm adopting Applejack as my big sister!

speaker: Rarity
content: What?!

speaker: Applejack
content: What?!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: What?!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: A sister is someone who loves and takes care of another sister. Applejack's a real sister.

speaker: Applejack
content: H-Hold on, Sweetie Belle. Don't get ahead of yourself here.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Besides, she's my big sister!

speaker: Applejack
content: Yeah, um<U+0096>

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Or maybe she should be your sister, so she could teach you what a good sister is supposed to be!

speaker: Applejack
content: Heh, um, actually, I<U+0096>

speaker: Rarity
content: But I don't need lessons on being a good sister, I-I promise! Listen! I'll show you how to cook my favorite quiche! Or, or, I'll show you the proper way to beautify your mane. Won't that be fun? Hm?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Hm! You want me to go home with you, so we can do what you wanna do?

speaker: Rarity
content: Uh... yes?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Just forget it!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: We're still sisters, right?

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, that apology went swimmingly. Applejack, why do you have to be so good and make me look so bad?

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh Rarity, once again you're thinkin' about yourself. Bein' sisters is a give and take. You've been doin' a whole lotta takin', but you haven't been doin' a whole lotta givin'.

speaker: Rarity
content: But of course I give. I give lessons. Reasonable demands.

speaker: Applejack
content: But ya never give in. Bein' sisters is like... apple pie. You can have amazin' apples, and you can have a wonderfully crispy crust, but only together you can have a perfect apple pie.

speaker: Rarity
content: But apart, all we are is just a pile of mush and some crumbly dry mess... I know what I need to do! I just hope it isn't too late!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Well, I guess it's a good thing Rarity isn't here. Do I see 'uncouth' written all over this contest?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Look at the size of that pig!

speaker: Applejack
content: He sure is a cutie.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: That's the last word Rarity would use. Oh my, what a repulsive monstrosity! This thing needs a head to toe makeover!

speaker: Applejack
content: It's almost time!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Well, you two have fun. Sure wish I had a sister to run the race with. Huh?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: You do now!

speaker: Applejack
content: AB and I figured since we do this every year...

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: I'd let you borrow my sis so you can give it a try!

speaker: Applejack
content: Sister for a day.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: No way!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: One. Day. One. Day.

speaker: Granny Smith
content: Is this thing on? I don't think this thing is on. Hello! What is the- e- oh. You have to say so. Confangled modern doohickeys. Now, the event you've all been waiting fer! The Sister Soci- The Socialhooves- Oh, dabnabbit, you know, the big race! We have five teams this year fer the event! So y'all head on up to the finish line, y'hear? Eh? The start line! That's what I said.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: That's us.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: One. Day. Good luck!

speaker: Granny Smith
content: And may the best sisters win! On your marks... get set... Gooooo!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: You okay, Applejack?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Applejack, help!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: You can do it, sister!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Ooh, so close! You almost won!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Thank you, Applejack! You were amazing! I don't even care that we didn't win. This was so much fun! Huh? Rarity?! Wait, where's Applejack?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I don't get it.

speaker: Applejack
content: We switched places over at the very first mudhole.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: So, we did the whole competition... together?

speaker: Rarity
content: That we did, little sister. Well, except for the start line.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: But you finished together!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: You mean... you were all in on it?

speaker: Others
content: Applejack, Mm-hmm.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: You did this for me?

speaker: Rarity
content: Us. I did it for us. You see? We are apple pie!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Huh?

speaker: Rarity
content: Uh, I'll explain later. For now, I think we deserve a celebration!

speaker: Others
content: Applejack, Yeah!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Where?

speaker: Rarity
content: The spa, of course.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Oh, Rarity.

speaker: Rarity
content: No, I-I-I'm serious.

speaker: Rarity
content: Very well then, what should we write to the Princess?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I'll start. Having a sister is just about the bestest thing in the world. But it sure isn't the easiest.

speaker: Rarity
content: I agree that being sisters is a wonderful thing, but it takes teamwork. Sometimes it's about compromising. Sometimes it's about accepting each others' differences. But mostly, it's about having fun together. Even if it means getting your hooves a little bit dirty.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: A lot dirty.

speaker: Rarity
content: A little bit dirty.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: A lot dirty.

speaker: Rarity
content: A little bit dirty!

speaker: Spike
content: Hold it, hold it! How about "a medium amount of dirty, not too little, not too much, just right"?

speaker: Rarity and Sweetie Belle
content: Deal!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Today's the day, Cutie Mark Crusaders! I can just feel it! Today's the day we are all gonna get our cutie marks in... bowlin'!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Whoo-hoo!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Whooo! I mean, yaay!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Why, after today, we won't even be the Cutie Mark Crusaders anymore! We'll be the... the Three Strikes!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: That makes us sound like we've struck out.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Mmm. How 'bout the Pin Twins?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: But there are three of us.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Okay then... Um... the Bowlin' Dolls!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: The Bowling Dolls! That's it!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Perfect!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: All righty then! Let's bowl 'em over!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Phpoo!

speaker: Sea Swirl
content: Cool! A bowling cutie mark!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: I did it! I did it! Blank?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: But... but... what about my ball?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: That bowling sure was fun, even if all I got was gutter balls.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Yeah, at least you were able to keep your ball in your lane. I don't think Mr. Kingpin is ever gonna let me play again! Hey, maybe I could get my cutie mark in demolition!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Aw, come on, Apple Bloom.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I know just what you need to put the bloom back on your apple.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: A treat from Sugarcube Corner will cheer you up.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: No, it won't.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: A party will cheer you up!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: No, it won't.

speaker: Rarity
content: A lovely new chapeau will cheer you up.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: No, it won't.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Come on, Apple Bloom, it's just a cutie mark!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Or lack of a cutie mark!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Shh! That's not helping! Apple Bloom! Where are you going?! Apple Bloom, come back!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Whoa! Ah! Ooh! Ow! Nnnn...

speaker: Zecora
content: Well, who is it that we have here? Why, it's Apple Bloom, my dear!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Ow...

speaker: Zecora
content: What has happened to you, youth? Ah, you've gone and chipped your tooth. Come with me, I have just the trick that will fix you up quite quick.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: I've tried everything, Zecora, and still no cutie mark! Well, I'm gonna be as old as Granny Smith and still have a blank flank!

speaker: Zecora
content: Your frustration is well understood, but one must be patient for all things good.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Ugh, I've heard that from every pony I know! And now from every zebra I know! I'm just too impatient to be patient. I just want my cutie mark and I want it now!

speaker: Zecora
content: For your cutie mark, you will have to wait. We must fix that tooth before it's too late. Now drink down every little drop, and this mixture will mend that chip on top!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Oh my star apples, you did it, Zecora! Golly, you have tonics that heal all sorts of ailments. Bad bones, bad back, bad breath...

speaker: Zecora
content: Yes little one, it is true, I have many a healing brew.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: And not only stuff that fixes the bad, but stuff that brings the good! Good health, good hair... good heavens! Hmm... I bet you can mix up a brew to fix... anything.

speaker: Zecora
content: There are many mixtures in this room, but none for what you want, dear Apple Bloom. A magic potion does not hold the key. For a cutie mark, time is the only remedy.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Fine. Whatcha got goin' on there?

speaker: Zecora
content: I am brewing up another mix for a rooster and his chicks. It seems the rooster has lost his crow, making mornings very slow.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Hey, I've seen that flower bloomin' in Ponyville! What is it?

speaker: Zecora
content: It is one we call 'Heart's Desire'. A dash will ignite the rooster's fire. With Heart's Desire, his talent comes into view, and he'll give a mighty cock-a-doodle-doo!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Zowie! Heart's Desire, huh?

speaker: Zecora
content: Ay me, but what is this? I have run out of amethyst. I must go get this purple flower for my brew to have full power!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Yeah, you go, you go.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I'm so hungry.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Yeah, I can't wai--

speaker: Scootaloo and Sweetie Belle
content: Aah! Apple Bloom! You got your cutie mark!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Um, Apple Bloom... what is it?

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Yeah! Is it an 'o'? Is your talent spelling?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Or is it a ring? Are you a jewelry maker?

speaker: Twist
content: Or is it a powdered donut? 'Cause that sounds delicious.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: No, it's a loop-de-hoop!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: A what now?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: A loop-de-hoop! 'Least, that's what I always called it. Applejack made it for me from an old rain barrel when I was littler! Who woulda thought that loop-de-hoop would end up bein' my special talent?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Wow, Apple Bloom, that's amazing!

speaker: Diamond Tiara
content: That's it? That's your talent?

speaker: Silver Spoon
content: Spinning a hoop around your waist? Puh-lease.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Oh, you ain't seen nothin' yet.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Apple Bloom, you're super-duper-loop-de-hooper!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Thanks, everypony!

speaker: Cheerilee
content: All right, my little ponies, time for class!

speaker: Cheerilee
content: Apple Bloom?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Yes, Miss Cheerilee?

speaker: Cheerilee
content: I want you to take your loop-de-hoop into the yard... and give us all a lesson in your amazing loop-de-hooping!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Don't worry, gals. Keep at it and you might get to be half as good as me!

speaker: Diamond Tiara and Silver Spoon
content: Grr...

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Great job, girls!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: You're too kind, Apple Bloom.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Yeah, we stink.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Nah, you just need a little practice. Soon you'll be able to... hoop and bop! Hoop and hop! Hoop and skip! And hoop and flip!

speaker: Cheerilee
content: Show us some more, Apple Bloom.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Well, all right, just a few more tricks. But be warned! These are advanced moves, not for beginners. Got that, Diamond Tiara?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: I call this one the hoop-la! Huh? Oof!

speaker: Diamond Tiara
content: Another cutie mark? Hah! I guess that last trick was a lot of hoopla. Those cutie marks are fake!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: What? No they're not!

speaker: Diamond Tiara
content: Miss Cheerilee, have you ever heard of a pony with two cutie marks?

speaker: Cheerilee
content: I must say that I never have, but maybe Apple Bloom has two special talents!

speaker: Silver Spoon
content: Oh yeah? Then let's see you do that!

speaker: Snips
content: Spin plates!

speaker: Snails
content: Yeah!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Two cutie marks?

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Two talents?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Aw yeah!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Our friend is the most...

speaker: Scootaloo and Sweetie Belle
content: ...special pony ever!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Alright, everypony, You ready for a real show?

speaker: Applejack
content: Yee-haw, little sis! Congratulations on gettin' not just one, but two cutie marks! We're mighty proud of you, right, Big McIntosh?

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Eeyup.

speaker: Applejack
content: I've never seen anythin' like it. Have you, Big Mac?

speaker: Big McIntosh
