speaker: Spike
content: Once upon a time, long before the peaceful rule of Celestia, and before ponies discovered our beautiful land of Equestria, ponies did not know harmony. It was a strange and dark time. A time when ponies were torn apart... by hatred!

speaker: Spike
content: I know. Can you believe it? During this frightful age, each of the three tribes <U+0096> the Pegasi, the unicorns, and the Earth ponies <U+0096> cared not for what befell the other tribes, but only for their own welfare. In those troubled times, as now, the Pegasi were the stewards of the weather. But they demanded something in return. Food that could only be grown by the Earth ponies.

speaker: Spike
content: The unicorns demanded the same, in return for magically bringing forth day and night. And so, mistrust between the tribes festered, until one fateful day, it came to a boil. And what prompted the ponies to clash? 'Twas a mysterious blizzard that overtook the land, and toppled the tribes' precarious peace.

speaker: Spike
content: The normally industrious Earth ponies were unable to farm their land.

speaker: Spike
content: The Earth ponies were freezing. The home of the Pegasi fared no better. The Pegasi were hungry. And the unicorns were freezing and hungry. Even the unicorns' magic was powerless against the storm. Each tribe blamed the others for their suffering, and the angrier everypony grew, the worse the blizzard became. And so it was decided that a grand summit would be held to figure out a way to cope with the blizzard.

content: Each tribe sent their leaders.

speaker: Spike
content: Daughter of the unicorn king, Princess Platinum.

speaker: Spike
content: Ruler of the Pegasi, Commander Hurricane. And lastly...

speaker: Spike
content: And so the paradise that the ponies had found was soon lost, buried beneath a thick blanket of snow and hard feelings. Instead of beautiful, it was blizzardy. Instead of wonderful, it was wintry! Instead of spectacular, it was snow-tacular! Instead of<U+0096>

Eventually, the warmth of the fire and singing and laughing reached the leaders, and their bodies began to thaw. And it even began to melt their hearts.

speaker: Granny Smith
content: That's right, my little ponies. Me and my family were pilgrim pony folk, back when I was a little filly. Oh, we ventured far and wide, collecting new seeds and sellin' the old. But my pa was the finest seed collector in all of Equestria. Then, one day, the Smith family found themselves in the most brilliant, most grand, most magnificent of all cities. A place called... Canterlot. Well, I bet your hooves to hindquarters I had never seen anything like it before nor since. And as if the beauty of that city wasn't enough, suddenly, she appeared. Princess Celestia, the most regal of all ponies. When lo and behold, she stopped to look at my pa's seed collection. Then Princess Celestia saw that we were plumb-tuckered and hankerin' to find our forever home. And bein' a royal Princess and all, she knew exactly the place for us to lay down our stakes. My pa gave the Princess a mighty thanks. We quickly found that land near the Everfree Forest, and we built our first home. Next, we planted our first orchards. But an orchard don't grow overnight, and we were getting mighty short on food. Now mind you, we were cautioned about the forest, and we knew that it was not fit to enter.

speaker: Granny Smith
content: But I knew there was critters livin' there. There must be somethin' to eat. It was dark and musty, and I won't lie, it was scary. But every inch was covered in plant life, and before I knew it, wasn't I standin' in front of the most incredible apple trees! I had never seen anything that bore this kind of colorful fruit! Oh I started picking apples quick as a whip!

speaker: Granny Smith
content: I turned, and there before me stood the timberwolves! I've never run so fast in my life. I did the only thing I could think of.

speaker: Granny Smith
content: My pa and I planted those special apple seeds, and before our eyes they grew like wildfire. Why, we had full grown trees faster than you could say 'lickety split'. Then each year, I paid close attention to the signs of the zap apples' special harvesting times. How the weather affects the Everfree Forest, how the timberwolves howl when the zap apples first start growing, and how they zapped away if you didn't pick 'em all in one day! And the fruits of our labor were the best fruit we ever tasted. Soon enough I was mixing up batches of zap apple jam. Just like harvestin' the zap apples had its special rules, so did makin' zap apple jam. I learned that you gotta be extra friendly with the bees, otherwise their honey won't taste rightly sweet to mix in with the zap apples. Who'd'a thought that glass jars needed talkin' to? Or that zap apples like pink polka dots? But magic is as magic does. Just funny that way. Then ponies started comin' to our farm from far and wide just to get a taste of my zap apple jam. Some of them decided to stay, like Stinkin' Rich, Diamond Tiara's great grandfather. Matter of fact, the first thing he ever sold was my zap apple jam.

speaker: Granny Smith

content: She said it was okay.

speaker: Applejack and Granny Smith
content: Really?

speaker: Spike
content: So, with Twilight's blessing, I'm free to follow my code and serve you until<U+0096>

speaker: Spike
content: Well, until forever!

speaker: Applejack
content: Listen, sugarcube, I completely respect your "dragon code"... Truly I do, but I just can't cotton with you permanently servin' me.

speaker: Spike
content: Please, Applejack, my dragon code is a part of me! I have to be true to myself! If you don't let me do this, I won't be a noble dragon anymore!

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, well, I can't have you feelin' like you're not a noble dragon now, can I?

speaker: Spike
content: Great! Then from here on in, your wish is my command.

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, uh, okay... I would like you to... hmm... huh... oh! ...Help me take some of the pie you made to...

speaker: Spike
content: Rarity?

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, sure, why not?

speaker: Spike
content: I helped bake it.

speaker: Rarity
content: Eugh.

speaker: Spike
content: You even look good when you're chewing... W-who looks good when they're chewing?

speaker: Spike
content: Aren't you gonna have some more?

speaker: Rarity
content: I... had a big lunch!

speaker: Spike
content: It's ten in the morning.

speaker: Rarity
content: Breakfast. A big breakfast.

speaker: Spike
content: Ohhh. Okay.

speaker: Applejack
content: Maybe you could take her plate back to the kitchen and wash it off?

speaker: Spike
content: As you wish!

speaker: Rarity
content: What was that all about?

speaker: Applejack
content: I saved Spike from some timberwolves in the Everfree Forest, and now he thinks he has to serve me forever.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, what I wouldn't give to have somepony forever in my debt! I'd get them to organize my closets, and give me pedicures, and help me with my sewing and<U+0096>

speaker: Applejack
content: Okay, I get it, havin' somepony to do things for you would be a dream come true. But I don't feel right havin' Spike thinkin' he owes me somethin'. You tasted that pie. Sometimes, his help isn't that helpful.

speaker: Spike
content: Do you... have a broom I could borrow?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: AJ, Rarity, what's happening?

speaker: Rarity
content: Applejack saved Spike's life and now he has to serve her forever.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Sweet! What are you having him do? Wash your laundry? Clean your room? Help you with your unfinished novel? Mine's about this awesome Pegasus who's the best flyer ever and becomes the captain of the Wonderbolts!

speaker: Rarity
content: How ever did you come up with that ingeniously woven intricate plot line?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Just came to me.

speaker: Applejack
content: Thing is, I don't really want him to serve me forever, but I don't know how to get him to stop.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: That's easy! Just make him help you with something really, really hard.

speaker: Applejack
content: I dunno. I don't want him to get hurt.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Puh-lease. He'll quit way before there's even a chance of getting hurt!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Leave this to me. Sooo, Spike, Applejack was gonna help me stack some hay so I could practice smashing through it, but I'm feeling extra, extra powerful today.

speaker: Applejack
content: You are?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yeah, I am. So instead of hay, I'm gonna smash through rocks!

speaker: Spike
content: Rocks?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yeah! A huge tower of rocks! And you're gonna build it!

speaker: Spike
content: I am?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yeah, I mean, unless you don't wanna help Applejack...

speaker: Spike
content: I do! It is Spike's dragon code!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Then get to it! Trust me. This is gonna work like a charm!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Huh. I was sure he'd give up after, like, three rocks.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, goodness. If it'd been me, I'd have just pretended I didn't have anything for him to do.

speaker: Applejack
content: Why didn't I think of that?

speaker: Spike
content: Is this high enough?

speaker: Applejack
content: That's plenty high! Come on down, Spike!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Bad news: He actually ended up building the whole rock tower. Good news... I've got a rock tower to knock down.

speaker: Spike
content: Haha, yeah! You can do it! Haha, hahah, alright, yeah!

speaker: Spike
content: That... was... awesome!

speaker: Spike
content: Wanna do it again, Rainbow Dash? Applejack can rebuild it for you. And when I say "Applejack", I of course mean me!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Sure! Why not...?

speaker: Applejack
content: No! I mean, I don't think Rainbow Dash needs any more of your help. My help. She doesn't need it. Right, Rainbow Dash?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Bbbbrrr. Yeah. I guess I'm good. For now.

speaker: Applejack
content: And so am I! I just can't think of one more thing I need help with, so you don't have to do anything else.

speaker: Spike
content: W-What do you mean you can't think of anything else I can help with?

speaker: Applejack
content: Exactly that! There's nothin' else. I don't want you to do anything.

speaker: Spike
content: If I don't help you, how will I know I'm a noble dragon?

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, I<U+0096>

speaker: Spike
content: Maybe there's things you need help with, but you don't even realize you need help with!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: If she needed help, I think she'd realize it.

speaker: Spike
content: Maybe not! Maybe Applejack needs help realizing what she needs help with. Like... maybe your back itches!

speaker: Applejack
content: Huuuuh... that does feel... good...

speaker: Spike
content: See? Or you might need help remembering your favorite song! "The dragon is the finest creature ever, there's more to him than just guarding treasure..."

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I don't think that's her favorite s<U+0096>

speaker: Spike
content: Or... you might need help breathing!

speaker: Applejack
content: Breathin'? I certainly do not<U+0096>

speaker: Spike
content: See? There are plenty of things I can help you with, and you don't even have to trouble yourself with thinking of them!

speaker: Applejack
content: No, I'll think of 'em. Lemme think of 'em.

speaker: Spike
content: As you wish.

speaker: Applejack
content: Twilight? Twilight, are you there? Twilight!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Agh!

speaker: Applejack
content: Sorry, I didn't mean to scare you.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No, it's okay, I need to take a break anyway. What's going on?

speaker: Applejack
content: I know Spike told you that he was gonna follow his dragon code, and serve me forever for savin' him from the timberwolves, and that you were okay with it, but<U+0096>

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wait, what?

speaker: Applejack
content: He said he told you all about it. I'm guessin' maybe you were a little distracted when he told you.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Um, maybe a little...

speaker: Applejack
content: I should've realized you wouldn't have let him go so easily. Well, now that you know what's goin' on, maybe you could talk some sense into him!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, Applejack, I wish I could, but this is dragon code we're talking about. Surely you know how important the dragon code is to a dragon!

speaker: Applejack
content: I sure am startin' to.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hm, there's only one other way Spike is gonna fulfill the debt he feels he owes you.

speaker: Spike
content: Seventy, seventy-one, seventy-two, seventy-three, seventy-four, seventy-five...

speaker: Applejack
content: All right, y'all, here's the deal. Spike needs to save my life.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And you want us to shoot you out of a cannon towards a hornet's nest and give Spike a butterfly net so he can catch you mere seconds before you hit the nest and are stung by a thousand angry hornets! I'll wear this mustache.

speaker: Applejack
content: No. I am gonna be attacked by a timberwolf!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Can I still wear the mustache?

speaker: Applejack
content: When I give the signal, Pinkie Pie and Rarity will come runnin' out of the woods, bein' pursued by the timberwolf. I'll start to run too, but then pretend to get my hoof stuck. I'll ask Spike to help me dislodge it, and he will, and I'll be able to get away from the terrifyin' timberwolf! Havin' saved me from certain doom, Spike will then consider us even. Everybody get it?

speaker: Fluttershy and Rainbow Dash
content: Uh-huh.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'll do my best.

speaker: Rarity
content: Mm-hmm.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Just one question.

speaker: Applejack
content: Yes? No.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Suit yourself.

speaker: Rarity
content: We are all ready to play our parts, ahem, but are you sure you are ready to play yours, Applejack?

speaker: Applejack
content: What d'you mean?

speaker: Rarity
content: Show us your best "damsel in distress" move.

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh... Oh, well, aheh, how's this? Hooooooo.

speaker: Rarity
content: Absolutely horrendous! Okay, this needs some serious work! Now, first, you must lift your foreleg up to your forehead, like so<U+0096>

speaker: Spike
content: Applejack?

speaker: Applejack
content: No time! Here he comes! Uh... over here, Spike!

speaker: Spike
content: You said you had something else you needed me to do?

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, yes, I, I was just hopin' you could maybe, uh, sweep up all those leaves for a compost pile, and<U+0096>

speaker: Spike
content: But of course. Oh, by the way, there are exactly twenty-four million, five hundred and sixty-seven thousand, eight hundred and thirty seven blades of grass at Sweet Apple Acres.

speaker: Applejack
content: I can't believe you counted every single one of 'em...

speaker: Spike
content: You asked me to.

speaker: Spike
content: And, as a noble dragon and follower of my dragon code, I<U+0096>

speaker: Fluttershy
content: That was very convincing!

speaker: Rarity
content: Timberwolf! We are doomed!

speaker: Rarity
content: See? Like that.

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh no! I seem to have got my hoof caught in between two rocks! I cannot run away! I am a damsel in distress! Help me, Spike!

speaker: Spike
content: Wait a minute.

speaker: Applejack
content: No, no, don't wait a minute. Save me from the terrifyin' timberwolf!

speaker: Spike
content: Well, he would be terrifying if he wasn't a fake! You got the clomping on his claws...

speaker: Spike
content: ...The roar was spot on, and the detail on his face is pretty good. But you forgot one thing: his breath! You could smell a real timberwolf's breath from a mile<U+0096> Too late, I'm already on<U+0096>

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Timberwolf!

speaker: Spike
content: Timberwolf!

speaker: Applejack
content: Whooooah!

speaker: Applejack
content: Ow!

speaker: Spike
content: Uh oh... Applejack, come on!

speaker: Applejack
content: I can't! I'm really stuck!

speaker: Spike
content: No more messing around! Let's go!

speaker: Applejack
content: Come on...

speaker: Applejack
content: Forget it, Spike! You gotta get out of here! Would you just forget your dragon code already and go?!

speaker: Spike
content: No! I have to save you!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What happened to you guys back there? Thought you were right behind us!

speaker: Applejack
content: My hoof was stuck, and that timberwolf was coming right at me!

speaker: Rarity
content: Wait, you were actually stuck?

speaker: Spike
content: Uh-huh!

speaker: Applejack
content: But Spike picked up a pebble, and rocketed that thing right at the huge timberwolf's mouth, and saved my life!

speaker: Spike
content: Aw, it was nothing.

speaker: Applejack
content: It was somethin' alright! 'Course, I wouldn't've needed help if I hadn't been tryin' to stage a fake timberwolf attack in the first place.

speaker: Spike
content: Yeah, what was that all about?

speaker: Applejack
content: I know this code thing's important to you, but if somethin' like this comes up in the future, think maybe we can go back to my code, say "that's what friends do" and leave it at that? I promise I won't think of you as any less noble.

speaker: Spike
content: Sounds good to me. But, maybe let's just try to avoid situations where one of us actually needs the other one to save their life?

speaker: Applejack
content: You got yourself a deal.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Thanks, Spike.

speaker: Spike
content: Happy to help!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Don't know what I'd do without you.

speaker: Spike
content: No, really! I'm really really really happy to help you!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I love it when Princess Celestia comes to Ponyville! I got my hooves shined just like Rarity for the occasion. Ya like?

speaker: Rarity
content: I certainly do!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm surprised she's not here yet.

speaker: Spike
content: I wonder what's taking so long?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And where are Applejack and Fluttershy?

speaker: Rarity
content: Fluttershy's detained helping Applejack with a mishap at Sweet Apple Acres. They'll be along.

speaker: Spike
content: But, I still don't get why the Princess would be so late.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: She's bringing an important visitor. That could be part of it.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: A visitor who's important and slow.

speaker: Rarity
content: Maybe it's somepony so terribly important, she still had many more terribly important things to do before she got here.

speaker: Spike
content: Maybe the visitor has a deer antler, a goat leg, a bat wing, and a snake tail!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yeah, right. That's Discord.

speaker: Rarity
content: Why in the wide, wide world of Equestria would Princess Celestia bring along someone like that?

speaker: Spike
content: M-m-maybe you should ask... her!

speaker: Rarity
content: Huh?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: With all due respect, Princess Celestia, how could you bring Discord here?! Your majesty.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I'm fully aware that the last time Discord was here, he created serious havoc.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: If by "serious havoc" you mean "turning Ponyville into the chaos capital of the world"...

speaker: Rarity
content: ...and tricking us all into being the opposite of our true selves...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And making yummy delicious chocolate milk rain all over the place without a single dollop of whipped cream to go with it anywhere in sight! Not a single dollop!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Yes, I understand. But I have use for Discord's magic if it can be reformed to serve good instead of evil. This is why I've brought Discord here, because I believe that you are the ponies who can help him do just that.

speaker: Spike
content: This will never work! This is a disaster! How will we ever control him?! We're doomed!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Need I remind you that you are the ponies who turned him back into stone like this in the first place?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I suppose we can just use the Elements of Harmony against him again if it gets out of hand.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, w-w-we probably need a volunteer to run away from here right away to get them. I'll do it!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: No need, Spike. I have them right here, and I've cast a spell so Discord can't take them and hide them again. Now where is Fluttershy? I believe she may know best how to begin reforming Discord.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Fluttershy? Really?

speaker: Applejack
content: What's he goin' on about now?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Good news. Mr. Beaverton Beaverteeth has agreed to take his dam apart and move it.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, it's about time. My apple trees are so waterlogged, I can practically hear 'em gargle!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: But he says first you'll have to apologize for calling him "a nuisance".

speaker: Applejack
content: Apologize? He's lucky I didn't call him a varmint!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Mr. Beaverton Beaverteeth! Such language!

speaker: Applejack
content: Fine, fine. I apologize.

speaker: Applejack
content: Thanks, Fluttershy. Don't know what I would've done without you.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Glad I could help.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hey, slackers! Double time it on over to Ponyville, would ya?! We're all waiting on you!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I realize that this is a tall order, but I wouldn't ask if I weren't confident you could get him to use magic obediently of his own free will.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: And... you really think I'll know best how to do that?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I do. Now, I must return to Canterlot for Equestria's royal summit. You may release Discord when ready.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, ponies, guess it's time to get started. Let's just hope this releasing spell works.

speaker: Spike
content: Or... let's not.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We'd best keep our elements on at all times 'til further notice.

speaker: Rest of main cast
content: Check!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What do you think you're doing?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Make that bunny cute again! Now!

speaker: Discord
content: Oh... He's adorable the way he is.

speaker: Discord
content: You know what else is adorable? You ponies truly believe that you can reform me, and that you're putting your faith in this one here to make it happen. Makes me wanna pinch your little horsey cheeks...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How'd you know about that?!

speaker: Discord
content: Being turned to stone doesn't keep me from hearing every word Celestia says. Although I admit it makes rolling my eyes a challenge.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, unless you want us to turn you back to stone, you'll zap those animals back the way they were, pronto!

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, you wouldn't dare turn me back to stone and risk disappointing your precious princess.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Try us, "Dip-cord"!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: You think you can treat poor defenseless animals like that and get away with it?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You go, Fluttershy!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: You'd best watch your step, buster, or I'll give you... the Stare!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: If it turns out we need to use our elements against you, I'm sure we can convince Princess Celestia it was for a good reason!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, dear.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: He may be horrible, but that doesn't mean we have to act the same way. We should at least try to be hospitable. You don't mind giving up your favorite spot on the couch, do you, Angel Bunny?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, I'm sorry about Angel. Are you alright?

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, yes. Thank you, Fluttershy, for your concern. If only your pony friends could be as considerate...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Don't listen to him, Fluttershy! He's just trying to drive a wedge between us like he always does.

speaker: Discord
content: Now why in the world would I ever try to do a thing like that?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: So we can't unite and use the Elements of Harmony against you, that's why!

speaker: Discord
content: I never thought of that...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You big liar!

speaker: Discord
content: Now, look who's a liar. Anyone can plainly see that I'm not big at all.

speaker: Applejack
content: I can't watch...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: We'll be outside.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You sure you're okay with this?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I know it's not gonna be easy, but Princess Celestia's counting on me. And... I think I actually know what to do.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You do?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I think the key is to befriend him. Being kind to him and letting him be my house guest is probably the best way to do that.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And you really think that'll work?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I think it's worth a try.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, but if you need us, all you need to do is whisper "help", and we'll be back here with our elements. So watch that goat-legged step of yours, pal!

speaker: Discord
content: Wh-what?! Look at me! I'm practically reformed already.

speaker: Rarity
content: She's really alright with him staying there?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's what she said.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Personally, I think we should come up with a backup plan, in case this whole "befriending" business doesn't work out.

speaker: Rarity
content: Rainbow Dash is right. This is Discord we are talking about, girls. It wouldn't be a bad idea to have another trick up our sleeves.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And I think I know just the trick.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Discord? Oh, there you are. Listen, Discord, I just want to make sure you know that if there's anything I can do to<U+0096> uh, umm, are you eating... paper?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Well, um... I'm just heading out, so you just make yourself at home while I'm gone.

speaker: Discord
content: Buh-bye, have a nice time! Everything is fine here. Bye bye... Bye bye...

speaker: Discord
content: You like carrots, Angel? I'm playing your owner for a fool! How d'ya like them carrots?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's weird. The spell I had in mind isn't in here. Spike, where are the other books I asked you to pull?

speaker: Spike
content: Right here, Twilight.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I really want to have a reforming spell up and running pronto.

speaker: Spike
content: But what if he makes the Elements of Harmony disappear like he did last time?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess Celestia cast a spell protecting them, remember? Uh-oh.

speaker: Spike
content: What's wrong?

speaker: Discord
content: Are you sure this isn't overdoing it? You said to make myself at home while you were gone, but I wouldn't want to overstep my bounds.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Nngh... I did say that, so... if this makes you more comfortable... by all means, please feel free.

speaker: Discord
content: Oh. Well, it does, very much so. You're so very kind, my dear Fluttershy. I always knew that you were the understanding one, not like those nasty friends of yours.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: My friends aren't nasty!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fluttershy! Fluttershy, can you hear me?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Goodness! I hear Twilight!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fluttershy, what's going on? Are you okay?!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: We're fine. Everything's going great. Isn't it, Angel?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We've come to get you away from Discord! He's just terrible and, from the looks of it, completely out of control!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, but you're wrong! We're making great progress!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle and Spike
content: Seriously?!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm earning his trust by giving him a little space to be himself.

speaker: Spike
content: Hate to break it to ya, but he used that "space to be himself" to tear out all the reforming spells from the library!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: That does explain the paper eating...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: He ate them?! Ugggghhhh!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: But we aren't gonna need a spell. He's already really considering being reformed! He said so.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And you believed him?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: If I'm going to be his friend, I have to start by giving him the benefit of the doubt! Tell you what. Bring all the ponies over for a dinner party this evening, and I'll bet his manners will have really improved by then. I'll even get him to put the cottage back on the ground first.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Alright. Dinner it is.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh, I can't believe we're having a dinner party with Discord!

speaker: Rarity
content: This evening is sure to be a disaster. Glad I didn't bother wearing my fanciest outfit.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fluttershy thinks this is the way to reform Discord and asked us to give it a chance.

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, our pony guests! We're so delighted that you've come. Please, do come in.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: See what a beautiful job he did helping? Discord set the entire table himself. I'm so proud.

speaker: Discord
content: May I take your... hats, ladies?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hang on to your elements, girls. It's gonna be a bumpy night.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: As you all know, Princess Celestia hoped we'd help Discord use his magic for good instead of evil.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Pinkie Pie, care for some gravy?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You bet!

speaker: Discord
content: Allow me.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, what a cute little gravy boat you are! Yes you are! Yes you are!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: That's one creepy little gravy boat if you ask me.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, come on now, Dashie. You're not even giving this a chance.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hey! That's hot!

speaker: Discord
content: Whoops! I'm so sorry!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: He did that on purpose!

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, well, I don't know about that. Mistakes happen. Oh, look, everypony, dancing candles!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I'm not falling for that! Discord's just trying to distract us from<U+0096>

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hey! Knock it off! I suppose that's another "mistake"?

speaker: Discord
content: No, I think you just made them mad.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There's something fishy going on.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Discord?

speaker: Discord
content: Well, it's hardly my fault if the soup tureen finds the term "something fishy" to be offensive.

speaker: Rarity
content: Not the dress! Not the dress!

speaker: Applejack
content: That tureen's only doin' what you're makin' it do!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Now let's not jump to any conclusions.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Fluttershy! Can't you see what he's doing? He's playing innocent with you so you'll never agree to use the Elements of Harmony against him!

speaker: Discord

speaker: Rarity
content: Wait... what is this?

Falling six stories into a deep dish pie pan takes a toll on the hindquarters. Oh, I was so sore, took years before I could even look at the water again! Just the idea of swimmin' makes my whole body ache! Besides, these old legs can't even paddle fast enough to stay afloat.

content: Boy, I sure would hate to be afraid of swimmin'. You think I'll ever be scared of the water?

content: Aah!

content: Wow, Granny. I can't believe you were a high diver!

content: Do you think I could be a high diver?

content: Nope.

content: I know, but<U+0096>

content: But nothin'! It is the riskiest, scariest, darn-fool thing I ever did do! That's not to say I didn't wish I was still young and spry and confident, but let's leave the flyin' through the air to the Pegasi.

content: Wow, when you put it that way, it doesn't sound so fun.

content: Now where in Ponyville do you two think you're goin'?

speaker: Flim
content: Consider just how dangerous this world is! You might...

speaker: Flam
content: Slip and fall, break or sprain something here tonight

content: Now I know our claims seem fantastical.

speaker: Flam
content: Impractical.

speaker: Flim
content: Improbable.

content: Impossible.

content: And magical!

content: Now don't crowd.

content: And we'll prove our tonic's effectiveness before your very eyes.

speaker: Flam
content: Try taking a sip of this!

content: That's why you're so lucky we've got the thing for you Just come on up, we've always got some more Of the Flim Flam Miracle Curative Tonic

content: Now how do ya like that?

speaker: Flam
content: Just listen and I'll tell you that you don't need to fear Your ears will work, your muscles tone, your eyes will see so clear

content: It can make you shorter, taller, or even grow old

content: When with one drink

content: You can be young again<U+0096>

content: I'm glad you're feelin' good, but how do you know it's from the tonic?

content: I looked out at the water this mornin' and I felt the same terrifyin' aches and pains I always do. But one sip of that magic elixir and it all went away! Why, I might even get a head start on my chores! What do you say, Big Mac-a-doo? Up for a little afternoon applebuckin'?

content: Uh, no.

content: Oh, quit your bellyachin'!

content: Gee, it looks like that tonic works after all! I wonder what's in it.

content: I think maybe it's time we found out.

content: So you're just gonna walk up and ask them how it works?

content: I guess. Though if it's a genuine cure, I don't suppose they'll be too keen on sharin' the recipe.

content: <U+0096>out the door!

content: Wait a second! That's that same pony from before!

speaker: Applejack
content: Hey!

content: Now hold it right there, Mister...?

content: Shill. Silver Shill. Ooh, what do you two want?

speaker: Applejack
content: Our Granny took some tonic and we want to know how it works.

content: Granny couldn't swim before, and now she can. Just like you couldn't walk and now you can. But what are you doin' back here? I mean, if the tonic cured you and all...

content: ...Because he's part of the act! It's time for you to tell the truth! You never needed crutches at all, did ya?

content: I, uh...

content: Hey! Huh?

content: Well, if it isn't our most favorite Apple!

speaker: Flam
content: What brings you back to our humble abode?

content: You two charlatans sold my Granny a bottle of tonic, and now she's off actin' like a filly again.

content: What's so bad about that?

speaker: Applejack
content: If she keeps gallavantin' around like a yearlin', she's apt to drop from exhaustion or worse! What's more, I know for a fact that your friend here is dressin' up as a different pony every night so he can pretend to be cured!

content: Well, well, well, that's quite an accusation.

content: But let's say that it's true...

speaker: Flam
content: Hypothetically...

speaker: Flim
content: Theoretically...

speaker: Flam
content: As I understand, your Granny was a famous aquapony.

speaker: Flim
content: The star of the show, once upon a time.

speaker: Flam
content: But hasn't set so much as a hoof in the water since.

speaker: Applejack
content: Until today, that's right.

speaker: Flim
content: Well, then even if our tonic were nothing more than a mixture of apple juice and beet leaves...

speaker: Flam
content: Hypothetically...

speaker: Flim
content: Theoretically...

content: The fact is that Granny is happier now than before she tried it.

speaker: Applejack
content: I guess...

speaker: Flim
content: So, the question is...

content: Do you really want to be the pony who takes all that happiness away?

content: There you are! I've been lookin' all over! Did you find out what's in the tonic?

content: Honestly, Apple Bloom... as long as it works, I... don't suppose it really matters.

content: Well, if it doesn't matter to you, then it doesn't matter to me either, sis.

speaker: Flim
content: That's the spirit!

speaker: Flam
content: Come back anytime!

content: Hey, Granny! Think you can buck me over the water?

content: I don't see why not! Come on, Big Mac, toss her this way!

speaker: Applejack
content: Granny, wait!

speaker: Granny Smith
content: Woo-hoo-hoo!

speaker: Granny Smith
content: Uh, what were you sayin', dear?

speaker: Applejack
content: Granny, don't you think you should take it kinda easy?

content: I've been takin' it easy for too long! And now, thanks to that Flim Flam Tonic, I don't have to!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Granny, you think I could be an aquapony like you?

speaker: Granny Smith
content: Of course you can, sapling. There's nothin' to it but to do it!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Well, the Ponyville swim meet is comin' up. We could enter together! A legendary water pony like you? We'd be a cinch to win!

speaker: Granny Smith
content: Mm, ee, uh, I don't know... Bein' back in the water is one thing, but a competition is a pony of a different color.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Oh. Okay.

speaker: Applejack
content: I don't know, Granny. A swim meet sounds pretty safe. And after all, if that tonic lets you swim in a river and a swimmin' hole, a pool should be no problem at all.

speaker: Granny Smith
content: Well, I'll be a tart turnover, you are right! All we need now is more tonic!

content: Welcome, friends, and step right up! The next show starts in five minutes!

speaker: Flim
content: But why not buy your tonic now and avoid the rush?

speaker: Flam
content: Right this way, good sir!

content: We'll take the whole case!

content: "Jinx": Are you saying this stuff actually works?

speaker: Applejack
content: It seems to work for Granny.

content: You heard it here first, folks! Flim Flam Miracle Curative Tonic is Granny Smith-tested and Applejack-approved!

content: "Jinx": If Applejack says it works, that's good enough for me!

content: Hoo-ha, hee-hee, ha-hoo-ha!

content: Just remember, you two. The most important thing is to be safe and have fun, right?

content: Fiddlesticks! With the routine we've been workin' on, I'll be a plum puddin' if we don't win this thing!

content: Uh... good luck, then!

content: Luck? Pfft, who needs luck? We got tonic on our side!

speaker: Flam
content: Flim Flam's Magical Curative Tonic!

speaker: Flim
content: Get your Applejack-approved tonic! Granny Smith drinks it <U+0096> why shouldn't you?

content: Right.

content: Now, if'n you'll excuse us, we got some swimmin' to do!

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, I'll be...

content: Yeah, but mostly it's the tonic!

speaker: Flim
content: That's Flim Flam Miracle Curative Tonic, to be precise.

speaker: Flam
content: Buy it now while supplies last.

content: What are you doin' here?

content: Oh, things are going so well, Flim and Flam gave me a promotion! Just made my first bit as a salespony. No more costumes for this pony. This is more of a uniform.

content: If you say so.

content: I used to wonder if I was doing the right thing. You know, pretending to be cured, basically lying to folks about this tonic. But thanks to you, I realized that sometimes honesty isn't the best policy.

content: Thanks to... me?

content: With Flim Flam's magical Curative Tonic, my Granny can do anything! Just ask Applejack!

content: No! This has gotta stop! If ponies keep believin' that tonic can do things it can't, who knows what'll happen?

content: Maybe something like that?

content: Granny! What in blazes does she think she's doin'?!

content: Granny's gonna break the Equestria high divin' record!

speaker: Applejack
content: Land sakes!

speaker: Granny Smith
content: Now what in tarnation did you do that for?!

speaker: Applejack

content: Yes, yes, yes, of course. It's just that I couldn't help but notice that Twilight hasn't yet opened this little chest of hers. I-I-It got me thinking, what if what's locked inside is something that could help her prove her royal worth? I only bring it up because she said that she's been feeling like her role as a princess doesn't equate to much.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wait a minute! How do you know how she was feeling?!

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, my. Is eavesdropping not the way you're supposed to find out what your best pals are up to? Woe is me. Will I ever learn the intricate nuances of being a good friend?

speaker: Discord
content: Well in any case, I suppose now is as good a time as any for me to make my exit.

speaker: Applejack
content: And good riddance!

speaker: Discord
content: Oopsie-doopsie, I almost left with the little journal you've all been keeping. What a fascinating read. Haven't you girls just learned so much? I've bookmarked a few of the more interesting passages. You really should take a look! We're still on for tea later, aren't we, Fluttershy?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I wouldn't miss it.

speaker: Discord
content: Well, I'll bring the cucumber sandwiches...!

speaker: Applejack
content: Sometimes I think the 'reformed' Discord is more obnoxious than the 'before-he-was-reformed' Discord.

speaker: Rarity
content: Indeed.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: But he could be right, couldn't he? What if there is something important in that chest?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There's only one way to find out.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Anything?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There must be something in this library that can help me figure out how to open it. The answer's in one of these books. I just know it.

speaker: Discord
content: Tirek, I presume?

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Discord. You're free?

speaker: Discord
content: As a bird.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: I commend you on your escape.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Oh, I should have known you would want to have Equestria all to yourself.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Fluttershy? You're not saying you're friends with ponies?

speaker: Discord
content: Surprise!

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: I am surprised that someone with your intellect does not see this 'friendship' is but a new form of imprisonment. Clearly you've had to abandon your true nature to stay in their good graces.

speaker: Discord
content: I have done nothing of the sort!

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Oh, please, I've seen this before. But he was always weak minded. You are Discord, you are legend, you cannot fall into the same trap that claimed my brother! Help me to grow strong, and be rewarded with something far greater than friendship. Freedom. Once I've stripped these ponies of their magic, nothing would give me greater pleasure than to see their world turned upside down. Who better to do so than the master of chaos himself? Join me, Discord, and reclaim your greatness. Unless, of course, 'pony errand boy' is the role you've always wanted to play in this world.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think I found something! I've been reading our journal, and there's something interesting about the sections that Discord bookmarked. Applejack, do you remember when you had to tell everypony that the tonic Granny bought from the Flim Flam brothers didn't really work?

speaker: Applejack
content: How could I forget? It was one of the hardest things I ever had to do.

speaker: Applejack
content: I hate to disappoint everypony, but there's no way Granny could have made that dive, because this tonic is a fake!

speaker: Applejack
content: And in that moment, I knew I had to be honest. I just knew it. But what's that got to do with openin' the chest?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I've found that each of you has had to face a situation where living up to the Element of Harmony you represent wasn't easy. Fluttershy, it was when you realized that the way to show kindness to the Breezies was by forcing them to leave your home.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, the looks on their poor little faces! But I knew that, as difficult as it was, pushing them away was the kindest thing I could do.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rarity, even after Suri took advantage of your generosity at Fashion Week in Manehattan, you didn't let it cause you to abandon your generous spirit.

speaker: Rarity
content: I simply couldn't have lived with myself if I didn't do something special for the friends who have always been so generous to me!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rainbow Dash, you had the chance to fly with the Wonderbolts at the Equestria Games, but instead you chose to compete with your friends.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Sure! But being loyal to my friends was way<U+0096>

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh, my turn, my turn!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie, you realized that seeing your friend laugh was more important than proving you were a better party planner than Cheese Sandwich.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Best party I've ever had.

speaker: Rarity
content: It's clear we've all had our moments to shine, Twilight, but I'm with Applejack. What does any of this have to do with the opening of the chest?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: All of you had tough choices to make. But when you made the right one and embraced your element, it helped somepony else make the right choice too. Each of you received something from the pony whose life you helped change. I know it sounds crazy, but maybe there's something special about those objects that could lead us to the location of the keys. The chest is connected to the Tree of Harmony, the Tree is connected to the Elements, and the Elements are connected to all of us. There must be a connection! I hate to admit it, but maybe Discord was trying to be a good friend after all.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't see anything on them that would give us a clue as to where the keys might be. They're just... ordinary, everyday objects.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Come on, Boneless! Give us that key!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't think that's going to work.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There's still one key missing. The key that represents the element of magic. My element.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, but I'm sure that if we've gotten our keys, you have too, Twilight.

speaker: Rarity
content: Think, Twilight. When have you completed a difficult magical task, and in doing so encouraged another pony to do the same?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I haven't. If I had, I would have written about it in the journal.

speaker: Spike
content: What's it say?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That I'm needed in Canterlot at once!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I came as quickly as I could! Is something wrong? Is it Tirek?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I'm afraid I put too much trust in Discord and the effect that friendship would have upon him.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Discord has betrayed the ponies of Equestria and joined forces with Tirek.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How could he do this?! I thought our friendship meant something to him! I thought he had changed.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Tirek has stolen enough magic that he now has the strength to steal flight as well. Without Pegasi to control the weather, there will be no rain in Equestria. There is word he has gone after Earth ponies as well. Without their strength, they will not be able to tend the land.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Ponies will no longer be in control of their world. That power will belong solely to Tirek.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: There is no doubt that Tirek is after Alicorn magic. With Discord by his side, we will not be able to stop him from taking it.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Once it is in his possession, his power will know no bounds, and all hope will be lost.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: But there is one solution. It is only by making this sacrifice that Equestria and the lands beyond it might be saved. We must rid ourselves of our magic before Tirek has the chance to steal it from us.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: What's wrong, Twilight?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It doesn't seem that my new role as a princess equates to all that much.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: I am Lord Tirek, and I will take what should have been mine long ago.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: With each passing moment, he grows stronger still.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: And I know just the princess who can stop him.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I'm afraid I must call in another to stop Tirek.

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, you're talking about me, I presume?

speaker: Discord
content: Haven't you girls just learned so much?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And there's something interesting about the sections that Discord bookmarked.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Each of you received something from the pony whose life you helped change.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There's still one key missing. My element.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Join me, Discord, and reclaim your greatness.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Discord has betrayed the ponies of Equestria and joined forces with Tirek.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: There is no doubt that Tirek is after Alicorn magic.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: We must rid ourselves of our magic before Tirek has the chance to steal it from us.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Tirek is set on possessing Alicorn magic. When he comes for us, we cannot have what he is looking for.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm more than willing to do my part and give up my magic.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: You misunderstand. Our magic cannot just disappear into thin air. Somepony must keep it safe.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: That somepony is you, Twilight.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Why me?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: We do not believe that Tirek is aware that a fourth Alicorn princess exists in Equestria. If we transfer our magic to you, Tirek will not know where it has gone.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Do you understand what we're asking of you?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yes. It's just... I'm only now learning how to control my own Alicorn magic. To take on even more<U+0096>

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Twilight, you represent the element of magic. If there is anypony who can do this, it's you.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Taking on this task will be one of the most difficult things I'll ever do, but with the help of my friends<U+0096>

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I'm sorry, Princess Twilight, but you must keep your new abilities a secret. I fear that your friends being aware of your new power could put them at great risk. Do you still think you can take on this responsibility?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: This is the role I am meant to play as a princess of Equestria! I will not fail to do my duty!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Then we must begin at once.

speaker: Discord
content: That can't be right.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: What can't be right?

speaker: Discord
content: Nothing. Carry on.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: It is done.

speaker: Spike
content: You weren't gone very long. Does that mean everything's okay?

speaker: Spike
content: In that case, I'm going back to bed. Sun's not up... and neither am I.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's strange. The sun should be up by now... The sun should be up by now! You can do this.

speaker: Discord
content: Shining Armor, why, whatever are you doing here?

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Back off, traitor.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: The only one Discord betrayed was himself. Abandoning his true nature to make friends with weak-minded equines who offer him nothing!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: How... could you... do this...?

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Why don't you go and have a little fun? I won't stand in your way.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: What have you done?! Where is your magic?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I have to gain better control. I sure can't practice here.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, Twilight, where are we goin'?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, uh, hi, Spike. Uh, gotta go... somewhere... else.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Waaaaah! Whoa!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whoa! Twilight?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yiiiipe!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ooh!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, my goodness, are you all right?

speaker: Applejack
content: Jumpin' junebugs, Twilight! When did you learn to fly that fast?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I must have caught a particularly strong breeze... or something.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Must have been "or something", because there wasn't any breeze up there.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't know what happened, but I don't really have time to figure it out right now.

speaker: Rarity
content: Another visit to the Castle of the Two Sisters, I presume? We'd be more than happy to accompany you!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Not today!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Tirek may still be a threat. I need you all to stay here and encourage everypony to remain inside.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Getting rid of your magic so that I cannot take it from you? That was your plan? How does it feel, knowing that soon, every Pegasus, unicorn and Earth pony will bow to my will, and that there is nothing you can do to stop it?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: You will not prevail, Tirek.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Give my regards to Cerberus.

speaker: Discord
content: You meant our will, didn't you?

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Of course. Here, I want you to have something. This was given to me by someone very close to me. I give it to you as a sign of my gratitude and loyalty.

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, my! I do love a good accessory. I suppose that's Rarity's influence.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Amusing. But we have no time for such things. With the princesses out of the way, we can now<U+0096> is this meant to be humorous?!

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, no, I haven't touched that one yet.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: There's a fourth? And you did not tell me this?!

speaker: Discord
content: I just needed some assurance that you truly considered this a team effort. And now I have it.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Then where can we find this fourth princess? Where is her castle?

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Not for much longer.

speaker: Applejack
content: Alright, y'all. I think we've warned everypony to stay inside.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm sure Discord will catch Tirek and this will all be over soon.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I'll bet he takes his sweet time.

speaker: Discord
content: Or perhaps these things just take time.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: You're back! Did you bring the cucumber sandwiches?

speaker: Discord
content: I did. I imagine they'll be your last decent meal for quite some time.

speaker: Discord
content: Ta-da!

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: You've gathered up all of them?

speaker: Discord
content: And her little dragon, too.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Why are you doing this? I thought we were friends!

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, we were. But Tirek offered me so much more than just tea parties. Surely you saw this coming.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I didn't. I really didn't.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: You really think she'd do anything for them?

speaker: Discord
content: If Twilight has magic to give, it will be yours. Soon there won't be a Pegasus, Earth pony or unicorn who will be able to stand up against us.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Us? Who said anything about us?

speaker: Discord
content: You did.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: You've helped me grow strong, you've provided the means by which I can obtain Princess Twilight's magic, and now you are no longer of any use to me.

speaker: Discord
content: But you said this was a sign of your gratitude and loyalty. A gift from someone close to you.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: My brother who betrayed me. It is as worthless as he is.

speaker: Applejack
content: Surely you saw this comin'.

speaker: Discord
content: I didn't. I truly didn't.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I can do this.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: See! Ha! Perfectly controlled teleportation<U+0096>

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Princess Twilight!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Tirek!

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: You have something that belongs to me!

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Now I understand what your fellow princesses have done!

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: It appears we are at an impasse. How about a trade, Princess Twilight? Their release for all the Alicorn magic in Equestria.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: What's it going to be, Princess?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Don't do it, Twilight!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: We aren't worth it!

speaker: Discord
content: Oh, but you are, Fluttershy. You're the pony that taught me that friendship is magic. I had magic and friendship, and now I don't have either.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Enough! I want an answer, and I want it now!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I will give you my magic, in exchange for my friends.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: As you wish.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: All of my friends.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: After the way he has betrayed you, you still call him a 'friend'?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Release him!

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: If that's what you want.

speaker: Discord
content: Thank you, Twilight. I'm sorry.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I know.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Your turn.

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: Yes!

speaker: Spike
content: Twilight, what were you thinking?!

speaker: Discord
content: Tirek tricked me into believing that he could offer me something more valuable than friendship. But there is nothing worth more. I see that now. He lied when he said that this medallion was given as a sign of gratitude and loyalty. But when I say that it is a sign of our true friendship, I am telling the truth.

speaker: Applejack
content: You think that might be the last one we need?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We have to get to the chest.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Together! I think we have to do this together!

speaker: Lord Tirek
content: How is this possible?! You have no magic!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're wrong, Tirek! I may have given you my Alicorn magic, but I carry within me the most powerful magic of all!

speaker: Rarity
content: Sweet Celestia! Are you all seeing what I'm seeing?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But... whose is it?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I believe it is yours, Princess Twilight.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: You've been wondering what you are meant to do as a princess. Do you know now?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: As princess, I believe I have the power to spread the magic of friendship across Equestria. That is the role I am meant to have in our world! The role I choose to have! But I didn't defeat Tirek on my own <U+0096> it took all of us to unlock the chest!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Then it is unlikely you are meant to take on this task alone.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wowee!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: You are now Twilight Sparkle, the princess of friendship. But what is the princess of friendship without her friends?

speaker: Discord
content: Wait a minute, where's my throne?!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I don't think you're quite there yet.

speaker: Discord
content: Yes, well, I suppose not.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Each one of us has something special That makes us different, that makes us rare

speaker: Fluttershy
content: We have a light that shines within us That we were always meant to share

speaker: All
content: And when we come together Combine the light that shines within There is nothing we can't do There is no battle we can't win

speaker: Others
content: When we come together There'll be a star to guide the way It's inside us every day

speaker: Others
content: See it now! See it now!

speaker: Others
content: Let the rainbow remind you That together we will always shine Let the rainbow remind you That forever this will be our time

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Let the rainbow remind you That together we will always shine

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Let's go through this one more time.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: We've been over it like a million times, Twilight! We found all six keys, defeated Tirek, and got this sweet castle! End of story!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yes, but why?

speaker: Applejack
content: I dunno, sugarcube. Maybe it's just your new house and there ain't nothin' more to it than that.

speaker: Rarity
content: I must say, speaking strictly on aesthetics, there really doesn't need to be more to it. It's all simply divine!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I agree with Twilight. And Rarity. And Applejack. And Rainbow Dash. And Pinkie Pie. Oh, and probably Spike.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: As princess, I've been chosen to spread the magic of friendship across Equestria. So why would the Tree of Harmony want us to sit in a castle in Ponyville? It doesn't make any sense.

speaker: Spike
content: Is that new? I like it.

speaker: Spike
content: This is incredible! It's got all of Equestria!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hi, Mom and Dad!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: But if this is Ponyville, why are our cutie marks over there?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't know. But it seems like the map wants us to find out. The Tree, the chest, this castle, and now the map. How can we not follow it?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Y'know what? There's a ton of room for dangerous adventure along that route. Count me in!

speaker: Applejack
content: Aw, shoot, I reckon you're right.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Well, I was planning on organizing my baking sheets, but okay!

speaker: Rarity
content: Very well.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Um, maybe I'll just stay here with Spike.

speaker: Spike
content: Awesome! Me and Big Mac have a huge weekend ahead of us talkin' hoofball, and... and trading hoofball cards, and arguing about hoofball stats...

speaker: Fluttershy
content: O-o-on second thought, m-m-maybe I'd better go with them. In case they need me.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Looks like it's time for a road trip.

speaker: Spike
content: Well, suit yourself. But he's got a Hock Fetlock rookie card I plan to sweet-talk right into these hot little claws.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's it! That's the place on the map!

speaker: Rarity
content: Right. Let's get down there and find the spa.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wait. We don't know why the map sent us here. We shouldn't just walk right in. It could be dangerous.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yes!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Stay behind me, everypony! I'm on it!

speaker: Applejack
content: Careful, Pinkie!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: This is where the map sent us? It looks like the most boring place in Equestria.

speaker: Applejack
content: It's just an ordinary village full of ordinary pony folk.

speaker: Rarity
content: It could certainly use a few more architectural flourishes. Or any architectural flourishes.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I think it's lovely.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I don't like it. I don't like it one bit. I know smiles. And those smiles? They're just not right.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Forget the smiles. Look at the cutie marks.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Okay, that's weird.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: An entire village with the same cutie mark? How can that be?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I bet there's some sort of horrific monster behind it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What makes you say that?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: 'Cause fighting a horrific monster would be super-awesome!

speaker: Applejack
content: I reckon we just ought to head into town and talk to some locals, find out what's goin' on.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Great idea, AJ. Let's go!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Those smiles are bad news.

speaker: Others
content: "Sunny Song": Welcome!

speaker: Others
content: S05E01 Unnamed Pegasus Mare # Welcome!

speaker: Others
content: S05E01 Unnamed Unicorn Stallion # Welcome!

speaker: Others
content: "Bacon Braids": Welcome!

speaker: Others
content: S05E01 Unnamed Unicorn Stallion # Welcome!

speaker: Others
content: "Offbeat": Welcome!

speaker: Others
content: S05E01 Unnamed Unicorn Filly #1, Cotton Cloudy, "Princess Erroria", and "Ruby Pinch": Welcome!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: This must be the most pleasant place in Equestria!

speaker: Night Glider
content: Welcome!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh. Thanks a lot, map.

speaker: Party Favor
content: Welcome! Pardon my forwardness, but are you an Alicorn?

speaker: Applejack
content: That there's the Princess of Friendship!

speaker: Party Favor
content: Well, you've certainly come to the right place for friendship.

speaker: Double Diamond
content: What brings you to town?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We're not entirely sure.

speaker: Double Diamond
content: I see. Well, all are welcome here in our little village. My name is Double Diamond, and this is Party Favor.

speaker: Applejack
content: Howdy, Double Diamond. I'm Applejack, and this here's Pinkie Pie, Fluttershy, Rarity, Rainbow Dash, and Twilight Sparkle.

speaker: Double Diamond
content: And you all have your own unique cutie marks.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: If you don't mind, has there been any sort of... trouble here, lately?

speaker: Double Diamond
content: Trouble? Why, I don't think we've ever had trouble in our little village.

speaker: Party Favor
content: It's true. You'll see. Hm.

speaker: Double Diamond
content: Perhaps you'd care to speak to our founder Starlight Glimmer.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I wish everypony in Equestria was as friendly as these ponies are.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I've got my eye on them. Something's rotten in... whatever the name of this village is that we're in right now!

speaker: Double Diamond
content: Starlight, we have some new visitors.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Be ready to fight. We don't know what's gonna come through that door.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Welcome! I'm so pleased to have you here.

speaker: Double Diamond
content: This is Applejack, Fluttershy, Pinkie Pie, Rarity, Rainbow Dash, and Twilight Sparkle.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Forgive my bluntness, but I'm assuming it's Princess Twilight Sparkle? We don't get many Alicorns around here.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yes, but "Twilight" is fine.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: So! How did you hear of our little village?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's kind of a long story. Let's just say we found it on a map.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Technically, it's a Tree-chest-castle-map!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well, however you found us, we're happy to have you! We're happy to have anypony who wants to experience true friendship for the first time.

speaker: Applejack
content: Say what?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
