content: Apology accepted.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And I'm just sorry we didn't get your idol back. Now we'll never be able to solve Griffonstone's problem.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: That's what I was trying to tell you! The map didn't send us here to find the lost Idol of Boreas. It sent us here to replace it with something better!

speaker: Gilda
content: Nothing's better than gold to a griffon.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: That's because you don't have friendship! If you can learn to care about each other again, Griffonstone could be a mightier kingdom than it ever was before! And you don't need some golden idol to do that. You just need each other.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whoa, Pinkie. That was... really sappy.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Eh, what can I say? That's how I roll. Go on, Gilda! Go make a friend!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I don't know, Pinkie. You really think these griffons are up for this? We aren't exactly in Ponyville, you know.

speaker: Gilda
content: Okay, so she was really weirded out until I gave her the scone. Then she tried it and said it tasted good! That's the first nice thing anygriffon's ever said to me!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whoa, Pinkie. I guess that really was the problem we needed to solve.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Well, we'd better be heading home.

speaker: Gilda
content: What? Y-Y-You want me to spread friendship here by myself?! How am I supposed to do that?! I haven't even made one single friend yet!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No, you haven't. You've made two.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hugging! Hugging now!

speaker: Gilda
content: But you'll come back and visit, right?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Just try and stop us!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: See ya later, you old charmer.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh, Pinkie? Who are you talking to?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Nopony! Come on, let's go home and see how Gummy did with Granny Pie's marjolaine recipe!

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: I'll never understand the ponies in this town! Everywhere I went, they were all gussied up and lookin' at me funny! Kept asking if I was "nervous"!

speaker: Matilda
content: Did they forget the wedding is tomorrow?

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: Oh, maybe they're just as excited for us to be married as I am.

speaker: Matilda
content: Well, they're going to feel awfully silly when they realize they've got the wrong date. The invitations are wrong! This says the wedding is today!

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: But I got such a good deal on them...

speaker: Matilda
content: Everypony in town got these! The princesses have even RSVP'd!

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: I told you we should have eloped!

speaker: Matilda
content: Oh, dear. The caterer, the flowers, the musicians! We've got to move it all to today!

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: What?!

speaker: Matilda
content: Where's my wedding planner?!

speaker: Derpy
content: Muffin?

speaker: Derpy
content: I really messed up on those invitations! I feel just awful, Doc!

speaker: Savoir Fare
content: Hmph! Perhaps that explains why I never got mine!

speaker: Derpy
content: I told Cranky I could get 'em printed for cheap, but that meant hiring somepony with no experience using a printing press.

speaker: Derpy
content: Oh, I wish there was a way I could go back in time and fix all this.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Going back in time is old thinking, my friend. I was working off a cutting-edge theory of making time come forward to you.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. My life's work, decades <U+0096> centuries, really <U+0096> of research and experimentation, and I nearly had it cracked! Turns out there's a magic spell for it. Who knew?

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. But there are so many things that magic can't explain, where science and mathematics are the real magic!

speaker: Derpy
content: Like these? They're pretty.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Ah, yes, my flameless fireworks. I never could quite figure out how to get them to ignite.

speaker: Derpy
content: How did you learn to make all this stuff anyway?

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. I've been studying science my whole life. Ever since a particularly traumatic experience as a foal, I've been looking for ways to make sense of the world around me. Science provides explanations of things we never thought possible! Now, why did we come here again?

speaker: Derpy
content: Yeah. Oh! Because I accidentally sent out invitations for Cranky and Matilda's wedding with today's date instead of tomorrow's!

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Great whickering stallions! I completely forgot! And I still need to get my suit tailored!

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Please! You've got to help me! I lost track of time, unbelievably, and forgot that the wedding is this afternoon! Have you seen Rarity? She's got to alter the sleeves on my suit, and she's got to do it now! Oh, ha-ha, thank goodness. Lead on, my friend.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Er, why have you brought me here? Rarity would never set hoof in<U+0097>

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Great whickering stallions, they've got style! Gentlecolts! I'm facing certain calamity, and I couldn't help noticing your remarkable fashion sense. Could I have the name of your incredible tailor?

speaker: Jeff Letrotski
content: Oh, yeah, man. His name is me.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. "Me". What an unfortunate name.

speaker: Jeff Letrotski
content: No, man, like, I manufacture all of my own garments. We all do, man.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Then you've got to help me! I need this suit tailored! It's an emergency!

speaker: Jeff Letrotski
content: Sorry, man, we're just about to start the finals.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. What's this word you keep using <U+0096> "man"?

speaker: Jeff Letrotski
content: I dunno, man, but guess what? Our fourth didn't show, so if you roll with us, we'll alter your suit for you.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. I'm sorry, gentlecolts, but I will not bowl. The splits, the spares! There are simply too many variables!

speaker: Jeff Letrotski
content: Variables? What are you talking about, man? Just throw the ball straight!

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Hold on. Straight?

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Very well. I'll try your "straight" technique. It just might be crazy enough to work.

speaker: Octavia Melody
content: Do we know what they're on about?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: The way they're huddled up like that, I'd say it's either a friendship problem or a monster attack.

speaker: Octavia Melody
content: A monster attack?! Blast! I'm performing at the ceremony this afternoon, and I still haven't sorted out what to play. How am I meant to practice with a monster invading Ponyville?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Maybe it's just a friendship problem, and it'll all be cleared up in half an hour or so.

speaker: Octavia Melody
content: I hope so.

speaker: Matilda
content: Where's Pinkie Pie?! I need my wedding planner!

speaker: Matilda
content: Oh, no! On my wedding day?! Somepony's gotta help me! You!

speaker: Amethyst Star
content: Me?

speaker: Matilda
content: I need to move an entire wedding from tomorrow to today!

speaker: Amethyst Star
content: But nopony's asked me to organize anything since Twilight came to town.

speaker: Matilda
content: So you'll do it?

speaker: Amethyst Star
content: I used to be the best organizer in all of Ponyville. You bet I'll<U+0097>

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whoa!

speaker: Matilda
content: Come on! We better get to the salon before that monster flattens it!

speaker: Derpy
content: What am I gonna do? Matilda! I feel so bad about the invitations! Is there anything I can do<U+0097>

speaker: Matilda
content: FLOWERS!

speaker: Lily Valley
content: You want Matilda's arrangements... today?!

speaker: Daisy
content: This is awful!

speaker: Rose
content: The horror, the horror!

speaker: Derpy
content: So there's no way you can do it?

speaker: Lily Valley
content: We don't even have Matilda's flowers in yet, much less arranged! This is a disaster!

speaker: Derpy
content: Okay. Thanks anyway.

speaker: Lily Valley
content: Look, girls! A broken stem on one of the zinnias!

speaker: Daisy
content: Whaaat?!

speaker: Rose
content: Oh, the horror, the horror!

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: I have to admit, when Matilda said we needed this place ready by today, I was a little nervous.

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: With you by my side, I knew we'd get it done in time.

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: There is nothing like a best friend, is there?

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: Anything's possible when you know somepony as well as we know each other!

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: What was that?

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: There's some monster attacking Ponyville or something.

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: What is it this time? A creature from the Everfree Forest?

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: Did you say bugbear? It found me!

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: What are you talking about, Bon Bon?

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: My name isn't Bon Bon. It's "Special Agent Sweetie Drops". I work for a super-secret anti-monster agency in Canterlot, or at least I did until the bugbear went missing from Tartarus a few years back.

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: What are you talking about?

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: When it escaped, we had to shutter the whole agency. Every last shred of evidence of the organization's existence was destroyed. Celestia demanded complete deniability.

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: ...What?

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: It was me who captured the bugbear. I had to go deep cover here in Ponyville and assume the name Bon Bon. I never thought it'd be able to track me, but now it has.

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: Are you saying our whole friendship was based on a lie?!

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: I'm sorry, Lyra! I couldn't tell you for your own protection!

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: B-b-but the lunches! The-the long talks! The benches we sat on! None of that was real?!

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: It was all real. You're my very best friend.

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: I've got to go find a crowd to blend into before I put you in danger! I'll see you at the wedding.

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: Fine! But we're going to talk about this later!

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: I need my ring today, no matter the cost! ...As long as it doesn't cost any extra.

speaker: Jeff Letrotski
content: Seven/ten split, man. Harshest of the harsh. But if you pick this up, we win the whole shebang!

speaker: Derpy
content: Doc! I've finally figured out how I can help! Your flameless fireworks look just like flowers! I'll use them for the wedding!

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Great whickering stallions! Wait!

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Wait! The flameless fireworks are extremely volatile! Without knowing what the trigger is, they could go off at any moment! My word, is that a bugbear?

speaker: Matilda
content: Oh, there are so many things I'm forgetting! I hope Cranky remembers to tell the musicians! Oh! Oh! I'll never get my mane done in time!

speaker: Lotus Blossom
content: You must relax, my dear! We can handle anything! We once did a pony's hair during the ceremony!

speaker: Steven Magnet
content: Oh, it's true, it's true! They really are the best! Matilda, I've just got to say, I already feel like we're family.

speaker: Matilda
content: You do?

speaker: Steven Magnet
content: Of course! I'm Steven Magnet, Cranky's best beast!

speaker: Matilda
content: You're Steven Magnet?

speaker: Steven Magnet
content: Well, what'd you expect, a bugbear? I've known Cranky forev-er! Surely he must have told you about the time he saved me from Flash Freeze Lake?

speaker: Matilda
content: ...You're Steven Magnet.

speaker: Steven Magnet
content: Oh, I know, I know! Typical Cranky, to leave out minor details, like the fact that I'm, y'know, a sea monster, right? I just love that old burro!

speaker: Matilda
content: I'm sorry, Steven. I guess I assumed you were a pony. And I had no idea you had such adventures together.

speaker: Steven Magnet
content: Oh, honey, you don't know the half of it! But let me tell you something. In all that we've been through together, the only thing he ever cared about was finding you.

speaker: Matilda
content: Really?

speaker: Matilda
content: He is the sweetest thing, isn't he? All the stress I've put myself through. All the stress I've put him through. The only thing that matters is that we're together. The wedding isn't the important thing <U+0096> the marriage is.

speaker: Steven Magnet
content: Oh, goodness gracious. If you believe that, I have got a bridge to sell you! All these ponies traveling to Ponyville, putting on uncomfortable clothes, sitting through a long ceremony, you think any of them care about the marriage? Honey, the wedding is everything.

speaker: Octavia Melody
content: That's more like it!

speaker: Octavia Melody
content: Stop! I'm going to be late for the wedding!

speaker: Octavia Melody
content: Something like that might work.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: What do you mean you left it on the counter?!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: I thought you were bringing it!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Well, this is just wonderful!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: I handled the gift for Cadance and Shining Armor! You were supposed to do this one, remember?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Well, we can't just come to this wedding empty-hoofed!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: It's alright. He always cries at weddings.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: ...Usually it's not until the wedding starts.

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: Attention, everypony! Our friends have done it! They've defeated the bugbear!

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: Hey.

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: Hello.

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: So, uh, you didn't happen to mention our earlier conversation about my secret identity to anypony, did you?

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: No. I did not. And you're not the only one with a secret, y'know. You know those expensive imported oats you were saving for a special occasion? I cooked them up and ate them! All of them! It's sort of thrilling to reveal your deepest, darkest secrets!

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: That's what best friends are for.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Next time, you can just bring your own gift, and I'll bring mine.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Fine.

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. There you are! My suit has vanished and this was the only thing left in my closet! How do I look?

speaker: Derpy
content: Like a million bits!

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Great whickering stallions, look at the time! We'd better get inside. Allons-y!

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: I can't believe I lost my hair! I look ridiculous. The love of my life deserves better than this!

speaker: Steven Magnet
content: Have no fear, Cranky, my dear. It's Steven Magnet's mustache to the rescue!

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: Aw, thanks, buddy.

speaker: Steven Magnet
content: Oh, no problem. Now you get in there and marry that donkey!

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: Well, is everypony here?

speaker: Derpy
content: All set, Mayor!

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: Dearly beloved, we are gathered here today to join these two in mare-trimony. As I look around this room, I can only imagine how uncomfortable Cranky must be.

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: But I also see so many ponies from all trots of life, brought together by love. Cranky searched all across this great land of ours to find Matilda, and no matter what obstacles kept them apart, love would finally bring them together, just as it has brought all of us together now. It's remarkable to me how a story like Cranky's search for Matilda could fill this room with such a unique collection of ponies! It makes you realize that everypony is the star of their own story. And it's not just the main characters in our stories that make life so rich! It's everypony <U+0096> those who play big parts and those who play small. If it weren't for everypony in this room and many more who couldn't be here today, Cranky and Matilda's lives wouldn't be as full and vibrant as they are.

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: And so, in front of all these loved ones... Cranky, do you take this donkey to be your lawfully wedded wife?

speaker: Cranky Doodle Donkey
content: You bet I do!

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: And do you, Matilda, take this donkey to be your lawfully wedded husband?

speaker: Matilda
content: I do!

speaker: Mayor Mare
content: Then I'm proud to say, I now pronounce you jack and jenny!

speaker: Dr. Hooves
content: Dr. Of course! They need love to ignite! How could I have missed it?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You know something, girls? We are so lucky to live in this town. I love you all!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ow! That's where the bugbear bit me!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sorry!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Welcome to the Grand Equestria Pony Summit!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: You delegates have traveled far and wide to represent your cities as we seek to celebrate and learn from all the unique places that make up our wonderful land of Equestria. At tonight's welcome reception, Princess Cadance will dedicate this beautiful friendship statue made up of gemstones from each of your home cities.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Now I'd like to turn things over to the one who organized the summit: Princess Twilight Sparkle!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Thank you, everypony. With delegates from over fifty cities attending three days of conferences, receptions, and meetings, this is the largest Grand Equestria Pony Summit yet. And let me tell you, putting it all together has led to more than one sleepless night. We're so excited to have you here and to learn more about life all across this great land of ours.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And now my faithful assistant Spike would like to say a few words.

speaker: Spike
content: Um, hello, everypony! I'm here to help any way I can. So if there's anything I can do for any of you<U+0097>

speaker: Neigh Sayer
content: We love you, Princess Twilight!

speaker: Delegate 2
content: We love all the princesses!

speaker: Spike
content: I guess everypony loves a princess. Hmph.

speaker: Spike
content: Ugh!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Spike!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Spike?

speaker: Spike
content: A little help?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Spike, we need you!

speaker: Spike
content: Of course! What can I do?

speaker: Spike
content: Whoa, what happened to you?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: She's been awake three straight days preparing for the summit. We need to make sure she gets some rest today. She'll never be able to attend the welcome reception in this condition. Can I count on you to see to it that she isn't disturbed?

speaker: Spike
content: I promise! I won't let you down!

speaker: Spike
content: Perfect.

speaker: Spike
content: Not on my watch.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, excuse me? Can you keep it down a little? Oh, no!

speaker: Spike
content: I'll give you birdseed! Worms! Anything! Just please stop singing before you wake the princess!

speaker: Spike
content: Huh. I can't believe that worked.

speaker: Spike
content: Hyah!

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, hi fellas. Sorry to break up your game, but there's sort of an important diplomatic summit kind of thingy going on, and it involves a princess needing to sleep, and, uh... maybe you could move your game somewhere else?

speaker: Horticultural Pegasus
content: Uh, these are too top-heavy. Wouldn't take much to bring these beauties down.

speaker: Spike
content: Can't you just wait a few hours?

speaker: Horticultural Pegasus
content: Sorry, it's a public hazard. I got my orders.

speaker: Horticultural Pegasus
content: Princess Twilight? Why didn't you say so? Gee, I reckon they'll keep a few more hours.

speaker: Spike
content: Huh. Good thing I've got the princesses on my side.

speaker: Spike
content: Aw, come on! Excuse me? Excuse me, sir! I really need you to<U+0097> <U+0097>stop right now! Oops.

speaker: Public Works Pony
content: Lemme guess, the noise? Sorry, but we can't have a broken water main!

speaker: Spike
content: Ugh, you couldn't do this yesterday?!

speaker: Public Works Pony
content: Hey, pal, I'm just tryin' to make sure everything runs smooth for the summit!

speaker: Spike
content: But there is no summit without Princess Twilight, and she needs things to be kept quiet around here. So if you don't mind, I'd<U+0097>

speaker: Public Works Pony
content: All right, all right, if that's how she wants it! But if something happens, it ain't my fault!

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": ...Oh, lemme tell you somethin', alright? I worked forever on this speech, and I know I have more<U+0097>

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, hi. Can I help you?

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": My friend here, the distinguished pony from up Manehattan, and I are in a bit of a pickle, and we need the Princess Twilight to resolve it.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, can you talk a little quieter? And maybe come back later?

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": Oh, sure now, gosh, I wish we could but, uh, we're both supposed to give speeches about our local economies in five minutes, and we've been booked in the same hall!

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": I had the room first. And let's be honest, my speech is more important.

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": Point of order there, sir, but I think you'll find that my speech is the more important one, don't'cha know?

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": Look, youse is gonna have a lot of unhappy delegates on your hooves unless we get a ruling from Princess Twilight right now!

speaker: Spike
content: Lemme see what I can do.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Huh?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Does something need scheduling?

speaker: Spike
content: Oh, uh, yeah. Two delegates have speeches booked in the same hall. What do I do?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, no problem. Just put the hay in the apple and eat the candle, hm?

speaker: Spike
content: Huh?

speaker: Spike
content: Oh, I need an answer, but Twilight can't even think straight! Oh, my gosh, what am I supposed to do?!

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": Well? What did she say? She picked me, right?

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": Hey, hey, hey. Let's not be too hasty there, good sir. I got a feeling she went with me.

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": He-hey, if she didn't pick me, it ain't hard to see that as an insult to all of Manehattan! You know what I'm sayin'?

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": And it'd sure be a shame to see something like a scheduling issue create a nasty old rift between Whinnyapolis and Ponyville.

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": So? What did the Princess say?

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": Come on, now! Spit it out!

speaker: Spike
content: Um, she said that... Well, she said that she... she wants you to... share it?

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": If that's what the princess wants, what are ya gonna do?

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": The princess is always right!

speaker: Annoyed Delegate
content: Combining those two talks was a disaster! The hall was overcrowded and the speakers just shouted over each other!

speaker: Spike
content: Huh? B-but<U+0097>

speaker: Annoyed Delegate
content: Why would the princess have made such a decision?!

speaker: Fluffy Clouds
content: I was really looking forward to the "Don't Spend All Your Bits" Speech, but when I went into the hall, a pony had taken my seat. A pony who used to be my friend!

speaker: Spike
content: Your friend took your seat? Hah, big deal! Why don't you just<U+0097>

speaker: Fluffy Clouds
content: No offense, but I don't need some random dragon's opinion. I-I want to hear what Princess Twilight thinks.

speaker: Spike
content: Fine.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh...

speaker: Spike
content: The princess says no friendship should end over a seat. You should forgive your friend!

speaker: Fluffy Clouds
content: Of course! Oh, the princess is so wise!

speaker: Spike
content: I could tell these delegates anything as long as they think it came from Twilight. Alright! Who's next?

speaker: Spike
content: So, how can Princess Twilight be of service?

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: Well, as host city, the Canterlot delegation feels it's only right that we should get passes to every meeting and party, yes?

speaker: Spike
content: Well, that doesn't seem fair<U+0097>I mean, Princess Twilight doesn't think that seems fair.

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: Ehhh... yes, yes, very well. It was worth a try though, wasn't it, old chap, hm?

speaker: Spike
content: This is great! I just took care of a whole bunch of stuff that Twilight won't have to worry about when she wakes up! Wonder if anypony else needs the princess's help?

speaker: Spike
content: If I can check a few of these meetings off Twilight's schedule, then when she wakes up, she won't have to think about anything but the reception.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, it says here you have a meeting with Princess Twilight?

speaker: Others
content: "Frazzle Rock": Uh, yuppers. She wanted me to prep her on all the different gemstones in the Citizens of Equestria statue before the reception tonight.

speaker: Spike
content: Okay, go ahead.

speaker: Others
content: "Frazzle Rock": Um, well, I'd rather, um, tell the princess directly.

speaker: Spike
content: Well, if it helps, you can call me "Princess Spike". No-no-no, it's alright. The princess asked me to take care of a few things for her. That's why I came to find you.

speaker: Others
content: "Frazzle Rock": Um, if you say so.

speaker: Spike
content: The princess says so!

speaker: Others
content: "Frazzle Rock": Uh, okay. Let's start with topaz...

speaker: Spike
content: I'm here for your two o'clock!

speaker: Public Works Pony
content: You?! But I'm supposed to be briefing Princess Twilight on the progress with the water main!

speaker: Spike
content: I speak for the Princess.

speaker: Public Works Pony
content: Uh, well, uh, can I start fixing it again? I'm getting a little worried, to be honest.

speaker: Spike
content: Actually, Twilight still needs her rest, and her no-noise policy is still in effect for a few more hours. Sorry.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Hey, Spike. What's going on?

speaker: Spike
content: Oh, you know, just settin' 'em up and knockin' 'em down!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: What do you mean?

speaker: Spike
content: Not only have I kept things quiet so Twilight could sleep, I also took care of all her afternoon meetings so she won't have to worry about them when she wakes up.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Are you sure she'd want you doing that? There are so many things to keep track of at this summit.

speaker: Spike
content: Nah, don't worry. I got it covered. I know Twilight so well, it's easy to make decisions like her!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Oh, okay. Well, thank you for keeping Twilight's stress level down. As long as that's the real reason you're doing it.

speaker: Spike
content: Well, why else would I be doing it?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: You're not enjoying speaking for Twilight a little bit?

speaker: Spike
content: By order of the princess.

speaker: Spike
content: By order of the princess...!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: It sure is, but it's also hard work, isn't it?

speaker: Spike
content: Eh, it's not so bad.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Spike, I'm concerned you might be abusing your relationship with Twilight.

speaker: Spike
content: What are you talking about? I'm a great princess<U+0097>I mean, Twilight's a great princess! And I've been working hard to help her! When two delegates had a falling out, I'm the one who fixed their friendship! I listened to that pony drone on about gems for forty-five minutes so Twilight wouldn't have to! I moved a polo match away from the tower so she could sleep! And I didn't even eat that delicious looking statue! I'm a decision-making master!

speaker: Spike
content: Okay. So maybe I did get a little carried away making decisions. But it's not like anything bad happened.

speaker: Spike
content: This is unexpected!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: I'll go shut off the main! You get rid of the water!

speaker: Spike
content: Oh, bless me...

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: Oh, my! What is the meaning of this?!

speaker: Spike
content: Well, uh, you see, there was this polo game, and<U+0097>

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: How could you let a water main burst on Canterlot's most important day?!

speaker: Public Works Pony
content: Hey, don't look at me! Princess Twilight said to stop working on it!

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: Well, what about these trees?! I ordered them trimmed to avoid just such a situation!

speaker: Horticultural Pegasus
content: But the princess told me to stop, bub!

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: Why would the princess make such horrible decisions?! This all could have been prevented!

speaker: Spike
content: Please, everypony, listen! I'm so sorry all this happened!

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: What are you apologizing for? These were Princess Twilight's awful decisions!

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": I'm about to blow my stack on Princess Twilight, I'll tell you that for nothin'!

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": Yeah, me too!

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: I'll not let Princess Twilight give Canterlot a bad name in the eyes of Equestria! Come on, everypony! Let's go give her a piece of our minds!

speaker: Spike
content: Please! You've got it all wrong!

speaker: Spike
content: Wait! I mean, wait!

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: What is it now?! There's an angry mob here that demands satisfaction!

speaker: Spike
content: It's just that, uh, we don't want to wake the princess, do we?

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": Wake her?! What?! You're tellin' me that she's asleep?!

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: Princess, we must speak at once!

speaker: Spike
content: She is SLEEPING!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm glad you're here, Spike. We've got a lot to do! Do you know if the water main was fixed?

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, you seem well-rested.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I haven't slept like that since I was a filly!

speaker: Spike
content: You haven't? Well, at least I got one thing right. And it was the one thing Cadance asked of me. Maybe I did do a good job today!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Fancy Pants, what's wrong?

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: Don't play games with me, Princess! You know why I'm here!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Is this about the special privileges you wanted? Because this seems a little extreme!

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: The special privileges?! The last thing on my mind is special privileges!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What's going on, Spike?

speaker: Spike
content: Um... you needed to sleep. And Princess Cadance told me you weren't to be disturbed. And there was this bird, and, well... long story short, I made a few decisions on your behalf.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: A few decisions?!

speaker: Spike
content: Well, maybe more than a few, but I had good intentions! Honest! Until I... didn't anymore. I'm sorry, Twilight. I guess I got a little carried away. It-it just felt so good to have ponies caring about my opinions on such important matters. I guess I was just enjoying feeling like a princess.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, Spike, one of the most important things a princess can do is realize when she's made a mistake and fix it.

speaker: Spike
content: How do I do that?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: You could start with them.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, hi there, everypony. So I guess I owe you all a pretty big apology. It's funny. Here we are at a summit that brings together ponies from all across Equestria, and all I could think about was myself. You all came here to celebrate the things that make each of our cities so unique and special. But instead of getting into the spirit of things like all of you, I used my friend's position to make myself feel good.

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: The Canterlot ruby goes here, old sport.

speaker: Others
content: "March Gustysnows": And ours goes here, don't'cha know?

speaker: Spike
content: Does this mean you forgive me?

speaker: Others
content: "Joe Pescolt": Sure! You know, the whole idea of the statue is that when each of us plays our own small part, it adds up to somethin' great.

speaker: Fancy Pants
content: Quite. Just like how all our cities make up the beautiful land of Equestria!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: I hereby dedicate the Citizens of Equestria statue to everypony who plays their part, no matter how big or how small!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You look nervous. There's no reason to be nervous. Nothing to worry about. Everything's gonna be fine!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Twilight, tell those butterflies in your tummy to beat it! Making new friends is always fun.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ohhhh...

speaker: Fluttershy
content: They're probably just as nervous as you are.

speaker: Applejack
content: You've been plannin' this shindig for weeks. You know everything about these fellers. It's gonna be dandy.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're right. Remember, Equestria and Yakyakistan haven't opened their borders for hundreds of moons. In fact, Yakyakistan is so far north of the Crystal Mountains, nopony's even been there! Imagine the look on Princess Celestia's face when she finds out we made friends with a yak prince! I'm calm! I'm calm...

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Ponies! Greetings, ponies!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Prince Rutherford, your Majesty. On behalf of all of us, I welcome you to Equestria.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Me honored. Yaks hope for great friendship between ponies and yaks. Friends for a thousand moons!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You must be hungry after a long journey.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We've prepared a banquet of traditional yak foods.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: If things not perfect, yaks get mad. Yaks always get mad when things not perfect!

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: This no taste like yak food! Fake pony food make yaks mad!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Is it okay to be nervous now?

speaker: Applejack
content: Them yaks sure have a funny way of sayin' "howdy."

speaker: Rarity
content: They're different, that's all. Very... different.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I think they broke my record for most stuff broken in under a minute. I mean, they even broke the trophy.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: All we have to do is show them how great it can be to have friends before Princess Celestia arrives for the friendship party tonight. Now, who read the seven-volume cross-indexed history of Yakyakistan I recommended?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Um... I-I had a thing...

speaker: Applejack
content: Pretty sure that's what fur's always for, Pinkie Pie.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I know! Yaks are so cool!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie, can you show them around town? I know you have to plan the friendship party too, but it would really help make them feel welcome.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Don't worry. They'll be in good hooves with me.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Remember, we want to make sure Equestria feels like home. That means doing everything we can to make this place feel like Yakyakistan.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: No problem!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Good. Let's get out there and make some new friends!

speaker: Applejack
content: We know y'all are noble warriors who avoid the so-called finer things, so me and my family would be honored if you rested here in the barn during your visit.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Applejack and I made hay beds like you're used to back in Yakyakistan.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Hmm... This perfect.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You can snooze here all afternoon, 'cause you're gonna need a lot of energy for my party tonight!

speaker: Applejack
content: That wasn't so hard.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Wait! This not yak hay!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Well, we didn't have actual hay from Yakyakistan, but we tried our best to make it just like yours.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Not perfect! Yaks destroy!

speaker: Applejack
content: Pinkie Pie, what do we do?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And now, for your entertainment pleasure... Presenting animals, Yakyakistan style!

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Animals cute.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh. Thank goodness.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Wait. These antlers lie! These not Yakyakistani animals! Yaks smash!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Okay, well... There's still other things we can do. I think.

speaker: Rarity
content: Yes! These are some of my favorite materials. Very rare, imported from the Crystal Empire to match your northern sensibilities. I hope you'll find them<U+0097>

speaker: Rarity
content: ...delicious.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: This no taste like yak fabric! Yaks destroy!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Everything's gonna be fine. You'll just... make it up to them. Somehow.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Listen up! Tell your faces to hold onto their frowns, 'cause they're about to get turned upside-down!

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Hold your frown, face!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hit it, Rainbow Dash!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Just like Yakyakistan snow, right? Because snow is snow, no matter where it comes from.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: This not yak snow!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Seriously?! ...Seriously?

speaker: Applejack
content: Y'know... it's goin' okay.

speaker: Rarity
content: Satisfactory, I'd say.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: It could be better.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: It's not very good.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: It's a disaster!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie, tonight's Yakyakistan theme party is more important than ever! You'll make them forget all about this afternoon, right? Because if it's not perfect, they're gonna smash everything! And I'm not sure how much more smashing this visit can take!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I definitely will! I think. Maybe...?

speaker: Applejack
content: You're the best gosh-darn party planner in Equestria.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You'll show 'em a good time!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: You can do it!

speaker: Rarity
content: We have absolute confidence in your abilities, Pinkie Pie.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: It's going to be my most happy-tacular party ever! I hope!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Why are your eyes darting around like that?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie, I don't know what we'd do without you<U+0097>

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Me either! Gotta go!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Gummy, what am I gonna do? I had all this amazing stuff planned for the party, but they're gonna hate it! There's no way to make Equestria feel like Yakyakistan. They're just too sensitive! Even Fluttershy made them mad! Fluttershy! Oh... I need a new idea, and I need it now. How am I supposed to make this party feel like Yakyakistan without actually going there and bringing something back?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And this is Sugarcube Corner. They're working hard to make your traditional Yakyakistan cake.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Vanilla extract balance very tricky.

speaker: Yaks
content: Uh-huh.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Do you mind, um, waiting here for one moment?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How's tonight's party coming? I'm doing what I can, but it's really up to you at this point! ...Pinkie? Where are you?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Did you find her?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Angel and I searched the forest, but...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Aerial recon turned up nothing either.

speaker: Applejack
content: I searched the farm inside and out. No Pinkie Pie. But I did find a set of Granny Smith's dentures under the house, so... not a complete loss.

speaker: Rarity
content: She's simply vanished!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But the party! It's all we have left! What are we gonna do?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "Don't worry. I'll be back in time for the party. Love, Pinkie Pie." If Pinkie Pie says she'll be back in time for the party, she'll be back. We have to trust her. Right? No reason to freak out!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Don't worry, Twilight.

speaker: Applejack
content: When it comes to parties, I think she knows what she's doin'.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're right. Let's just focus on keeping the yaks happy 'til she's back.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Piece o' cake.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The cake!

speaker: Mrs. Cake
content: Mrs. One bite, and you'll be transported right back to Yakyakistan. I hope.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Hmm... Ponies too heavy on vanilla extract!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We've never needed a party so badly.

speaker: Conductor
content: Next stop, Crystal Empire!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And so my quest begins. I know what you're thinking. "Why go to Yakyakistan alone, Pinkie Pie?" Because I'm the party planner. This burden falls on my rump and my rump alone. If I want a great party, I gotta climb the mountains north of the Crystal Empire, find Yakyakistan, and come back with something authentic! Know what I mean?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Did we go the wrong way? Where's all the snow? Please tell me this is magical sand-colored snow. Nope. Sand. Definitely sand.

speaker: Conductor
content: Dodge City. End of the line, I'm afraid. All trains had to stop. Sheep decided to sit on the tracks.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Curse you, sheep! Thanks for you help, conductor.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Cherry Jubilee!

speaker: Cherry Jubilee
content: Pinkie Pie?! I reckoned I eyeballed you crossin' my way right now.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: How are you? You look amazing! I need help.

speaker: Cherry Jubilee
content: I'm dandy as a daffodil and fit as a floribunda. What can I do ya for?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Have you heard of Yakyakistan? Do you have any idea how I can get there?

speaker: Cherry Jubilee
content: Mark your calendar, missy, 'cause this right here's your lucky day! I'm headin' north to the Crystal Empire myself for a delivery. I ought to warn you though <U+0096> me and the boys are powerful tired 'cause we was up all night countin' cherries. Hey there! Wake up!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Counting cherries? How many?

speaker: Cherry Jubilee
content: Four hundred and seventeen thousand, two hundred and thirty-four. Yee-haw!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Whoa!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And so my quest resumes. As I stare across the endless desert, I tell myself I will soon triumphantly enter the homeland of our noble guests and return with a prize to make the best party they've ever seen. Know what I mean?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Cherry? Ravine. Ravine!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wake up! Wake up! Stooooop!

speaker: Cherry Jubilee
content: Huh?! Whoa. I was dreamin' about a ravine. Ravine!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: That's what I said.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Music beautiful. Much soul.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Phew!

speaker: Spike
content: When Twilight told me to stall<U+0097> I-I mean, entertain you, I thought there's no way I could<U+0097>

speaker: Yaks
content: Huh?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Spike!

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: We demand party! Party now or yaks no friends!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No! Just a little longer!

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: No more longer! We leave now! Yak go to train, return with more yaks! We declare war!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No Pinkie Pie? What's this?!

speaker: Applejack
content: Heh-heh. We panicked and tried to plan our own party.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: It's sort of panic-themed.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The yaks are going home! This is awful! I wanted to surprise Princess Celestia. Now the only surprise is that I may have just started a war.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: There we were, face-to-face with Falling Pony Ravine. Down, down, down! And then, suddenly... Pow! We were rescued mid-air by the Wonderbolts! And then they gave me a ride to Manehattan, I joined a traveling band, we played some shows here and there, got popular, almost made it big until creative differences tore us apart. And that's when I knew I had to get back on with my journey to the Crystal Empire, the gateway to Yakyakistan! And so here I am. It was a major adventure that took most of the afternoon. Know what I mean?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: This is it. The northern boundary of the Crystal Empire. Beyond lies Yakyakistan. Nopony who's attempted this climb has ever returned. Are you sure you have to do this?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I do.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Good luck, Pinkie Pie.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How could she be so late to the party? This isn't like her.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm sure she's trying her best.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Pinkie Pie's tougher than she looks.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hi! My name is Pinkie Pie! I'm looking for Yakyakistan. You know, faraway land, lots of yaks? Maybe you've heard of it?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Whoa-ho-ho! Slow down! I can't understand a word you're saying<U+0097>

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: There it is! Yakyakistan!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ugh. Is everypony alright?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I can't tell if my eyes are open or closed.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I think I can see a little bit.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Gah! Nope.

speaker: Main cast sans Pinkie
content: Ooooh...

speaker: Applejack
content: Look at these! Pinkie Pie's made files for everypony in town!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: With exactly what kind of parties we like.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Pinkie Pie has a secret party-planning cave?! How cool is this?!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: "Twilight Sparkle likes vanilla ice cream, red balloons, dancing..."

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's right!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: "But she's afraid of quesadillas."

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No, I'm not! They're just so... cheesy.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: ...oooooooo! No! I'm all the way back where I started! Gummy, I was this close to helping Twilight befriend the yaks. Now I've just let everypony down.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hmm?

speaker: Applejack
content: Looky here. It's notes for the party she wants to throw for her folks' fiftieth anniversary. But they ain't nearly that old! Huh. She's already plannin' their one-hundredth too. And their five-hundredth?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I had no idea she worked so hard on her parties.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: She may be more organized than you, Twilight.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Let's not get carried away.

speaker: Rarity
content: I just wish Pinkie Pie were here so we could tell her how much we all appreciate her hard work.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Thank you! Thank you! I love you too! All of you!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're back!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I tried to go to Yakyakistan so I could bring something back for my party. But at the last second, I made a mistake. I worked harder on this party than any party ever. But I'm still just a big failure.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Pinkie Pie, you're not a failure.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: What matters is how hard you tried.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Who else would've gone all across Equestria to plan one party?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You know... the trip was really hard. But everypony I met along the way was so helpful. I just wish the yaks could see how friendly and wonderful and great Equestria really is! I just got the best party idea ever!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's too late. The yaks left on the last train.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Um, no, they didn't. Trust me! There are a whole lot of sheep out there!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: So, um, do we walk back up the slide or... or what?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I never thought I'd say this, but... thank you, sheep! And now, if it's okay with you, it's party time!

speaker: Yaks
content: Ooh.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wow, Pinkie. This came together quick, even for you.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: What can I say? I'm good at what I do. Prince Rutherford, every time we tried to make something in Equestria feel like Yakyakistan, we couldn't get it right. When I got back from my adventure, I realized something. We shouldn't try to make Equestria feel like your home. We should try to make you feel at home in Equestria. And that means showing you why we love it here, so you'll love it too.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Pink pony work hard to make yaks feel at home. Now yaks happy. No declare war.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Ponies and yaks... friends?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: For a thousand moons?

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: For a thousand moons!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I am very impressed, princess.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Heh. Just doing my best to spread friendship.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: And you did a wonderful job of it. You and your friends.

speaker: Prince Rutherford
content: Pink pony, you understand yaks now.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Aww, come here, you!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wow! Too strong! Okay, okay, okay!

speaker: Spike
content: You know the worst thing about you being the Princess of Friendship? The dishes.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Thanks for taking care of that, Spike. After three events in one week, I really needed to relax with a good book.

speaker: Spike
content: It's kinda funny, isn't it? All these ponies comin' to you for advice about friendship?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What's funny about that?

speaker: Spike
content: You know, 'cause you used to be famous for being such a bad friend.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What are you talking about? I had good friends in Canterlot.

speaker: Spike
content: Come on, Twilight. Look at the wall. D'ya see any photos from before we moved to Ponyville? And look at you now <U+0096> the Princess of Friendship.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: This is a disaster! All my old friends! I can't remember any of their names right now! But do you really think that they think I'm a bad friend?!

speaker: Spike
content: Well, I only meant that you've come so far. You're a great friend now and<U+0097>

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, I feel terrible! I've gotta make it up to them! Pack a bag, Spike! We're going to Canterlot! And make a list of my friends' names.

speaker: Spike
content: Aw. Me and my big mouth.

speaker: Spike
content: Come on, Twilight. You're getting worked up about nothin'.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The only logical place to start is at the beginning.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh. It's exactly how we left it! Look! It's Predictions and Prophecies! And it's still open to the Elements of Harmony!

speaker: Spike
content: And here's that present I was gonna give Moon Dancer! Huh. Guess she won't be needing that. Hey, look! The rest of it's still here!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How could I have let this happen?

speaker: Spike
content: Come on, Twilight. Princess Celestia gave you an assignment. Nopony could blame you for that.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But look at the way I left this place. It's a total mess! Just like how I left my friendships.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I've gotta make it up toooo... uh...

speaker: Spike
content: Oh! Uh, Minuette, Twinkleshine, Lemon Hearts, Lyra Heartstrings, and Moon Dancer.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yeah. Them.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Spike! Come on! We've got work to do!

speaker: Spike
content: Have you been awake all night?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I did a little research, and I think I know where we can find Minuette! That is one of my friends, right?

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, it's not too late to forget I opened my big mouth.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No, Spike, I'm glad you opened your big mouth. These ponies have probably been suffering ever since I left. Wondering why their supposed friend would treat them so badly!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Minuette?

speaker: Minuette
content: Twilight Sparkle! You old so-and-so! What are you doing here?! Hey, Spike! Look at these wings, huh?! Hey, grab a picture of me and the princess, will ya?! I tried to tell my co-workers we used to be friends back when. But they've never believed me!

speaker: Minuette
content: So what are you doing here? I mean, I know you're here all the time, but you never come to see me. Hey! I just had the greatest idea! You wanna go see Lemon Hearts and Twinkleshine?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Of course! My old friends!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: This is perfect! I can apologize to all three of them at once!

speaker: Spike
content: Let's hope they're not as traumatized as Minuette.

speaker: Minuette
content: She did! Twinkleshine literally spit out her oats when she heard you were the Princess of Friendship!

speaker: Twinkleshine
content: We saw you at the coronation. That was some shindig!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle

content: <U+0097>ah, eh, never mind. Not helping.

content: That's not good.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What are you doing?

content: Uh, just thinking thoughts. Rainbow Dash was right. In order to solve the mystery, we had to be focused. Driven. One hundred percent in the<U+0097> Ooh! The damask pattern on these curtains is exquisite! Oh, and this velvet rope-holder <U+0096> oh, it's just<U+0097>

speaker: Rarity

Nopony loses hair in a chunk. And look at the ends. It's a straight line! They were clearly cut with shears, which means somepony planted it! Then when we were examining Spitfire's room, I smelled something on the envelope. Juniper Phoenix, Wind Rider's cologne of choice! Then, in the castle hallway, I noticed some of the damask curtains fell out of their velvet rope-holder, indicating that somepony had been hiding behind them! Perhaps after they dropped off the fake letter?

speaker: Wind Rider
content: Juniper Phoenix is a very popular fragrance, and anypony could have moved those curtains.

A cake that was ordered by a girl pony with a raspy voice! content: Ah, this is preposterous. Wonderbolts, you don't believe a word of this, right?

content: I thought if I could get Rainbow Dash kicked out of the Wonderbolts forever, my record could be preserved.

content: That's not what being a Wonderbolt is all about.

content: No wonder she's been gone so long. Ice irises are almost impossible to find in spring!

content: But Spitfire shouldn't have to miss this! I'm gonna get her!

content: But you'll never make it in time!

content: I'll get my chance one day.

content: Or today. How'd you like Wind Rider's spot in the show?

content: Manehattan! We've been called to Manehattan! Oh, I've simply been dying to go back for a visit! And now I return... with a purpose!

content: Hmmm. It looks like you've been summoned to this particular neighborhood here.

content: It's such an exciting city, and there's still so much I'd like to do there. So many museums and historical landmarks to visit. Not to mention all the libraries! But this is your mission. Heh-heh. Don't worry about me. I've got plenty of... books... to keep me... busy.

content: Mm-hmm.

content: Oh, right! She's the one you got a job makin' costumes for that designer friend o' yours.

content: But when she moved away to be closer to her grandfillies, the neighborhood lost the special tradition she had started, and worse, the sense of community it fostered.

content: Say no more! You finish up your work, and by this time tomorrow, you'll be up to your mane in ponies who want to lend a hoof. Applejack and I will make sure of it!

content: You will?

content: You bet your boots we will!

content: Oh, I don't wear boots. I find they chafe my calves when I walk.

speaker: Applejack
content: It's just an expression.

speaker: Rarity
content: So you see, the Method Mares are only available on this one day, and we need all the help we can get with preparation.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well? What do you think?

speaker: Others
content: "Chock-full Carafe": I got my own problems. You think I've got hours to dedicate to somepony else's?

content: So you'll help us?

content: "Uptown Clover": Oh, , don't be ridiculous. I run a very important oat and hay import/export business. Why, I can't spare even a moment for such things!

content: This is a nightmare.

content: Oh, not at all, darling. It's quite lovely.

content: Uh-huh.

speaker: On Stage
content: Um, excuse me? Is this where the Midsummer Theater Revival is supposed to be, perchance?

speaker: Raspberry Beret
content: We're here for the dress rehearsal?

speaker: Coco Pommel
content: Oh, yes! We've just put the finishing touches on the costumes.

speaker: Others
content: "Late Show": At least those look professional.

speaker: Raspberry Beret
content: We'll do a dry run of the play first, and then the fitting.

speaker: Applejack
content: No, wait! I haven't gotten a chance to<U+0097>

speaker: Applejack
content: ...reinforce the stage yet.

speaker: Coco Pommel
content: I just wanted to live up to Charity's example, to bring my neighborhood together again. But the park is still a mess, we haven't even thought about what refreshments to serve during the performance, and even if we had, we don't have a stage for the Method Mares to perform on! It's hopeless... Just hopeless!

speaker: Rarity
content: I don't understand. The map summoned us here to solve a friendship problem. We've clearly found it, but why did it send the two of us? Why not Twilight? I'm sure she could have used her magic to transform this park in an instant!

speaker: Applejack
content: I've been thinkin' the same thing. I mean, I can at least see why you're here <U+0096> Coco's your friend, and you have an eye for costumes and all <U+0096> but me? I was never gonna be able to finish a project this big.

speaker: Rarity
content: We'll return to Ponyville as failures! Why must this be, Applejack? Why? Why?! Wh<U+0097>

speaker: Applejack
content: Now hold on there. I'm not suggestin' we pack up and go home.

speaker: Rarity
content: Then what are you suggesting<U+0097> Then what are you suggesting?

speaker: Applejack
content: I'm suggestin' we stop worryin' about what we can't do and start doing what we can. I think I've got a plan. It won't be anythin' big or fancy, but it'll be somethin'. And somethin's gotta be better than nothin', right?

speaker: Coco Pommel
content: I suppose so...

speaker: Applejack
content: That's the spirit! Sorta...

speaker: Applejack
content: Alright, y'all, it's ready!

speaker: On Stage
content: Should we go ahead and start?

speaker: Raspberry Beret
content: Excuse me. I'm Charity Kindheart. I'm here about the open design position. I brought some samples of my work. I'm sorry I'm late. I had the hardest time finding my way here. I just moved here, and I keep getting mixed up by the street names! I had a map, but I dropped it in a puddle, which only made the street names harder to read!

speaker: On Stage
content: I see.

speaker: Others
content: "Cloudy Daze": What is that?

speaker: Blueberry Curls
content: I dunno, sugar, looks like some kinda play.

speaker: Others
content: "Cloudy Daze": Well, can we stay and watch it please? Please, can we, can we?

speaker: Blueberry Curls
content: Oh, alright, I suppose we could stay for a minute.

speaker: Others
content: "Late Show": Excuse me, but your next appointment is here.

speaker: On Stage
content: Alright. Send him in. I'm sorry, but based on these samples, I just don't think this is the place for you.

speaker: On Stage
content: Don't get me wrong. These clothes are all exquisite and well-made, but more theatrical than avant-garde. Have you considered costume design? I have a contact on Bridleway! If you're interested, I can put you in touch with him. ...And scene.

speaker: Others
content: "Stardom": Charity, dear, is that you?

speaker: Raspberry Beret
content: Hello, Mrs. Pearblossom! I didn't see<U+0097>oops!

speaker: Others
content: "Stardom": Oh, let me help you, dear. Are these the costumes you've been working on?

speaker: Raspberry Beret
content: Yes, I was supposed to be finished by now, but there's just so much to do, and I still have a few last-minute alterations to make before opening night! I'm sorry I couldn't get enough tickets for everypony in the neighborhood. I hope Mr. Pearblossom wasn't too disappointed. I know Trotter on the Roof is one of his favorites.

speaker: Others
content: "Stardom": Oh, my dear filly, don't worry about that. We're so proud of you. We shall be with you in spirit!

speaker: Raspberry Beret
content: Thank you! You've all made me feel so welcome here and have become like family to me! I just wish I could share this experience with you and the others!

speaker: Others
content: "Rivet": Eh, what's goin' on?

speaker: Luckette
content: It's the Midsummer Theater Revival. The Method Mares are performing!

speaker: Others
content: "Rivet": The Revival. Mhm, yeah. My pop used to bring me.

speaker: Others
content: "Stardom": So nice of you to put on this play for the neighborhood.

speaker: Raspberry Beret
content: I couldn't have done it without everypony's help! I know it's not Bridleway, but<U+0097>

speaker: Others
content: "Stardom": Oh, pish-tosh! It's perfect, dear!

speaker: Pearly Stitch
content: Oh, you're such a dear, thank you! This is so nice. Haven't seen the neighborhood this friendly since Charity moved away!

speaker: On Stage
content: Thank you, fillies and gentlecolts. Please give a warm welcome to the one who made this entire event possible <U+0096> our neighbor Coco Pommel!

speaker: Coco Pommel
content: Thank you all so much for coming. The Midsummer Theater Revival was always something that meant so much to me, and it seems it means quite a lot to all of you as well. I really can't take all the credit, though. My dear friends Rarity and Applejack helped me ever so much.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, darling, please, it was just a few costumes.

speaker: Applejack
content: Aw, shucks, I just happen to be good with a hammer is all. To be honest, we had much bigger plans to start. When those fell through, we decided to simplify. This here was the result.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, don't be so modest. Coco and I were lost.

speaker: Coco Pommel
content: You bet your boots we were!

speaker: Others
content: "Viola": We just wanted to say how much we enjoyed the Midsummer Theater Revival and how much it inspired us!

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, yeah?

speaker: Others
content: "Uptown Clover": I used to think that to help my community I had to do something big. Heh-heh. And let's face it <U+0096> in this day and age, who has the time for such a commitment? But here, you did something as simple as building a stage and putting on a play and, heh, look at how it's brought everypony together.

speaker: Others
content: "Viola": I saw Coco's flyers for volunteers but didn't think anything I'd have time to do would be that useful. Now I wish I'd offered to help, even if it was just pulling a few weeds or planting a few flowers.

speaker: Applejack
content: Not sure if you noticed, but the park is far from bein' fixed up. I imagine if you look around, you'll find there's lots of little ways for you to get involved in changin' this place for the better.

speaker: Others
content: "Viola": And I will!

speaker: Others
content: "Uptown Clover": And I don't think we'll be alone!

speaker: Applejack
content: Yee-hoo!

speaker: Applejack
content: We did it!

speaker: Rarity
content: I understand now! It all makes perfect sense!

speaker: Applejack
content: Huh?

speaker: Rarity
content: I know why the map called you here.

speaker: Applejack
content: You do?

speaker: Rarity
content: If Twilight had used her magic to fix the park, it wouldn't have fixed the real problem, which is that these Manehattan ponies didn't think they had time to do something for their community! But by building that stage and making sure the play went on, you showed them that just by doing something small, you can make a big difference!

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, I'll be!

speaker: Applejack

content: Oh, dagnabbit, it's not in there either!

content: Sisterhooves Social is right around the corner. Thought it'd be nice to award the winner of the big race the ribbon from when we hosted the very first Social! content: Found her!

content: Eeyup.

content: Hold that thought. Applejack, you are the most awesome sister ever!

content: Eeyup.

But it's even harder to fathom what my life would be like. Without this rainboom, I might not have gotten into magic school. Celestia wouldn't have taken me on as her pupil or sent me to Ponyville to meet my friends. And the most powerful thing about Cutie Mark Magic that I found is the connection I share with them.

content: "Tough Nut": I camped out all night for this spot! I'm not about to just give it up!
