content: Still, when you think about it, the view is just as good a little further back, like... inside your house?

speaker: Others
content: "Scouts Honor": The Crystalling ceremony is one of our most sacred traditions! And when that foal is held before the Crystal Heart, I plan to be as close to the action as possible!

speaker: Applejack
content: Honestly, I don't know if there's gonna be a Crystallin'. The truth is, the baby's an Alicorn and her magic's plum crazy, so you might not wanna be that close after all.

speaker: Others
content: "Tough Nut": A baby Alicorn? Wow, I can't wait to see that!

speaker: Others
content: "Scouts Honor": Oh, those little wings are probably so cute!

speaker: Others
content: "Mustafa Combe": I know, right?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Look, I am a hundred percent sure the Crystalling isn't happening.

speaker: Others
content: "Mustafa Combe": No Crystalling, huh? Then why are they starting the fireworks show?

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Young filly... come back here!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Come to your Auntie Pinkie Pie!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Bridle Buck's Boat Chants, Hayhoof's Intonements, Mystic Maps and Mazes... Anything up there?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Not yet! I'm not even sure how these are organized!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Shining Armor, I thought you were taking care of the baby!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: I'm trying!

speaker: Flurry Heart
content: Whoo!

speaker: Rarity
content: Gotcha!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh! Or not...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Whoa!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What is going on?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You want the long or the short version?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Short?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: The baby's an Alicorn and she accidentally destroyed the Crystal Heart, so Twilight and Cadance are looking for a spell to put it back together and save the Crystal Empire from turning into a giant wasteland of ice and snow.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: What about this? Trotter's Tome of Reliquary?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think this is it!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: "Spell of Relic Reconstitution"! I can't believe we found it!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's a good thing, too! Without this, I don't know what we'd do!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oops.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That spell was the only thing we found in the whole library that was even close to what we needed!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'm so sorry, Twilight!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's not your fault, Starlight. None of us were expecting any of this.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Do you think you can remember the spell?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I only read it through once!

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, if anypony can exactly remember something she read for the first time two minutes ago, it's you, Twilight.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'll try. But I'm not sure how long it'll take.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Is quickly an option?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: I'll help if I can, but we should evacuate the city just in case! You need to lead everypony to the train station before the tracks freeze over!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: We will. But between you and Twilight, I'm sure you'll remember the spell.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I only hope this spell is the one we need.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Is there anything I can do?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't think so. I'm just sorry about your lesson.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, that doesn't matter now. Sunburst and I don't have anything in common anyway. He's a big important wizard! And I'm re-learning everything I ever thought I knew.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Sunburst? I don't recognize the name, but if he's an important wizard, you should bring him here. Maybe he'll know what to do if the spell fails.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Of course!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You better go with her, Spike.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Sunburst! Haven't you looked outside?!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Snow? That's... not right. The Crystal Heart<U+0097>

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Is gone! The baby <U+0096> Shining Armor and Cadance's baby <U+0096> it's an Alicorn!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Really?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Really! And her magic is a little berserk, and well, I guess she destroyed the Heart! But Twilight thinks she can fix it and Princess Cadance thought you could help!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Me?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Of course! You're an important wizard in the Crystal Empire! It just makes sense!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Right... right... right right right. You know, I'd like to help, I-I really would. I-I just have so much, um, important wizard work to do around here.

speaker: Spike and Starlight Glimmer
content: Huh?!

speaker: Applejack
content: You can't stay here!

speaker: Others
content: "Mustafa Combe": Did I mention this was a Royal Crystalling? When the crystaller holds the young one aloft, all of the Empire will share their joy and light, and the Crystal Heart will beat stronger than it ever has before!

speaker: Others
content: "Scouts Honor": It really is a moving ceremony!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I really don't think it's going to happen.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Come on, it's freezing out here!

speaker: Others
content: "Tough Nut": Uh, this is the Crystal Empire. We've seen snow before.

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Not like this! We don't have time to argue! Princess Cadance has decided to evacuate the city!

speaker: Others
content: "Mustafa Combe": But the Crystalling...!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: I don't know if we'll ever have another Crystalling again! The Crystal Heart... is shattered.

speaker: Others
content: "Tough Nut": It's not safe here!

speaker: Applejack
content: That's what we've been tryin' to tell you!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Sunburst, I know you're busy, but did you hear what I said?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Oh, I heard you, but-but like I said, when you're an important wizard, the work just piles up.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Sunburst!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Look, Starlight, I want to help. I do. But I can't. I wish I could.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What do you mean?!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Fixing an ancient relic? I-I can't even come close to doing something like that!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But I thought you were an important wizard!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Well, you were wrong, okay?! I'm not an important wizard! I'm not even a wizard at all!

speaker: Sunburst
content: I know it's hard for you to understand, but not all of us end up achieving greatness.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What? Why wouldn't I understand that?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Really? You're the prot<e9>g<e9> of the Princess of Friendship! I don't think she picks just anypony for that!

speaker: Spike
content: Technically, she's more of a student than a prot<e9>g<e9>.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Whatever. I'm sorry I'm not the big important wizard you were expecting.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Sunburst, I don't care if you're a wizard or not. I'm just surprised. You always knew so much about magic. I mean, look at all these books!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Yeah, well, reading about magic is one thing, but you don't know what it was like at magic school! To know so much and not be able to do any of it!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well, you don't know what it was like to be left behind! And then getting so bitter that you steal the cutie marks from an entire village and then get defeated by Twilight and her friends, so you travel through time to get back at them, but they beat you again and teach you about friendship, but you're so terrified ponies will find out what you did that you can't make any friends!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Did you really travel through time?

speaker: Spike
content: See? I told you he'd be impressed.

speaker: Sunburst
content: I'm sorry we lost touch. Maybe if I had reached out, you could have helped me at magic school, and I could have helped you to...

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Not become totally evil? Let's just say I know what it's like to have something you're not exactly proud of.

speaker: Sunburst
content: When you showed up thinking I was some big wizard... I'm sorry. I should have told you the truth.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It's fine. At least we worked it all out. I think Twilight would be proud of us.

speaker: Spike
content: Well, if you ever want to tell her about it, we should probably leave now!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I forgot to tell you! They're evacuating the city! You need to get to the train station, unless you've got a spell here that will drive back the Frozen North and fix the Crystal Heart so the baby can have her Crystalling?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Crystalling...! Of course!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Push them back, my sister!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: This way!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh!

speaker: Applejack
content: Just a little bit further, y'all! The station's just ahead!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We have to go back!

speaker: Sunburst
content: I know how to stop this!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh, I think that's everything?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: It looks right to me, but... there's only one way to find out!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The spell failed. I don't know what else to do.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: An old student of mine believes he does.

speaker: Sunburst
content: The baby did this?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I tried putting it back together with<U+0097>

speaker: Sunburst
content: The spell of Relic Reconstitution. No, that won't do it. The Crystal Heart's been around for millennia. Restoring a relic like this is way beyond one spell. You need to combine it with something else. Something unique to the relic itself. Something that strengthens it and provides it with power...?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The Crystalling!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Combining that spell with the light and love of everypony gathered for the ceremony, together with... Somnambula's Weather Abjuration to clear away the snow... and a little Fledgling's Forbearance for the parents... Heh. That should curb the little one's power fluctuations.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: You must be Sunburst. Starlight said you were a powerful wizard.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Oh, I'm no wizard.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But he studied magic his whole life! You should see his house! And since nopony has any better ideas, what do we have to lose?!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: I had planned on asking Twilight to be our crystaller, but since it seems like she'll be busy...

speaker: Sunburst
content: I'd be honored!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, what are we waiting for?!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Citizens! May I present the newest member of the Crystal Empire!

speaker: Others
content: "Mustafa Combe": She's beautiful!

speaker: Others
content: "Scouts Honor": Oh! It's just so moving!

speaker: Others
content: "Tough Nut": Best Crystalling ever!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: For a pony who isn't great at magic, you did pretty well.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Indeed. I'm glad to see you've found a way to share your unique gift, Sunburst. You may be more of a wizard than you think.

speaker: Night Light
content: You would not believe the crazy weather that delayed our train. Came out of nowhere.

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: But it was all worth it to see this peaceful little angel! Awww, so sweet! Come to your grandmare!

speaker: Applejack
content: Yeah, peaceful now, anyway.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I suppose that spell really did the trick!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: We have Sunburst to thank for that.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: I hope he takes his role as crystaller seriously. Something tells me the baby will need a pony like him to look to for magical advice.

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Cadance, darling, aren't we gonna name the poor little dear, or are we gonna spend our entire visit just calling her "the baby"?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: We were thinking... "Flurry Heart".

speaker: Shining Armor
content: You know, to remember the occasion.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, goodness, how could anypony forget?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well, I think you're the Crystal Empire's big important wizard, whether you like it or not.

speaker: Sunburst
content: I don't know if I'll have time for any wizarding. I'm a crystaller now. That's a big responsibility.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I can't think of anypony more qualified. Just... promise you'll stay in touch?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Hm, like I'd ever lose touch with my oldest friend.

speaker: Spike
content: What's wrong, Twilight?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't know, Spike. I think I have a lot to learn about being a teacher.

speaker: Spike
content: What are you talking about? Your lesson went perfectly! Starlight and Sunburst got over their past and rekindled their friendship!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No thanks to me. I know a lot happened. I just wish I could have given my pupil the attention she deserves.

speaker: Spike
content: Well, I know she needed to be put on the right path, but giving her the space to make her own decisions worked pretty well. Isn't that how Celestia taught you?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You know, I never thought about it! But I guess it is!

speaker: Spike
content: Maybe you're a better teacher than you thought.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: We're going to Manehattan, we're going to Manehattan, we're going to Manehattan...!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Yes, yes, Manehattan, the height of sophistication, elegance, culture... Since my boutique in Canterlot has been doing so nicely, it only makes sense for me to open one there as well.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: We're almost there! Why doesn't your face look like this?! Eee...

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Pinkie, dear, this is just a business trip for me. I need to scour the city for the most perfect location for my new shop. And while it's lovely how excited you are, there's absolutely no chance of me getting swept into the<U+0096> energy, the beauty, the majesty of the greatest city in all of Equestria!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: This city's simply a-ma-zing! It's just... everything, ever!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And it's about to get everything ever-er! Because guess who I see! M-A-U-D! You know what that spells?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: It spells Maud.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Maud, Maud, Maud! Yay!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, you Pie sisters have just about the sweetest family traditions! Every year, you set aside a special day to spend with each of your sisters?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Yep! I do separate trips with each one, and we make it super fun by picking a different location every year! We see the sights all day and then swap gifts at sunset! And since Maud's getting her rocktorate nearby, we figured this would be the perfect spot for PSSSD!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Okay, what's the secret?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Huh?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: You just said 'pssst'.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: No, silly! Not pssst, PSSSD! P-S-S-S-D! Pie Sisters Surprise Swap Day!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Maud!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: Boulder promised his cousin a postcard.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Well, I'll just leave you two to your PSSSD. And now, I am off to scout possible locations for my new boutique!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Before you go, can I ask you a quick question?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, of course.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Will you please help me?!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Only if you let go of my leg and stand up...

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Every year, Maud's PSSSD gift always blows mine away! But this year is going to be different! For the first time, I'm finally getting her a gift that's as good as the one she always gets me! There's a specialty store here in Manehattan that sells nothing but rock pouches! A rock pouch would be perfect for Boulder, and I know Maud will love it!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Why, Pinkie, that really is the perfect gift for Maud!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I know, right? Problem is, I still need to buy one, and the store is downtown!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Hmm, and you want to get a pouch for Maud without ruining the surprise... Well, luckily for you, I know exactly what you should do! Why not sight-see on a path that leads right to the pouch store? That way Maud won't get suspicious! I'll come with you to distract Maud, so...

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Y-Yes, yes, yes, let's not get too excited until you actually get a pouch for Maud.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Of course. Got it. Absolutely.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: Nothing moved him.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Maud! I'm giving you the greatest PSSSD gift in the history of ever!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, what a spectacular view! You really can see everything from here!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: Especially the glaciation of the sloping strata. It's breathtaking.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: But not half as breathtaking as the gift I'm giving you!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: I-It certainly is<U+0096> <U+0096>cozy... but this simply won't do! Working in a space this small would make me lose my mind!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Just like Maud's gonna lose her mind when she sees the gift I'm giving her!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Whatever you were about to say isn't nearly as good as the gift I'm giving Maud!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: You'll be pleased with yours too.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Pinkie, put down that crayon! The Cantering Cook isn't that kind of restaurant!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh... A pony could get used to eating at places like this!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: I know. It's the only restaurant in the city with nepheline syenite in their bathroom tiles.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: ...Well, isn't that something! You know what, Pinkie Pie? Uh, maybe you could help me figure out what to order!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: We're so close to the pouch store! It's just a block away! I could practically smell it from here! If I knew what a pouch store smelled like.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Okay, remember the plan. I will stay here and distract Maud while you go get a pouch!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Gotcha!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, why, thank you for the kind assistance, Pinkie Pie. And now I know exactly what to order.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You are very welcome, Rarity! Now pardon me whilst I go wash my hooves!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Sorry!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: So, Maud... that Boulder of yours is such an interesting... ahem... character. You must tell me, how did the two of you first meet?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: It was a dark and stormy night. Little did I know that my life was about to change forever.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Look at that hand-stitched ten-thousand-thread-count velvet-lined rock pouch! Maud will love it! I need it!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ungh! Huh, must be stuck! "Took a sudden vacation to Canterlot with my grandniece. Back in a few moons." Oh, no. Oh, no-no-no-no-no-no-no! Well, maybe, just maybe, he's already back from vacation and just forgot to take the sign down! Hello, Mr. Pouch Store Owner! I'd like to hear all about your sudden vacation in Canterlot with your grandniece while buying a pouch for my sister please!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Deputy Copper
content: Miss, the store's clearly closed.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: But it can't be. It just can't be! If I can't get that pouch... then not only am I not getting my sister the greatest present in the history of PSSSD, but now I have no PSSSD present for my sister at all!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: ...and Boulder's been by my side ever since.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Wow. What a surprisingly suspenseful and compelling story. I completely get what you see in him now. Pinkie Pie, you're back! Oh, your hooves must be sparkling clean!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Gar<e7>on! One super-deluxe two-mile-high hot fudge sundae, stat!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: What happened? Did you get a pouch for Maud? Tell me everything!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, not to worry, dear! I'll just have to help you find a new present for Maud. We have plenty of time before your gift exchange at sunset and all of Manehattan to explore. We're bound to find something Maud would like. Maybe even more than a rock pouch!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You're right! Thanks, Rarity!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Maud, I can't help but notice you're staring at that marvelous giraffe. I was just wondering, any chance you could see yourself with it?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: Only if I had a mirror.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Now, Maud, I know you're a big fan of rocks, so get your camera ready, because these are the most spectacular rocks in all of Manehattan! Surely there must be something here that catches your eye.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: Boulder says they're all too... stuck-up.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: I like... that.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: What is it? You have to tell me! Was it this bike? This lamp? This grappling hook? What do you like?!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: I like that fissure in the sidewalk. It's an elegant example of thermal expansion and soil settlement.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Fissure in thhhhhhhe soil...? What?! But I...! All of this...! And she likes a crack?!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Did she like anything?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: That sister of yours is simply impossible to shop for! There's nothing she needs or wants!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: Boulder. Boulder. Where'd you run off to? There you are. Sure wish I had something to carry you around in.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: A rock pouch was the perfect gift for Maud! Aw, and I know she would have loved the one I saw in the window! It had double stitching, a red drawstring...

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: ...and ochre-flecked velvet lining with reinforced triple-crosshatched seams?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Yep, that's the pouch. Wait, how'd you know?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Because I'm looking at one just like it! Maybe if you can catch up with him, you could ask<U+0097>

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Excuse me, sir! I couldn't help but notice your nifty rock pouch! Is there any chance you'd be willing to part with it? I really need it. Like, really really really!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Others
content: "Street Rat": You, uh, really really need this pouch, huh?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I believe I said really really really.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Others
content: "Street Rat": Well, you know, pouches like this are really hard to come by these days. But I might be able to part with it for the right price.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: So you'll sell it to me? And I'll finally be able to give my sister the perfect Pie Sisters' Surprise Swap Day present? Oh, thank you, thank you, thank you!

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Others
content: "Street Rat": Hmmm. That's one sweet party cannon you got there. Tell you what. I'd be more than happy to give you the pouch for the low, low price of... that cannon.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: M-My... party cannon...?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Others
content: "Street Rat": Well, if you really wanna give that sister of yours the perfect present, then you'll have to give up your party cannon. So, what do you say? The pouch for the cannon.

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Maud Pie
content: Do you see the exposed chalcedony in the fissure?

episode: The Gift of the Maud Pie
speaker: Rarity
content: Probably?

content: What are you doing here?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: You told me that you wanted to perform more than anythin', but I was too caught up in myself to listen. You're the best dancer I've ever seen, and I'm here to convince you to get out on that stage!

speaker: Tender Taps
content: Um, didn't I also tell you that dancing in front of other ponies is t-t-terrifying?! I don't know if you noticed, but that auditorium is full of other ponies! I can't go out there! What if I'm bad?!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: We can go on together! No matter what, you'll look good dancin' next to me.

speaker: Tender Taps
content: All right, I'll do it. But I don't have my costume, and the backdrop is all wrong, and we don't have time to change it!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Leave everything to us.

speaker: Tender Taps
content: I don't know about this...

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Don't worry, you'll be just fine!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Here goes nothin'...

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Can't be any worse than I was!

speaker: Tender Taps
content: I can't believe it! It's just what I always imagined it would be! And if it weren't for all of you, I wouldn't even have it.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: No problem!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: It's what we do.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: I only wish I'd realized what you needed right away instead of mopin' around for no reason...

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: You know, I just might! It sure is a lot of fun, and I'm pretty confident I can only get better. I'm sorry I was so silly about us all doin' our own things. If we hadn't, I might never even have tried dancin'!

speaker: Tender Taps
content: Or find out I needed help!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: With each of us going out and trying things on our own, we'll be three times as likely to find ponies to help!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: And trying new stuff might even make us better at helping them, like how I used my bungee jumping to change the sets!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Or my crochet to make the costumes!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Well, one thing is for sure. The Cutie Mark Crusaders will never be the same. We'll be better!

speaker: Cutie Mark Crusaders
content: Yeah!

speaker: Rarity
content: The last time I was here, I woke them and ended up with a mane full of bats! Thanks for being my basket holder, Spike.

speaker: Spike
content: Basket holder? I thought I was your bodyguard.

speaker: Rarity
content: What? Oh, heh, yes, yes, that of course, too. Oh, for once I wish unicorn magic wasn't so... luminescent!

speaker: Rarity
content: Spike! You'll wake the bats! Turn that off!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm so glad you two could come!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Of course. We so rarely get a chance to relax and just visit.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: There's usually some crisis we have to deal with. Somepony always needs our help. But today<U+0097>

speaker: Rarity
content: Help!

speaker: Rarity
content: Twilight! There's something wrong with Spike!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What's wrong?

speaker: Spike
content: I don't know! Nngh! All of a sudden, my scales just started glowing and... burning!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Little is known about dragon culture, but this is a phenomenon we've seen before. It is the call of the Dragon Lord.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Dragons glow whenever the Dragon Lord has need of them in the Dragon Lands.

speaker: Spike
content: Great... H-How do I make it stop?!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: The only way to end the summons is to answer it. You must journey to the Dragon Lands and see what is expected of you.

speaker: Rarity
content: B-B-But the Dragon Lands are full of... dragons! And they're ghastly creatures! Oh, oh, not you, of course, Spikey-wikey. But remember that rotten Garble?

speaker: Spike
content: How could I forget? He would have burnt us to a crisp if you weren't there. If I have to go to the Dragon Lands, would you two come with me?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ooh! Oh my goodness, I'd love to! We are sadly lacking any information on dragon culture and customs. I could research them <U+0096> maybe even write an article! This could be my chance to make a great contribution to the knowledge of Equestria! And be there for Spike, heh, of course.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: Be very careful. The Dragon Lands are particularly dangerous for ponies. It would be wise to be discreet.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think we might want something a little more practical this time.

speaker: Rarity
content: Hmmm... Well, it may be practical, but this disguise isn't flattering in the slightest!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's not supposed to be flattering. It's supposed to blend in!

speaker: Spike
content: Shh!

speaker: Garble
content: Hey-hey, look! It's our old friend Sparkle-warkle.

speaker: Spike
content: It's Spike.

speaker: Garble
content: Are you sure your pony friends didn't give you a pony name?

speaker: Spike
content: It's nice to see you too, Garble.

speaker: Garble
content: I didn't say it was nice to see you. It's not. I don't like you. Was I not clear about that?

speaker: Spike
content: Hey! That's my rock!

speaker: Garble
content: Oh, really? Then why aren't you sitting on it?

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Dragons of Equestria, hear me! I have been Dragon Lord for longer than many of you can remember, and my reign has been extraordinary! Agree with me!

speaker: Dragons
content: Torch! Torch! Torch! Torch!

speaker: Spike
content: Who is that?

speaker: Garble
content: It's Dragon Lord Torch, dummy.

speaker: Spike
content: No, next to him.

speaker: Garble
content: That's his daughter, Princess Ember. I wouldn't even look at her if I were you, unless you want Torch to eat you!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: This is fascinating! Dragons are notoriously reckless, but they do whatever the Dragon Lord says!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Unfortunately, according to dragon law, it is time for me to step down. Sad, I know. Be sad!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: This is why I have summoned you <U+0096> to compete for the throne in the Gauntlet of Fire!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Whomever has the strength and fortitude to retrieve this bloodstone scepter from the heart of the flame-cano will be crowned Lord of the Dragons!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: When the scepter disappeared, the dragons stopped glowing! We are learning so much!

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, excuse me!

speaker: Garble
content: Ugh, you even sneeze like a pony!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: The Gauntlet is dangerous, for I designed it myself! Only dragons with my ferocity, strength, and determination will be able to finish. We will gather at the cliff when the sun is at its peak!

speaker: Spike
content: I don't want to be Dragon Lord or dragon toast, and I stopped glowing, so let's sneak out of here!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Ah! Where do you think you're going, little dragon?!

speaker: Spike
content: Oh, uh, hi, your Lordship. Uh, I was just going home!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: You don't get to leave unless I say you can!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Dad, look at him. He's just a runt. Besides, he doesn't even wanna compete. Let him go.

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: That wasn't a joke. It was a fact. When I want you to laugh, I will say "be amused!"

speaker: Spike
content: Of course, your Lordship! I, uh, guess I don't understand dragon customs. Another reason why I shouldn't compete.

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Hm. Very well then, little dragon. I release you.

speaker: Spike
content: Thank you! And thank you.

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Where do you think you're going?

speaker: Princess Ember
content: To prepare for the Gauntlet.

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: No, you're not. You're not much bigger than that runt I just sent home!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: But I'm smarter than most of these boulderheads and you know it!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Being smart won't help you win this Gauntlet! It was designed for a big, strong dragon to win, because it takes a big, strong dragon to lead! Besides, I said no!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: I hate when he does that!

speaker: Maar
content: Ha. When I become Dragon Lord, I will make burps an official greeting!

speaker: Others
content: "Barry": Ha, you? Please! When I win, I will pillage Equestria for all their pillows. Why should these ponies be comfortable while we sleep on rocks?

speaker: Garble
content: That's nothing! When I'm in charge, the first thing I'll do is get revenge on those puny ponies! They'll regret they ever crossed Garble! We'll take whatever we want from Equestria and burn the rest!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, my gosh!

speaker: Rarity
content: Ooh, I can't believe I'm saying this, but I hope that burping dragon wins!

speaker: Spike
content: None of them can win! Equestria's in big trouble if any of them are in charge!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But what can we do?

speaker: Spike
content: There's only one thing to do, and only I can do it! I have to win the Gauntlet of Fire!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle and Rarity
content: Oh...

speaker: Rarity
content: What do you mean you have to win the Gauntlet?

speaker: Spike
content: It's the only way to protect Equestria from the dragons. You heard them! They have horrible plans for ponies if they win! So somehow, I have to do it!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There has to be another way. It's too dangerous. Besides, if you win, you'd have to stay here!

speaker: Spike
content: I know, but there's no other way to keep my friends safe.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, if you're staying to compete, then we're staying to cheer you on!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: I thought I released you, tiny one!

speaker: Spike
content: I decided to compete. I am a dragon, after all.

speaker: Garble
content: Are you sure? You can't even fly!

speaker: Garble
content: Good luck! Just kidding. I hope you lose.

speaker: Spike
content: Thanks, Garble! I was planning on swimming anyway!

speaker: Rarity
content: You can do it, Spike!

speaker: Spike
content: He's gonna drown!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Spike!

speaker: Spike
content: Hey, are you okay?

speaker: Spike
content: Princess Ember!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: What do you think you're doing?

speaker: Rarity
content: Only saving your ungrateful scales!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Did that seaweed just talk? Ponies?! What are they doing here?!

speaker: Spike
content: They're my friends!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Friends? Dragons don't do friends.

speaker: Spike
content: Well, this dragon does.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Whatever. I don't care as long as none of you get in my way. I have a Gauntlet to win.

speaker: Spike
content: But I thought your dad said that<U+0097>

speaker: Princess Ember
content: I don't care what my dad said! I'll show him and every dragon who thinks I'm just a little princess there are better things than being big and strong!

speaker: Garble
content: Don't leave me here, Spike!

speaker: Garble
content: Ha-ha! Knew you'd do it. Your pony friends made you soft.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh-huh. You're welcome.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Uh, that's just me. I, uh, robbed some ponies on my way over here.

speaker: Garble
content: Huh, I like your style. Have I met you before? You kind of look like<U+0097>

speaker: Spike
content: My, uh, old neighbor! Uh, Sandy... Rockbeach!

speaker: Garble
content: Stupid slingtails knocked me down! But I've wasted enough time making small talk. Get it? Ha-ha! Because you're too small to win this! I'm funny.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Why did you cover for me? You could've had one less competitor.

speaker: Spike
content: I could ask you the same thing. You could've told Garble about my friends.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Yikes... That looks rough. But that's what makes it a challenge.

speaker: Spike
content: Are you kidding? Those boulders are huge! Hey, what if we worked together? You fly me up there, and I'll help look out for boulders, like a second set of eyes!

speaker: Rarity
content: Pssst!

speaker: Rarity
content: Spike! Are you sure it's a good idea to team up with Ember? You don't know her too well.

speaker: Spike
content: I do know she could've told Garble about you, but she didn't. I think we can trust her.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Her behavior does seem contradictory to everything I've noted about dragons so far.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Hey, you, little fella! I've thought about it, and your plan makes sense. Let's do it.

speaker: Spike
content: Really? Great! It's a deal!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Just so you know, this doesn't mean we're gonna pick flowers or exchange necklaces or whatever pony friends do.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Good luck. We'll meet you at the top.

speaker: Spike
content: Pull up! There's one on your tail!

speaker: Spike
content: Go left!

speaker: Spike
content: So what do we do now?

speaker: Princess Ember
content: I think we go through there.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, that looks scary! I mean, you can do it!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Listen, Spike. I wouldn't have made it this far without you. So I guess, if you want to, we could keep working together. I mean, just until we get through that tunnel.

speaker: Spike
content: Okay!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We'll be right behind you!

speaker: Spike
content: Oof!

speaker: Garble
content: Urgh!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, you made it! Oh, we were so worried!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Wait. How did you two get through?

speaker: Spike
content: Rarity!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, thanks, Spike!

speaker: Spike
content: It was nothing.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Nothing? You just risked everything to save her! And they're putting themselves in danger just to support you!

speaker: Spike
content: Well, that's just what friends do. Don't you have anyone who looks out for you?

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Not really. Unless I count you. Which I don't! Because we were only helping each other get through the tunnel, and now we're through the tunnel, so that's it.

speaker: Spike
content: Wait, what do you mean?

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Well, there's only one winner, one scepter, and one Dragon Lord. So I guess it's every dragon for themselves.

speaker: Spike
content: Oh. So we aren't really friends?

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Maybe if we were in Ponyland, but like I said, dragons don't do friendship.

speaker: Spike
content: I can't believe Ember ditched me.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, you're better off. She was only looking out for herself. She's just like all the other dragons.

speaker: Spike
content: She's not, though. I know it. She saved me, even when she didn't have to. I don't care what she says. That makes us friends.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Is it just me, or have we seen this crevasse three times already?

speaker: Spike
content: It's kinda hard to tell. They all look the same. Except for this one! Look! We made it! I can't believe I'm the only dragon to make it this far!

speaker: Garble
content: You're not! And I'm not losing to a puny pony-loving dragon like you!

speaker: Rarity
content: We have to do something!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Look!

speaker: Spike
content: Ember! I thought it was every dragon for themselves! Why did you save me?!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: That's what friends do! And I am. I mean, we are. I never should have left you back there. Agh, please don't make me talk about my feelings!

speaker: Garble
content: Argh! Whoa!

speaker: Garble
content: I'm sick and tired of you two helping each other! Dragons don't do helping!

speaker: Spike
content: Whoa...

speaker: Spike
content: Leave her alone!

speaker: Garble
content: What? You?! You have the scepter?! But that means that you're...

speaker: Princess Ember
content: The Dragon Lord. Dragon Lord Spike.

speaker: Garble
content: Dragon... Lord... Spike...

speaker: Spike
content: That's right! Uh... Now, go start your long journey home. And give every dragon you see on the way a hug. Don't tell them why.

speaker: Garble
content: Awww! But that'll be super embarrassing!

speaker: Spike
content: I command you to do it!

speaker: Garble
content: I can't believe this...

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Dragon Lord Spike. Hm, has a nice ring to it.

speaker: Spike
content: Dragon Lord Ember sounds a lot better.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: What? No. You're the Dragon Lord now.

speaker: Spike
content: The Dragon Lord is whoever brings the scepter back to your father! Besides, you'll make a great leader. I was just doing this to protect the ponies. But I know you'll protect them just as well as I would have.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: You sure about this?

speaker: Spike
content: Absolutely. My home is in Equestria with my friends.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Well, you'll have at least one friend here too. What are you doing?

speaker: Spike
content: It's called a hug!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Oh. I don't know if I like it. But... okay.

speaker: Spike
content: Mmmmm!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Awww!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Ember? You?!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: I know you didn't think I could do it, but I did.

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: I expressly told you not to do it, because you're not<U+0097>!

speaker: Princess Ember
content: I'm not big and strong. I know. But you know what? I won anyway. So maybe it takes more than just being big and strong to be a good Dragon Lord!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: I was wrong, Ember. You might not be big, but you are strong and smart, and perhaps that counts for more than I thought. And you will make an excellent leader.

speaker: Princess Ember
content: Thanks, dad. Agree with him! Just kidding! That's not gonna be my thing.

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Dragons, hear me! I present to you our new Dragon Lord, Ember!

speaker: Dragon Lord Torch
content: Hm? What is the meaning of this?!

speaker: Garble
content: I can't tell you!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You did well, Spike. With Ember as Dragon Lord, the ponies will be safe and you've gained us a powerful ally.

speaker: Spike
content: And a new friend!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Plus, Ember said I could write to her anytime I had questions about dragon culture! With this much information, I'll be able to write a whole book on dragons!

speaker: Rarity
content: And I gained tons of ideas for a new line of camouflage clothing! I think I'll call it "Camo-Maud"!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: First lesson of the day, we very carefully set the table without using magic, so that<U+0097> Yikes!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Did you...?! How? When? What?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I said no magic. You were supposed to do it by hoof so I could work in a friendship lesson.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, I heard "set the table" and just kinda went for it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, if you hadn't used magic, you'd have heard me say, uh... this plate represents your head, this spoon is your heart, and the knives... are sharp! Always be careful with knives. The metaphors make more sense when you're actually setting the table.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Should I... change it back?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I just want to make sure you're ready for this dinner. Princess Celestia will be joining us tomorrow night to see how the friendship lessons are going!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: If it's just you, me, and Princess Celestia, why are there four seats?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, the whole point is for you to bring a new friend. That way, the princess will see for herself just how far you've come. And how good a teacher you have.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well, I can't choose. I like all your friends.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's the best part! You have to make a new friend!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: New friends? Hey, maybe I'll just force friendships by magically enslaving the entire population of Ponyville!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Starlight!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Let's see. Make new friends in Ponyville, the friendliest place in Equestria. Shouldn't be hard...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Need to make a new friend, huh? I know just the pony for you!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Miss Starlight Glimmer, meet Mrs. Cake!

speaker: Mrs. Cake
content: Mrs. How are you, dearie?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Are you baking? Can I help?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wow, Mrs. Cake! Look what your new friend made you!

speaker: Mrs. Cake
content: Mrs. New friend. I like the sound of<U+0096> Howza-wowza! A-Are you trying to put me out of business with your fancy magical-thingy-whatsit cake?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Sorry...

speaker: Applejack
content: I think I have just the pony for you, Starlight. Meet Big Mac!

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Eeyup!

speaker: Applejack
content: He's not much of a talker.

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Nnope.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, that's too bad. I love a good conversation.

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Eeyup-yup-yup-yup-yup-yup-yup-yup-y-y-y-y-you did something! Whoa! What's happening? I feel really weird! I'm talkin' so much! And I'm so articulate! Enunciating with such precise pronunciation! Annie Apple awoke and accidentally ate an auburn azalea! Make it stop!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I can't be friends with somepony who doesn't talk.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: ...And I guess my first instinct shouldn't be to magically command ponies to act the way I want them to?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Alright, I'll change him back!

speaker: Rarity
content: The trick to finding a new friend is to render yourself radiant. First impressions count a great deal, you know.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'm glad you all got past my first impression.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, everypony deserves a second chance. Ooh! Now, I have a top-notch idea. I'm thinking pastel silk here and here with a crinoline underneath.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You really think a new outfit will help me meet ponies?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, with the right outfit, you can do anything, darling!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: When will it be ready?

speaker: Rarity
content: Three weeks.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Dinner's tomorrow.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well then, how about a hat from the... ...clearance bin?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Ugh! Maybe not.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Heh. Nopony's gonna make friends with you because of your outfit. The only thing you want a new friend draped in is coolness.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Like you?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yeah, but you already know me, so... Spitfire! Heh. Sorry.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Who's that?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Only the Wonderbolt-iest pony in the Wonderbolts! Come on, I'll introduce you!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You coming or what?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I guess my first question would be, "What's a Wonderbolt?"

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You've never heard of the Wonderbolts?! Where have you been?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Enslaving villages, I guess...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Right.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You're adorable, but probably not what Twilight had in mind.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What is going on? This is Ponyville! If I can't make a friend here, there's gotta be something wrong with me! Okay, calm down. Nobody makes friends with a total stresscase.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Stop stressing... Stop stressing!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: This is just what I needed.

speaker: Trixie
content: Tell me about it.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You ever have one of those days?

speaker: Trixie
content: For me, they're all one of those days.

speaker: Trixie
content: I'm gonna start coming here every time I visit Ponyville.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'm not from here either. I've been trying to make friends, but it's not easy. They're not saying it, but I think everypony knows about my past. I may have been a tiny bit... completely and utterly evil?

speaker: Trixie
content: Ponies judge me on my past too.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Finally, a pony I can relate to.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Twilight, guess what? I made a new friend!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's fantastic news!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: She's great!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Great!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: She's powerful!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Powerful?

speaker: Trixie
content: Hello... princess!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Trixie?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You know each other?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You could say that.

speaker: Trixie
content: We've had our differences. What matters is Twilight gave me a second chance, and I appreciate it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: So, um, what brings you to Ponyville?

speaker: Trixie
content: The Grrrreat and Powerful Trrrrixie has come to perform a new stage show of grand illusion! I am calling it "The Humble and Penitent Trixie's Equestrian Apology Tour"!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: That's kind of a mouthful.

speaker: Trixie
content: It's a working title.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Starlight? A moment? Over here? I know I said make friends with anypony, but, well, with Trixie's past, and your past, I'm not sure she's the best... first friend.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But whatever she did, you've forgiven her, right?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Of course. It's just... She wasn't the nicest pony.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well, you did say anypony, and I just assumed that you'd trust me to make my own friends the way Princess Celestia trusted you.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're right. I trust you. Just be back in time for the dinner.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Thanks, Twilight! You won't regret it!

speaker: Trixie

content: Maybe we should just postpone.

content: Perfect.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
