speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We can do this. And we can stay true to your vision.

speaker: Rarity
content: You'd do that? Fluttershy, you'll handle those... strong-smelling raccoons for me?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Of course.

speaker: Applejack
content: Leave Plaid Stripes to me. I'll handle her and her, uh, "good ideas".

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh, ooh, ooh! And I can go upstairs to that nonstop party and have tons of fun and eat some cake and set off party cannons and<U+0097>

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And then make them be quiet.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm pretty sure I know somepony who wouldn't mind organizing this merchandise shipment for you. I'm talking about myself. Oh, please, let me organize it!

speaker: Rarity
content: This all sounds splendid, but I don't even have a single employee, and I'll need the best of the best.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Leave the hiring to me.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh! This is it, my dears. If you can handle these problems, I'll focus on the designs for the front window display. We'll show Manehattan what Rarity For You is all about! Oh, what would I do without you?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What would she do without us? Huh. Lemme think. "Darlings, I'm absolutely doomed, doomed, doomed!" Heh, I sound just like her!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hey, you're not writing this down, are you?

speaker: Rarity
content: Now for the perfect window display. Hmm.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, I can't really stop a super fun party in the middle of mega-happy fun times, can I?! Oh, what would Rarity want?!

speaker: Rarity Devil
content: Keep that party going 'til the break of dawn!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Really?

speaker: Rarity Angel
content: Indubitably! And as for the roof, get jiggy! Raise it, Pinkie! Raise it like you've never raised it before!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh! If you say so!

speaker: Rarity Devil
content: Oh, please, Pinkie Pie. Never in a million years would I say such balderdash!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Obviously, DJ Pon-3 only plays the sickest of beats. I just wouldn't want her to miss out on the coolest new music straight from the back-alley underground, zip-zap party scene! I'd play the whole thing if I were you, no matter what other ponies think.

speaker: Dancers
content: Awww.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Rarity For You is only hiring the best of the best. And to me, that means the fastest. Now, uh, before we begin, uh... Am I doing this right? What would Rarity want? New plan!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Who can be the first one to tell me what fabric this is?

speaker: Blue Bobbin
content: That's organza.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Are you sure?

speaker: Blue Bobbin
content: It's a thin, plain weave. Sheer fabric traditionally made from silk, so... yeah.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I don't know the first thing about clothes. Pretty much all I can do is look at something and tell you if it's clothes or not. This chair? Not clothes.

speaker: Plaid Stripes
content: See if you can keep up with me here. What are all clothes made of?

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, fabric?

speaker: Plaid Stripes
content: Bingo! But not in this store. Uh-uh. Not anymore.

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, no?

speaker: Plaid Stripes
content: Two words for you: "spoon clothes". All our clothes will be made of spoons!

speaker: Applejack
content: What would Rarity want? You know, I like you, Plaid Stripes. If it were up to me, we'd have a spoon clothes store right next to Stinky Bottom's Discount Hat Emporium. But it ain't up to me, so the answer is no.

speaker: Applejack
content: Personally, I think spoon clothes ain't such a bad idea. Useful, too. Eatin' soup, stirrin' gumbo, diggin' little holes.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There. Perfect. Although, what would Rarity want? Maybe she wouldn't like it done by color. Guess I have to start over!

speaker: Rarity
content: A window display is the first thing customers see, and if they like it, they'll walk inside and experience the glory that is my boutique.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I don't know which one of you to hire! Just... keep guessing fabrics!

speaker: Plaid Stripes
content: Daddy, Rarity's friend doesn't like my ideas!

speaker: Mr. Stripes
content: Mr. Spoon clothes is good idea!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, no! Not a shopping music mashup!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry!

speaker: Rarity
content: How's it<U+0097>

speaker: Rarity
content: Ooh!

speaker: Rarity
content: Hello? The door appears to be stuck!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yep. We're workin' on it!

speaker: Rarity
content: Hmm. Well, shouldn't let this time go to waste.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How did this happen?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I shut down the party.

speaker: Applejack
content: I told Plaid Stripes no.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I asked the raccoons to leave.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I asked a lot of fabric questions.

speaker: Others
content: Pinkie Pie, Applejack, Just like I thought Rarity would want!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rarity asked us to help her with everything because she knows all of us so well. She knows how much you care for animals. She'd trust you to solve the problem your way. Maybe we should all do the same. Doing this our way is what Rarity wants. It's not too late. Let's all dig in and we can fix this.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Before Rarity finds out how bad we messed up.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm sorry I asked you to leave. The place is yours if you wanna stay. Though I would like to ask you all just one favor.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I'm sorry I made you play that un-fun, super-boring music. But if you're up for it, I have an idea to make the party even better!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Okay, I don't get fabric, but I do get speed. And I need somepony fast enough to help all the customers Rarity's gonna have. So... first one to the river and back gets the job! It's a race! Go!

speaker: Applejack
content: Mr. Stripes, I owe your daughter an apology. She's got good ideas, and I should give 'em a chance. So here's what I'm thinkin'.

speaker: Rarity
content: Perfect!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wow, looks like we fixed that door just in time!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh! What's all this?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The whole place organized by style, cross-referenced by size, and reverse-indexed by fabric. She'll be able to find anything in three seconds flat! It was some of my best work.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh! I knew I could count on you! All right... I suppose this is the moment of truth...

speaker: Rarity
content: Rarity For You is now open!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, dear. I wasn't quite prepared for such a crowd. How will I handle them all?

speaker: Blue Bobbin
content: My name's Blue Bobbin. I'll be your personal shopping assistant this evening.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Right this way, everypony, and one of our talented salesponies can help you out!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Honestly, they were all pretty slow. But they finished the race. Plus they knew a lot more about fabric than I did. So, I hired them all!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: The way I see it, Rarity designs fashion, DJ Pon-3 designs beats. What better combination than a boutique/dance club?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: After a quick bath, they were more than willing to help!

speaker: Others
content: "Waxton": Ah, a blue corn reduction with shallot confit! But how can I possibly enjoy it without a<U+0097>

speaker: Plaid Stripes
content: Spoon?

speaker: Applejack
content: Heh. Toldja spoon clothes ain't such a bad idea.

speaker: Others
content: "Waxton": Mmm! Exquisite! This is the most whimsical and wonderfully fashionable boutique I've ever seen!

speaker: Rarity
content: "In the end, Rarity's grand opening was a smashing success! True, it got off to a rocky start, but somehow this rag-tag group of ne'er-do-wells..." Oh, heavens, I think he means you. "...came together and created the perfect boutique. A vision of Rarity combined with the expertise of her friends! This reporter, for one, is a believer." Why didn't you tell me there were so many problems?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We all figured you had enough on your mind.

speaker: Applejack
content: And we didn't want you to think that the opening wasn't perfect.

speaker: Rarity
content: "Ne'er-do-wells" or not, I know I can always count on all of you. And nothing could be more perfect than that.

speaker: Aloe
content: Um... Miss Rarity? Eh, how much longer are you planning to stay in here, darling?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, dear. Is somepony else waiting?

speaker: Aloe
content: Oh, no, no. I just don't want you to get all... What is word? Pruney.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh. Uh, well, I'm just waiting for Applejack. It's been so long since we've had a relaxing day at the spa together. I'm quite certain she'll be along any moment.

speaker: Applejack
content: Hey, there, Rarity. I really tried to get here earlier. I just can't believe how much time my chores are takin' up these days. At least now we'll finally get to spend some quality spa time together. Right?

speaker: Aloe
content: Okay, fillies, that's it. We are closing up for the day.

speaker: Applejack
content: Aw, shucks, Rarity. I guess I missed the whole day. I sure am sorry.

speaker: Rarity
content: Me, too.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hi, Rarity!

speaker: Rarity
content: Morning, Twilight, Spike. Good heavens, that's a lot of empty pie plates.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh... yeah. We were just heading to pick up some fresh pies. Heh. I don't know why we keep running out at the castle. What are you gonna get?

speaker: Rarity
content: Applejack, actually. Although, I'm quite sure she'll be too busy once again.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What do you mean?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, nothing. It's just that Applejack and I haven't had one of our spa days in ages.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You two really should set aside some time.

speaker: Rarity
content: Darling, I have been trying for moons! But Applejack is so busy these days, it's next to impossible.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wow. I didn't realize Applejack had so much to do.

speaker: Spike
content: Hey, Applejack! Another order of pies, please.

speaker: Applejack
content: Sure thing, Spike!

speaker: Spike
content: Aah! Dah! Whoa-oa-oa!

speaker: Rarity
content: I don't suppose those pies are the last chore on the schedule for today?

speaker: Applejack
content: Gah! Land's sakes! Is it time for our spa day already? Rarity, why don't you go on ahead and I'll meet ya there?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh! Please, Applejack, let's not kid ourselves!

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, it ain't 'cause I don't wanna. But the work on the farm has just been takin' up more and more of my time.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I hate seeing you two not spending time together. Can't you get somepony else in your family to take over for a bit?

speaker: Applejack
content: Wish I could. But Granny, Big Mac, and Apple Bloom all have chores of their own. And today, they're all busy takin' the harvest to market.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I know we're not farmers, but I'm sure Spike and I could handle things for a little while.

speaker: Applejack
content: Maybe...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Is there one chore we could do?

speaker: Applejack
content: Well... I suppose if you two got started on feedin' the pigs, I could maybe leave for an hour.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oooh! An hour of spa perfection? I can work with that!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Perfect! You head out to the spa, and Spike and I'll take care of things here.

speaker: Spike
content: Whoa! Dah! Whoa!

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, yeah. We totally got everything covered.

speaker: Applejack
content: Okay. This list pretty much covers everything you need to know to feed the pigs. But, uh, maybe I should go over it with you just to...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Applejack, please. If there's a list involved, I am one hundred percent on top of it.

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, right.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And don't worry about things here! Spike and I have totally got this! I mean, it's just feeding the pigs. How hard could it be?

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, Twilight?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Whoa.

speaker: Applejack
content: I'm glad we're doin' this, Rarity. I've been puttin' work before our spa time for too long. I know we've only got an hour, but I can't wait to have a steam.

speaker: Rarity
content: A steam is just the start. I know exactly what we'll do, and an hour will be perfect.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, Spike, ready with that list?

speaker: Spike
content: Ready.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Let's do this!

speaker: Spike
content: "Step one: open the gate."

speaker: Spike
content: Okay. "Step two: close the gate."

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Huh?

speaker: Spike
content: Mm. That's what it says.

speaker: Spike
content: "Step three: walk away."

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "Walk away"? Really?

speaker: Spike
content: Mmm.

speaker: Applejack
content: I just hope Twilight and Spike can handle things until I get back.

speaker: Rarity
content: Now, Applejack, if we are really to enjoy this time together, you simply must give yourself over to the idea that you are off-duty and try to relax.

speaker: Applejack
content: I know. You're right. I really am glad we're doin' this. And as long as it's only an hour, I'm sure everythin' will be just fine.

speaker: Rarity
content: Exactly. Now kindly step this way. Relaxation awaits.

speaker: Rarity
content: Rainbow Dash! What are you doing here?!

speaker: Applejack
content: Yeah. I didn't think spa treatments were your thing exactly.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, they're totally not. At least, not the froufrou kind.

speaker: Rarity
content: Ah.

speaker: Applejack
content: Huh.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yeah, I, uh, I think I tweaked something at Wonderbolts practice the other day. I just came in for a deep tissue sports massage.

speaker: Others
content: "Lavender Essence": Ah, Miss Dash, I am so sorry, but we are running just a tad behind, and we are not quite ready to start your pampered muscle massage and indulgent hooficure just yet.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh! I-I'm pretty sure that wasn't what I signed up for.

speaker: Others
content: "Lavender Essence": But they are your usual.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And it seems like you're really busy today anyway! I'll just come back tomorrow. Uh, see you two later! Have fun! But put me down for the same thing.

speaker: Applejack
content: Too bad Rainbow Dash just hates those "froufrou" spa treatments. She could have joined us for a nice steam. Hoo-wee! I can't wait.

speaker: Rarity
content: Indeed. Although, if they couldn't fit Dashie in, I wonder just how far behind things are running. Obviously, we're on a very tight schedule.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, maybe not everypony is waiting for the steam room.

speaker: Caramel
content: Oh, no. No, that's exactly what we're waiting for. Oh, I hope you're not in a hurry.

speaker: Applejack
content: So everypony here wants a steam bath?

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, the solution is obvious. We'll simply have to start our short time at the spa with something else.

speaker: Applejack
content: Nothin' doin'. I came here to have a steam, and that's just what I'm gonna get!

speaker: Rarity
content: But, but, it'll take most of our hour just to get through this line!

speaker: Aloe
content: RRRRarity! My favorite customer! Mwah! Mwah! And Appleyack? Well, it certainly has been a long time since you two were here together! So lovely to have you back.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, I wish I could say the same.

speaker: Aloe
content: Yes, the wait time for the steam room certainly has been getting worse lately. But I'm sure we'll be able to accommodate your usual treatments.

speaker: Applejack
content: Not without my steam!

speaker: Rarity
content: Apparently, Applejack won't consider starting her time at the spa without a steam, and we only have an hour.

speaker: Aloe
content: That is a problem.

speaker: Rarity
content: Applejack, where are you going?

speaker: Applejack
content: Um, why are y'all just standin' here?

speaker: Buddy
content: Ugh! Just waiting for the steam to build up.

speaker: Spoiled Rich
content: Without steam, a steam room's just a room, and I've got plenty of those at home. Because I live in a mansion.

speaker: Aloe
content: It has been taking longer for the steam to reach the Ponyville Day Spa quality. We even had to add a warm towel service. So sorry for the delay, everypony. Please help yourselves.

speaker: Applejack
content: So if you're not gettin' enough steam, that must mean there's not enough hot water.

speaker: Rarity
content: Ooh, Applejack, honestly, can't we just start with a hooficure? We're going to run out of time.

speaker: Applejack
content: Hmm.

speaker: Applejack
content: Ha! Now what do we have here?

speaker: Rarity
content: The laundry room, of course. And at this point, I'm considering soaking my hooves in one of the machines so my time here isn't a total loss!

speaker: Aloe
content: The Ponyville Day Spa prides itself on sanitary conditions, and fresh linens are integral part.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, sure, but have you always run every single one of these here machines full bore all day, every day?

speaker: Others
content: "Birch Bucket": The answer is no. But ponies sure do love the warm towel service.

speaker: Applejack
content: Hmmm.

speaker: Others
content: "Birch Bucket": Eh, you are all wanting towel?

speaker: Applejack
content: Looks to me like you don't have any left.

speaker: Others
content: "Birch Bucket": Well, like I said, warm towels are big hit.

speaker: Applejack
content: I think I figured out the problem. You've got a small leak, and that means the steam takes just a little longer to build up. And while ponies wait, they get cold. Cold ponies start wrappin' themselves in towels, and all those dirty towels have to be cleaned because Ponyville Day Spa prides itself on cleanliness.

speaker: Others
content: "Birch Bucket": Eh, what?

speaker: Applejack
content: Basically, losin' steam makes you use more towels. That means you do more laundry, which uses up the hot water you need to make more steam, so the problem just keeps gettin' worse.

speaker: Aloe
content: Ah! I had no idea.

speaker: Rarity
content: Wonderful. Now that we've solved the great steam mystery, we can finally get back to our... significantly less than an hour of relaxation.

speaker: Applejack
content: Rarity, are you kiddin'? I can't just leave things like this. I'm gonna need my tools.

speaker: Rarity
content: Ahh!

speaker: Applejack
content: Whew! Now that that leak's fixed, ponies won't get so cold they use up all those towels! And without all that laundry, there'll be plenty of hot water for all the steam anypony could want!

speaker: Others
content: "Birch Bucket": And I only have to be doing vash once a day!

speaker: Aloe
content: Wow, Appleyack! Have you ever considered a career in the spa industry? I'm sure I can find something for you.

speaker: Applejack
content: No, thanks. I'm just relieved I can finally relax in the steam. What do you say, Rarity?

speaker: Rarity
content: It sounds lovely, Applejack, but... unfortunately, you spent so much time fixing the steam room, we don't have any time left to use it. Honestly, how in Equestria did it never occur to you to check for leaks?

speaker: Aloe
content: There's just so many other things to worry about! I suppose ve get used to the way things are, and ve don't realize there vas problem.

speaker: Rarity
content: You obviously need an outside eye to evaluate the situation. It's lucky for you Applejack is too stubborn to relax!

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, I'm sorry, Rarity. We'll just have to do this another day. Twilight and Spike should be done feedin' the pigs by now.

speaker: Rarity
content: Twilight is a very capable pony. I'm sure she can figure out what to do next.

speaker: Applejack
content: Look, I know Twilight's a princess and an Alicorn, but she isn't a farmer. I've been doin' farm work my whole life, and I'm not sure it's somethin' you can just "figure out".

speaker: Rarity
content: Of course. Why don't we pop back so you could explain to Twilight what to do next, and then we'll come back here and pick up where we left off?

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, I suppose I could try... assumin' everythin' went well so far.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Applejack, honestly! How could it not?

speaker: Spike
content: Wouldn't it be easier to just fly?

speaker: Applejack
content: I'm sorry, Rarity, but I think I'm gonna have to finish these chores myself.

speaker: Rarity
content: Twilight, darling! How in the world did you end up there?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Spike and I were just trying to follow Applejack's list as closely as possible.

speaker: Spike
content: Mmmh... Maybe not the best plan.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm sorry, Applejack, but we never even got started feeding the pigs.

speaker: Applejack
content: That's alright, Twilight. I know you did your best. I guess a list can't really capture all the ways I have of doin' things.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: At least you two got to spend some time at the spa together.

speaker: Spike
content: Yeah, that must've been super relaxing!

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, if watching Applejack fix plumbing counts as relaxing, then yes.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What about your hour of spa perfection?

speaker: Rarity
content: As it turns out, the Ponyville Day Spa had a few problems with their steam room, and somepony refused to relax until she had fixed them.

speaker: Applejack
content: I'm sorry, but I just couldn't let those spa ponies go another minute puttin' up with problems they didn't even know they had! Somehow they just got used to a huge bottleneck of ponies standin' around waitin'. An' I took one good look at that spa jam, and I knew I had to do somethin'! Sometimes the simplest things can just derail a whole operation. Whether it's a leaky pipe or doin' too much laundry. You can't just stick to the same old way of doin' things and expect them to get better. I mean, thinkin' you can is just plumb ridiculous. Right? It's funny when you realize the extra work they were doin' was actually makin' things worse!

speaker: Applejack
content: I mean, I guess it's possible to get stuck in a routine where you're doin' all this extra stuff and not realize it, but I can't for the life of me think of how! Why are y'all starin' at me like that?

speaker: Rarity
content: Um... Are you certain everything you just did is entirely necessary to feed the pigs?

speaker: Applejack
content: What? Of course! Why would I be doin' it if it weren't? See, this gate here used to squeak so loud, the pigs would run to the other side of the pen and never come out! So I open and close it to let them know it's safe.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But it doesn't squeak anymore.

speaker: Applejack
content: Of course not! I fixed that ages ago. Then I realized puttin' a little fright into 'em got 'em all hustlin' out of the pen.

speaker: Spike
content: They don't look scared to me.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, no. They got used to it. Which is why I started doin' the chicken dance! To show 'em that if they didn't get to eatin' their food, the chickens would. 'Course, bein' a chicken, I couldn't very well open the gate. Gettin' the food bucket to spill into the trough was just a happy accident because one time I left it there by mistake.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh, Applejack? It seems like everything you're doing is to fix things that aren't really problems anymore.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, I'll be...

speaker: Rarity
content: Hmmm... Maybe it isn't so hard to get stuck doing extra work after all.

speaker: Applejack
content: Huh. I wonder if I've been doin' that around here with anythin' else.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, there's only one way to find out!

speaker: Applejack
content: Thanks, y'all. I guess I just got so used to doin' everythin' a certain way, I didn't realize there were any problems.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Having a friend look at what you're doing with an outside eye can really help!

speaker: Rarity
content: Mm-hmm! And I suppose if it weren't for our unsuccessful time at the spa, none of us would've realized it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, now that your chores are streamlined, what are you gonna do with all the extra time?

speaker: Applejack
content: I think I have a few ideas.

speaker: Applejack
content: Think you can come up with enough things for us to do now that we have more time to relax?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, please. I could plan a week's worth of treatments!

speaker: Applejack
content: Heh. Well, let's just start with the rest of the day for now. After all the work we just did on the farm, I am ready for some serious relaxation!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Thanks for letting me know there was an opening. I don't know if I could make it without my pampered muscle massage.

speaker: Aloe
content: Don't vorry about it. Shall I put you down for another one tomorrow?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, absolutely! Sometimes a girl just has to pamper herself, am I right?

speaker: Rarity
content: You certainly are!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh! Hey! I was just, uh, uh...

speaker: Rarity
content: Don't worry, Rainbow Dash. We were just heading in for some pampering ourselves. You could always join us.

speaker: Applejack
content: That is, if you don't mind sufferin' through one or two "froufrou" treatments.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh... I suppose I could take it. You know, for you ponies.

speaker: Mrs. Shy
content: Mrs. We're so happy you could come have lunch with your father and me, Fluttershy.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm so glad you asked.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And it was super awesome of you to invite me too! Things have been so busy with the Wonderbolts lately, it's great to get a chance to relax someplace quiet.

speaker: Mr. Shy

speaker: Mrs. Shy
content: Mrs. O-Oh, this is... lovely, dear.

content: Ugh.

content: Oh, this ought to be good.

content: Sorry, I shouldn't tease you. I know the whole super awesome flyer bit's just to impress me.

speaker: Zephyr Breeze

content: That all sounds fine for your friends, but it's just not me.

content: Aw, cheer up, Fluttershy. I know it was hard, but you did the right thing. You couldn't let Zephyr pull the same stuff on you that he's always pulled on your folks!

content: I guess so...

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, hello, Constance!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh? Oh, dear.

content: See, Wigford? The Breeze needs nopony! We've got food, shelter. Just need to put the old kettle on...

content: Come on, sticky-sticky, make with the sparks!

content: Ugh! What's a pony got to do to find a decent stick around here?!

content: I know he needs to learn to do things for himself, but...

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh... I can't let him live like this.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Actually, I don't think he'd make it through the night.

speaker: Zephyr Breeze
content: Fluttershy! Hey! I was just, um, cozying up in my sleeping bag! Ready to call it an early night! Such an exhausting day, y'know?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: It's noon.

content: You know me! Siesta...

content: Ugh... I can't do this. I can't do anything.

content: Zephyr, you're smart and talented. You could do anything if you just tried!

content: And what if I give everything I have and still fail? Honestly, I think it's better not to try at all.

content: But then you won't ever do anything.

content: I don't expect you two to understand. I mean, when have you ever failed? You've literally helped save Equestria, like, a dozen times.

content: And I was worried that I'd fail every time! Sometimes you have to do things, even though you might fail.

content: But failing is the worst!

content: And quitting doesn't feel much better, does it?

content: No.

content: So here's the deal: You can come back with me, but you have to do exactly what I say. No exceptions.

speaker: Zephyr Breeze
content: I will literally do anything you ask me if it means I don't have to stay here.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Okay, you know what you have to do, right?

speaker: Zephyr Breeze
content: Beg for help, then quit when I get frustrated. Just kidding! Total opposite of that. Got it.

content: You think he can do it?

content: That's what big sisters are for.

content: So, Zeph, now that you've accomplished this, what's next?

content: But, y'know... I've got some baby steps in mind.

content: Thanks for dinner, Mr. and Mrs. Shy! Ha! It was great as usual.

content: Mrs. Thank you, dear, for not giving up on Zephyr. After all these years of pining for him, it must be so satisfying to see him on the right track.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Huh...?

content: Have you heard from Zephyr? Is he doing well?

content: Mr. I tell you, he's a brand new pony! So full of drive and determination.

content: Heh. That's great.

speaker: Zephyr Breeze
content: Guess who graduated from mane therapy training?

content: Hah, awesome!

content: Mr. Congratulations, son!

speaker: Mrs. Shy
content: Mrs. You look so handsome!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm so proud of you, Zephyr.

content: It was only a matter of time before they recognized my true genius! But actually doing the work probably helped, and I wouldn't have if it weren't for you.

content: Oh, I just gave you some encouragement. You did this on your own.

content: As you've all probably noticed, it's been quite some time since the map has sent us on a mission of friendship.

content: Hm. Take your pick. Culture, couture, cuisine!

content: Zesty grew up around fine dining, and everypony hangs on her every word when it comes to cuisine.

content: Oh, my! Such presentation. Mm. Oh. Ah. Yes. Very nice...

content: Nom nom nom. Maybe, I'm not in the mood for... whatever this is. Can we try someplace else?

content: Nom nom. Ugh. Maybe one more stop?

content: Blech! Nope.

content: So good!

content: Ooh!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Well, my guests may be looking for lights, music, and parties, but working hard and making friends is how I turned this hotel into what it is today, and how I plan to make it even bigger. Uh-huh-huh! Uh, excuse me for a second. Wise ponies may say the folks that come here are customers, but I can't help but thinkin' of each and every one of you as friends. That's why there's a three-for-one special on apple fritters in the cafe for the next hour! Enjoy! Uh-huh-huh!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Would you two like to take a tour of the place? I'm just about to do my rounds and check on my friends who work here.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: We do have a friendship problem to find.

speaker: Applejack
content: Lead the way, Mr. Gladmane!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Just Gladmane now, you hear?

speaker: Trapeze Star
content: Gladmane, you're just in time to see my newest move!

speaker: Gladmane
content: New moves or not, I'm glad to have a star like you working for me, I'll tell you what.

speaker: Trapeze Star
content: Oh, don't make me blush! Now watch this!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Stellar! Uh-huh-huh!

speaker: Director
content: Oh! Oh! Monsieur Gladmane himself is here! Let's run through the whole routine!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Now, don't make a fuss for ol' me. I'm just gonna keep on giving a tour to my new friends Applejack and Fluttershy.

speaker: Applejack
content: Howdy!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Hi.

speaker: Director
content: If zis pony calls you friend, you're welcome backstage anytime! I owe him my entire career.

speaker: Gladmane
content: Aw, shucks. Well, let's leave the artists to their work.

speaker: Applejack
content: Doesn't look like there's any friendship problems here.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I've never seen a pink prairie dog before!

speaker: Gladmane
content: I like the folks that come here to have a unique experience. Uh-huh-huh.

speaker: Others
content: "Roar Horn": Und we love him for it!

speaker: Others
content: "Sprigfield": With Gladmane's help, we've been able to take care of all these little guys!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Now this place is overwhelming in a good way!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Aw, glad you like it.

speaker: Applejack
content: Fluttershy?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Hmm? Oh, um, coming!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: There doesn't seem to be anything wrong around here at all.

speaker: Applejack
content: I figured lookin' for a friendship problem in Las Pegasus would be like tryin' to find a needle in a stack of needles. But everypony seems to be gettin' along just fine.

speaker: Flim
content: Ladies and gentleponies, despite what my competition might say, I know you've come to this fair city to be entertained, and I assure you there is nothing more entertaining than the astounding acrobatics in Gladmane's Ponet Fantastique!

speaker: Flam
content: Now, I suppose that might be true if it weren't for the existence, and far superiorly entertaining presence, of the show-stopping exotic animal act that Ponet Fantastique includes!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Those voices sound familiar.

speaker: Applejack
content: They sure do. Flim and Flam.

speaker: Flim
content: Why, I won't even dignify that assertion with a response! Except to say that if you were to consider buying your tickets from me, I might consider offering them to you at a substantial discount!

speaker: Flam
content: But I've always thought you get what you pay for, and in my humble opinion, these tickets are a value at twice the price!

speaker: Flim
content: Don't let this price-gouging charlatan take you for a ride!

speaker: Flam
content: Charlatan? How dare you!

speaker: Flim
content: Hah! How dare I?!

speaker: Flam
content: Yes, how dare you! I was the one that...

speaker: Flim
content: I call 'em likes I see them, dear brother of mine!

speaker: Flam
content: I'm two minutes older than you <U+0096> don't you forget that, brother of mine!

speaker: Flim
content: I'm sick and tired of this...

speaker: Fluttershy
content: They certainly don't seem to be getting along. You don't suppose we've been brought here to help them?

speaker: Applejack
content: Absolutely not!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I know you and the rest of the Apple family have had your issues with Flim and Flam in the past, but they're definitely having trouble, and solving a friendship problem is important, no matter who's having it.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, of course that's true... for anypony but them!

speaker: Gladmane
content: I'm sorry you had to see that. I don't know why, but those two have been fightin' ever since they got here. I thought giving them these jobs might help, but I... I guess it just made matters worse.

speaker: Applejack
content: Trust me. I know those ponies, and you're better off with them apart. The two of them together will cheat the hooves right out from under you!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Yeah, I suppose you're right. Flim's such a showpony, and Flam has such a head for business. Why, if they ever did work together, they'd be running this place in two shakes! Ah, speaking of which, I'd better get back to work. Y'all enjoy your stay now, you hear?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm pretty sure we should help Flim and Flam...

speaker: Applejack
content: And I'm pretty sure there's another friendship problem here, and I'm gonna search this resort top to bottom 'til I find it!

speaker: Flim
content: I hope you didn't travel all the way from Ponyville to try to get me to reconcile with my no-account brother.

speaker: Flam
content: Brother? I don't believe I have one of those.

speaker: Flim
content: No! I already know what he thinks of me! All show and no substance! Well, if he's so smart, he should have no trouble becoming a big success on his own!

speaker: Flam
content: "Ooh, why, he's the greatest salespony that ever lived, of course!" Just ask him. He'll tell you all about it.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm sure you could work out your differences if you just sat down and talked to each other.

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: I'm never speaking to that pony again!

speaker: Director
content: No! You are ruining my show!

speaker: Trapeze Star
content: It isn't just your show, and I'm improving it.

speaker: Director
content: You don't pull a rabbit out of a hat on the trapeze!

speaker: Trapeze Star
content: That's the point <U+0096> to give the audience something they've never seen before! Acrobatic magic!

speaker: Bernard Rabbit
content: Ta-da!

speaker: Trapeze Star
content: It's called "blending genres", and it's awesome!

speaker: Applejack
content: Shouldn't somepony do somethin'?

speaker: Others
content: "Back Stage": Hah. They've been doing this since they started working here. Too bad, really. If they ever stopped shouting at each other, we could take the show on tour. They'd be way more successful than staying at Gladmane's.

speaker: Applejack
content: Heh-heh. Now that sounds like a real friendship problem!

speaker: Others
content: "Roar Horn": Hup! Hup! Hup! Hup!

speaker: Others
content: "Sprigfield": Stop! What are you doing?! It's supposed to be a pink prairie dog pyramid! It's alliterative!

speaker: Others
content: "Roar Horn": Wha<U+0097> You said a tower! Why do you keep changing everything?

speaker: Others
content: "Sprigfield": I'm not changing anything! You said pyramid!

speaker: Others
content: "Roar Horn": You are driving me crazy!

speaker: Applejack
content: I thought you two got along.

speaker: Applejack
content: Two friendship problems in the same theater? Now we're talkin'!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: If you count Flim and Flam, that's three big friendship problems all in the same place!

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, I don't count Flim and Flam since those two not bein' friends isn't a problem.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: It certainly isn't for Gladmane. Sounds like he's better off with them fighting.

speaker: Applejack
content: Actually, the other ponies' problems seemed to be good for Gladmane too. Both the trapeze show and the animal act would be better off if they left, but everypony's so busy arguin' that they can't.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Do you think he knows?

speaker: Applejack
content: I don't know, but I'm startin' to think we should find out.

speaker: Trapeze Star
content: Of course Gladmane wants everypony to get along. He's the nicest, most genuine pony I've ever met. Did the director put you up to this?

speaker: Director
content: I tell you, if Gladmane is your friend, you are welcome backstage. But if you are speaking of him poorly, you leave!

speaker: Others
content: "Roar Horn": Gladmane is the kindest, most gentle...

speaker: Others
content: "Sprigfield": ...most compassionate pony I've ever known!

speaker: Others
content: "Roar Horn" and "Sprigfield": My problem... is with him!

speaker: Applejack
content: I just can't figure it! The only pony who benefits from all this feudin' is Gladmane, but by all accounts, he's the best friend any of these ponies have!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Well, Bernard <U+0096> that adorable bunny from the acrobat's act <U+0096> claims that every morning, Gladmane tells the director that the star wants control of the show, and every afternoon tells the star that the director wants to get rid of her! But neither is true!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: And the Flying Prairinos <U+0096> the pink prairie dog family <U+0096> say Gladmane keeps changing their act to make each trainer think the other is doing it!

speaker: Applejack
content: So all his talk about friendship is just a load of applesauce! He's gettin' them all to fight with each other on purpose!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: But how can we get everypony to believe that's what he's doing?

speaker: Applejack
content: There must be a way to trick him into telling the truth!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Gee, if only there was a pony who knew how to trick a trickster.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Or maybe a pair of ponies?

speaker: Applejack
content: Fine. Guess bringin' Flim and Flam back together might be why we're here. Maybe.

speaker: Flim
content: Sorry if I don't take the word of somepony off the street, even if that street is in Ponyville.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: But Gladmane is behind so many other friendship problems. How can you be sure he isn't the cause of yours?

speaker: Flam
content: Because the only problem I have is standing right there.

speaker: Flim
content: Same here, buster!

speaker: Applejack
content: Do either of you even know what you're fightin' over?

speaker: Flim
content: Gladmane let me know that ex-brother of mine thinks I'm just a mouthpiece without a single good idea!

speaker: Flam
content: Gladmane assured me this former fraternal foal here thinks I couldn't sell heat lamps to yaks!

speaker: Applejack
content: Sounds to me like neither of you said those things. Why'd you believe Gladmane when he said you did?

speaker: Flim
content: Why would he lie?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Because he's afraid that the two of you together could move in and take over his resort.

speaker: Applejack
content: And if I'm tellin' you he said it, you know it's the absolute truth because<U+0097>

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: You never lie!

speaker: Flam
content: Oh, brother of mine, I think it's time for a little payback!

speaker: Flim
content: The Canterlot Two-Step?

speaker: Flam
content: Mmm, we don't have the chickens. How about the Baltimare Flair?

speaker: Flim
content: Ah, my flair isn't what it used to be.

speaker: Gladmane
content: Listen here, y'all! If you're a friend of mine, you're entitled to a free night's stay, and everypony is a friend of mine! Thank you. Thank you very much.

speaker: Flim
content: Are you thinking what I am?

speaker: Flam
content: The High Roller Hustle!

speaker: Applejack
content: The what now?

speaker: Flam
content: Trust us. When we're done, there won't be a pony in town who doesn't know the Applejack-iest truth about Gladmane! That is, assuming you two are willing to help.

speaker: Flim
content: What size gown do you wear?

speaker: Gladmane
content: Wh-What's all the fuss, now?

speaker: Flim
content: It's the grand matriarch of the Rich family, Impossibly Rich! She's one of the wealthiest ponies in Equestria.

speaker: Gladmane
content: Well, why didn't somepony tell me? You know how I like to give VIP guests my personal touch.

speaker: Flim
content: Well, she's not exactly a guest. Word is she's planning a resort of her own. I think she's here to scout the competition.

speaker: Gladmane
content: Oh, really?

speaker: Flim
content: And with her bits, she could take over the whole strip, hire away anypony she wants!

speaker: Flim
content: Uh, not me, of course! I love it here. My good-for-nothing brother, on the other hoof...

speaker: Gladmane
content: Impossibly Rich, what an honor it is to have you at my humble five-hoof resort. I'm sure Flam has done an excellent job showing you around, but nothing could beat a personalized tour from the mane himself. Uh-huh-huh.

speaker: Flam
content: You'll have to excuse Ms. Rich. She saves the energy other ponies spend talking out loud and uses it to make more money.

speaker: Flam
content: She'd love a personal tour! Say, in, uh, about an hour?

speaker: Gladmane
content: Well, that sounds right pleasant. And if you can break away for a moment, Flam, I'd love to see you in my office so I can get ready.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Are all of you sure this is a good idea?

speaker: Flim
content: Abso-tively!

speaker: Flam
content: Gladmane is one fish that's hooked but good!

speaker: Applejack
content: I sure hope you two know what you're doin'.

speaker: Flam
content: Oho, don't you worry. When it comes to throwing ponies off their game...

speaker: Flim
content: No two ponies do it better than us!

speaker: Applejack
content: Can't argue with that.

speaker: Flam
content: Hey there, boss, Impossibly Rich is just about ready for that tour. So what did you want to see me about?

speaker: Gladmane
content: Actually, there's something I want you to see <U+0096> the Grand Plan. Every hotel on this strip as amazing as this one, and every one of 'em mine.

speaker: Gladmane
content: And all it'll take is a little salesponyship, like this.

speaker: Gladmane
content: Hey there, friends. Uh-huh-huh. If you think my resort is fantastic, wait 'til you see Ponet Fantastique! Tickets are on sale now. Two for the price of one! Thank you. Thank you very much.

speaker: Gladmane
content: Now I know Impossibly Rich has probably made you a tempting offer to come work for her.

speaker: Flam
content: Well uh, now that you mention it...

speaker: Gladmane
content: And as your friend, I'd never tell you what to do. But nopony's gonna stand in the way of my plans, no matter how rich she is! And I sure wouldn't want you to end up on the losing side. Think you might consider staying here?

speaker: Flam
content: Um...

speaker: Gladmane
content: Well all right then.

speaker: Applejack
content: They're comin'!

speaker: Gladmane
content: And last but not least, Ms. Rich, the jewel in my crown.

speaker: Flam
content: Impossibly wants you to know she's very impressed but doesn't think you can keep a resort of this caliber going for long.

speaker: Gladmane
content: Oh? And why's that?

speaker: Flam
content: Because you've got the best talents in the industry. What stops them from just leaving to join any competitor?

speaker: Gladmane
content: Well, you see I have a trick for that, I must confess. Uh-huh-huh. And it all has to do with how I handle my employees.

speaker: Flam
content: And how is that?

speaker: Gladmane
content: Well, like friends, of course! And I treat every one of my employees with the kindness they deserve.

speaker: Flam
content: That's it? That's your secret, heh-heh? There's... ...nothing else?

speaker: Gladmane
content: Nope, just friendship. But you know all about friendship, don't you... Fluttershy?!

speaker: Flim
content: You knew the whole time?

speaker: Gladmane
content: Never try to con a con-pony. Uh-huh-huh. Yeah!

speaker: Gladmane
content: I'd have thought you'd have hit the road by now.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Whether we were able to fool you or not, you can't just go on keeping ponies from getting along! It's just... mean!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Now, maybe it is. But it's a meanness that works. Unlike your pathetic little ploy. I practically invented the "High Roller Hustle". But I suppose I should be impressed. You're the only ponies to ever figure out the secret to my success. Takes a lot of work keepin' everypony fightin'. But as long as I keep 'em convinced that I'm their only friend, all of Las Pegasus will be mine. Oh, you can't trick a confession out of a pony like me! I'm always one step ahead.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, you better check your hooves, because you've just stepped in a confession!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Oh, no. No, no, w-w-wait, wait!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Did that sound okay?

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: Never better!

speaker: Applejack
content: Flim and Flam told us you'd see right through the fake rich pony bit, and that once you did, you wouldn't be able to resist gloatin' about it! This was all part of the plan!

speaker: Gladmane
content: Oh, now, now, friends! Listen, I-I can explain everything!

speaker: Director
content: I think you've done enough of that! Darling?

speaker: Trapeze Star
content: Hmph!

speaker: Others
content: "Roar Horn": Oh, I cannot believe we let him almost ruin our friendship!

speaker: Others
content: "Sprigfield": And our act. Good luck finding another one!

speaker: Applejack
content: Gladmane has left the buildin'!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I guess the map wasn't on the fritz after all.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: If it weren't for your history with Flim and Flam, you never would've been so determined to find somepony else to help, and we never would have found out what Gladmane was doing.

speaker: Applejack
content: And if it weren't for you wantin' to show even those two con-ponies kindness, we never would have been able to trick the trickster. Must've felt pretty nice to finally put all your connivin' and cheatin' skills to good use.

speaker: Flam
content: In fact, we might think of it as a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

speaker: Flim
content: Emphasis on "once".

speaker: Fluttershy
content: What do you mean?

speaker: Flam
content: While this establishment undergoes a slight change in management, my brother and I want to assure you that it remains the pinnacle of Las Pegasus entertainment! Which is why we invite each and every one of you to experience the wonder of the Ponet Fantastique Theater <U+0096> at half the normal cost of admission!

speaker: Flim
content: And while you're appreciating this historic venue totally devoid of any performers of any kind, we invite you to use the wonder of your own imaginations to fill the space at no additional charge!

speaker: Applejack
content: Flim and Flam!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I've prepared a full day of spells. You've been doing great, but now it's time for a real challenge!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh-ho-ho! It is on! Where do we begin?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Teleportation! Multiple locations! Try to keep up!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Transfiguration!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Shields!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Whoo! I am on fire! What's next?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Maybe there is such a thing as too much studying.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: As you know, speed spells like Accelero are not easy. But if done correctly, they can allow you to be much more efficient with your day.

speaker: Spike
content: Way to go, Starlight!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'm not finished. I've discovered a very old spell, Similo Duplexis, when combined with Accelero in just the right way... ...you can literally be in two places at once! Now I'm finished.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I have to admit, your skills with magic really are nothing short of amazing. I'm very impressed.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I've always been something of a natural.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: However, it doesn't look like you've tackled any friendship lessons since you met Trixie.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Are you sure? I could've sworn there were a couple in there somewhere...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm sure.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I see... Well, I'm really quite busy this week. So many commitments. I'll try and find some time in my<U+0097>

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No time like the present! Spike and I are headed to Canterlot. Princess Celestia wanted me to give her students a quick overview on the history of enchanted objects in Equestria. We'll be back after the presentation, which should be...

speaker: Spike
content: Twenty moons from now?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Tonight. It's a quick presentation.

speaker: Spike
content: Sure, keep telling yourself that...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You can tackle a friendship lesson today, and we can review your progress when I get back later this evening.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Of course! No problem! Friendship lesson... On it...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Great! Can't wait. Now, Spike, help me color-code these cards according to time, place, and object.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Huh? Huh! Oh, yeah. Mm-hmm.

speaker: Spike
content: Hey! Twilight and I are about to head to Canterlot. Just checking to see if you need anything before we left.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Nope, not at all! I'm good here. Oh, not good <U+0096> great! Not a problem in the world! Heh.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh-huh. So... what are you doing, exactly?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I... was... just trying to decide which friendship lesson I was going to tackle while you two were in Canterlot. Bap-ba-du... Oh, yep, right here, where I just left them a second ago.

speaker: Spike
content: "Bake a cake with Pinkie Pie," "scrapbook with Applejack," "sew with Rarity..."

speaker: Spike
content: "Help an animal with Fluttershy," "chillax with Rainbow Dash?" What is chillaxing?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: No idea.

speaker: Spike
content: You know, uh, if you're nervous about your friendship lessons, it's totally okay to say so.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Nervous, me? Oh, Spike, you really are hilarious, ha-ha. You think I'm nervous that I'm gonna fail something as simple as baking a cake?

speaker: Spike
content: Well, if you were, it'd be<U+0097>

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Silly! Twilight just said how impressed she was that I combined a speed spell and a duplication spell. That was a challenge. These? Pfft, hah! I could combine all five of these at the same time without breaking a sweat.

speaker: Spike
content: I think maybe you're missing<U+0097>

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: An opportunity to really impress Twilight? Great idea, Spike! I'm gonna get right on that! Good talk.

speaker: Spike
content: And I thought Twilight was the master of the freak-out.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: So, with your help, I figure these should be done in no time.

speaker: Applejack
content: Are you sure this is what Twilight would want? Seems like you might want to take your time with each of these.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But by working as a team, we can get them done faster. And isn't teamwork a key factor in friendship?

speaker: Applejack
content: I... guess.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Super! Pinkie Pie, since we're baking, you will be in the kitchen.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Rarity, Applejack, you two can set up in the library.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, I don't know that a dusty old library has the proper lighting. Perhaps we can stay out here in the foyer.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I thought that Fluttershy and I could work with the animals right here in the foyer.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, um, whatever you think is best.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Great. Now, Rainbow Dash<U+0097>

speaker: Fluttershy
content: It might depend on the animal. For instance, this poor little eagle with a sprained wing might be better off up in one of the towers.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yeah, yeah, yeah, sure.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: And these adorable little chipmunks might prefer a nook somewhere. Maybe if you spend some time getting to know<U+0097>

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: In a minute, Fluttershy.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh, I don't know if we can chillax properly in the castle. We need very specific conditions for optimal chillaxing.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, I just assumed chillaxing could happen anywhere.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Heh. Shows what you know about chillaxing. Let me do some location scouting.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Okay... It seemed more efficient to start with the scrapbooking, so we can just get it out of the<U+0097>

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh, ooh, ooh-ooh-ooh! Can we start with me? We're gonna need time for the cake to bake! After all... It's a piece of cake to bake a pretty cake<U+0097>

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh, we're on a schedule, no time for a song. We can start with baking, then<U+0097>

speaker: Rarity
content: But we can't design dresses after you've been baking with Pinkie. She can be a bit messy.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Mmm!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Fine. We can start with the dresses, and then<U+0097>

speaker: Applejack
content: While y'all figure that out, I'm gonna start layin' out the pictures for scrapbookin'. We got a whole lot of time to cover.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: How much is a whole lot?

speaker: Applejack
content: We've got at least eighty moons worth of memories to go through.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Eighty moons?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh. There is nowhere to chillax in this castle! We're gonna have to set up somewhere else.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Could you all excuse me for... one... second?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Wow. That pony really needs to chillax.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Okay, Starlight. You've got this. A handful of friendship lessons is nothing compared to the spells you've mastered. Maybe if I cast a little spell to help things along... Something simple and safe. Fiducia Compelus... That's not bad. They would barely notice it, but... is it enough? Oh... Maybe Cogeria so they're more... open to suggestion. Oh, or maybe Cogeria combined with Fiducia Compelus! Yes, that could work nicely! Oh, with a hint of Persuadere to be sure it sticks.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Everypony'll probably thank me for getting it all done so quickly. And Twilight will be thrilled I've completed so many lessons. Everypony wins!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Congratulations, Starlight. You're a genius. Maybe the congratulations were a little premature...

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Cogeria... Persuadere... Fiducia... Hmm. Ah! Of course! Fiducia Compelus needs a trigger. Ponies! Hear my voice and listen!

content: Pinkie, kitchen. Rarity, Applejack, library. Fluttershy, stay here. Rainbow Dash, find somewhere inside the castle and set up a place where we can chillax.

content: Let's get to work, Pinkie!

content: Take what from where?

content: Abso-tively! Instruction following starting... now!

content: What did you have in mind, Rarity?

speaker: Rarity
content: Whatever you want me to have in my mind, Starlight Glimmer.

content: Can you make a dress exactly like that one?

speaker: Rarity
content: Just like this one?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Just like it.

content: Absolutely. It will look perfectly divine.

content: Ugh. I don't need every little detail. Heh. Just sum up the story in one sentence.

content: Huh. Turns out Granny Smith didn't know how to make a pig do the backstroke.

content: Uh-huh... Why don't you keep putting these photos in chronological order, and when I come back, you can give me more... highlights?

content: Sure thing, Starlight Glimmer.

content: Fluttershy, where are all the animals?

content: They ran away.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: And why didn't you stop them?

content: Because you didn't ask me to.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Obviously I wanted you to... Never mind. Can you please round up all the animals in the castle and bring them back here to the foyer?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: All the animals. Got it.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Did you find a place to chillax, Rainbow Dash?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Sure thing, Starlight Glimmer!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Great. Let me know when it's ready.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yes, Starlight Glimmer.

speaker: Applejack
content: Granny Smith knew she was gonna need a bigger boat, so Goldie Delicious says, "If you can't say anythin' nice about anypony, come sit by me!" Big Mac knew if he just covered himself in mud, the creature wouldn't be able to see him!

speaker: Rarity
content: Starlight Glimmer. I have finished the dress. Isn't it gorgeous?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What is that?

speaker: Rarity
content: You wanted me to make a dress exactly like the one in the book.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Go make a real dress out of fabric, exactly like the one in the book.

speaker: Rarity
content: Ah. I see. Yes, of course, Starlight Glimmer.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Rarity! Make it bigger than the one in the book.

speaker: Rarity
content: Of course, darling. Bigger it is.

speaker: Applejack
content: She was just a pony standin' in front of another pony askin' him to love her.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Pinkie, what are you doing?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Following all of the instructions in the cookbook in order, Starlight Glimmer!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I meant just the one cake! I was only gone a few minutes! How in Equestria did you get all of this done so fast?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Think the baking lesson is done.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, what now?

speaker: Applejack
content: They can take our farm, but they can't take our freedom!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What's going on?!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I gathered all of the animals like you asked, Starlight Glimmer.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, yes, this will do nicely.

speaker: Rarity
content: A much bigger dress!

speaker: Applejack
content: It was the best of apples, it was the worst of apples...

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I can handle this. It's just magic, and I know magic. What's that?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What did you say?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: The cakes are burning. You left the ovens on.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We need water!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yes, Starlight Glimmer.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Storm clouds?!

speaker: Applejack
content: Big Mac told me, "With a whole lot of power comes a heck of a lot of responsibility."

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: This can't get any worse!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What is going on?!

speaker: Spike
content: I had no idea we had spiders in the castle! I'm never sleeping again!

content: Maybe if I had reversed the Fiducia Compelus and Cogeria... Or maybe I added too much Persuadere... What?

speaker: Spike
content: You're really missing the point here.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I finally untangled that mess of a spell and got everypony home. It was really powerful stuff. They're gonna feel that in the morning. Now please try to explain to me how in the name of Celestia things got this out of control.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well, it was the first time I cast that particular spell, and I didn't fully think it through. I-I bet if I had reversed<U+0097>

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think you might be missing the point here.

speaker: Spike
content: Told ya.

content: What made you think that casting a spell on your friends to do your bidding was even remotely a good idea?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Baking a cake freaks you out?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yes! Baking a cake, sewing <U+0096> all of it! What if I was bad at it? I didn't want to be a disappointment to anypony, and I ended up being a disappointment to everypony.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Starlight, do you think anypony cares if you can bake a cake?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But the lesson<U+0097>

content: Was to get to know Pinkie Pie better by doing something she loves. It was a friendship lesson, not a baking lesson.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh. You know, I think I might have missed the point here.

speaker: Spike
content: Told ya.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: So now what?

content: Now it's time for a pretty advanced friendship lesson. It's called apologizing.

content: I don't know what kind of whammy Starlight put on us, but I feel like I got shoved through the Super Speedy Cider Squeezy 6000.

content: Yeah, about that... Things got a little out of hand last night.

content: Hmph! Tell it to the cake, sister!

content: I really messed up. I cast the spell because I was nervous about working with you on the friendship lessons.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Believe me, I know. What I did was wrong, a-and I can't take it back. You're right to be upset, and I hope one day I can make it up to you. But all I can say is... I'm sorry. Now, if you'll excuse me, I've gotta go clean the castle covered in wet cake batter and spiders.

speaker: Fluttershy

content: Hey, Starlight! Most of the Apple family photos are still layin' around in the wreckage. I think I'll come along and hunt 'em down.

content: Oh, and I feel awful for disturbing all of those cute little spiders and bats. I should check on them.

speaker: Rainbow Dash

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Fine! Somepony has to bake a cake to honor all the poor cakes that sacrificed their batter in last night's tragedy!

content: It seems your apology went well.

content: I'm just lucky to have such understanding friends, but it's probably going to be a while before I try to tackle those friendship lessons again.

content: What do you mean? You've been doing them all day.

content: What are you talking about? I've been cleaning up the mess I made by totally failing at friendship.

content: Really? But didn't I see you sewing with Rarity?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yes, but<U+0097>

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And you and Applejack did a great job collecting those photos and putting them in the book. Helping animals with Fluttershy, baking with Pinkie Pie <U+0096> those sound like your assignments to me. In fact, I think there's just one that you're missing.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Sun <U+0096> check. Chairs <U+0096> check. And thanks to a simple Catadupa Levitata spell, we've got water. Is that everything we need to chillax?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Nope.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: No? What did I miss?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Quiet.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Ah! Right.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hey! She completes the lesson when I say she completes it. So less learning and more chillaxing!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: So... How long do we sit quietly?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sorry, Spike. It's just Pinkie Pie, Rarity, and Applejack are getting back from their Seaward Shoals boat trip, and I can't wait to hear all about it! It's such a shame Rainbow Dash and Fluttershy had to miss it for their Cloudsdale flight school reunion. Maybe the rest of us not going was for the best anyway. I know the three of them were really looking forward to getting out of their element.

content: Getting out of their element?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think they all just wanted to try something new.

speaker: Spike
content: Huh. I guess a boat trip qualifies as that.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: My only worry is that they'll be so excited, they'll talk over each other, and I'll miss some of the details! Just to be safe, I may need you to take notes.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh... right.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: So how was the trip?

content: Well, at least you don't have to worry about them talking over each other.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't know what happened on that boat trip. But once Rarity, Applejack, and Pinkie Pie have some tea and talk it out, I'm sure everypony will feel better.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Come on in, everypony! Gummy, Opalescence, and Winona? This is a surprise!

content: Aren't Pinkie Pie, Rarity, and Applejack with you?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "Sorry, darling, but I must decline the invitation to your soiree. While I'm sure it will be positively resplendent, there are certain ponies I'd rather not associate with at the moment. Rarity."

speaker: Spike
content: Rarity's not coming? Awww. So I polished my scales for nothing.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "Sorry I can't make it, but I'm still a mite upset about everything that happened on the boat. Applejack." "Sorry I can't make the tea party today, but there's a small problem with the guest list. Plus, I'm right in the middle of a very important cupcake. Pinkie." Come on, Spike! Since our friends won't come here and tell us what happened, we'll just have to go to them!

speaker: Rarity
content: I'm sorry, but my mane wasn't made to support marine life! Ruined, completely ruined.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't know, Rarity. Maybe you could<U+0097>

speaker: Rarity
content: Throw it away? Yes, I agree. Just another innocent casualty of that disastrous boat trip.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: About that. Spike and I were wondering what happened out there.

speaker: Spike
content: If it's too difficult to talk about, we completely understand.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, since you dragged it out of me... It all started at the docks. I knew Applejack and Pinkie Pie wanted to get out of their element, so I thought I would surprise them with an elegant cruise.

speaker: Rarity
content: I had brought a small bag with just a few key essentials. All right, ponies! Prepare yourselves for luxury on the high seas!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: That sounds... fun?

speaker: Applejack
content: The sea air carries a portent for trouble this day. 'Tis a treacherous and perilous journey that lies ahead of us! We sail to adventure... or our very doom.

speaker: Rarity
content: I... have no idea what you just said, but your wardrobe is delightfully seaworthy.

speaker: Rarity
content: Despite Applejack's colorful seafarer attitude, I was still determined to get my friends out of their element by providing them with all the refinements of a luxury cruise. I made sure to bring the most delectable nibbles for them to enjoy.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh, I brought food too!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Let's see, I've got cotton candy, taffy, circus peanuts, and lots of other super-yummy stuff!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Pinkie Pie, that all looks positively delectable. But you simply must try one of these cucumber sandwiches. Dig in!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hmmm. Hmmm. Hmm. Hmm. Hmm. Hmm. Hmm.

speaker: Applejack
content: Arrr! Get those off me ship!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh! I'm so sorry! I had no idea you had such distaste for cucumbers!

speaker: Applejack
content: Yar-har-har-har, hardy-har-har-har!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hmm... That doesn't sound like Applejack.

speaker: Spike
content: Huh.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, hold on, because it gets even worse. Pinkie tried to lighten the mood with some fun maritime games.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: It's pi<f1>ata o'clock! Wanna give it a whack, Rarity?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, darling, of course!

speaker: Applejack
content: I'll be chartin' a course to the very heart of that maelstrom!

speaker: Rarity
content: Ahem. Er, Applejack? Just a thought, but maybe we should steer the ship toward calmer waters.

speaker: Applejack
content: This be the only way to Plunder Cove!

speaker: Rarity
content: Perhaps if I took a quick look-see at that map of yours, I could find us a more cruise-friendly path<U+0097>

content: Yah! There'll be no mutiny aboard me ship!

content: Look at me! I'm the captain too!

content: Clearly, Pinkie Pie had caught Applejack's sea madness.

content: Then what happened?!

content: So Applejack got some sort of sea madness and caused the boat to capsize?

content: After all the effort I put in to provide her and Pinkie with the exact luxury cruise they needed to get out of their elements, that is how Applejack thanked me!

content: So you were stuck out in the middle of the ocean? How in Equestria did you get back?

content: Spike, darling, you'll have to forgive me. I am far too emotionally drained to discuss the matter any further!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rarity, I don't suppose there's any chance you might be... uh, exaggerating things? Just a little?

content: Well! I can assure you that that is exactly what happened! But if you don't believe me, you can ask Pinkie Pie. I'm quite certain her story will be the same.

content: So that's what Rarity said happened on the boat, huh?

content: We thought there was a chance she might have... embellished the story just a tad. So we wanted to hear about what happened from you! Did Applejack really capsize the boat?

content: Of course not! Pfft, that's just silly! There's no way Applejack could've sank the boat!

content: I knew it!

content: That's a relief.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Because Rarity did!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle and Spike
content: What?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: It all started on the docks. I knew Rarity and Applejack wanted to get out of their element, so I figured I'd throw them the funnest, silliest boat party ever! But I guess Rarity had other ideas.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I thought I overpacked until I saw Rarity and her team of porter-ponies!

speaker: Rarity
content: Prepare yourselves for a luxury cruise! A day of opulence, decadence, and extravagance!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: That sounds fun.

speaker: Applejack
content: Ahoy, mateys! Batten down the hatches, y'all, 'cause this here's gonna be a boat ride of adventure!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Eh, I can live with that.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Huh. They just keep coming.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Now, you can't throw a silly boat party without snacks. So I made sure to pack the funnest party food I could find! Rarity, would you care for some cotton candy? It's freshly spun!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Pinkie Pie, those all look simply... well, simple. But they're obviously unfit for a luxury cruise. Now, my cucumber sandwiches, on the other hoof... Try one, then you'll understand.

speaker: Applejack
content: Ooh, are those chocolate chip?

content: Sorry! Cucumber sandwiches are so ten seconds ago.

content: Wait, wait, wait. That doesn't sound like Rarity.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Just wait until you hear how much more unlike her she sounds!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I thought I'd lighten the mood with some super-fun party boat games. But Rarity was a real wet blanket.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: It's pi<f1>ata time! Ooh! Wanna give it a whack, Rarity?

speaker: Rarity
content: ...Oh. You were serious. Well, that's adorable.

speaker: Applejack
content: I'll give it a go!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: That's the spirit! Let's get this boat party started!

speaker: Applejack
content: Whoooooa! Heh-heh! Whoa, doggie!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Tug of war? Now we're talking! Whoever wins gets to be captain!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Or... one of us should just be captain now?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, don't worry, dear. Luxury cruises never sink.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: What?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And that's why the boat sinking was all Rarity's fault.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That seems... odd. I mean, we trust you, of course. But it's all so... extraordinary?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, it's "extraordinary", all right. But that's exactly what happened! In fact, the only thing I might've gotten wrong was that there were even more porter ponies! But just to be safe, you should talk to Applejack. She'll know exactly how many porter ponies there were!

speaker: Spike
content: Okay, but if the boat sank, how did you all get rescued?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, that's easy. We just<U+0097> My muffins!

speaker: Spike
content: That's it. We've gotta go talk to Applejack.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Good idea. She'll straighten this out.

speaker: Spike
content: I just really, really wanna know how they made it back! But yeah, that'd be great too.

speaker: Applejack
content: Hold on a tick. Pinkie Pie says it's Rarity's fault, and Rarity says I sank the boat? Well, that's plumb crazy! If you two really wanna know what happened, I'll tell you. Y'all know how Pinkie Pie and Rarity wanted to get out of their "element"? Well, I bought a treasure map to give 'em a rip-roarin' seafarin' adventure! But they had other ideas.

speaker: Rarity
content: La-la-la! Prepare yourselves for the most luxurious boat outing that ever outed a boat!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And more fun than you can shake a stick at! Because I brought a stick!

speaker: Applejack
content: Alright, mateys, but just y'all wait 'til you see the high seas adventure I've got planned!

content: Unfortunately, they seemed less interested in a treasure huntin' adventure and more interested in snacks.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, darling, that food isn't fit for a pony of proper breeding, darling, and refinement, darling! Now my cucumber sandwiches, on the other hoof...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Bet you I can fit them all in my mouth! Ahh...

speaker: Rarity
content: Pinkie, darling, please!

speaker: Applejack
content: U-uh, Rarity, I<U+0097>

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, I never! Hum-ph!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Me neither! Hum-ph!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Do you want to say it, or should I?

speaker: Spike
content: I'll go. That sure doesn't sound like Rarity or Pinkie Pie!

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, it gets a sight worse than that!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: It's P.W.T. <U+0096> Pi<f1>ata Whacking Time!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, darling, whacking is a base pastime for common ponies. Doesn't interest me in the least.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Meh. Hee-hee!

speaker: Applejack
content: Huh?

speaker: Applejack
content: Whoooooa!

speaker: Applejack
content: Looks like we need to change course!

speaker: Rarity
content: Ooh! Why, this will make a perfect tablecloth for my cheeseboard!

speaker: Applejack
content: Maybe so, but it's also the only way to find Plunder Cove!

speaker: Applejack
content: And Pinkie Pie was just about as helpful as a weasel in a hen house.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Captain Pinkie Pie reporting for map duty!

speaker: Applejack
content: Hold on, everypony!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wait, so it was Rarity and Pinkie's fault?

speaker: Applejack
content: Yup! And maybe if they ever apologized, I'll consider talkin' to them again.

speaker: Spike
content: If they all blame each other, I don't know how we're gonna get them to talk again.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Neither do I, Spike. Neither do I.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There's gotta be some way to fix this. If Applejack, Pinkie Pie, and Rarity keep not talking to each other, they could forget what good friends they really are!

speaker: Spike
content: I just don't get it! All of their stories are so different! We're never gonna figure out what really happened.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Their stories were different, but they also had a lot in common.

speaker: Spike
content: I guess... They were all on a ship that sank, and... that's about it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Not quite.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: A-ha! Not only do I think I know how the boat sank, I have a pretty good idea how to get Rarity, Applejack and Pinkie Pie back together!

speaker: Spike
content: I hope this plan of yours works.

content: Winona brought me your note about a friendship emergency! H-How can I help?

content: Opalescence delivered your message, Twilight! What's the emergency?
