content: It's a good thing it was time for Gummy's bath, or I might not have seen your note about the emergency, Twilight!

content: Applejack, Pinkie Pie, What's she doing here?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sorry, but I just didn't know how else to get the three of you here together, and there really is a friendship emergency! Yours!

content: Oh, there's no emergency! I'm just waitin' for an apology.

content: An apology?!

content: What?! Why would you want me to apologize when it was Rarity's fault?!

content: What are you talking about? Applejack clearly caused the boat to sink! She stranded us in the middle of the ocean!

content: Will somepony please tell me how you made it back?!

content: Well... Maybe it wasn't the middle of the ocean...

speaker: Spike
content: Ugh.

speaker: Applejack
content: Even so, I don't appreciate bein' hornswoggled into comin' back here.

speaker: Rarity
content: On that, at least, we agree.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Yeah!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I know you each have a different perspective on how the boat capsized and blame each other, but if you come on the boat with me I'll show you what really happened.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, not that I have any doubts, but it will feel good for everypony to see exactly whose fault it was.

speaker: Applejack
content: I think we all know which pony's about to be proven right.

speaker: Pinkie Pie

content: I remember when she said that to me.

content: Maybe we can help!

content: Absolutely! Between your flying skills and my teaching expertise, they could learn a lot! Plus, once they get to know us, they'll be more comfortable coming to us with their friendship problems!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Count us in!

content: You have your work cut out for you.

content: I'm pretty sure their thirst for knowledge will keep them bright-eyed and bushy-tailed.

content: Do you think they're still mad?

content: Yeah, they're still mad.

content: No, it's my fault. It hit me when I was watching Sky train with you. He wasn't even trying!

content: Oh, no. He's lost his confidence.

content: Uh, it's a long story, but we'll fix it.

content: You got this, Sky!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Where were you?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I... went to my old village? For the festival?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh, sounds fun! How was it?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It was kind of a disaster. I came back early because I freaked out!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh, sounds awful! Bye!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: That was... strange.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: Isn't she always strange?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yeah, but not like that. Hey! I'm back early.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Rarity
content: Ah. Welcome back?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Have you two noticed Pinkie acting a little strange?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Applejack
content: Pinkie Pie always acts strange.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: Told you.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Anyway, I wanted to talk to all of you. Things didn't go the way I thought they were going to go at the Sunset Festival.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Rarity
content: What happened?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I kind of freaked out and ran out of the village.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Applejack
content: You freaked out and ran away from a festival? Ha! That's the funniest danged thing I've heard all day.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh my. Let me guess. The decorations were terrifying!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Fluttershy
content: ...Applejack for friendship business.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hello, ponies. We need Rarity and Applejack. Very important friendship business.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: I have to say, I'm really not as impressed with your friends as the rest of Equestria is.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I need to talk to Twilight!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Twilight? Hello?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Spike
content: What do you want? Twilight's very busy!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Spike, I really need to speak with her.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Spike
content: Make an appointment! She's a princess, after all!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What's wrong with you? Why are you being so<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rude? I think a certain dragon didn't get his nap today.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Spike
content: Yeah, right. Whatever.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sorry. He's been acting a little off all day. I think he missed a meal or something.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: He's not the only one. Everypony's acting a little strange today.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yes, it's definitely been one of those days! How are you?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Not great, actually. You're probably wondering why I'm back from the village so early.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I didn't want to bring it up, but yeah, it did seem strange. Did it not go well?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: The townsponies kept asking me things, like they expected me to be in charge again. But being a leader is the last thing I should ever be. So we left. Very suddenly. In a literal puff of smoke.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wow, you should definitely never go back to that village.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: If you were worried about what they thought of you before, it's probably way worse now. I'd cut my losses.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: That's... surprising advice, coming from you.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Trust me. I'm the Princess of Friendship. You don't need those ponies. You can always make more friends.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ah! Speaking of friends, if you'll excuse me, important business to attend to!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Cut my losses? That can't be right.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Hey, I wanted to apologize for my behavior earlier. Party Favor, can you hear me?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I told you you can never speak to them again!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What are you all doing here?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Making sure you do what I said! I'm your teacher, aren't I? Didn't I say to never come back here?!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yes, but that just doesn't seem right. You aren't acting like yourself.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer and Princess Luna
content: Something is wrong!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: A dream? This is another dream!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Princess Luna
content: Starlight Glimmer...!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Princess Luna?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Princess Luna
content: Starlight Glimmer!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Princess Luna, where are you?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Princess Luna
content: Starlight Glimmer, there is no time! You must get help!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What? What are you talking about? This is just a dream!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Princess Luna
content: Not here! In the waking world! They've taken my sister and I! It's worse than the last time! Your dream called to me, and I was able to break through! You must find help!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What are you saying?! Who's taken you?!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Princess Luna!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: They're back!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Trixie? Trixie, it's Starlight! Are you awake?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: Of course, Princess Celestia... I'd love to perform for peanut butter crackers...

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Trixie, wake up!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: Starlight? What time is it?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It's late. I think I figured out what's wrong with my friends!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: I have a whole list of things that are wrong with your friends. We can go over it in the morning.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: No, Trixie, we're in danger!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: Okay, fine! Aside from lack of sleep, how are we in danger?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I think the<U+0097>! What did you tell me never to tell another pony?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: Starlight, if you woke me up to play guessing games<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: After we left my village, what did you tell me to never tell another pony you said?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: That even Trixie's made mistakes.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Trixie, there's no time for this! What did you say?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: That even Trixie's made mistakes! Okay? Are you happy?!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yes. Sorry. I just had to make sure you weren't... one of them!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: One of who?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: A changeling! I think they've taken Princess Celestia and Princess Luna!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: What?! Are you sure?! I mean, what do we<U+0097>? We have to tell Twilight!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: If I'm right, then it's too late for that.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Is it ready?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Applejack
content: Just one more.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Queen Chrysalis!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Queen Chrysalis
content: Ugh. I can't take any of you seriously when you look like that.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, right.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Queen Chrysalis
content: Much better. Now report!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Changeling
content: Everything here is going according to plan! We've replaced the six ponies and their dragon, and have taken control of the castle!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Queen Chrysalis
content: Excellent. And I've just received word that the princesses from Canterlot have successfully been replaced as well.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: I can't deal with this! I'm just a performer! This is... This is princess-level stuff! But the changelings have all the princesses... We're doomed!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Maybe not. Uh, Queen Chrysalis only said they took Luna and Celestia and obviously Twilight and the others... but maybe Cadance is still safe. Our best bet is to get to the Crystal Empire before the changelings do. That way we can<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Thorax
content: There's no help coming from the Crystal Empire.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Thorax?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Thorax
content: Yes.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Your wings look... different.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Thorax
content: I guess they do.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: How do I know you aren't some other changeling pretending to be Thorax?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Thorax
content: You were there when Spike defended me to the ponies of the Crystal Empire. Princess Twilight said<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Thorax
content: As the Princess of Friendship, I should set an example for all of Equestria. But today it was Spike who taught me<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Okay, okay. I believe you. We don't need the whole speech.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Trixie, this is Thorax. He's a reformed changeling. He's on our side. Understand?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Thorax
content: Hi. It's a pleasure to...

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: If Starlight says you're on our side, I believe her. But maybe just stay over there for now, okay?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What did you mean there's no help? Did the changelings get Cadance too?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Thorax
content: They took Cadance, Shining Armor, and Flurry Heart! Sunburst sent me here to get Princess Twilight's help, but... but it sounds like it's too late for that, too! So... what should we do?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: Yeah, Starlight. What are we gonna do?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I... I don't know! There has to be somepony else who can handle this?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: There is nopony else! Everypony with powerful magic is already gone!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Discord
content: You know whenever ponies talk about powerful magic, they always leave me out. If I weren't so evolved, I might decide to take it personally. Well, isn't this quite the combination of secondary characters? Where are Twilight and the girls?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: First, how do we know that you're really you?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Discord
content: Shall I continue?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Chrysalis and the changelings are back. They've ponynapped all of the most powerful ponies in Equestria! Celestia, Luna, Cadance, Shining Armor, Flurry Heart, Twilight and her friends. We need to<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Discord
content: They took Fluttershy?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yes!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Discord
content: Where?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: The Changeling Kingdom. With you on our side, I can<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Discord
content: Odd. I was trying to take us right to Fluttershy, but there is no Fluttershy.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Trixie
content: I think I have a pretty good idea where she might be...

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 1
speaker: Thorax
content: I'd hoped never to see that place again. Now what?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It's... the ponies from my old village.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh. It's only a dream.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: With my past, I should never be in charge of anything!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Princess Luna
content: They've taken my sister and I! It's worse than the last time!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Chrysalis and the changelings are back. They've ponynapped all of the most powerful ponies in Equestria!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: ...this is Thorax. He's a reformed changeling.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: They took Fluttershy?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: I think I have a pretty good idea where she might be...

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Oh, this is so strange. We're here and that's there, and I clearly meant for us to be there and not here.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Oh, I-I can probably explain<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Oh, well. If at first you don't succeed...

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Maybe we should come up with a plan first?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: A what?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: You know, figuring out the best way to do something before you actually do it.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Oh, that's adorable. But you see, unlike you, I can do anything.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Uh, actually<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: That's all very nice, but really a waste of time. We have me. And what else could we possibly need?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: A draconequus with magic and half a brain might help.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Why are you here again? I mean, it's not like you're going to stop the changelings by pulling a rabbit out of a hat. At least my magic can do something.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: The thing about magic here is<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: I've been trying to tell you! Nothing other than changeling magic works here. Chrysalis' throne is carved from an ancient dark stone that soaks up outside magic the same way changelings soak up love. It's how she keeps the hive safe.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: So, uh, what kind of plan were you thinking?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Without magic, I have no idea. But nopony else is coming. So somepony better come up with something.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Anypony? Anything? Hmm. This throne <U+0096> if we get into the hive and destroy it, can we get our magic back?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Uh-huh!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Well, that's a terrible plan. How are we even supposed to get to the hive?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: We walk.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: I haven't walked that far in a millennia!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Oh, I don't know how any of you manage not being able to disappear and reappear whenever you want!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Well, I, for one, definitely miss you being able to disappear!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Give Discord a break. None of us knew we weren't going to be able to use magic.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: I did.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: If we get separated, it might make sense to have a way to make sure we are who we say we are.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: How about if we say "klutzy" and you say "draconequus"?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: "Klutzy draconequus". Works for me.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: I'll definitely remember it.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Okay. I am definitely glad you came. I don't think we'd be able to find our way without you.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: You definitely wouldn't.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Um, where's the way out?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: It's a changeling hive. It shifts and changes like we do, and we're the only ones who can navigate it. It's total chaos to non-changelings.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Well, it's decent chaos. I don't know if I'd call it "total".

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Are we sure that I'll get my magic back when we destroy this throne thingy?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: If Thorax is right, then yes.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Well, that's reassuring.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: And how are we supposed to destroy the throne when we find it?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I... don't know.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: That's reassuring.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: I don't suppose you brought any throne-destroying tools along with these useless sideshow props.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Asks the Lord of Chaos who can't go for a walk without whining nonstop!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Yes, but when the throne is destroyed, I'll be able to rip the very fabric of reality to save our friends, while you'll still be a self-absorbed, below-average illusionist!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Self-absorbed?! Why, you...!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Cut. It. Out! I'm just barely keeping it together, and it would be wonderful if you two could actually try to help instead of bickering like foals!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Okay.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: How can we help?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Don't ask me! I couldn't even handle giving advice at the Sunset Festival, and I had magic then! And the three of us are as good as useless! At least Thorax knows where we're going.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Um, guys? I think we're lost.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Oh, great. We might as well just sit here and wait for the changelings to soak up all of our love or whatever gross thing it is that they do. How often do you all get hungry?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Actually, I haven't been since I met Spike. And changelings are always hungry. We can never get enough love.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Well, that's just super<U+0097>

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But you aren't hungry at all now?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Huh. Once I made a few friends, I guess I just sort of forgot about the whole feeding thing.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Is that about the same time your wings changed?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: I guess so.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Can you please lower your voice?! You're gonna get us all captured!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Oh, you keep saying that, but I haven't seen an actual changeling since we got into this hive.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: W-What's that?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: A changeling patrol!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: This seems like one of those moments where we need a plan.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: What kind of plan?! We have no magic, and it's not like my illusions are gonna save us!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Do you have any of your smoke bombs?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Are you kidding?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Looking for somepony?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Not exactly great and powerful, but effective.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Hm. I'll take it.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: "Klutzy"...

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie and Thorax
content: ..."draconequus"!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Discord
content: Ugh. I really think we need a new code word!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: That was a pretty good plan.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: But we still don't know where we're going.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Actually, we might. Two of the changelings didn't go with the rest.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Oh! With an intruder in the hive, they went to protect the queen! Good thinking, Starlight!

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: Now what?

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We... go in.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Thorax
content: Even if I wanted to, there's no way past the guards. We'll be spotted for sure.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We need some kind of... distraction.

episode: To Where and Back Again - Part 2
speaker: Trixie
content: I'm fresh out of smoke bombs.

content: Oh, I know. But she always calms down. Eventually.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Why do you find rocks so fascinating?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Each one has a different story to tell. Like Boulder here. This tells me he's over two thousand years old. You don't look a day over six hundred.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Wow. You can tell that from a line?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: I didn't get a rocktorate because I can shred on guitar like nopony else.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Another reason I like rocks <U+0096> they don't exclude you if you're... different than other ponies.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: They're beautiful and strong, but they don't judge you or make you feel less than in any way. I think I'm starting to like rocks, too.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It's hollow?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: It's granite. Hollow granite is highly unusual.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Wow! Have you ever seen anything like this?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: No. And that's unusual. For me.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: There you are! I thought you went your separate ways but you can't imagine how happy I am to find you both together and to witness one of your firsts as friends!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: First time discovering an underground cavern! I can't wait 'til you're old and eating pistachios together and telling your grand-foals about this! Oh, no! They're not bonding!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I got an idea!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Whooaa! I'm tripping on a rock at this very moment! And now I'm falling down!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, no! My accidental clumsiness has trapped us here! Where you'll be forced to bond until we're rescued.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, we won't have to wait for that. There's gotta be a spell that<U+0097>

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Get us out of here, boy.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Boulder, that was awesome!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: No. That was sandstone.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: More sand than stone, apparently.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I'm thinking you wear these around your neck at all times so I don't lose you again, you sillies! That way, I can track your progress as friends!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh! And tomorrow, we can have a friendship brunch! What's your favorite kind of omelette cupcake?! Mine's jalape<f1>o red velvet!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yeah, um, I-I don't know if I can make it.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You'll change your minds when you smell the yummy food! Come on!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oops.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Tomorrow's brunch is going to be the scrumptiest, brunchiest, munchiest brunch ever!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Yeah. About that...

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Zero times.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, Maud, don't be so hard on yourself! You've got the best friendship-maker in Ponyville on the case! I'll be by your side the whole time! Speaking of which, your bell fell off, silly!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Pinkie Pie, I appreciate what you're trying to do, but<U+0097>

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Buuuuuut?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Never mind.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Don't worry, Maud. When you see this brunch, you'll realize everything's gonna be okay! And then, I have amazing bonding activities planned for the next seventeen days! You and Starlight will be besties in no time! Goodnight! ...Cupcake omelette...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Friendship brunch!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Pinkie Pie. Thank you for trying so hard to help me make friends. But my decision has to be rock based. And Ghastly Gorge has such great rocks, I won't even have time for friends. It's better this way. Sorry it didn't work out. Maud.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Maud! Wait!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Maud! Maud...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Starlight, wake up!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Kites!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Huh? Oh. If this is about brunch, I-I, uh... You know what? Jalape<f1>o red velvet omelettes sound gross. I-I just can't.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Maud left in the middle of the night!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh. I guess Ghastly Gorge really does have the best rocks.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Why couldn't you two just be friends?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Pinkie Pie, I like Maud.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You do?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yeah. She's weird!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hey!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: No, in a good way! She sees the world in a totally different way than anypony I've ever met. She accepts me for who I am. She taught me that a rock is never just a rock, and she could make anything funny. We never had to say it, but we got each other.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You really were becoming friends?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I think so, but you kinda sorta... got in the way.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You're right, too harsh. Let's go with... You ruined everything all the time?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Mmmmh, that's worse. What I'm trying to say is<U+0097>

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I have to go!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Sigh.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Emerald jasper? This must be my lucky day.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Maud tracks!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Hello, Pinkie Pie. I found emerald jasper.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Are you okay, Maud?! That eel almost ate you!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: What eel?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: You didn't need to come. I'm having a great time on my own.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: I even made a new friend.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Is it a rock?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Yes.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Maud!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: I don't belong in Ponyville. It only proved I'm better off all by myself. Like I always have been.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Don't say that! It was all my fault! I<U+0097> I thought I knew everything about making friends, but I didn't even know my own sister! I forced you to do things my way, but my way isn't your way!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: This way.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Exactly!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: No. This way.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Maud, I thought you couldn't make a friend without my help, but it turns out you couldn't make a friend with my help. I underestimated you, and I'm sorry.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: I know you did it out of love. You're my best sister friend forever.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: And you melt my heart more easily than sodium-rich plagioclase feldspar.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I don't know what that means, but please please please please please give Ponyville another chance! But more importantly, give me another chance... to leave you alone.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: What do you think, Boulder?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You're back!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Mm-hmm.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: For good?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Mm-hmm. This doesn't mean we need to start talking about feelings, does it?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Heh. No way.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Maybe after this we could decorate my new place.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Totally! Where is it?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Well, it's not in Ponyville. More like Ponyville-adjacent.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It's perfect.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Sorry, sorry, I'm leaving! I promise. I'm not even here. Aah, you're wearing the slippers! Okay, now I'm really leaving. Buh-bye!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh! Be careful!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Are you okay, Angel?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I told you that entering the Ponyville Parkour Contest was a dangerous idea. You just rest here, and I'll have you all fixed up in no time. Oh, dear. I'm all out of bunny foot braces. I think we need to pay a visit to Dr. Fauna.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, I was sure she would be here today.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Hello? Is anypony there?

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Fluttershy? Oh, am I glad to see you!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I wish I could say the same, but the door's stuck, so I, um... can't see you.

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Ohhhh. Somebunny hurt his foot. Let's bandage that up so he can get back home. I'd like to keep him overnight, but as you can see, my place is just bursting with animals! I don't think I can take in even one more critter right now!

speaker: Fluttershy and Dr. Fauna
content: Fluttershy and Dr. Oh, dear.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: You really have your hooves full here.

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. This place is like a zoo! Then again, it's normally like that, but still... I can't keep up!

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Oh. Now, does my favowite wittle bunny want a carrot pop?

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. That's okay. I think the goats ate all of them anyway.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I just can't believe all these poor little animals are hurt. What happened?

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. I'm flummoxed! Every day, there's more and more animals on my doorstep. Most of them just have minor ailments <U+0096> hurt wings, stuffy noses, and such. But the trouble is even after they're all healed up, I can't seem to get these comfy critters to leave!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, dear.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: They do seem to have made themselves right at home here.

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. I wonder why they chose to flock to my office. It just doesn't make sense.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Don't be silly, Dr. Fauna. You're the best vet pony in Equestria. At least that's what I've been telling everypony.

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Uh... you did what?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, no. Do you suppose it's my fault? I'm so sorry. I didn't mean for this to happen. I just know animals feel safe and happy under your care.

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Normally, I don't mind if a snake wants to slither in or a raccoon needs a rest, but now this place is so full, I have no space to treat any injured animals.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: That is a big problem... that I'm going to fix for you! I already have the perfect solution that'll make the critters happy and give you more space. Then you'll have all your ducks in a row!

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. The sooner you fix it, the better!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm on it!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I want to thank you all for rushing right over when I called.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Dr. Fauna needs my help with a serious problem.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: A friendship problem?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: No. Her vet clinic is a bit... maybe, um... overrun with adorable critters in dire need of a safe place to lay their heads, and... they don't have anywhere to go!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, that's just awful.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I know!

speaker: Applejack
content: Yeah. Dr. Fauna's always fixin' Winona up when she ain't feelin' too fine, so helpin' her out is A-okay by me.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hah! Yeah!

speaker: Rarity
content: You can count on us!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Okie-dokie-lokie!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, that's great news! Because it means you'll all be helping me with something special, too. Something that's been a dream of mine for a long time.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, goody! Is your dream to make a bouncy castle shaped like a gigantic bundt cake?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Um, no. Not exactly.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Huh. Just me then.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: So? What is it, Fluttershy? Spill!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: My dream is to build a real animal sanctuary.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: A beautiful habitat where every animal <U+0096> whether sick or scared or even just lonely, feathered or furry, scaly or slimy <U+0096> every critter would be welcome. My sanctuary can be the one place in Equestria they call home 'til they feel ready to take on the world.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wow, Fluttershy! I've never heard you speak with such conviction.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh! That was exquisite!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Pretty awesome.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, thank you, everypony. You all taught me so much about building my confidence over the years. It's because of your friendship that I finally feel able to make my dream project a reality. But I can't build the sanctuary alone. Will you join me?

speaker: Applejack
content: I'm happy to offer my extra hooves to ya. Huh. But come to think of it, I actually know a filly who'd be more help than I would. She's a friend of mine from Winona's sheep-herdin' competitions <U+0096> Wrangler! Heh. She's an expert in animal enclosures.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: How lovely!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh-ooh-ooh! I know somepony, too! Hard Hat is the best construction pony in Ponyville. He can build anything you could ever, ever, ever want!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Is it you, Rarity?

speaker: Rarity
content: No! No. Um, I was referring to the premiere interior designer of the Canterlot elite <U+0096> Dandy Grandeur. He helped me when I was setting up my Canterlot boutique. I know that he'd be thrilled to work with you.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Wow, everypony! Thank you! I can't wait to meet all of them and hear their ideas. We're right on track to building the most wonderful sanctuary in Equestria!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Thank you, Rupert. Ahem. It's wonderful that you all could join me to discuss the Ponyville sanctuary project. My friends have so many nice things to say about each of your talents. This is a big project, so I'm happy to have such experienced ponies working on it with me.

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: Rarity has impeccable taste in design and friends, so I can't wait to work with you, you know?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I-I think so.

speaker: Wrangler
content: Yee-haw! I'm just lookin' forward to helpin' ya out, ma'am! And the animals.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Of course.

speaker: Hard Hat
content: So, uh, Pinkie Pie said you drew up some blueprints?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Um, not exactly. It's more of a dream board.

speaker: Hard Hat
content: Hmmm, that sure doesn't look like an animal hospital.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Well, that's because it's not. It's a sanctuary. A place that is safe but not restrictive. Cozy but natural. A place where the animals can come and go as they please.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: So, can you build it?

speaker: Others
content: Wrangler, Hard Hat, Uhhh...

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I want the sanctuary to have an open floor plan. No walls. More like an enclosure that melts into the trees. With a gate in the back. That way, the animals can return to the forest right when they feel ready.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Sneaky! I like it!

speaker: Hard Hat
content: You know, uh, I designed the Ponyville Hospital. I could do the exact same thing right here. I still have the blueprints. Though it'll take a while to clear all these trees.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: But I don't want to clear the trees. I want to use them.

speaker: Hard Hat
content: Are you sure? What you're talking about doesn't really seem like a cohesive structure. Or any structure I'm familiar with.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Critters don't live the same way ponies do. I know this is unconventional, but that's because we're trying to do something that's never been done before. I really believe it'll work.

speaker: Hard Hat
content: Hmm. All right then. I'll see what I can do.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: See, Fluttershy? Whatever you want.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Good.

speaker: Hard Hat
content: I know she thinks she knows what's best, but once she sees how much better it works with these plans, she'll thank us.

speaker: Steam Roller and Jack Hammer
content: Uh-huh, yup.

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: Which one do you like for the window treatments?

speaker: Rarity
content: Ooooh! Loving the print on those!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Um, not to be rude, but there must be some mistake. We have no need for curtains at the sanctuary.

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: And whyever not?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Everything is gonna look natural in the animal habitats, not like it was made for ponies.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Drab? You're calling the colors of beautiful trees drab?

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: Exactly! The natural look is not in right now. This is better. Trust me.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I appreciate your input, but I just know the animals would be happiest with dirt brown pillows and leaf green accents.

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: I'll... look into it.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Thank you.

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: ...Sometimes they need me to steer them away from it. Especially if it's dirt brown.

speaker: Wrangler
content: And right there, we got your standard sheep-travelin' cage. Fits two critters, dependin' on size.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Hmm.

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, what is it, sugarcube?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm looking for something less like a cage and more like a nice hug. Maybe if we lose that part.

speaker: Wrangler
content: Uh... Well then, it wouldn't be a cage.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Exactly! Ooh! This is the perfect base for a little nest. I'll take a bunch of these and anything else the animals can burrow into.

speaker: Wrangler
content: You sure you don't want somethin' more secure for the critters?

speaker: Applejack
content: She does have a point there. You wouldn't want a bunny wanderin' into the wrong cave, would ya?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: No! No cages. I want to give the animals the freedom to come and go. It's the only way they'll feel comfortable.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, she's the boss.

speaker: Hard Hat
content: Hey, whaddya think, Fluttershy? I told ya we'd be fast. Almost finished with the building already.

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: The color just pops, you know?

speaker: Wrangler
content: Quite roomy inside, really. And very safe.

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: Don't keep us waiting, Fluttershy. Do you love it, or do you love it?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I... I... I don't love it! This is not going to work at all! A giraffe can't fit through this door! With these curtains blocking the light, how are the birds gonna sing in the sunshine? And this is the opposite of a nice hug! I know you all worked hard, but none of you did anything I asked for!

speaker: Hard Hat
content: That's not true. We used the trees just like you asked!

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: And that curtain fabric is organic! It's got natural fibers!

speaker: Wrangler
content: And I added pillows inside my cages. That should count as feelin' like a hug!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I may not know much about construction or interior design or wrangling, but I am an expert at one thing: the care of animals! And what animals need is a sanctuary, not this!

speaker: Dandy Grandeur
content: Maybe your "vision" wasn't all that it was cracked up to be, you know?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: My vision isn't the problem here! I told you all exactly what I wanted, and none of you listened to me! So while I appreciate your efforts, I no longer require your services!

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Hello! Oh, the animals have been so excited for the sanctuary, they couldn't wait any longer! Can we take a look inside?

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Oh, I'm so sorry, Fluttershy.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: No. I'm the one who should be sorry. This didn't go at all like I had imagined.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Sleep tight, little one. It's going to be okay. I promise.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Now, now, every mouse has gotta wait their turn.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I'm so sorry. I thought I'd have a beautiful sanctuary for you all to stay in by now. But I put my trust in the wrong ponies.

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. It's okay, Fluttershy. I know you did your best, but we can make this work here. It'll be a bit, uh... tight. Heh. But with your help, we'll have these patients back on their paws in no time, even without a sanctuary.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: No!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I won't give up! These animals need me! And I'm gonna solve this once and for all! If this little lady can crawl all the way here from Western Equestria, I can find a way to build her a safe place to rest!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh! Oops. Everyone back to sleep now.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Thanks for coming, everypony. As you know, building the sanctuary didn't go quite as planned.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I know, right? Who would've guessed that Hard Hat wouldn't build whatever you want?

speaker: Rarity
content: I never would've invited Dandy to help if I thought he'd act in such a manner.

speaker: Applejack
content: And Wrangler sure made a fool outta me, too. I'm sorry, Fluttershy.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: It's okay. You were all just trying to help. But I know that letting all the experts go was the right call.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: So what are you gonna do now?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Try again. I'm going to rebuild the sanctuary and do it my way this time.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: All right, Fluttershy!

speaker: Applejack
content: You show 'em, filly!

speaker: Rarity
content: That's the spirit!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: How about putting an awesome flying course for the birds right there?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And a carrot cake stand here?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ooh, a library cave?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Everypony, stop! I appreciate you sharing your thoughts, but I need everypony to respect mine. Other ponies may be experts in their fields, but animals are my field of expertise. And if I say this is what I want, then this is what needs to happen! Oh, um, for the animals of course.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wow! We should call you "Flutterbold" now!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: To get things back on track, I called in a favor from an old friend. He'll be here any minute.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I thought you said no more experts.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: This is one expert I know I can trust to put the animals first. Plus there's nopony better at building.

speaker: Big Daddy McColt
content: I heard somepony needs construction help fer them critters!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Big Daddy McColt! We met each other back when the map called me and Fluttershy to the Smokey Mountains!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: And he certainly knows his stuff when it comes to buildings and caring for animals.

speaker: Big Daddy McColt
content: Well, shucks. Let's not stand around talkin' about it. Let's build us a sanctuary!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Are you ready?

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Oh, I'm more excited than a beaver in a log pile!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Okay, you can open your eyes! Welcome to Sweet Feather Sanctuary, a safe and cozy retreat for everycreature!

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Oh, Fluttershy! This is amazing!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Now you should have plenty of room at the clinic. Because once you've treated them, they can recover here! With my help, of course. It's okay, Lola. We all move at our own pace. Sometimes, all we need to do is believe in our dreams. And when we finally reach our goal, we'll know that it was worth what it took to get there, because the view will be even better than you imagined!

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Oh, I have to... Oh! I can't believe the winter-to-spring transition is almost here!

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Ohhh. I like that. I'm going to have to relabel all my binders. Right after we finish... everything! We still have so much to do! Oh, my bustles and bows! Rarity, did we<U+0097>?

speaker: Rarity
content: Already hemmed, ruched, and cut, my dear.

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Oh. Rarity, no reason to panic, but, um, we seem to be temporarily low! And when I say "temporarily low", I mean "completely out of"<U+0097>!

speaker: Rarity
content: The baby blue sapphires? They arrived this morning.

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Oh. Heh. Wonderful. Oh! What about the design for the<U+0097>?!

speaker: Rarity
content: And done!

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Wow. You are good. And you've really outdone yourself this time! The Morning Sunshine Tulip Frock is gorgeous!

speaker: Rarity
content: Ooh, thank you. Look, I know you're worried about something slipping between the cracks. But with your managerial skills and my fabulous designs, we have everything covered.

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: You're right. You're right. There are no cracks.

speaker: Rarity
content: Would you be a dear and fetch me some vermilion satin from the back? And I'll start on the Eternal Elegance Empire Silhouette evening gown.

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: My most certain pleasure!

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Rarity, we're running low on vermilion satin.

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: I... I can order more!

speaker: Rarity
content: And this is when we pretended we were storybook princesses. And here we pretended we were on a dangerous yet stylish safari. So many wonderful memories! Not to put too fine a point on it, but... Sweetie Belle loves playing dress-up. I miss her so much!

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Then why don't you go visit her?

speaker: Rarity
content: I wish I... could, but... between... running... three stores and the spring-sition... I couldn't possibly...

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: But you've already done almost all the work. I can handle the rest.

speaker: Rarity
content: B-B-But... but...

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Rarity, go. I have everything well in hoof.

speaker: Rarity
content: Mm, point taken. I am going to visit my sister!

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: Way to immediately turn that around.

speaker: Rarity
content: We can spend the whole day together! And we can do all her favorite things!

speaker: Sassy Saddles
content: I'm sure she'd love that.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, Sassy, thank you!

speaker: Sassy Saddles
