speaker: Spike
content: I don't know! Ember was asking for you, Thorax wants to talk with me. We need to switch places! They might be getting suspicious.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: All we have to do is make both Thorax and Ember feel special and keep them apart for a few more hours. We can do this.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think it's the map. It's calling... you. Apparently, you also have to solve a friendship problem!

speaker: Spike
content: The map is calling me?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, amazing! The map is really reaching out!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Not a good time? I get it.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Spike, are you here? Ember's eaten all of Twilight's decorations, and<U+0097>oh! Hey, Twilight! Glowing map... Glowing spikes... That's not good.

speaker: Spike
content: I know!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: At least your friendship problem is in Ponyville? Heh.

speaker: Spike
content: Okay, okay. To pull this off, I'm gonna need both of you to help. You two need to keep Ember and Thorax separate while I get ice cream.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You mean "find the friendship problem".

speaker: Spike
content: Yeeeees! Go easy on me. I'm under a lot of pressure.

speaker: Spike
content: Friendship problem? Anypony gotta friendship problem here? Any problems to solve? Friendship problems? Friendship problems! Anypony got a friendship problem here? No? Okay.

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: Well, I think vanilla strawberry cream is overused!

speaker: Sweetie Drops
content: Hmph.

speaker: Spike
content: Yes! Fighting! Uh, I mean, what seems to be the problem?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ember, there you are!

speaker: Ember
content: Okay, right. More pony hugs.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How's your trip to Ponyville so far?

speaker: Ember
content: Well, I'm certainly learning a lot about friendship. I had no idea it was polite to decorate your walls in your friends' favorite foods!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, my.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Nooooo. They're just making sure everything is perfect for your welcome party later. In the meantime, how about I show you around town?

speaker: Ember
content: Sounds good. I can't exactly learn about friendship if I don't make new friends.

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh, hey, Thorax. Um, Twilight and Spike had some boring official paperwork to deal with, so looks like you and I get to hang out. What would you like to do?

speaker: Thorax
content: But I wanted to talk with Spike. He said he'd be right back.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, you will. But first, how about we grab a bite to eat?

speaker: Thorax
content: Huh. Well, you know, now that you've said it, I am a little hungry. Is there a dining room in the castle?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: No! I mean, yeah, but that's castle food. If you want the good stuff, we gotta go to town. Phew!

speaker: Spike
content: ...and that's why you should never let cupcake flavors get in the way of your friendship.

speaker: Lyra Heartstrings
content: Huh. I guess I never thought of it that way. Thanks, Spike!

speaker: Spike
content: Oh, come on! Glow!

speaker: Thorax
content: Spike! There you are! Uh, done with your boring paperwork, I see.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh-huh. Uh-huh.

speaker: Spike
content: Yep. I am done with whatever Starlight says I was doing.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Thorax wanted to get out of the castle. I thought coming to town was a really, really great idea.

speaker: Thorax
content: Well, maybe now we can talk.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, sssssure.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'll leave you guys to it.

speaker: Thorax
content: First of all, I want to say thank you for having me over. I'm in a bit of a leadership pickle, and I could use some advice.

speaker: Spike
content: Well, I definitely want to help you out as quickly as possible.

speaker: Ember
content: Usually when I do that, the dragons are eager to meet me.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's not how ponies make friends.

speaker: Ember
content: Ah, I get it.

speaker: Ember
content: This is a weird friendship thing you ponies do, right?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh, you guys are in town, too?

speaker: Ember
content: What are you talking about? You've been with me this whole time.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: No. I'm Starlight.

speaker: Ember
content: Riiiight. I'm sorry, but you can't blame me. You both look and act so much alike.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle and Starlight Glimmer
content: What?!

speaker: Thorax
content: ...and they said to me they just keep saying the same thing. You know, I think my leadership problem started in childhood. I must've been three when... ...three's a different story, a-and you've definitely gotta hear it. But the story about my brother was when I was two... or was I one?

speaker: Crusoe Palm
content: This is my seat! I saw it first!

speaker: Others
content: "Rainbow Stars": Well, I got here first!

speaker: Spike
content: Thorax, uh, excuse me for a second.

speaker: Thorax
content: Hey, that was really great advice. So what do you think I should do?

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, actually, I, uh... need a minute... alone... to, uh, really come up with great advice! I'll be right back.

speaker: Thorax
content: Great. No problem. Leave me again. It's fine.

speaker: Ember
content: I'm just saying you're both purple ponies with purple hair. You both have cutie marks with sparkly things.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Mine's more of a glimmer. Heh.

speaker: Ember
content: How is that different? Oh, good. Spike. Can you please tell these two I'm right? They look very similar.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh... Well, y'know, one thing friends do is let something go when it's upsetting somepony else.

speaker: Ember
content: But I'm right! Besides, who are you to be telling me about friendship? I've barely seen you all day!

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, well, I've seen you.

speaker: Ember
content: Are you calling me a liar?!

speaker: Thorax
content: Hey! No one yells at my friend!

speaker: Ember
content: Spike, get away from the bear!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Actually, the bear is a changeling. And he's quite gentle.

speaker: Spike
content: My worst fears are happening!

speaker: Spike
content: Noooo!

speaker: Thorax
content: Back away, Spike! I'm not gonna let this dragon harm a scale on your back!

speaker: Ember
content: You back away! I'm not gonna let you harm him! Wait. Did you say you're not gonna let me harm Spike?

speaker: Thorax
content: Yeah!

speaker: Ember
content: But that's what I'm doing!

speaker: Thorax
content: Uh, what?

speaker: Ember
content: Yeah, what?

speaker: Spike
content: Equestria as we know it is over! The war that pits changeling against dragon is about to begin! And it's all my fault! My title of Equestria's friendship ambassador is a lie<U+0097>! Oh. Hey. You guys aren't fighting?

speaker: Ember
content: Why would we be fighting?

speaker: Spike
content: Because I accidentally invited you both over to Ponyville on the same day?

speaker: Ember and Thorax
content: So what?

speaker: Spike
content: So I... was trying to keep you apart because I didn't think you'd get along.

speaker: Ember
content: Oh. I get it. You thought he wouldn't like me just because I'm a dragon and I'm bad at friendship?

speaker: Spike
content: No, no, of course not! But<U+0097> Wait. Isn't that why you're here?

speaker: Ember
content: I can say I'm bad at friendship. You can't say it about me! You know what? I don't wanna talk about it.

speaker: Spike
content: Wait, please! I'm sorry.

speaker: Thorax
content: No, no, it's cool. You thought I would be too soft, and someone like Ember would never respect me. Just like my own changelings!

speaker: Spike
content: No, that's not it! Thorax, wait! Oh, no... What have I done?

speaker: Ember
content: Why are you still here?

speaker: Thorax
content: Because I'm having trouble leading my pack, so I don't really wanna go home.

speaker: Ember
content: Wait, you're in charge? Oh, boy. You need to be more assertive.

speaker: Thorax
content: Well, that's my problem. I don't know how! I tried asking them to please follow my directions. I even offered a prize, and then<U+0097>

speaker: Ember
content: Shhh! Stop talking.

speaker: Ember
content: That's how you do it.

speaker: Thorax
content: Whoa! That just gave me chills.

speaker: Ember
content: I know you have it in you. You turned into a bear to defend Spike.

speaker: Thorax
content: Huh, I guess I can be tough when I'm defending my friends, but when I'm just enforcing my rules, I-I feel unsure of myself.

speaker: Ember
content: There's nothing to be unsure of. You're the leader for a reason. Make a decision and let it be known that the decision is final. And if that doesn't work, turn into a bear.

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh, well, that's good advice.

speaker: Ember
content: I know it is.

speaker: Thorax
content: So what's your deal? Why do you think you're so bad at friendship?

speaker: Ember
content: I don't want to talk about it.

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh, you have to! How else are you gonna solve your problems?

speaker: Thorax
content: Uh, how does that help?

speaker: Ember
content: Crushing another dragon in competition establishes my dominance and makes me feel great.

speaker: Thorax
content: Right, but, uh, how do you think they feel?

speaker: Ember
content: Humiliated! Ashamed! They'd probably wanna run away and bury themselves under a rock and... never come out. They're probably sad. Kinda low. Definitely not happy.

speaker: Thorax
content: That's because that kind of competition can divide you. And it doesn't get to the heart of the issue. Talking about your feelings does.

speaker: Ember
content: Ugh! I think I'm allergic to feelings.

speaker: Thorax
content: You know you don't have to be sappy...

speaker: Thorax
content: ...or huggy-feely about it! But you should let your friends know how you feel.

speaker: Ember
content: Uh, I know where we can start.

speaker: Thorax
content: Where? Ohhhh. Spike. Hah. I got there.

speaker: Spike
content: I think they're gone. They probably never want to see me again.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Or they want to see you now.

speaker: Ember
content: Guess what, Spike.

speaker: Spike
content: I know. I'm so sorry.

speaker: Thorax
content: Okaaaay... That's a good first attempt. Now maybe try to be more specific?

speaker: Ember
content: I'm... upset!

speaker: Spike
content: You have every right to be.

speaker: Ember
content: I know I do! And I know I need to tell you how I feel because my friend Thorax said it would make me feel better. And it does!

speaker: Thorax
content: Yeah! And I have no problem telling you what you did was wrong because my friend Ember is helping me be more assertive!

speaker: Spike
content: Whoa.

speaker: Ember
content: Nice.

speaker: Ember and Thorax
content: Ha-ha!

speaker: Spike
content: You guys should be mad at me. I was so worried about how it could go wrong, I didn't even think about how it could go right. Can you forgive me?

speaker: Ember
content: I really do feel better. So, yeah. I'm good.

speaker: Ember
content: Again?

speaker: Spike
content: No way! It's finally happening! I solved the friendship problem!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Actually, you created the friendship problem by not trusting your friends.

speaker: Spike
content: Yeah, but then I solved it by learning my lesson. I should have told my two friends about each other immediately instead of assuming they wouldn't get along.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Good job, Spike.

speaker: Ember
content: Is this another part of pony friendship? Telling each other what you learned all the time?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yeah, pretty much.

speaker: Spike
content: Yup.

speaker: Spike
content: So, as a show of unity, I present the Dragon Fire Flame of Friendship to both Dragon Lord Ember and Thorax, leader of the changeling pack! May the flame of friendship burn for eternity.

speaker: Ember
content: You should have more things made of rocks.

speaker: Applejack
content: Hey, kid, get over here!

speaker: Applejack
content: Tents are lookin' good. And we made good time today. At this rate, we'll be at Winsome Falls by tomorrow!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: We should do the annual Big-Sister-Little-Sister camping trip every weekend!

speaker: Applejack
content: Then it wouldn't be annual. And if we did it every weekend, it probably wouldn't be as special.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: But the more we do it, the better we get at camping. Remember the first time we came here and Rarity had that ginormous tent?

speaker: Rarity
content: I heard that! I've gotten much better at "roughing it", haven't I?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Yup. This time, you only packed three suitcases.

speaker: Rarity
content: I know what you're thinking. But I promise, I only brought the essentials.

speaker: Applejack
content: Like those light thingies?

speaker: Rarity
content: Of course. What is life if you can't make it beautiful?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Mmmm! These berries look good enough to eat!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Don't! According to my book, they're extremely poisonous!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What?

speaker: Scootaloo
content: I heard something, I stepped on something, and I saw that creepy cave... I guess I still get a little bit scared out here, even after the last camping trip.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Don't worry, kid. You've got a big sister this time.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: This looks amazing!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: This is gonna be the best Big-Sister-Slash-Little-Sister camping trip ever!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Ow! What are these things?! Aaagh!

speaker: Applejack
content: Fly-ders! Everypony, run for cover! Don't get stuck in their<U+0097>

speaker: Applejack
content: ...web.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Now what?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Follow me, everypony!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Aaah! Not the scary cave!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Where did those terrible bugs come from? And why did they destroy our camp?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh.

speaker: Applejack
content: Flyders are from the Luna Bay area. Never seen 'em this far east, though. Probably attracted to the food. Best wait here until they're gone.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Oh, apple rot! What are we supposed to do now?! We had games to play and marshmallows to roast at camp! In here, we got nothin'!

speaker: Rarity
content: Mm, that's not entirely true. We have each other.

speaker: Applejack
content: That's right! And if you girls want to, maybe we could tell some stories to pass the time.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You want stories? I've got a ton of stories! Spoiler alert <U+0096> they're all about me and how awesome I am!

speaker: Applejack
content: I was thinkin' more like campfire stories?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: But we don't even have a campfire.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I got this!

speaker: Applejack
content: Wow. That was brave.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: We aren't gonna tell scary stories like our last camping trip, are we? It's bad enough just being in here!

speaker: Applejack
content: Don't worry, Scootaloo. I was gonna tell you mine and Apple Bloom's favorite legend.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Ooh! You mean Rockhoof? I love that one! He was so strong, and when he<U+0097>

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Apple Bloom, shhh! We haven't heard it yet!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Oh, okay. But it's so good! Heh.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, it's true. Rockhoof was known far and wide for his incredible strength. But he didn't start out that way. You see, Rockhoof was a tiny little fella, the son of a farmer.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Just like us!

speaker: Applejack
content: They lived in a village that sat at the foot of a gigantic volcano.

speaker: Applejack
content: And the village was protected by an elite group of guard ponies called the Mighty Helm.

speaker: Applejack
content: Young Rockhoof wanted nothing more than to be part of the Mighty Helm.

speaker: Applejack
content: But he was told that he was too scrawny and weak to protect the village.

speaker: Applejack
content: But Rockhoof wouldn't take no for an answer.

speaker: Applejack
content: Then, one fateful day...

speaker: Applejack
content: ...the volcano erupted!

speaker: Rockhoof
content: Eeeeeeeeeeee<U+0097>

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: <U+0097>eeeeeeeeee! This is my favorite part!

speaker: Others
content: Rainbow Dash, What happened next?!

speaker: Applejack
content: The molten lava poured down the side of the volcano...

speaker: Applejack
content: ...and try as they might, the Mighty Helm couldn't figure out a way to save the village! They had to evacuate. But the village ponies didn't wanna leave their homes. They spent their entire lives there. They had nowhere else to go! So Rockhoof decided to do something crazy.

speaker: Applejack
content: He thought if he could divert the flow of the lava, he might be able to save his village. He started diggin' a trench!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Wait a minute. All by himself?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: It'd be impossible for one pony to dig a trench fast enough to stop the lava. I mean, even I couldn't do that.

speaker: Applejack
content: Good thing Rockhoof didn't believe in the word "impossible".

speaker: Applejack
content: He continued to work, knowin' the odds were against him, but determined to push through it. Then, somethin' magical happened.

speaker: Applejack
content: Rockhoof got visibly stronger! But the lava was getting' closer.

speaker: Applejack
content: Through his extraordinary determination and sheer force o' will, Rockhoof more than earned his place in the Mighty Helm.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Good story, Applejack! Even if it wasn't about me.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: I love that story, no matter how many times I hear it.

speaker: Rarity
content: Why don't we see if it's safe to head back to camp?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Uh, girls? There is no camp to go back to.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: All our hard work is ruined!

speaker: Rarity
content: There, there, Sweetie Belle. Not to worry.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: How? Our camp was so pretty, and this cave is so... not.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, no-no-no-no, no, not true. There's beauty in everything. Even these blah rocks aren't really blah. If you look closely, you can see flecks of gold in them. And the way the firelight dances on the cave wall, shadow and light? Ooh, it's so gorgeous! Sweetie Belle, have I ever told you about my favorite legend?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: No. I didn't know you had one.

speaker: Rarity
content: Her name... was Mistmane.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Mistmane? Isn't she the old wrinkly sorceress with the flower?

speaker: Rarity
content: Yeeees, but did you know she used to be the most beautiful unicorn in all the land?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No.

speaker: Cutie Mark Crusaders
content: So what happened to her?!

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, Mistmane was a very promising young sorceress.

speaker: Rarity
content: She was as talented as she was beautiful and kind. Everypony loved her and missed her when she was sent to the finest magic school.

speaker: Rarity
content: While she was gone, she was delighted to find out that her best friend, Sable Spirit, was crowned empress. She couldn't wait to return home once she finished her studies.

speaker: Rarity
content: But once she arrived, she was devastated by what she saw.

speaker: Mistmane
content: What happened here?

speaker: Villager
content: The Empress happened. She makes everypony work day and night on her palace. We don't have time to take care of anything else.

speaker: Mistmane
content: But that can't be. I know her! She would never do this.

speaker: Rarity
content: But there was no denying what was in front of her.

speaker: Rarity
content: Sable Spirit took everything that was beautiful away from anypony else! And Mistmane was sure there had to be some explanation.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I'd assume there was, too. If somepony told me either one of you two'd gone evil...

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Yeah, I'd never believe it.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: I dunno. I've seen the way you two get when you miss breakfast.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Just kiddin'. But I'd want answers too.

speaker: Rarity
content: So did Mistmane. She went to confront her friend.

speaker: Mistmane
content: Sable, is that you?

speaker: Sable Spirit
content: Don't tell me you don't recognize your old friend.

speaker: Mistmane
content: I don't. My friend would never work our families and friends to the bone for something as silly as a palace.

speaker: Sable Spirit
content: Silly? My palace is a beacon of beauty! Anypony who passes will be in awe of its majesty!

speaker: Mistmane
content: What good is a pretty palace if it just hides the misery of its ponies?

speaker: Sable Spirit
content: Beauty is everything. You taught me that.

speaker: Mistmane
content: What?!

speaker: Sable Spirit
content: You were always the pretty one. You got to go to the best magic school. Everypony missed you. Everypony loved you! I admit I was jealous, so I tried to perform a spell that would make me beautiful. You can see how that went!

speaker: Sable Spirit
content: I found if I couldn't have beauty, I would take it. I wasn't chosen to be empress, you know. I took it! Just like I'm going to take everything else.

speaker: Mistmane
content: I can't let you do that.

speaker: Rarity
content: Everypony thought Sable Spirit was defeated, and that was that. But Mistmane knew there was more she could do to help.

speaker: Rarity
content: Beauty isn't everything. But Mistmane knew that it does have the power to make ponies smile.

speaker: Rarity
content: She made a huge sacrifice to bring that smile back to her friends' and family's faces... including Sable Spirit's.

speaker: Sable Spirit
content: You did this for me? Even after I was so cruel?

speaker: Rarity
content: Sable Spirit was so touched that she vowed to be more like her friend in the ways that mattered. From then on, she ruled with kindness and compassion.

speaker: Rarity
content: Even though she gave away her physical beauty, she dedicated her life to spreading beauty all over Equestria. Any time you go out of your way to brighten somepony's day by doing something like giving them flowers, you're following in the hoofsteps of Mistmane.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: I think she's my favorite legend too.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh! These Fly-ders won't quit! What do they want from us now?

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, like it or not, we're food, too.

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: And I've got the bites to prove it.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: What are we gonna do?! They're almost here!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What?! Now those bugs can't get in!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: And we can't get out!

speaker: Applejack
content: Let's all just stay calm. Let me re-light this fire...

speaker: Rarity
content: We just have to wait until the swarm moves on. Then we'll think of a way out.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whoa-whoa-whoa, Scootaloo. You're focusing on the wrong things.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: You have a plan?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Close. I have a story.

speaker: Applejack
content: Lemme guess <U+0096> it's about you?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Practically. It's about my favorite legend, Flash Magnus!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Wasn't he the pony who took on the dragons?

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Dragons?! Big, scary, mean ones or like Spike?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, these were definitely the big, scary, mean kind!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: But not too scary. You can sit closer to me if you want.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: A long time ago, before the Wonderbolts were even founded...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: ...Flash Magnus was a lowly cadet in the Royal Legion.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And the Legion needed to fly over the Dragon Lands to get to their comrades on the other side. But as they got closer to the dragons...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: ...the dragons attacked!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: You said this wasn't too scary!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Scootaloo, if you just hang in there<U+0097>

speaker: Scootaloo
content: What?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I said if you just hang in there, I promise you'll like the ending. So, like I was saying, Flash Magnus and the Royal Legion tried to get past the dragons...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: ...but the dragons wouldn't let them!

speaker: Commander Ironhead
content: Everypony, retreat!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Flash Magnus and a few other cadets were separated from the battalion. He managed to get away, but the dragons captured his friends and took them back to their lair!

speaker: Flash Magnus
content: Commander! We need to save our captured comrades!

speaker: Commander Ironhead
content: I appreciate your loyalty, Flash Magnus, but getting past those dragons is going to be impossible. Nothing will work.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: The commander was right. You can't outfight dragons.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: But you can out-think them.

speaker: Flash Magnus
content: Commander Ironhead, I'm pretty sure I can outfly the dragons. If I can lure them into chasing me, you can all sneak into the lair and retrieve our friends before they get back.

speaker: Commander Ironhead
content: Are you really willing to take that chance, soldier?

speaker: Flash Magnus
content: I am, sir.

speaker: Commander Ironhead
content: It's a very brave thing you're doing. You'll need all the help you can get.

speaker: Flash Magnus
content: Is this... Netitus, the fireproof shield?!

speaker: Commander Ironhead
content: It has protected Legion heroes for generations. And today, I can't think of a worthier flank for Netitus to protect.

speaker: Commander Ironhead
content: Good luck, soldier.

speaker: Flash Magnus
content: Hey! Come and get me, fire-breath! If you can! Hey, hey! Come and get me! Hey, I'm over here!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: While Flash Magnus bravely flew for his life, Commander Ironhoof was able to get his soldiers back.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Flash Magnus flew like the wind...

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: ...faster than the dragons!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: But he knew he couldn't do this forever. Luckily, he had a plan.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: He led the dragons straight into a storm that the Legion had planted!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: One taste of the lightning, and the dragons retreated.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Flash Magnus' plan worked!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Wow! I did like that ending.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Told ya! He always inspired me to be my brave and awesome self.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Mm-hmm!

speaker: Applejack
content: Yeah, I guess he kinda reminds me of you.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Tch! You guess? Come on, I'm just like him!

speaker: Applejack
content: Hey, do you hear that?

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Uh, I don't hear anythin'.

speaker: Applejack
content: Exactly! Those gosh-darn Fly-ders are gone! We can get out!

speaker: Applejack
content: Whoa!

speaker: Rarity
content: Or not.

speaker: Applejack
content: We're gonna have to see if we can get out the other way.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: You mean go further into the dark, spooky cave?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Scootaloo, just remember the story. Gotta be brave like me and Flash Magnus, okay?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I hear water!

speaker: Rarity
content: And if there's flowing water, then...

speaker: Applejack
content: ...it might lead to the way out!

speaker: Cutie Mark Crusaders
content: Whoa!

speaker: Rarity
content: Okay, on three. One, two<U+0097>

speaker: Apple Bloom and Sweetie Belle
content: Three!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Woo-hoo!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: Yeah-ha-ha!

speaker: Applejack
content: Huh. Well, what do you know? We found ourselves a shortcut to Winsome Falls!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: It's never looked so beautiful.

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, almost.

speaker: Applejack
content: We sure are sorry that our camping trip wasn't what we hoped it would be.

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: Are you kidding? This trip is awesome!

speaker: Rarity
content: It is?

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: We got to hear legendary stories and go on an adventure.

speaker: Applejack
content: Wait, you three wanna stay?

speaker: Cutie Mark Crusaders
content: Of course we do!

speaker: Sweetie Belle
content: We could turn those trees into a nice, little shelter!

speaker: Apple Bloom
content: We can get you some big logs and branches to help build it!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: And I bet we could find some more berries! Come on! I can't wait to see what happens next year!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Ha! Straight to the changeling hive! I told you I could do it.

speaker: Trixie
content: Well, not exactly straight, Starlight. We've been popping all around Equestria, and we still have to walk.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It's like twelve steps away. Before Chrysalis' throne was destroyed, the closest magic would've gotten us was waaaaaaay over there. On a scale of one to ten, how happy do you think Thorax is gonna be about our surprise visit?

speaker: Trixie
content: Definitely ten. I mean, who wouldn't be happy at the chance to marvel at the overwhelming talent that is the Great and Powerful Trrrrrixie?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Trixie, we're coming to offer Thorax encouragement and support. His letters make it seem like the responsibilities of being a changeling leader are a little overwhelming.

speaker: Trixie
content: Yeah. I know. That's basically what I said.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: He's dealing with the wants and needs of his subjects. Redesigning the hive, a dread maulwurf wreaking havoc outside...

speaker: Trixie
content: It does sound like a lot, but are you sure that last thing is real?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: The dread maulwurf? Sure it is. Thorax said it's like half-bear, half-mole, half-raging-pile-of-claws! But now that the changelings don't feed on the love of everything around them, plants have started to grow back. But this maulwurf keeps eating them all up.

speaker: Trixie
content: "Maulwurf". Uh-huh. You're just trying to scare me, but it won't work. Because not only am I the Great and Powerful, I am also the Unscareable Trixie!

speaker: Trixie
content: Please tell me Thorax also mentioned a terrifying-looking changeling who greets visitors but is actually nice!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Nope.

speaker: Trixie
content: Starlight, you got us here. I'll take us home. Teleportation spell, go! Did I save us?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Nope.

speaker: Trixie
content: What are you waiting for?! Use some magic to get us outta here!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Calm down, "Unscareable Trixie". We have to find out what's going on. Thorax might need our help.

speaker: Trixie
content: We need our help! Teleportation spell, go! Teleportation spell, go! Teleportation spell<U+0097>!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Ugh! Why do you keep doing that? You know it doesn't work that way.

speaker: Trixie
content: I know, but this is my process.

speaker: Pharynx
content: I've captured these trespassers!

speaker: Thorax
content: Starlight! Trixie! It's okay, Pharynx. You can let them go.

speaker: Pharynx
content: But they were lurking on our grounds! In the old days, I would've already feasted on their love.

speaker: Thorax
content: Well, that's why they're called the "old days", because they're old. We don't do that anymore.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Dah! I liked the old days better.

speaker: Thorax
content: Uh, what are you two doing here?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We wanted to surprise you. Surprise.

speaker: Thorax
content: Well, it's great to see you! I'm sorry about the welcome committee.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I thought Ember helped you get more assertive so you could deal with all the renegade changelings who didn't wanna change.

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh, she did. Really helpful. I was able to convince all of them to change, except one of them... My brother.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Your brother?

speaker: Thorax
content: Yep. Pharynx is my elder broodmate.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, yeah. You guys have the same... um... eye shape?

speaker: Pharynx
content: What a ridiculous comparison! We are nothing alike!

speaker: Thorax
content: Stop doing that!

speaker: Thorax
content: Ugh. Well, how about I show you the rest of the hive where it's less loud and bangy?

speaker: Thorax
content: There've been a lot of changes since you were here last. I'm trying to start some new activities since the only thing we did before was hunt and patrol. There's theatre, swing dancing, a once-a-week potluck lunch. Ooh! And who can change shape and organize craft time? Hmm? This guy!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I am really impressed, Thorax. The hive, all the activities...

speaker: Sclerite
content: Gah! He did it again! Pharynx dumped an entire can of black paint on me! He said my fuchsia color wasn't "intimidating to our enemies"! What enemies?!

speaker: Thorax
content: I am so sorry. I promise I'll talk to him.

speaker: Sclerite
content: You're the ruler of the hive, Thorax! You need to do more than talk!

speaker: Trixie
content: Well, maybe not everything here is amazing.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Seriously, Thorax. What is up with your brother?

speaker: Thorax
content: Ugh. Pharynx used to be head of patrol. But now we're peaceful and there's no need to patrol, so he just stalks around the hive making everyone miserable. The other changelings are sick of it, and if I can't get him to accept love and friendship and change like the rest of us, everything I've done here is at risk.

speaker: Trixie
content: Uh-uh.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Hmm?

speaker: Trixie
content: Uh-huh.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We know a thing or two about what it's like to be outsiders. Maybe we could talk to him for you.

speaker: Thorax
content: Do you really think you can help?

speaker: Trixie
content: Thorax, if there's anypony who can help your brother, it's me. And with Starlight helping, it might take slightly longer, but I guarantee you we can do it.

speaker: Frenulum
content: Thorax, we're ready to start work on the trail of plants to lead the maulwurf away.

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh, I have to head outside. You sure you're okay handling Pharynx?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Absolutely.

speaker: Trixie
content: So, how do you wanna play this? I'm thinking "good pony/bad pony". You yell and blast him with magic while my natural charisma will convince him that<U+0097> uh, Starlight?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Hey, Pharynx. I know when we first met, it didn't go so well.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Right. So... not a big fan of the vines, huh?

speaker: Pharynx
content: They're a safety hazard. An enemy could hide in them or use them as weapons. I don't even know why they're here.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Because they're pretty?

speaker: Pharynx
content: That's ridiculous.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, totally. We get you. But... maybe don't express how you feel by destroying them?

speaker: Pharynx
content: I don't take advice from ponies. The only thing I take from you is breakfast. At least, I used to.

speaker: Trixie
content: You know, you're a lot like us!

speaker: Pharynx
content: Doubt it.

speaker: Trixie
content: It's true. Do you know who Twilight Sparkle is?

speaker: Pharynx
content: No.

speaker: Trixie
content: Well, she's the most well-liked, studious, do-goodiest pony in Equestria.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Ugh! She sounds awful.

speaker: Trixie
content: Oh, you'd hate her. I used to. She made me unsure about my place in the world, which led me to act out against her.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: And I used to be a dictator who ran a village with an iron hoof.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Really? Hmm. Maybe you two do understand me.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yes! We do! But now, Trixie has come to terms with being second-best, and I no longer control ponies against their will. And our lives are so much better for it.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Wow. So you're both losers. Stay away from me, or I'll do to you what I did to the vines.

speaker: Thorax
content: Well, "Operation: Lead Maulwurf Away" is coming along. How'd it go with Pharynx?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Your brother is, um, challenging.

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh, that bad, huh?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It wasn't great.

speaker: Thorax
content: You wanna talk it out? You can come with me to the feelings forum.

speaker: Trixie
content: The feel-like-what-now?

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh, it's a place for changelings to express their feelings so we all gain a better understanding of each other. It's really helped bring the hive closer together.

speaker: Green Changeling
content: Sometimes I feel like I'm a blue changeling. Sometimes I feel like I'm a purple changeling. But here I am, a green one.

speaker: Tymbal
content: You can be anything you want to be. Be blue one day and purple the next. Be both on the same day!

speaker: Green Changeling
content: But then I feel like I'd be living a lie.

speaker: Tymbal
content: It's very brave of you to share something so personal. Does anyone else have similar concerns?

speaker: Changeling 1
content: I used to, but craft time has given me such a creative outlet, I feel great now!

speaker: Changeling 2
content: Uh-huh. Everyone loves craft time.

speaker: Changeling 1
content: Well, everyone except for... you-know-who.

speaker: Changeling 2
content: Yeah. You-know-who spends all his craft time making spears.

speaker: Changeling 1
content: He's scary and intimidating. You-know-who makes me uncomfortable.

speaker: Green Changeling
content: He makes us all uncomfortable.

speaker: Thorax
content: Everyone, please! I understand Pharynx can be challenging at times.

speaker: Changeling 1
content: That's an understatement. He lined a hallway with thorns!

speaker: Green Changeling
content: He teaches little changelings to growl and hiss!

speaker: Changeling 3
content: My soup's too hot!

speaker: Changeling 3
content: What? I thought the feelings forum was for sharing our problems.

speaker: Pharynx
content: It sounds like your lame "feelings forum" is for talking about me behind my back!

speaker: Tymbal
content: The feelings forum is for talking about anything that's bothering you. Is there something you'd like to share, Pharynx?

speaker: Pharynx
content: Actually, there is. The changelings used to be a fearsome swarm! Now we sit around talking about our feelings so much, you can't even stop a maulwurf from eating all your "pretty plants"! I could've sent that thing packing before, but I guess now we'll just try to lead it away and hope that keeps us safe!

speaker: Changeling 1
content: I don't feel safe with him around!

speaker: Green Changeling
content: I'd feel safer if he were gone!

speaker: Thorax
content: I can't do that.

speaker: Changeling 3
content: Hey, my soup's cooled down! These feeling forums are great for solving problems!

speaker: Tymbal
content: Everyone, please. If we are interrupting each other, we are not affirming each other.

speaker: Tymbal
content: That's it! Feelings forum is over!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I... I want to say something, but it goes against everything I've been taught as Twilight's pupil.

speaker: Trixie
content: Ooh! Then, by all means, say it.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I think Pharynx is a lost cause.

speaker: Trixie
content: Mm. I'm all for second chances. Third, even. But he just seems like a bad bug.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: And Thorax has a duty to the whole hive, not just his brother.

speaker: Trixie
content: If he keeps sticking up for Pharynx, the hive might decide they don't want Thorax as their leader.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I think he might have to kick Pharynx out. But I don't wanna be the one to tell Thorax that.

speaker: Trixie
content: Me, neither. But somepony probably should. I nominate you!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Ugh!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Thorax, we have something to tell you.

speaker: Thorax
content: It's about Pharynx, isn't it?

speaker: Trixie
content: Mmmmmmmaybe?

speaker: Thorax
content: Look, I know he's an aggressive warrior type, but when I was little, every young changeling wanted to be like that.

speaker: Thorax
content: ...Every young changeling except me. The others would pick on me for not wanting to fight.

speaker: Young Changeling
content: Look at the little grub playing with his dollies!

speaker: Young Pharynx
content: Step away from my brother!

speaker: Thorax
content: But Pharynx never let them hurt me.

speaker: Young Changeling
content: We were just complimenting his dollies.

speaker: Young Thorax
content: Thanks, Pharynx.

speaker: Young Pharynx
content: Why are you hitting yourself?! Stop hitting yourself! Why are you hitting yourself?!

speaker: Young Thorax
content: Ouch! Cut it out, Pharynx!

speaker: Young Pharynx
content: They're right, you know. You need to have tougher skin.

speaker: Trixie
content: Aw, that was a really sweet story. Until the end.

speaker: Thorax
content: I know Pharynx loved me in his own way, and I know there's still good in him. That's why I keep sticking up for him. Anyway, what did you wanna talk to me about?

speaker: Trixie
content: Me? Oh, noooo. But, uh, Starlight has something she<U+0097>

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Actually, Thorax, um, never mind! C'mon, Trixie, we've got a... thing to do.

speaker: Trixie
content: What are you doing? I thought we agreed you'd tell Thorax he had to kick his brother out of the hive!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Maybe we don't have to. Get Pharynx and meet me at the hive entrance. I'll explain everything.

speaker: Trixie
content: And how am I supposed to know where Pharynx is?!

speaker: Passing Changeling
content: I just saw Pharynx.

speaker: Trixie
content: Oh! Well, that was easy.

speaker: Trixie
content: Wow.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I know, right? Great idea? Where's Pharynx?

speaker: Trixie
content: He's gone.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Gone like gone to the throne room?

speaker: Trixie
content: Gone like gone! One of the changelings said Pharynx left the hive for good!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Then who's gonna stop the dread maulwurf I'm leading here?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Thorax, there you are! Pharynx is missing!

speaker: Trixie
content: Wait for it...

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: And the dread maulwurf is coming this way!

speaker: Trixie
content: Told ya.

speaker: Thorax
content: That doesn't make any sense. The trail of plants should have led the dread maulwurf away.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I might have relaid them to lead it back toward the hive.

speaker: Thorax
content: Why would you do that?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I thought if Pharynx saw you were in danger, the loving, caring side of him would come out when he protected you!

speaker: Thorax
content: But instead, he's out there alone somewhere between us and that rampaging monster?! I have to save him!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'm coming with you!

speaker: Thorax
content: Of course you are! This is all your fault!

speaker: Trixie
content: Oh, don't be too hard on Starlight. Her heart was in the right place.

speaker: Thorax
content: You're coming, too!

speaker: Trixie
content: Oh. Right. I mean, I was gonna volunteer anyway...

speaker: Thorax
content: Who else is coming?

speaker: Thorax
content: Fine.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, sure, you could all stay here, not help Pharynx and he won't bother you anymore. It's your choice. But remember when you didn't have a choice! When you were forced to obey Chrysalis! You might have been unstoppable, but you weren't free to choose! And now you are, because of Thorax! Well, it's his brother out there, and now it's your chance to prove you're just as strong embracing love as you were feeding on it! Now is your chance to show what changelings can really be! Not because you have to, but because you choose to!

speaker: Trixie
content: That was an amazingly epic speech, Starlight! I just can't believe not a single changeling was moved by it.

speaker: Thorax
content: I can't blame them. If he wasn't my brother, I don't think I'd be here. We're gonna have to face the maulwurf by ourselves.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Maybe it'll be long gone and we'll find Pharynx out here alone!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Or maybe not.

speaker: Thorax
content: Pharynx!

speaker: Pharynx
content: What are you doing here?!

speaker: Thorax
content: I'm here to save you!

speaker: Pharynx
content: Get outta here! Let me handle this!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We're not leaving you!

speaker: Thorax
content: I may have forgotten to mention in my letters that maulwurfs have really thick hides!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I thought you said you could beat this thing!

speaker: Pharynx
content: Yeah, with the rest of the swarm! Not alone!

speaker: Changeling 1
content: Good thing you're not alone!

speaker: Trixie
content: I told you it was an epic speech.

speaker: Thorax
content: It's no use! We're out of practice and he's too tough!

speaker: Trixie
content: And strong! Too bad we can't get it to fight itself!

speaker: Pharynx
content: That's it! Thorax, remember when we were young and I made you hit yourself?

speaker: Thorax
content: Now is not the time to make fun of me, Pharynx!

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh, right! Of course!

speaker: Pharynx
content: Why are you hitting yourself? Why are you hitting yourself? Why are you hitting yourself?!

speaker: Thorax
content: Yeah, maulwurf, why are you hitting yourself?

speaker: Thorax
content: Why are you hitting yourself, huh? Huh? Huh?

speaker: Trixie
content: Ooh, that looks like it hurts.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We did it! It's gone!

speaker: Thorax
content: What were you doing out here?

speaker: Pharynx
content: Leaving. I'm done with all of you.

speaker: Thorax
content: Oh. It's just, why bother fighting the maulwurf then? You coulda left it alone.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Well, I couldn't just let it attack you!

speaker: Thorax
content: But I thought you were done with us, and you didn't care.

speaker: Pharynx
content: I never said that. The hive is the thing I care about most.

speaker: Thorax
content: Well, you certainly don't act like it.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Well, I'm sorry if I don't get excited about pretty flowers and feeling circles and<U+0097>

speaker: Thorax
content: It's a feelings forum.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Whatever. It doesn't matter. Even if I do care about the hive, I obviously don't have a place there anymore.

speaker: Changeling 1
content: Actually, you do. Because we've been wrong. Um, the hive may be a gentler, nicer place...

speaker: Changeling 2
content: ...but that doesn't mean we won't have to defend ourselves. Clearly.

speaker: Thorax
content: And who better to help us do that than the only changeling who never stopped protecting us?

speaker: Pharynx
content: You all want me to stay?

speaker: Thorax
content: Unless you still want to leave the hive.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Why would I want that? I love the hive!

speaker: Trixie
content: He did it! He transformed!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I always knew you had it in you!

speaker: Pharynx
content: Really? Because I thought you said I was a lost cause and you were going to tell Thorax he should kick me out.

speaker: Trixie
content: Oh! Starlight! How could you say that?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Ugh! What?! That's<U+0097>! I mean<U+0097>! But you<U+0097>!

speaker: Thorax
content: Lucky for us, you weren't a lost cause.

speaker: Pharynx
content: Lucky for me, you didn't give up on me.

speaker: Trixie
content: Soooo... glad everything worked out.

speaker: Thorax
content: Yeah! Let's talk about how you not only led the maulwurf to the hive but also drove my brother away from it!

speaker: Pharynx
content: Hey. Do you guys want to hear the story about how I used to make Thorax hit himself?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh, absolutely, yes, right now!

speaker: Newspaper Pony
content: Morning, Pinkie Pie. Get your Ponyville Chronicle right here!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Fan-tizzy-astic! I just love to read about happy happenings, and it's always good to be a pony in the know, you know? And there's so much to know!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Eh, seems like a bunch of boring hooey to me.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Does "New Shrubbery In Castle Garden" sound like boring hooey to you?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Snooze.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: What about... "Parasprite Infestation In Fillydelphia Eradicated"? Ah! That's great news!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Eh. Another day, another parasprite hype story.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: "Noodles Named Official Food Of Whinnyapolis". "Author A. K. Yearling Announces Retirement". "Cloudsdale Election Heating Up For Candidate In Favor Of Cooling It Down".

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What?! Let me see that!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I never knew you were so into politics, Rainbow.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No, this! It can't be true...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I'd have never have picked noodles as the official food of Whinnyapolis either, but here we are.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No, Pinkie! I can't believe that the greatest author and secret pony adventurer of all time, A. K. Yearling... is retiring!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: A. K. Yearling just retired. Like, today. Are you sure she wants visitors?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Pinkie, the A. K. Yearling I know would never quit and retire out of the blue! Something could be really wrong, and we need to make sure she's okay!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Okay! Heeeey... You're not just trying to make sure she writes more Daring Do books, are you?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Of course not! But that wouldn't hurt either. Now, come on!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh, maybe she's not home. Maybe she went to the editor-in-chief of the Ponyville Chronicle to correct the misprint they've made.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Nope. She's home.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: How do you know?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Because she's right there looking all sad and alone.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I knew it! Something is wrong! A. K!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Now she's sighing with the weight of the world. Now she's hanging her head in utter despair. Now she's shaking her hoof and cursing the heavens like nothing could ever possibly be the same again. Why, oh, why did this happen to her?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: A. K., it's us! Rainbow Dash and Pinkie Pie! Your friends!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, no. Did somepony ransack your cottage again and steal some ancient, mysterious relic that's the key to saving all of Equestria?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oooh! Sparky!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. Nothing's been stolen.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Then is somepony blackmailing you and forcing you to retire? Cause if they are...!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. No. Nothing like that.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: So you're just quitting and moving away? Why... would... you... do... that?!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. I already explained everything to the Ponyville Chronicle.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, really? "Author A. K. Yearling announced yesterday that the next adventure novel in her popular series, 'Daring Do and the Curse of the Pharaoh's Tomb', will be her last. Yearling looks forward to her retirement." That doesn't explain anything!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: It just says you're giving up writing stories. But most ponies don't know that you actually are Daring Do and that the stories are real. So what you're really saying is that you're giving up being Daring Do, but you're not saying why!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Of course, if you don't feel like talking about it, that's A-okay, A. K.! As your friends, we completely understand. Right, Rainbow Dash?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh. Yeah. We just came to make sure you're all right. That's really why we wanted to find out what's going on.

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. If you really want to know... My last quest took me to a village in Southern Equestria, where I started seeing these.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: "Wake Of Destruction: Daring Do Ruins Entire Village Marketplace!"

speaker: Rainbow Dash

content: So all we have to do is go down there and explain to these ponies that none of this stuff is true.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Easy-peasy-cheesy!

content: A. K. But that's just the thing <U+0096> it is true.

speaker: Rainbow Dash and Pinkie Pie
content: What?!

content: A. K. I guess I've always been so focused on saving priceless relics and stopping the bad guys that I never really thought about the mess I leave behind.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Then you are in a tricky pickle. But why is all this happening now?

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. I guess ponies are finally fed up. Either way, I'm done with adventures, having or writing.

content: Come on! For every one pony who's upset, there must be at least a hundred that know you're a hero!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. I don't think so, Dash.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Well, why don't we go visit this village "Som...nam...bu...la" and see for ourselves?

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. Those articles seem to make it pretty clear how the villagers feel.

content: But if we go there, the ponies can tell you in person just how much they appreciate you.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And what a heap of rotten apple cores these articles are!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. You really think so?

content: I know so! Let's go!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: This is so cool! It looks just like that village in your last book where Daring Do recovers the Doomed Diadem from the Wild Bunch Gang who chase after her through the desert!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. It should. I based that entire chapter on my experiences here in Somnambula.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: What happens? No, wait, don't tell me. I changed my mind! Tell me!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Daring Do thwarts Ahuizotl's evil plot to separate the Sister Crown Relics. And if it wasn't for her, the region would be cursed with eternal night, and the entire town of Somnambula would have sunk into the ground!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ah, puh! There's no chance that these ponies don't think you're a hero.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Watch this. Hiya there, mister! I was hoping you could tell me about a pony named Daring Do. I hear she's an awesome adventure-pony hero.

content: "Cortland": Daring Do? Oh, she's awesome, all right. Awesome at destroying ponies' apple carts...

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": ...and priceless, sacred statues!

speaker: Dr. Caballeron
content: Dr. Indeed. Daring Do is a menace who destroys everything she touches!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What?! No! Daring Do is the exact opposite of a menace!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. Ugh! I tried to tell you! Coming back here was a mistake!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Come on, A. K.! So we picked a bad example. That was just one angry pony.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Two angry ponies!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. It doesn't matter! I never should have come with you! You two should just go home!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Come on! We gotta follow her!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I dunno. It really seemed like she doesn't want us cramping her saddle.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: But we have to convince her that ponies do appreciate her! As her friend, I have to make sure she believes that.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Look, Pinkie! It's the Get On Inn! Daring Do stays here all the time in her adventures. Which means there must be ponies here who love Daring Do! Maybe they can help us.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Mmmmm. My nose is telling me to help myself to muffins.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Come on...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh, she's fancy. I got this. A good evening to you, madame. We are but weary travelers who humbly wish to inquire on the status of a certain mare of intrigue taking residence here.

speaker: Mrs. Trotsworth
content: Mrs. What in Southern Equestria are you on about?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Is it true that Daring Do stays here?

speaker: Mrs. Trotsworth
content: Mrs. Ha! Not anymore, she doesn't!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Why not?

speaker: Mrs. Trotsworth
content: Mrs. The last time I rented that rascal a room, she was in such a rush to hightail it outta here, she didn't even pay her bill!

speaker: Mrs. Trotsworth
content: Mrs. After that, a band of ruffians showed up and destroyed half the rooms looking for her. Guess she made them even more mad than she made me!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No, no, no. You've got it all wrong.

speaker: Mrs. Trotsworth
content: Mrs. Hmph! How do you figure?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Daring Do was trying to save everypony from the curse of the Doomed Diadem of Xilati. And she was only in a rush because she had to get the crown back to the Tiara of Teotlale before the curse took effect. Chapter seventeen.

speaker: Mrs. Trotsworth
content: Mrs. Sounds like a tall tale to me. And a hard one to believe, now that I know Daring Do is a scoundrel and a thief! Every year, ponies come to offer precious glowpaz to the Somnambula statue in the village in hopes for a good future. Why, that poor fella had his glowpaz necklace stolen by Daring Do just yesterday!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hmmm...

speaker: Rainbow Dash and Pinkie Pie
content: There's A. K.!

speaker: Dr. Caballeron
content: Dr. Daring Do ruined our town and stole our precious glowpaz! We need to make sure that if she turns up again, there will be consequences! Everypony who's with me, meet at the statue tomorrow!

content: A. K. Now I'm getting blamed for things I didn't even do? Why would I steal from them?

content: Listen, A. K. After a good night's sleep, we're going to fix all of this. I promise.

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. I shouldn't be here, Rainbow Dash. This is never gonna work.

content: Of course it will! All I have to do is go up there and explain to everypony how wrong they all are.

content: Yeah! And then I'll be like, "What she said!"

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. Easy-peasy-cheesy...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Exactly!

speaker: Dr. Caballeron
content: Dr. Here it is! The remains of your<U+0096> I mean, our Somnambula statue! Now that Daring Do has destroyed it, tell me, where will we hang our glowpaz?

speaker: Random Villager
content: We don't even have any glowpaz because they were stolen by Daring Do!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Daring Do would never steal anything! And okay, she destroyed your statue, but it was because she was trying to save you all from Ahuizotl!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ahuizotl? He's about yea big? Long neck? Itty-bitty face? Weird claw thingy on his tail?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ooh! Ooh! I know him! He's a baddie!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Trust me, if Ahuizotl had gotten away with the Doomed Diadem, your entire village would have been swallowed up! And that's a lot worse than losing some crummy old statue!

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": Ahem! This was not some crummy old statue! It was the namesake of our town! If you want to understand us, you must first understand her.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Who?

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": Somnambula. Long ago...

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": ...this village fell prey to an evil Sphinx who demanded most of their crops. Like her fellow villagers, Somnambula didn't have much, but she used what she had to keep others from giving up hope. The son of the Pharaoh, Prince Hisan, was so moved by her compassion that he decreed nopony would go hungry again. But when Hisan stood up to the Sphinx, the beast captured him, telling the Pharaoh the only way to get Hisan back was to solve her riddle. Nopony would volunteer to save the prince. Nopony except Somnambula.

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": The Sphinx gave her the riddle. "I shine brightest in the dark. I am there but cannot be seen. To have me costs you nothing. To be without me costs you everything." As Somnambula thought of the hardship she and her fellow villagers had experienced, she instantly knew the answer. "Hope!", she shouted.

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": The Sphinx was so enraged, it seemed she might still refuse to release the prince, so Somnambula asked her for one more challenge. But if she accomplished it, the Sphinx would leave from the kingdom forever. The Sphinx quickly agreed, asking only that Somnambula walk to the prince across a deep chasm... blindfolded! Further, the Sphinx had cast a powerful spell that prevented Somnambula from flying.

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": But Somnambula never lost hope! She knew she'd need to make a leap of faith to save the prince. Guided by the sound of the prince's voice... she easily made it across.

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": The Pharaoh asked how Somnambula prevailed, and she explained that she had always hoped she could make things better for her people and that hope had carried her through. The Prince replaced the pearls Somnambula gave up with a string of glowpaz. And around her neck, they glowed bright enough to light the entire kingdom.

speaker: Others
content: "Cortland": Forever after, glowpaz became our symbol of hope.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Wow. I had no idea how special the statue was to you. Somnambula sounds like a pretty cool pony. But I bet if she were here, she'd tell you how cool Daring Do is too, because they've both fought to protect this town!

speaker: Dr. Caballeron
content: Dr. If Somnambula were here today, she would condemn Daring Do for destroying your<U+0096> our symbol of hope!

content: Hey, buddy! What did Daring Do ever do to you to deserve all this?!

content: Dr. Only... everything!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Dr. Caballeron?!

speaker: Dr. Caballeron
content: Dr. Yes... Rainbow Dash. When I saw you, her closest friend, I knew that Daring Do would not be far behind. I really do owe you for leading her right to me.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: But I-I didn't mean to<U+0097>

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Help!

speaker: A. K. Yearling
content: A. K. Caballeron?! No!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: He's got Rainbow Dash! Come on!

content: I'm... coming... Rainbow... Dash... Ah! I knew you'd come!

content: You did? I sure didn't. What if I cause more trouble?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You won't.

speaker: Daring Do
content: How do you know?

content: I just do! You wouldn't let anything happen to Rainbow Dash. You care too much.

speaker: Daring Do
content: You're right. Which way did they go? To the pyramid!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Somepony help! Somepony! Anypony! Pinkie Pie?! Daring Do?! Is that you?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Don't worry, Rainbow! We'll save you!

content: He's right! We'll never get to her in time!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: If this really is like Somnambula's story, then we just have to have hope that we can.

speaker: Daring Do
content: I think we need more than hope, Pinkie. There was a bridge in the story, and there's no bridge here. What are we going to do?

speaker: Daring Do
content: Pinkie!

speaker: Daring Do
content: Aha!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wheeee! I knew we'd do it!

speaker: Daring Do
content: Thanks for reminding me to never give up hope, Pinkie.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And I'm kinda "hoping" you ponies will untie me before we all take a bath in bubbling green slime!

speaker: Daring Do
content: We're on it!

speaker: Daring Do
content: Not so fast, Caballeron!

speaker: Others
content: "Nile Faras": You stole our glowpaz!

speaker: Daring Do
content: I should have known you were just trying to sully my name so that you'd be free to steal whatever you wanted.

speaker: Dr. Caballeron
content: Dr. And with the destruction you leave in your wake, it didn't take too much to convince ponies you were a villain!

speaker: Daring Do
content: You're wrong, Caballeron. And I won't let you break my spirit again. Because I'm never going to give up hope that I can protect ponies and ancient treasures from miscreants like you!

speaker: Dr. Caballeron
content: Dr. R-Remember! She ruined your statue! You're fools to believe in her! You'll pay for this, Daring Do!

content: You know, I think I will.

content: I fear if we don't find a cure soon, everypony will be in grave danger!

content: With mother sick, I didn't think I'd ever find a cure. But starin' at those cursed flowers today, I saw somethin'.

content: Flash bees! I realized the flowers' poison didn't affect the flash bees. And if they were immune to Swamp Fever, their honey could be the cure!

content: But they were so aggressive defendin' their hive, I didn't know how I was gonna get it!

speaker: Mage Meadowbrook
content: Here goes nothin'!

speaker: Mage Meadowbrook
content: Today, I cured mother...

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Oh, I can't wait to get on this zeppelin and fly like a Pegasus!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Really? I remember you getting airsick on Admiral Fairweather's Wild Ride at Pony Island.

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Oh, please! I grew out of airsickness a long time ago.

speaker: Iron Will
content: I hope you ponies feel welcomed aboard, because you are!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, that was an... assertive welcome.

speaker: Night Light
content: Guess this is what it's like to be big-time prize winners. I just wish I could remember what contest we won.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wait. You don't know where this prize came from?

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: When somepony offers you a free vacation, you just sign the paperwork and don't ask questions!

speaker: Night Light
content: Especially when it means we all get to fly off together. What should we do first?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, I did categorize the ship's activities and make a schedule organized by each of our interests. Dad, you're easy. Bingo competition right here.

speaker: Night Light
content: Oh, I just love how the numbers and letters are organized in their little boxes. It's so satisfying.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Shining Armor, they've got a tiny boat race in a tiny pool here.

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Aw, sis. Only you would remember I love tiny things.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And Cadance, there's a Peewee Princess Playtime here that Flurry's gonna love!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Oh, wonderful!

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Hmm. This barrel jumping at Neighagra Falls sounds interesting.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Eh. I just want to see you all have a good time. And this works out perfectly, because we have room for the one thing I wanna do! Our ship passes the Frozen North at sunset, which is the only time you can see the astrological phenomenon known as the Northern Stars. It's like the stars are shooting out of the setting sun!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Well, we definitely don't want to miss that.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Then it's settled. Hmm. But we don't have anything to do right now. Any suggestions?

speaker: Iron Will
content: Attention, cruise ponies! Don't let this zeppelin be a bore! Leave your room and see the tour!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: A tour could be fun.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: I'm afraid Flurry may be airsick. Since I know that isn't a problem for you, would you mind taking her below?

speaker: Iron Will
content: Far to our right, you can just make out the white tufts of Cloudsdale, where Princess Twilight Sparkle once toured the weather factory.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How'd he know that? And why announce it on a cruise?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Why don't we move to the other side of the deck?

speaker: Iron Will
content: We are now high enough to see all of Canterlot, even the royal tree where Princess Twilight and her brother Shining Armor were born!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What? That's not right.

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Oooh!

speaker: Night Light
content: Let's get down for that!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Um, you guys know that's not where we were born. What are you so excited about?

speaker: Night Light
content: Well, it is a really nice tree, sweetheart.

speaker: Others
content: "Raspberry Sorbet": We just wanted to say how excited we are to be here!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Um... yeah. Us, too.

speaker: Iron Will
content: On our route north, we will pass the spires of the Crystal Empire, where Princess Cadance rescued her Alicorn baby Spike from a monster made of fire!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Well, that doesn't even make sense.

speaker: Night Light
content: Well, "Royal Grandparents" sounds a bit fancy, but of course you can take our picture.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What?!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Uh... Oh!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, that's it! Does anypony know where the cruise announcer is?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Excuse me, sir.

speaker: Iron Will
content: You can call Iron Will "Iron Will"!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What are you doing here? And why do you keep announcing random things about me and my family?

speaker: Iron Will
content: The assertiveness seminar market dried up, so Iron Will started a new career organizing themed vacation packages!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And the theme of this vacation is...

speaker: Iron Will
content: Everypony, stomp your hooves if you are here for the premiere Cruise of the Princesses Experience!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Iron Will, I'm not sure it was entirely honest of you to offer this cruise to my family without telling us that ponies bought tickets just to see Cadance and me!

speaker: Iron Will
content: Iron Will outlined all the details of the cruise in the Prize Acceptance and Consent Form that you signed.

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Well, when somepony offers you a free vacation, who reads the fine print?

speaker: Iron Will
content: Iron Will prides himself on providing a quality vacation experience. But if Twilight Sparkle and her family don't want it, Iron Will can cancel the cruise and break the hearts of every princess-adoring pony on board.

speaker: Pony in Window
content: I love you, Princess Twilight!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: As much as I want a family vacation, I don't think I could entertain all these cruise ponies. My hooves are pretty full taking care of Flurry Heart.

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: I guess we were just so excited by the idea of a family cruise.

speaker: Night Light
content: All right. I guess we better turn this ship around.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wait! Iron Will, what if I offered you a deal? If I agree to do whatever princess activities you want, will you promise that my family gets to do the activities they want?

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Sis, you don't have to do that. We want you to enjoy yourself, too.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't want the vacation to end now or let down all these ponies who were looking forward to seeing us. So what do you say, Iron Will? Do we have a deal?

speaker: Iron Will
content: Princess Twilight has a deal!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Great! So it looks like we have some time before Dad plays Bingo.

speaker: Iron Will
content: Actually, we have just enough to pick the winner of our grand-prize raffle.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh. Well... who doesn't like prizes?

speaker: Iron Will
content: All right, cruise ponies! When the zeppelin flies, it's time for a prize!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Thank you all for being so gracious and respectful to me and my family. And now, without further ado, the winner is...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Star Tracker!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Congratulations, Star Tracker! Enjoy your prize! Okay, Dad! Bingo time!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh... Oh. I'm sorry. I don't have the prize.

speaker: Iron Will
content: Congratulations to Star Tracker, who wins the grand prize <U+0096> spending the day with Twilight as an honorary member of her family!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's the prize?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, well... I guess you should come with us, honorary family member.

speaker: Night Light
content: Sure! There's always room at the bingo table!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ahem! Is everypony ready?

speaker: Night Light
content: Sure are, sweetie! Give that cage a whirl!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Dad? What did you say?

speaker: Star Tracker
content: He... He said to, uh, uh, give it a-a whirl. Heh.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh. Um, thanks.

speaker: Night Light
content: Hey, hey! Now we're talkin'! This Princess Bingo is great!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Did you get that one, Dad? Can anypony tell me how my dad is doing?

speaker: Star Tracker
content: He, uh, he said the Princess Bingo is, uh, great. Heh.

speaker: Star Tracker
content: Twilight is my favorite time of day. And it's also your name. So I just thought that was cool.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Phew! Just made it!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And I'm ready to give you the tiny boat race of your life!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Are you sure you're not airsick, big brother?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't think that's how it works. But I'm ready if you are.

speaker: Iron Will
content: Technically, Princess Twilight Sparkle should officiate the princess paddle boat race.

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Well, I suppose I could could race your brother.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh. Well, as long as Shining Armor gets to race, I'm happy.

speaker: Star Tracker
content: S-Sorry.

speaker: Star Tracker
content: I'm gonna write about this race tonight in my journal! It's just so exciting!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: On your mark, get set<U+0097>

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Just so everypony knows, I'm getting out of this boat because of how not sick I feel.

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Aww, that's all right, dear. We'll take you back to the room.

speaker: Iron Will
content: That was just the first heat! Of ten!

speaker: Iron Will
content: Now, who's ready to see a princess face when they win their race?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Cadance, I'm so glad you got in the Peewee Princess Playtime!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Flurry is having a wonderful time.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's great. I'm just on my way to take some old-time Appleloosan photos!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: And then do a quick question-and-answer session on becoming an Alicorn before Mom's barrel ride at Neighagra Falls! I really hope I don't miss that.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Twilight, are you sure you don't mind doing all of these princess activities?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Mind? What? Absolutely not. I mean, you guys are having fun, right? Besides, I have to make sure these cruise ponies are happy if I want to be a good princess.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: You're already a good princess, Twilight.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Honestly, as long as I get to see the Northern Stars tonight with everypony, I'll be happy. But right now, I gotta go take some pictures. See you later!

speaker: Forceful Parent Pony
content: Why don't you play and make a princess friend?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Uh... I am so sorry, everypony, but it looks like Flurry needs her nap.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, why did that last question have to be a two-parter? I just hope I have time for one barrel ride with Mom!

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Neighagra Falls was amazing! The endless open air, the water in my mane! Oh! The small confines of the barrel!

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Oh, honey, I know you're disappointed, but we waited as long as we could. Maybe you should take a break from these princess things.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Disappointed? No! I've just been answering some detailed questions about Alicorns! You know how much I love details!

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: I just don't want you to forget. It's your vacation, too.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How can I when it's a totally successful vacation?

speaker: Night Light
content: All right. Well, uh, we can't wait to see those Northern Stars!

speaker: Iron Will
content: Iron Will lived up to his side of the bargain, and Princess Twilight only has one more thing to do for the day.

speaker: Iron Will
content: It's your last chance. Come get in line if you want the princess to sign!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How long have you been waiting?

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: You were right, Twilight. They were breathtaking.

speaker: Night Light
content: Aw, we wish you'd been here to see it, sweet-pea, but we're sure you're making a whole bunch of cruise ponies happy.

speaker: Star Tracker
content: I'm so happy I could cry!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, yeah. The cruise ponies are happy. My family is happy. Even Iron Will is happy.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You know who isn't happy? Me!

speaker: Star Tracker
content: Augh, my hoof!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm sorry. But maybe that wouldn't have happened if you weren't practically standing on my tail! Not even my real family stands so close! Rrgh!

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Twilight?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I only made that deal with Iron Will so my family and the cruise ponies could have the vacation they wanted.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: What about what you wanted?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I just want everypony to be happy.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Well, sometimes ponies want more from a princess than you can give, and it can be hard to know where to draw the line.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
