content: You seem to know pretty well.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: Once I had Flurry Heart, the line was easier for me to see. You will always have obligations as a princess, but you also have an obligation to yourself.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're right. I think I need to set some boundaries. But first, I owe somepony an apology.

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Aww, how's that, dearie?

speaker: Star Tracker
content: Better. Thanks.

speaker: Star Tracker
content: Uh, I think I should go!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No, Star Tracker. You should stay. I have something to tell you. All of you. I'm glad you all got to do the things you wanted, but I should have stood up for myself so that I could do what I wanted, too. It wasn't fair of me to lash out at you. If I felt like you were standing too close, I should have said something. I'm sorry. What do you say we do something off the schedule?

speaker: Star Tracker
content: Who are you?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Yup! We're gonna do something I want us to do, as a family. Honorary members, too.

speaker: Night Light
content: Now that's cold! This is more like it!

speaker: Star Tracker
content: You and your family have been really kind to include me, but you deserve your own vacation together. And I'm really glad we met, too!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Ohhh!

speaker: Iron Will
content: Attention, cruise ponies! If it's your dream, come to the deck for ice cream!

speaker: Star Tracker
content: Oh, no! Leave the princess alone!

speaker: Iron Will
content: What did you say to Iron Will?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's okay, everypony. First, I want to thank all of you for coming. It means a lot that you'd spend your hard-earned bits just to be with us. But I honestly came on this cruise to take some time off from being a princess. I'm just a pony, too, after all. And even though I want everypony here to be happy, I'd really like to spend the rest of the cruise relaxing with my family.

speaker: Cruise Pony 2
content: Of course, Princess Twilight.

speaker: Cruise Pony 3
content: But why was this trip advertised as a Cruise of the Princesses if you just wanted to get away?

speaker: Iron Will
content: Iron Will's Cruise of the Princesses makes no guarantees as to the participation of actual princesses.

speaker: Cruise pony
content: What?!

speaker: Iron Will
content: But Iron Will learned his lesson before. Satisfaction not guaranteed. No refuuuuuuunds!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: Wow. He may be pushy and manipulative, but nopony can say that minotaur isn't prepared.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There's still plenty of activities. We pass Fillydelphia on the way back. I could give Flurry Heart a quick history tour.

speaker: Princess Cadance
content: That's very thoughtful. But right now, the family and I have something scheduled for you.

speaker: Night Light
content: Behold! The Northern Stars!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You did all this for me? This is amazing! Thank you. And Shining Armor, I can't believe you're up there even though you're airsick!

speaker: Shining Armor
content: I am not air<U+0097> Oh, okay. Maybe I'm not feeling great!

speaker: Twilight Velvet
content: Oh, dear!

speaker: Night Light
content: Whatever you say.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Now this is the only activity I need.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Okay. All we need is a dot of salt, a dab of sugar, and a spritz of ginger.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh... Are those real measurements? How do you keep track without a recipe?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Pie baking is more art than science. And this will be my masterpiece! It's to celebrate Rainbow Dash's seventy-third Wonderbolt training session!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Seventy-third? That's specific.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I know! The pie is blueberry because Wonderbolt outfits are blue. The crust is rainbow, for obvious reasons. But the most special part is the seventy-three super secret sweets and spices that represent each training session! Could you please pass the... brown sugar, pink sugar, sweetroot, apple jelly, berry mash, and a towel?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You sure are going to a lot of trouble for Rainbow Dash's pie.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Phew! That's because I know how much she loves them! My pies are her favorite! It's worth all the trouble to see her happy. Now I'm going to need some cocoa powder, cocoa flakes<U+0097> Ooh! Cocoa bar! Want some?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Isn't that for the pie?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, Twilight! That's hilarious! You don't mix chocolate into a blueberry pie! This is my mid morning, pie-making chocolate fuel that keeps this pie baking train chugging down the tracks! Break time's over! Now let's finish this pie! Chugga-chugga, chugga-chugga, choo-choo!

speaker: Spitfire
content: Good training, everypony. Nice work, Crash. You really added that sparkle to that pressure diamond-drop.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: My seventy-third training session? That's specific.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I know! I'm just so proud and happy for you, and I've been counting all your training sessions, and I was going to wait until your hundredth, but I got too excited, and I know how much you love pie, so happy seventy-third training session!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whaaa?! You didn't have to do this.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I know I didn't have to, but I reeeally wanted to! Have a bite.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whoa! What's that?! Huh. Guess it was nothing. But wow, heh. This pie is the best I've ever had! Mmm! Is that cinnamon?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I knew you'd love it! Have more. I made the whole thing for you.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Really? Oh, that's so great! But I need to go change. A-And then I have to take Tank to the vet. Heh. His sensitive tortoise tummy's been acting up again. Do you mind if I take this pie with me?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Of course not! I gotta get back to my shift at Sugarcube Corner anyway. Congratulations again!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Heh. Thanks.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I knew she'd love it. Is that...? Is that...?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Stop!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You didn't see a blueberry rainbow-crust seventy-three-ingredient pie with a slice eaten out of it in here, did you?

speaker: Janitor Pony
content: Uh... n-no?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Right. Of course you didn't. That would be ridiculous. Because I made it for Rainbow Dash, and she loves my pies. She would never throw them away like trash in the trash with other trash, right? Right?!

speaker: Janitor Pony
content: Um... riiight?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hmmm... That pie couldn't have been the one I made. I must be seeing things. I did have a lot of chocolate this morning. But what if I wasn't seeing things? What if that was my pie? That would be bananas! Unless Rainbow Dash's been replaced by an imposter who throws delicious pies away!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Or... has she been brainwashed by a pie-hating evil queen?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You make a good point. Rainbow Dash is too stubborn to be brainwashed. Plus she hates washing. Hmm. There's something else going on here. Let's look up a few of the more recent pies I've made for her. The boysenberry pie I made for her birthday... and her three half-birthday lemon meringues... and the "It's Not Your Birthday But Here's a Pie Anyway Day" custard pie! She ate all of these... Right?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Another pie!? Thank you so much! Whoa! What's that?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Huh. Guess it was nothing. Heh-heh.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Awesome! Three lemon meringues? Uh... Hey, what's that over there?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, never mind. Heh. Great pies!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Happy "It's Not Your Birthday But Here's a Pie Anyway" Day!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Thank you! No way! Check that out!

speaker: Shoeshine
content: Oh! It's not even my birthday!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, sorry. Guess it was nothing. Mmm! But that custard was everything!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Have I ever really seen Rainbow Dash eat one of my pies? And do I always look when somepony points behind me? What's there?! Heh. Good one. But I need answers.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I've sent Rainbow Dash a pie every month she's been a Wonderbolt, and you're telling me you've never seen her eat one?

speaker: Others
content: Spitfire, Soarin, Uhhh...

speaker: Spitfire
content: Uh, affirmative. Or, uh, negative. Um... I-I-I mean, she wasn't seen eating one.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hmm... Interesting. Very interesting.

speaker: Spitfire
content: Are we under investigation?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: As chief detective on the pie case, I've labeled you all ponies-of-interest. So it's best you tell me everything you know.

speaker: Spitfire
content: Well, we have been getting mysterious monthly pie donations.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Would you be able to pick these pies out of a line up?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I hear Rainbow Dash's pet tortoise Tank has been having tummy troubles. When did it start?

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. About a week ago. Poor Tank had all the telltale signs of sugar overload <U+0096> jittery shell, sleeplessness, reptilian indigestion.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Hmmm... And this all happened the day after I made Rainbow Dash a "Thanks For Lending Me Your Jacket" peach pie. It seems the pieces of the puzzle are plopping into place, but the picture isn't pretty. Note to self <U+0096> P. Alliteration Pie. Is that everything, Doctor?

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. Well, there's also this.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Interesting. Did you have the lab analyze the flavor of that pie?

speaker: Dr. Fauna
content: Dr. No. But you know, Miss Cheerilee was in here not long ago. The class hamster was having similar symptoms. Perhaps it's a pie pandemic!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Perhaps. And I just might know Pony Patient Zero!

speaker: Cheerilee
content: Dr. Fauna's right. I do always have to remind the foals and fillies not to share the pies with the class hamster. Animals just can't digest pony food.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Indeed. But where do these pies come from?

speaker: Cheerilee
content: Well, they're from Rainbow Dash. She drops off her "Day After Rainbow Dash's Half-Birthday" pie every year.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Did you say the day after her half-birthday?! Very, very interesting. Because I give her a pie on her half-birthday every year! And I have a feeling it's the same pie.

speaker: Cheerilee
content: Well, wherever it comes from, the students just love it.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I'm so glad. At least I can be sure somepony is.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: She didn't eat the blueberry. She didn't eat the banana. She didn't eat the cream, and she didn't eat the chocolate. She didn't eat any of 'em! Why?! And don't tell me this all just started recently! It's been going on for years! Cheerilee said so herself. If there's one thing I know, you can't escape the truth!

speaker: Applejack
content: Pinkie Pie?! Pinkie Pie!

speaker: Applejack
content: Whooooaaaa! Oh. Party-planning cave. Right. You okay? Or are you just screamin' for fun?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Screaming is fun. But I'm not okay! I've been making Rainbow Dash pies for years, but she doesn't even like them. She's been lying to me!

speaker: Applejack
content: But everypony loves your pies. they're the greatest thing since sliced apples.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Thank you!

speaker: Applejack
content: And I could swear I've seen her eat one of your pies before.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Have you reeeaaally?

speaker: Applejack
content: Um, I... thought I had. That's why I said it?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Are you sure?

speaker: Applejack
content: Maybe I haven't...?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Exactly! Because it's all been a sham! Rainbow Dash has been laughing at my pies behind my back and scheming of a way to get rid of them for years!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Bring forth the worst-tasting food in all of Equestria!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And now I will destroy Pinkie Pie's horrid abominations, freeing the land of these disgusting pies forever!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Nooooooo!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Good riddance, strawberry cream and peaches 'o plenty! Begone, apple crumble and lemon surprise!

speaker: Applejack
content: I really don't think that's what's happening.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I don't think so either. I know so.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, I've got just the thing to get your mind off all this madness. We've had a great apple harvest, so I was hopin' you could whip up a few of your delicious pies.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Yes. I will make pies. Lots of pies. I'm going to make Rainbow Dash so many pies, it'll force her to admit the truth. Or I'll catch her in the act of getting rid of them. Operation: "Pie of Lies" is a go. Thanks, Applejack. I knew I could count on you to come up with a plan.

speaker: Applejack
content: I don't think that's what I did. Also, uh... how do you get out of here?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Surprise!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: W-W-What's happening?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Happy unofficial "Wake Your Friends Up" Day!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh. I've never heard of "Wake Your Friends Up" Day.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Well, it's unofficial. But I made you your favorite pie in celebration! Ta-da! Gifts are the second most important part of "Wake Your Friends Up" Day.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What's the first most important part?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Accepting the gifts and enjoying them immediately.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh... Well, I'm sorry I forgot about "Wake Your Friends Up" Day. Let me make it up to you. Here!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: The pie! Where'd it go?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What do you mean where did it go? Heh-heh. Mmm-mmm.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Congratulations on your seventy-fourth Wonderbolt training session! Here's a pie. Now eat it!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Okay, this is getting a little out of hoof. I haven't even trained yet.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Well, I wanted to pre-celebrate because I already know how great you're gonna do. Eat the pie!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Pinkie, look out!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Pinkie! Are you okay?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Get me down!

speaker: EMT Pony
content: Sorry, ma'am, but we have to make sure you didn't sustain any internal injuries.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: But the pie! What happened to the pie?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh! The pie was delicious! You just get better!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Noooooooo!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Ah! Somepony help me! Rainbow Dash, thank goodness you're here! I was trying to fix the top pie on my pie pyramid, but the whole thing became unstable. And there's only one way to save me! You have to eat the pies!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Don't worry, I got ya!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, right. Or you could save me that way.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You gotta be more careful, okay?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Rrgh!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Rainbow Dash! I wanted to thank you for saving me from the pie pyramid, so have a pie! Have three! Have fifteen! I know how much you love them! Now eat up!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh... Thanks!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I can't wait to eat all these pies!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: What!? Where did they<U+0097>?! How did you<U+0097>?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Delicious! You did it again, Pinkie!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Rainbow Dash, there you are! I made a pie for everypony, and you're the only one who hasn't eaten hers yet. So here. Your pie. For you to eat. Now.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Are you okay? You seem to be staring more than usual.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You sure you don't have to blink?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Me? Nope. I'm not much of a blinker. Don't mind me. Go ahead and take a bite.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Well... Do I want to take a big bite or a small bite...? I just don't know... Or maybe medium? No, no, no. Definitely not medium.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Just try some.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ahhhh... Do you have any milk?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ah, never mind. Your pies are just too good to resist.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: What?! No! No! That's it! I can't take it!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh, everything okay, Pinkie?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: No! Everything is not okay! You hate my pies!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What are you talking about?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You know exactly what I'm talking about! I saw what you did! Well, I didn't see what you did. But I know that you've been fake-eating my pies! You threw away the pie I made for your seventy-third Wonderbolt training session, and I know you secretly somehow got rid of all the other pies I gave you! Admit it!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: That's crazy! What do you think I did? Somehow make them all disappear into thin air?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Okay. So maybe I made one of them disappear into thin air.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: How could you?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What?! I, uh... I-I just wanted to share these amazing pies with the folks of Cloudsdale! So I, uh... I was trying to send them up via... balloon mail.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: But you just said they were delicious.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Well, obviously that's because... I have amnesia!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I've been brainwashed!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I-It's Opposite Day?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Your memory is working fine, you hate washing, and I know today's not Opposite Day because I baked you a pie for it every year. A pie that you'd probably just throw away. Or give to charity. Or destroy with your laser eyes while laughing at me!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Laser eyes?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh! Oh! So you admit it!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What? No! I can explain!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I don't want to hear it!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: She won't listen to me. She won't let me apologize. I feel terrible.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, you have been lying to her. To all of us, actually.

speaker: Applejack
content: Yeah. Is there anything else you're lyin' about that we should know?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No! Well, not that I can think of off the top of my head. Is it my fault that I don't like pies? And not just Pinkie's pies. All pies! I know how much she loves making pies, and if I told her I didn't like them, it would have crushed her.

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, you kinda crushed her anyway.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, but I...! You're right. I guess I should've just eaten the pies in the first place. Wait! That's it! I know how I can make it up to her!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Pee-yew! Gummy, is that you?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Huh. What is that? Oh. It's you.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Pinkie Pie, wait! I know now that I should've been honest with you from the start, because lying to your friends is wrong. And because getting rid of all those pies was a giant hassle. I mean, do you have any idea how many pies you've made for me over the years?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Yes, I know exactly how many. I have a very detailed pie-ling system.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Of course you do. The point is I thought the hassle was worth it just to spare your feelings, but I was wrong. So to make up for it, I made this pie for you. Well, I guess I made it for me. To eat in front of you. Point is I'm eating this pie for friendship!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wait. That smelly circular monstrosity is a pie?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yeah! I know I can't go back and eat all the pies you made for me in the past, so instead I'm going to eat this one giant one for you now. So here I go.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ahhhh...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wait! I can't watch you do this!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I mean, is that crust or some kind of concrete?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yeah, honestly, I have no idea.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, I can't believe you're willing to eat this terrible pie for me. It's ridiculous, and this whole thing is overly complicated, and... I think I finally understand why you lied.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whoa! What's that?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Huh. Guess it was nothing. Heh-heh.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I'm so glad you enjoyed my pies!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, never mind. Heh. Great pies!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No way! Check that out!

speaker: Shoeshine
content: Oh! It's not even my birthday!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, sorry. Guess it was nothing. Mmm! But that custard was everything!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Seeing you eat my pies makes me the happiest pony in all of Equestria!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Heh. I know it does.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You did a lot of ridiculous and overly complex things to get rid of my pies because it made you happy to see me happy. Just like I went to a lot of effort to make you the pies because it made me happy to see you happy.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yes!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And if you're willing to go through all of that, it really shows how much you're willing to do for your friends.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Aw, shucks. It was nothing.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Now get out of that thing and give me a hug!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Just remember. In the future, you can always be honest with me.

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, I could've told her that.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Heh. Cool. H-How about this? Your hugs are too tight.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: No, they're not.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oooh! Excuse me. When does the noon train from the Crystal Empire arrive?

speaker: Others
content: "All Aboard": Uh... noon?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Heh. Right. Sorry. I'm just a little excited because my friend Sunburst is coming.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: He's my oldest friend. I mean, we've known each other practically forever. We have tons in common.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: We both love magic and games and jokes <U+0096> everything, really. Now that I think about it, there isn't a pony in all of Equestria I have more in common with.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Starlight?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Sunburst! You made it!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Of course! I've been looking forward to this visit for a long time.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Whoa. How long are you staying?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Uh, just a... little reading for the train.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Same old Sunburst. It's going to be so great spending time together. Just like old times. You and me doing the stuff we like <U+0096> games, magic...

speaker: Sunburst
content: Antiquing.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Antiquing. You know I like antiquing.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You do?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Um, of course! Historical knickknacks, ancient relics... Oh! You are so lucky! Ponyville is antique central!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It is?

speaker: Sunburst
content: How have we never talked about this? We are going antiquing, and you are gonna love it!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Okay. Let's drop your stuff off at the castle first.

speaker: Sunburst
content: This is so great! Who knew I'd be the one showing you the cool sights of Ponyville?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'm a little surprised myself.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Wow! What a difference between the hoof-molded bricks and the extruded ones, right?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh-huh... Ha-ha...

speaker: Sunburst
content: Oooh! Check out all these chandeliers! Sometimes, the crystals have magical properties.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh. Oh, that's cool. How do you<U+0097>?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sunburst! I'm so glad you're here!

speaker: Sunburst
content: In the antique store?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: In Ponyville! Starlight's really been looking forward to your visit. Though I'm glad you're in the antique store, too. I'm usually the only one.

speaker: Sunburst
content: That's crazy! Who doesn't like antiquing, right?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Right.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oooh, look! An ancient map of Equestria made by the Mighty Helm.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Without the help of unicorn magic or Pegasus flight, the Earth ponies of the Mighty Helm were able to map the entire coast of Equestria.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Coooool...

speaker: Sunburst
content: You don't have to pretend to like all this stuff.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What? No! I do like it. I mean, if you like it, I like it. Besides, we've almost looked at everything, right?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, wow! You have got to see this Saddle Arabian vanity!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: This shop looked a lot smaller from the outside.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Did you see this Palominian letter opener?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wow! That goes well with this ancient phoenix feather quill! We could write to each other!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Um, I-I really like this old-timey barrel.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Actually, the stuff I bought is inside the barrel. But I can't wait to see what it is!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Wait. You don't know what you bought?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Mm-mmm. It's a blind buy. Sometimes shops get too busy to go through everything, so they load up a box or barrel and sell it without knowing what's inside.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Buying one is sort of like a treasure hunt.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Once I found a first edition History of Equestria in the original Olde Ponish.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hliet foresettan pliht!

speaker: Sunburst
content: It's an Olde Ponish saying. "Reward prefers risk!" Uh, it loses something in the translation.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Why don't we look through this stuff later?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Yeah. What do you want to do, Starlight?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well, I don't know if you're gonna remember this, but...

speaker: Sunburst
content: Is this...?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Dragon Pit!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I remember that game. You two used to play it?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Pretty much any time we weren't working on magic. I can't believe you found a copy!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Sunburst would get so excited whenever his dragon got trapped, he knocked the whole board over.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's adorable.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Uh, well, it's an exciting game. But I have a little more control over my horn now.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh-oh! Somepony's dragon's gonna get trapped!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Doesn't seem so exciting to m<U+0097>

speaker: Sunburst
content: Huh. I guess it is adorable.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I hope you're enjoying your visit so far.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Are you kidding? I mean, first antiquing and then spending time with Twilight?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh. Yeah. She's pretty great.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Right? I mean, I know she's a princess, but I never thought she'd be so fun to just hang out with.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well, she is the Princess of Friendship.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Right. I guess that makes sense.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: So tomorrow I thought<U+0097>

speaker: Sunburst
content: I suppose I'm just surprised at how well we get along. I don't have much in common with most ponies.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You two are pretty similar. I don't know many ponies who are fluent in Olde Ponish.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Exactly! I probably have more in common with Twilight than any pony in Equestria!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Right...

speaker: Sunburst
content: Anyway, I better get some sleep. Ponyville might be small, but there's a lot to do. Maybe we should ask Twilight what she recommends we see!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Um... sure.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Great! Good night, Starlight.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Um...

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: ...Good night.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Knock, knock!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Oh. Hi, Starlight. Is it morning already?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yup! Maybe a bit early, but like you said, there's a lot to see in Ponyville.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Uh... Right. Okay.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Plus, I couldn't really sleep. I just kept thinking about all the stuff we have in common and how much fun we'll have today.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Great. Uh, is Twilight up yet?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Actually, I'm pretty sure she's busy with princess stuff today.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But I've got a full day of stuff planned. Just you and me.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Uh, great. Um, would you mind turning around or preferably... leaving the room so I could get changed?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: One genuine Sweet Apple Acres apple tree! Because we used to drink so much apple juice as foals?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Uh, I don't remember that.

speaker: Trixie
content: Ow.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Trixie? What are you doing here?

speaker: Trixie
content: Huh. I often seek the privacy of the orchard to practice new feats of amazement. And also, I fell asleep.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh. Well, Sunburst and I were just catching up, so<U+0097>

speaker: Trixie
content: I don't suppose the two of you want to see a never-before-witnessed magical marvel?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Sure!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Why not?

speaker: Trixie
content: Behold, visiting friend from Starlight's past, and be amazed by the Great and Powerful <U+0096> and current best friend of Starlight <U+0096> Trixie!

speaker: Trixie
content: I give you... the Unicorn Escape! Just... a sec... One more... twist... and... The Great and Powerful Trixie requires a little assistance.

speaker: Sunburst
content: I know this trick. There's a special link, but I could never hold the chain up long enough to find it.

speaker: Trixie
content: Well, if I could do magic like that, I'd have a whole slew of new tricks at my disposal.

speaker: Sunburst
content: I always liked close-up magic because I knew I could do it if I just practiced enough.

speaker: Trixie
content: Starlight, why didn't you tell me how much Sunburst and I had in common?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Gee. I don't know.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I know Trixie's "magic" is, you know, fun. But the Mirror Pool is actual magic.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Whoa. This place is pure pony lore.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yup. I mean, it's supposed to be all dangerous, and I guess I shouldn't have broken the seal to get in, but you wanted to see the sights of Ponyville, right?

speaker: Sunburst
content: So, Pinkie Pie just dove in and made copies of herself?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Mm-hmm. If we made copies of ourselves, we could get a year's worth of hanging out over in one day.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh, not that we would.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Do you hear that?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Oh. I hope it's not a leftover Pinkie Pie.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Not exactly.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Maud! How did you get in here?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: This cavern's actually connected to mine.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Uh, what are you doing?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Tapping.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Maud isn't super chatty. I mean, you and I could sit around and talk all day, but she looks pretty busy.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Are you taking some kind of core sample?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Not exactly. I'm uncovering this section of strata for closer study. You might want to step back.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: I'm studying this area's metamorphic<U+0097>

speaker: Sunburst
content: <U+0097>foliation. Is this gneiss, phyllite, or slate? Wow. The pressure above must be pretty uniform to get the planar fabric to be this consistent.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: You know about geology?

speaker: Sunburst
content: Eh, I dabble. For example, by the speleothems in this cave, I kind of figured there was another way out.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Because of the calcite deposits.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Starlight? Where's Sunburst?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Doing stage magic with Trixie? Studying new rocks with Maud? You're here, so I guess you two aren't off translating some ancient Olde Ponish text.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What are you talking about? Why would Sunburst be doing any of that? I thought he came to Ponyville to see you.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I thought so, too, but it hasn't worked out that way. When we were foals, we had more in common than any two ponies in Equestria. But now, it seems like he's got more in common with my friends than he does with me.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh. Everypony changes, but that doesn't mean there aren't still things you both like. You both love magic, right?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Magic?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sure. You're really good at it, and Sunburst practically knows every spell that ever was.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You're right! Thanks, Twilight! You're the best!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Heh. I try.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Starlight, what happened? Maud and I found some fascinating sedimentary stratum, but when I turned to show you, you were gone.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Maud does have a way of making rocks really interesting, but I wanted to work on something a little more "us".

speaker: Sunburst
content: What's this?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Just a little something I made up.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Whoa! You made up this spell? Just now?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Yup!

speaker: Sunburst
content: Wow.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I know, right? But wait, there's more!

speaker: Young Starlight Glimmer
content: Cool, right?!

speaker: Young Sunburst
content: Um... sure.

speaker: Young Starlight Glimmer
content: Now we can play Dragon Pit! Just like we used to!

speaker: Young Sunburst
content: Actually, I thought we could go with Maud and<U+0097>

speaker: Young Starlight Glimmer
content: I mean, nothing was better than just you and me playing this game when we were foals, right?

speaker: Young Sunburst
content: Starlight.

speaker: Young Starlight Glimmer
content: Do you what to be red or blue?

speaker: Young Sunburst
content: Starlight! I don't want to play the game at all!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What's going on in here?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Nothing. I was trying to have fun doing the one thing I thought we still had in common, but I guess we don't even have that anymore.

speaker: Sunburst
content: I don't understand. Starlight and I have known each other since we were foals, but that doesn't mean we have to be foals to hang out.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh, Starlight does have a tendency to overdo.

speaker: Sunburst
content: I mean, it is surprising how well I get along with all of her friends, but she and I still have tons in common.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Maybe you just need to remind her what those things are.

speaker: Sunburst
content: That's it! That's exactly what I'll do! Uh, right after I think of them.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh-oh.

speaker: Trixie
content: Obviously you and I hit it off. I am quite impressive. And we share a love for prestidigitation.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Right. And Starlight and I share a lot of things, too. I just need to think of them. What else do you guys have in common?

speaker: Trixie
content: Well, we've both made not-so-great choices in the past.

speaker: Trixie
content: And we're self-conscious about everypony judging us, even though we've both changed and are trying hard to be better.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Yeah, we don't really have that.

speaker: Trixie
content: Hmph! I can think of something you have in common. You're both poor practice audiences.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Starlight and I don't really have a lot in common. Other than feeling different from most ponies. And comedy.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Comedy?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: I'm very funny.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Was that a joke?

speaker: Maud Pie
content: No.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Oh. Well, that's more than I can think of that she and I have in common.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: We don't really spend that much time talking about that, though. Mostly we're just comfortable around each other.

speaker: Sunburst
content: We used to be. We did everything together. But now I'm wondering if we've spent so much time apart that we don't connect over anything anymore. And if we can't connect over anything, then maybe we're not even friends!

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Well, at least it's not serious. That was a joke.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I appreciate you trying to help, Twilight. But it seems pretty clear that Sunburst and I have grown apart.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I understand. But I feel like that only happens if you both let it. You still want to be friends, right?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I created a spell so we could relive playing a game in our childhood home... and bodies.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Right...

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'm just not sure Sunburst wants to stay friends, too.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think you might be surprised.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Prepare yourself...

speaker: Trixie
content: ...for the new and improved Dragon Pit!

speaker: Sunburst
content: We had to take out a few spaces to get it to fit, but you hardly miss them. Maud made the dice.

speaker: Maud Pie
content: Pumice is the lightest igneous rock. It seemed the best choice.

speaker: Trixie
content: And I added the special effects. There's nothing like a little well-placed magic smoke.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Looks like somepony's dragon is going to get trapped.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I thought you didn't want to play this game.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Well, I didn't want to pretend to be a foal, but I know you wanted to play. I thought it'd be fun to play a version big enough for full-grown ponies. What do you think? Fun, right?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Actually, it's missing something.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Now it's fun.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I don't know why I got so worried about us not having anything in common.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Yeah. I kind of think it doesn't matter as long as we enjoy each other's company.

speaker: Trixie
content: And that game was certainly enjoyable.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: What made it even better was getting to play it with all my friends.

speaker: Sunburst
content: See you soon?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You bet. I want to hear if you find anything interesting in that barrel.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Trust me, Starlight. You'll be the first to know.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: The best elements within us can spread light and virtue, and I know ponies who represent them all <U+0096> strength, bravery, healing, beauty, hope, and sorcery. Myself and these Pillars of Equestria were gathered together by another to maintain and share the light of these powerful ideals. But we soon came to believe the pony who brought us together only wanted that power for himself. Cast out and alone, this power-mad pony turned to darkness to satisfy his thirst. Transformed into a Pony of Shadows, he returned for revenge <U+0096> to extinguish the Pillars' light and rob the world of hope. To stop him, the Pillars and I must make a grave sacrifice. But we shall leave behind a seed in hopes that one day it will grow into a force to stand against the darkness for all time. We must now face the fiend with the only plan we have...

speaker: Sunburst
content: "...I only hope it will be enough." That's the last entry. And maybe Star Swirl's final words before he vanished.

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: I've always wondered what happened to Star Swirl. This is quite a discovery, Sunburst.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: So it's genuine? You can verify that this journal really belonged to Star Swirl the Bearded?!

speaker: Princess Luna
content: Indeed. From the looks of it, the last thing he wrote before facing the Pony of Shadows.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh... So, the Pony of Shadows was really real?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: It appears so.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: We never met the other Pillars, and we were too young to understand the danger they faced.

speaker: Applejack
content: Hold on a second now. All those legendary ponies were real, too? And they went off with Star Swirl to face the Pony of Shadows, and then none of them were ever heard from again?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Uh, yeah. Weren't you listening?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: But what happened to them all?

speaker: Rarity
content: They must have defeated the villain, since Equestria is still full of light and hope.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But how? And where did they go?

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: My Olde Ponish is a bit rusty, but I wonder if the answers can be found somewhere within the pages of this book.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, I just happen to be an expert in Olde Ponish. I mean, I've practically memorized every ancient text about Star Swirl there is!

speaker: Spike
content: Seriously. All of them.

speaker: Princess Luna
content: We have fond memories of our old teacher. If you could discover what happened to him, we would be most grateful.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Solving a thousands-year-old mystery could take forever! Think of the research! The re-reading! The re-re-reading!

speaker: Princess Celestia
content: You might find you need help.

speaker: Applejack
content: Luckily, she's got a whole bushel o' helpers right here.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Totally! Uh... how long will all this research take, exactly?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Let's get this back to my library. I'm sure we'll figure out what happened in no time.

speaker: Spike
content: Figure it out yet, Twilight?

speaker: Sunburst
content: What did you figure out?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: What is it?

speaker: Applejack
content: Twilight, we've been studyin' and referencin' and cross-referencin' for three days straight now.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh. I haven't spent this much time reading since the last Daring Do book came out.

speaker: Rarity
content: Perhaps it is time to take a break. This mystery is over a thousand years old, after all. Another day or two won't make a difference.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Two days?! I don't want to waste two seconds! I'm close to an answer. I can feel it.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: "Hearg sylfum se Ponhenge". What's that?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The Temple of Ponhenge?! You can read that?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: The hornwriting's pretty sloppy, but it's nowhere near as bad as mine. "Toward dol grimlic of Fola Firgenbeorg"?

speaker: Sunburst
content: "At the base of Foal Mountain"...

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: "User endemest scield".

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "Our last stand".

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: This is it. Ponhenge. I can't believe it.

speaker: Sunburst
content: I've never seen magical runes like these before! Have you?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh-uh.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I don't think anypony's seen any of this for a long time. Whoa!

speaker: Applejack
content: It'd take a whole team of ponies to clear away all this brush.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Even then, I'm not sure we'd find out what happened here over a thousand years ago.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're right. I suppose it was a long shot.

speaker: Spike
content: Cheer up, Twilight. Finding a whole set of ancient ruins is pretty impressive. Maybe you could write a paper on it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I guess I hoped we'd get here and the mystery would just magically be explained.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh... Twilight?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Star Swirl!? I... I've wanted to meet you my whole life! I can't believe you're here!

speaker: Sunburst
content: I don't think he is here. I don't think any of them are.

speaker: Pony of Shadows
content: Drawing me here will only make me stronger. You will never defeat me!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: We did not come here to defeat you.

speaker: Pony of Shadows
content: What are you doing?!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: We came... to contain you.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Well, you did ask for a magical explanation.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh... what just happened?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It looked like Star Swirl cast a spell that banished the Pony of Shadows.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Of course! Powerful magic like that would leave an impression on this place. Bringing the book back here let us see what happened.

speaker: Applejack
content: Which was what?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Star Swirl and the rest of the Pillars sacrificed themselves to save Equestria.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: It's amazing to think one of the greatest mysteries of Equestria was solved with a musty old book from an antique shop.

speaker: Sunburst
content: But I wouldn't say the mystery's solved. Star Swirl's spell was one of the most powerful feats of magic in all of history. It'll take years of study before we fully understand it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think I understand Star Swirl's spell!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I know I've finished one of Star Swirl's spells before, but this one was on a whole different level! Was it an explosion of magical feedback? An evocation? A kind of incantation? It's Star Swirl, so the possibilities are endless! And once Starlight set me on the right track with his crazy hornwriting <U+0096> I mean, he was a genius, so I guess we can forgive a little messiness <U+0096> I went through the journal again, and it's amazing!

speaker: Rarity
content: Twilight, darling. We understand you're excited, but that's all we understand.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What exactly is so amazing?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Only how Star Swirl and the other Pillars sent the Pony of Shadows to limbo!

speaker: Applejack
content: They did what now?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: They used their magic to open a portal between worlds <U+0096> to limbo <U+0096> and pulled the Pony of Shadows inside.

speaker: Rarity
content: Darling, your diorama!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I made more!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Star Swirl thought the only way to trap the Pony of Shadows in limbo was for the Pillars to take him there.

speaker: Applejack
content: So they got stuck, too!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: The Pony of Shadows must have been really awful for them to do that.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I suppose being trapped for all time with a super-duper bad guy in limbo might be okay if you were doing the limbo, but that's still pushing it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The thing is, I think I can get them out.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Twilight, are you serious? You can save the most legendary ponies of all time?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I-I don't know. Opening portals between worlds didn't work out well for me. Are you sure it's safe?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: First of all, you opened portals through time. And second of all, Star Swirl wrote the spell you used to do it. If he'd been here, he could have stopped it. Equestria would be safer with him in it. We have to save him.

speaker: Applejack
content: But you'd be savin' all the Pillars, right? A-And they disappeared ages ago.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That's the thing about limbo. It isn't one place or another. It's in between, so time stands still. If we can pull them out, it'll be like they never left. I actually built another model to demonstrate<U+0097>

speaker: Spike
content: What can we do to help?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: If I'm right, we need to find items that are connected to the Pillars in some way.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You mean, like, stuff that belonged to them?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: How would we know what to look for? Or where?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Luckily, Star Swirl took a lot of notes. "My compatriots are as varied as the realm itself and hail from every corner of our land, bringing with them artifacts and talismans of great power."

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Um, Twilight? What are you doing?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm not doing anything!

speaker: Applejack
content: Rockhoof's shovel!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Flash Magnus' shield!

speaker: Rarity
content: Mistmane's flower!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Meadowbrook's mask!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And the blindfold Somnambula wore when she faced that nasty sphinx!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I guess we don't need to figure out who should get what.

speaker: Petunia Paleo
content: Professor! It's a Mighty Helm headpiece! Maybe it belonged to Rockhoof himself!

speaker: Professor Fossil
content: Legends don't wear helmets. This belonged to a real pony.

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, I can guarantee Rockhoof was as real as you and me.

speaker: Professor Fossil
content: And I suppose that ravine was dug with his trusty shovel to save the village from an erupting volcano.

speaker: Applejack
content: Probably.

speaker: Professor Fossil
content: I love old legends as much as anypony. But a pony strong enough to save a village from rushing lava with a shovel is... preposterous.

speaker: Professor Fossil
content: I can't believe you just did that. Y-You saved us!

speaker: Applejack
content: I bet if you told somepony else the story, it might sound... "preposterous".

speaker: Professor Fossil
content: I suppose some stories might be true...

speaker: Professor Fossil
content: And Rockhoof's appears to be one of them.

speaker: Rarity
content: Ow!

speaker: Others
content: "Lotus Petal": You keep those hooves to yourself, dearie! This place has been in my family for generations, and I'm not about to let some whippersnapper take the last good piece of it! Time was, ponies came from far and wide to see these gardens. But that flower's the only worthwhile thing left!

speaker: Rarity
content: Perhaps it just seemed like your gardens were worthless. But a little pruning can work wonders. Of course you will have to look after more than just one flower now.

speaker: Others
content: "Lotus Petal": You've given me back my family's legacy. The flower you wanted seems like a fair trade for that.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I can't believe Flash Magnus' shield ended up in the Dragon Lands.

speaker: Spike
content: Good thing you brought the official Equestrian friendship ambassador to the dragons to help you navigate our customs. Like our favorite sport <U+0096> gorge surfing!

speaker: Maar
content: Wahoo! Ollie!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Okay. That was awesome.

speaker: Others
content: "Billy": Dragon Lord Ember commanded us to make peace with ponies, but it doesn't mean you can surf in our spot.

speaker: Spike
content: Whoa, fellas. As the official Equestrian friendship ambassador to the dragons, I have to say that's not very friendly.

speaker: Garble
content: Well, what do you know? The puny pony-dragon's sticking up for his pony pal.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hey! That's an ancient pony artifact!

speaker: Garble
content: Hooves off my gorge board! I found it in the desert, and finders keepers.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: It isn't yours.

speaker: Garble
content: Huh. It sure looks like mine. But I might consider racing you for it.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No problem.

speaker: Garble
content: Um... No. I mean you.

speaker: Dragon
content: Awesome!

speaker: Others
content: "Billy": On your marks... Get set... Surf!

speaker: Spike
content: Whoa! Whoa! Whoooooaaaaa! Aaah! I won? I won! Woo-hoo! Give up the shield, Garble!

speaker: Garble
content: Lord Ember only commanded us to be nice to ponies. She never said anything about pony-loving dragons.

speaker: Spike
content: Uh, s-since Dragon Lord Ember commanded you to make peace with ponies, you can't very well attack one of their friends, can you?

speaker: Garble
content: I guess we'll find out! Aaah!

speaker: Garble
content: Ugh. Why is he always hiding behind ponies?

speaker: Spike
content: I wasn't hiding when I beat you down the ridge.

speaker: Garble
content: You fell.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Wow. You must be slow if all Spike had to do to win was fall down.

speaker: Garble
content: I'm faster than you.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Doubt it.

speaker: Garble
content: Fine! I'll race you back to the top. If you win, you can have your pony junk. But if I win, you'll leave and I get to give it to him!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Fine. I'm pretty sure I could beat you anyway. But with that heavy hunk of metal on your back, it'll be a snap.

speaker: Garble
content: Huh? Oh, yeah. Thanks for the tip.

speaker: Garble
content: See ya at the top, loser! Hey! That's mine!

speaker: Spike
content: Finders keepers, remember?

speaker: Others
content: "Billy": See, because that's what you said to them when they first showed up<U+0097>

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Just remember not to turn away from them, Cattail. Flash bees can get pretty aggressive. I guess that's why none of the other bayou animals can get to the water.

speaker: Cattail
content: Wouldn't it make more sense for you to wear the mask that calms the bees?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: It would... if I didn't have to fly up here to move their hive. There!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Now the other bayou creatures can get to the water without the bees feeling threatened.

speaker: Cattail
content: You know, you didn't have to help with this. I would've lent you the mask anyway.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I know. But I couldn't leave without helping.

speaker: Others
content: "Fahal Alkhayl": I don't think anypony can find anything in there.

speaker: Daring Do
content: I wouldn't give up hope just yet.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: This old blindfold was stuck in the drain.

speaker: Daring Do
content: Weren't you looking for a blindfold?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Oh, yeah!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I can't believe I'm gonna meet Star Swirl the Bearded! You know, outside of my dreams.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I can't believe you're actually going through with it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What do you mean?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I'm all for pushing the envelope, obviously, but this is pretty out there for you, Twilight.

speaker: Sunburst
content: What's "out there" about saving the most legendary ponies of all time from a thousands-year-old prison?

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Well... nothing when you say it like that. Unless "the most legendary ponies of all time" knew what they were doing, and we shouldn't mess with it.

speaker: Sunburst
content: I'm sure Star Swirl and the Pillars did the best they could back then, but magic has come a long way. Mostly because of the work they did.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: That's true. And you did get your wings from finishing one of Star Swirl's spells.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Exactly.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But then I messed with one and nearly destroyed the universe, so...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Starlight, Star Swirl the Bearded is the greatest wizard who ever lived. The chance to have him back in Equestria is worth the risk.

speaker: Spike
content: That's good news.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Otherwise, we'd have brought this shield for nothing.

speaker: Applejack
content: I hope you don't think you're the only one to find her artifact, because this here shovel says otherwise.

speaker: Rarity
content: Honestly, you two. Not everything is a competition. But Mistmane's flower is by far the most attractive of the artifacts.

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You're just saying that because you didn't have to scuba dive in a pit of green slime to get yours!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Or move a flash beehive.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Good work, everyone. Let's do this!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: What... What has happened?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It worked! We brought you back!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: To where?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You and the others have been trapped in limbo for over a thousand years, but I figured out how to get you ho<U+0097>

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: What?! No, no, no, no! You must undo what you've done!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What? Why? I mean, I don't think I can.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: You cannot bring us back!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But I did. I brought all the Pillars back.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: You cannot bring only the Pillars back!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, no!

speaker: Sunburst
content: That's the last entry. Star Swirl's final words before he vanished.

speaker: Applejack
content: All those legendary ponies were real, too? And then none of them were ever heard from again?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: They used their magic to open a portal to limbo.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We need to find items that are connected to the Pillars in some way.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We brought you back!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: You cannot bring only the Pillars back!

speaker: Pony of Shadows
content: Your pitiful attempt to imprison me has failed, Star Swirl!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: You must return us to limbo. It's the only way to stop him.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I only figured out how to bring you back.

speaker: Sunburst
content: Working on it! No table of contents!

speaker: Pony of Shadows
content: There! Without the power of Ponhenge, your banishing spell is useless!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: You have studied my writings. Surely you have some other plan.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No. I just wanted to save you. I didn't think<U+0097>

speaker: Pony of Shadows
content: Don't fret. When I extinguish the light and hope of this miserable world, you won't remember any of this.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Lucky for her, she's not alone!

speaker: Pony of Shadows
content: Arrrrggghhhh!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Know this, fiend! We will not rest until we find a way to return you to limbo!

speaker: Pony of Shadows
content: Never! Your days of glory are through, Star Swirl. Now my dark power will reign, and you six will bow to me!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Um... where'd he go?

speaker: Somnambula
content: That is a riddle we must unravel. And quickly.

speaker: Mage Meadowbrook
content: How long have we been gone?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Over a thousand years.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Then my spell worked <U+0096> before it was meddled with <U+0096> and the realm has been at peace for a millennia!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Weeeeell... we did have to save everypony from Nightmare Moon and Discord and Chrysalis and King Sombra and Lord Tirek, and there was that one time when Starlight traveled through time and almost destroyed life as we know it! But that's all in the past.

speaker: Flash Magnus
content: If you are truly this accomplished, we will stop the Pony of Shadows twice as fast together.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: We shall see. It is an easy thing to say you have saved the world. It is quite another to do it.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Oh, we've saved the world, Beardo. And we can do it again.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Be that as it may, the problem of locating the Pony of Shadows remains, and this land is vast.

speaker: Rarity
content: It sounds like you need a map. Luckily, we have just the thing.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Something about this magic seems familiar...

speaker: Rarity
content: Did you know he can do that?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: He's Star Swirl! He can do anything!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: This map, and indeed this very castle, are grown from the seed we planted over a thousand years ago.

speaker: Rockhoof
content: Then it did work!

speaker: Sunburst
content: What worked?

speaker: Somnambula
content: Each of us infused a crystal seed with our magic in hopes that it would grow into a force for good.

speaker: Mistmane
content: We wanted to leave something to protect the realm in our absence, but we never dreamed our gift would become so powerful.

speaker: Applejack
content: Y'all mean the Elements came from you?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: You know, the sparkly crystal things that grow from the Tree of Harmony and represent each of us? Laughter, honesty, generosity, loyalty, kindness, and magic!

speaker: Somnambula
content: They are reflections of our own elements of hope, strength, beauty, bravery, healing, and sorcery.

speaker: Mage Meadowbrook
content: We had no idea our small seed would bloom into the living spirit of the land. I am glad our mantles have passed to such capable ponies.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: More importantly, we no longer need Ponhenge to send our foe back to limbo. We can use the stored magic in this Tree of Harmony.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But doesn't a banishing spell take a lot of power? We'd have to sacrifice the Elements for that.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Mm-hmm.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: They'd be gone... forever?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Star Swirl, I don't think the Tree can survive without the Elements. If it dies, Equestria will suffer.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: If the Pony of Shadows has his way, your land will not exist. So unless you have a better idea...

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Our foe will seek dark places from which to draw power. I will prepare my spell so that we may strike as soon as you find him.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: What are we waiting for?

speaker: Flash Magnus
content: I like your spirit!

speaker: Spike
content: What about this one?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Seapony etiquette isn't going to help right now, Spike.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh, Twilight? Are you okay?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I just unleashed ultimate evil and doomed Equestria because I was obsessed with meeting my idol! Why wouldn't I be okay?!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: You didn't know that was gonna happen.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But I should have listened to you and left things alone. Now the Elements of Harmony will be lost to fix my mistake!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Maybe there's another way.

speaker: Spike
content: If there is, Twilight will find it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Portal gate... Portal keys... Portal spells... Yes! If the Pillars can hold open the gateway to limbo, a powerful pony can do the banishing spell herself! Do you know what this means?

speaker: Spike
content: I can stop carrying books?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The Pillars don't have to leave Equestria! Even though we'll lose the Elements, we'll have the ponies that created them. And the Pony of Shadows will be banished for good!

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: That's great. Heh. But I was thinking of another way that maybe doesn't involve banishing at all?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Star Swirl knew what he was doing when he cast that spell. If I can make it even better, maybe he'll see that I take magic as seriously as he does.

speaker: Rockhoof
content: It seems the dark places Star Swirl indicated on the map have changed.

speaker: Applejack
content: I bet the Pony of Shadows would've loved the Ghastly Caverns before a thousand years of erosion turned it into the Ghastly Gorge.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: The Appeloosian Wastes sure sounded dark and desolate.

speaker: Rarity
content: Who knew they would become such a popular square dancing destination?

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: And I get how this part of Equestria used to be cast in eternal night where the Pony of Shadows could draw power and wreak havoc while ponies were powerless to stop him. But...

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: ...it's kinda made a comeback! Did I mention it's really bright?!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: It seems there are fewer dark corners in the realm these days.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Isn't that a good thing?

speaker: Flash Magnus
content: True. The Pony of Shadows will have a hard time regaining power. When he rears his head, we'll be ready!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Isn't there some way to banish him without losing all of you?

speaker: Mage Meadowbrook
content: Oh, I wish there were. But to save our home, we are willin' to leave it.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't think you'll have to! My spell isn't finished yet, but I think we can send the Pony of Shadows to limbo without all of you having to go as well!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: While I appreciate your enthusiasm, Twilight, this is hardly the time to take risks on half-baked spells.

speaker: Applejack
content: Beggin' your pardon, Mr. the Bearded! But Twilight doesn't do anythin' halfway!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Especially not magic!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Seriously! She got her wings by finishing one of your spells!

speaker: Rarity
content: I think you'll find her work is worth reading before you dismiss it out of hoof!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Mm-hmm!

speaker: Mage Meadowbrook
content: While it is an unconventional approach, I believe it could work.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Hmm. I suppose there is a chance.

speaker: Sunburst
content: But we still have no idea where to find the villain.

speaker: Spike
content: Maybe we should try there?

speaker: Applejack
content: The Hollow Shades. I think a branch of the Apple family lives there.

speaker: Sunburst
content: They'd have to be pretty distant. The Hollow Shades was abandoned eons ago.

speaker: Rarity
content: Hmm, that's odd. The only time the map's called all of us to one place was Starlight's village.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: So it's like a super-villain tracker! No offense.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Do you think the map could be trying to tell us where the Pony of Shadows is?

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Hmm... The Tree of Harmony acting to protect the light of the realm... Yes. A good thought, Twilight.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: I will make my notes on this spell. Ready yourselves for battle.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Uh, I know I'm not as experienced as all of you, but is banishment really the only option? I mean, it's been a long time. Maybe the Pony of Shadows is ready to talk?

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: I doubt we can save our homeland with a conversation.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: But we could try.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Starlight, I'm sure Star Swirl and the others did try.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: The Pony of Shadows was not interested in reconciliation. Once a villain, always a villain. Twilight, Sunburst, would you accompany me? I wish to refine this spell for our use.

speaker: Rockhoof
content: Come. We must prepare for the struggle ahead.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: I know Star Swirl is a great wizard, but this whole plan seems... wrong. The map's only ever sent us to solve friendship problems.

speaker: Spike
content: Maybe so, but the Pony of Shadows doesn't really seem like the "friendship" type.

speaker: Starlight Glimmer
content: Honestly? We don't know anything about him.

speaker: Spike

content: I'm sorry, Sweetie Belle. I'm just mad, and I'm takin' it out on you.

content: I gotta talk to Sugar Belle!

speaker: Sugar Belle

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Caught ya just in time! We both know I don't like to say much, but I'm gonna say somethin' now. Even though I'm hurtin', I wouldn't trade this feelin' for anythin'. Because it'd mean givin' up the good times we had, too. I only broke up with you because you were gonna break up with me. I respect your decision, and you should know you'll always be in my heart.

speaker: Sugar Belle
content: I didn't want to break up with you.

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: But... you said you didn't need me to visit anymore. You said I'm gonna be on my own. I-I heard you said "we're finished" when I was hidin' in the bushes.

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: That sounds worse than it is.

speaker: Sugar Belle
content: Oh, Big Mac! I was talking about my cousin! I have this wacky cousin who's never been on his own, but I have to let him run my shop on weekends. Which is why you won't be delivering to my village anymore because I'll already be here apprenticing with Mrs. Cake, who does that two days a week. No, three.

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Wait 'til I tell Spike!

speaker: Sugar Belle
content: I'd never break up with you! I suppose there's a lesson here somewhere about communication, talking instead of assuming, or eavesdropping is wrong. Wouldn't you say?

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Eeeeyup!

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Hee-hee. Wrinkle-nose cutie-face. You must've been awful confused at my breakin' up with you after you got my pie.

speaker: Sugar Belle
content: What pie?

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: You didn't get the pie I sent?

speaker: Sugar Belle
content: Mm-mm.

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Or the invitation?

speaker: Sugar Belle
content: Uh-uh.

speaker: Big McIntosh
content: Well, in that case... allow me to escort you to a Hearts and Hooves Day surprise!

speaker: Sweetie Belle

content: Sugar Belle?!

speaker: Scootaloo

speaker: Sweetie Belle

content: Oh, it's funny. I've been sitting here feeling sorry for myself for not having a special pony on Hearts and Hooves Day. But remembering all the fun we had, I think I have two special ponies <U+0096> my two best friends.

content: Awwwww...

content: And so ends another Hearts and Hooves Day. Despite a bumpy start... and middle... and ending... lot of bumps today... love was in the air.

speaker: Discord
content: So was confusion, apparently, and a fair number of assumptions.

speaker: Spike
content: But you have to admit, after seeing everything Big Mac went through, love is a hundred percent real.

speaker: Spike
content: Seriously?! Discord, come on! I can't believe you!

speaker: Discord
content: Who do you think broke Sugar Belle's wagon wheel?

speaker: Discord
content: Ta-da! Happy Hearts and Hooves Day!

content: You old softie. I knew you had a heart.

speaker: Discord
content: Calico's Ring of Imperceptibility isn't going to reclaim itself, you know.

content: Ogres & Oubliettes? I thought you'd never ask! Oh, and... just wondering. No biggie, but... is Skellinore gonna be there?

content: He really was an excellent pet. I can't imagine why you set him free.

speaker: Spike
content: Phoenixes aren't meant to be domesticated. Even in the wild, they like to keep to themselves.

content: Well, they are beautiful. A few of their feathers will add just the right splash of color to my latest<U+0097> Spike! What are you doing?

content: Uh, nothing!

content: Is there something wrong with your face?

speaker: Spike
content: It's a stone scale. It isn't magical or anything like the call of the Dragon Lord. It's just... red. And itchy. And embarrassing.

content: Ooh, precious pants, that does look uncomfortable. But even I get the odd blemish from time to time. It's nothing to be embarrassed by. You could pay Zecora a visit. She makes a cream that works wonders. Just don't get the shampoo.

content: There's Peewee's parents! But I don't see Peewee.

speaker: Spike
content: Peewee!

content: Spike, what are you doing?

content: I'm sure it feels terrible, but it's just a breakout. It's not the end of the world.

content: You could try Zecora. She makes a cream that<U+0097>

content: Fine. But you're still gonna help me practice my lecture.

content: The element of generosity and its importance in relation to the other Elements of Harmony<U+0097>

content: My lecture!

content: ...indigestion. I'm so sorry!

content: It's okay. I'm sure I can rewrite the lecture from my notes. I have a lot.

speaker: Spike
content: I can help you with<U+0097>

content: Oh. Sorry.

content: Congrats!

content: I didn't know where else to go. I can't take the chance that Twilight will kick me out. You aren't feeling any molt effects, are you?

I hope you're not busy, but I must have my hearing back! It turns out that I talk to myself while I sew, and without that conversation, I simply can't think!

content: It's a simple cure, and the directions are clear. Just one or two drops in each of your ears.

content: Oh, thank you. You're an ear saver. Oh, and while I am here, do you have any blemish cream?! Spike is having some scale issues!

content: You have no idea!

content: I think I heard something! Your cure is working already!

content: The cream that you want is just over here. It's a popular potion for all creatures this year.

speaker: Rarity
content: Thank you, Zecora.

speaker: Rarity
content: I don't mean to be rude, but I do think your hut could use an airing out!

speaker: Zecora
content: Rarity's gone. There's no need to hide. Though I wonder if we should continue outside. Can't treat your symptoms down there on the ground. It's safe to come out. There's no ponies around.

content: I'm not hiding from ponies. I'm hiding from that!

content: Did I forget to mention the molt smell attracts predators?

content: Okay, maybe this wasn't a good plan.

content: Oh, Spike. What are you doing here?

content: Rarity! You have to get out of here! There's a giant roc trying to eat me! It's got Zecora!

content: Yes, what? I was just at Zecora's, but I'm heading back! I can't read these instructions! Does this say "two drops once a day" or "one drop twice a day"?!

speaker: Spike
content: Rarity, there's no time! We have to get help!

speaker: Rarity
content: Yes, my ears are completely clogged! Why, Spike! Your stone scales look worse! Oh, here! I picked up just the thing. Ah<U+0097>

content: Oh, I wish you'd escaped either claw of this bird! But the both of us trapped in the same one's absurd!

content: What?!

speaker: Spike
content: Let my ponies go!

content: Spike, what are you doing?

content: If my stone scales didn't itch so much and we weren't in immediate danger, this would be really embarrassing!

content: Danger?

content: Well, I was headed to Zecora's to get some cream for your scales. I had no idea you were<U+0097>

content: Molt smell?

content: Twilight!

content: Whoa!

content: Was that Rarity?

content: And Zecora! I tried to save them, but it's all I can do to stop scratching long enough to dive out of the way when that bird attacks!

speaker: Spike
content: Finally! I didn't think that itching would ever stop!

speaker: Spike
content: What's happening?! I... I can't move!

speaker: Spike
content: What just... happened? Did I just sprout wings? I just sprouted wings!

speaker: Spike
content: Whoops.

content: Spike?! How did you get wings?!

speaker: Spike
content: I don't know! But they're pretty aweso<U+0096> Whoa!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Do you think you can fly up and distract him while I work on freeing Zecora and Rarity?

speaker: Spike
content: Hey, giant chicken! If you like dragons so much, come and get me!

speaker: Spike
content: Greetings.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Spike!

speaker: Zecora
content: I know that the molt produced surprising things. But I'm glad that the last was a new pair of wings!

speaker: Rarity
content: Yes! And also, I'm glad you've got wings!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: This is amazing! I didn't know if you'd ever get wings. I'm so happy for you. Does it have something to do with this molt you were talking about?

speaker: Spike
content: It's what's been going on with me. The breakout, the fire burps. The molt is when dragons get older and start to change. I wish I could stop it, but I can't. I-I should go.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Go? What are you talking about?

speaker: Spike
content: In the Dragon Lands, families make molters leave home. It's called the molt effect.

content: Well, this isn't the Dragon Lands, and molt effect or no, I don't want you going anywhere.

speaker: Spike
content: But I'm growing up. What if something even worse happens?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You're supposed to grow up, but you'll always be you. And whatever happens, we'll get through it together.

speaker: Spike
content: Woo-hoo! Yeah! Woo-hoo! Look at me! Let's go home!

content: Uh, I don't need to carry you anymore, do I? You have wings.

speaker: Spike
content: They are new, and I don't want to overdo it.

speaker: Rarity
content: I can't believe you thought any of us would send you away because of some silly molt effect. Even if the symptoms were slightly unsettling. And let's face it, the odor wasn't pleasant. Nopony would stop caring for you just because you were getting older. Everypony goes through changes, but sometimes change can be wonderful. Like being able to model for any length of dress! Uh, a bit higher, darling, please?

speaker: Spike
content: I'm glad to help, Rarity. But don't you think there's wonderful things about flying that don't involve dresses?

content: Whoa, whoa, whoa!

content: Back in the days of Chancellor Puddinghead... Uh, Spike?

content: Huh? Sorry, Twilight. Still getting used to my new wings. They're pretty great, huh?

content: Yes, Spike. As I was saying... Huh? What are you three doing here?

content: We wanna go to your school!

content: But why?
