content: I see. Why don't you three come with me? Spike, you're in charge.

content: I'm sorry to have to tell you this, but... you can't be my students.

content: Why not?

content: Isn't this place for everycreature?

content: Spike?! What did you do?

content: Please? Please?!

content: So it's just about smashing stuff, like all your other holidays.

speaker: Yona
content: No! How griffon get that idea? This holiday about so much more. Last year, for example. Most perfect Snilldar ever.

speaker: Yona
content: Whole family <U+0096> grandpa, grandma yak, Yona's brother, sister, mother, father yak <U+0096> all go to woods singing yak song.

speaker: Yona and family
content: Yak song! Yak song! Not very long! Sing again! Yak song! Yak song! Not very long! Sing again! Yak song! Yak song! Not very long! Sing again!

speaker: Yona
content: Calves in family pick out perfect smashing log. Then yaks smash it!

speaker: Yona
content: Then yak family build perfect snow fort... and smash it!

speaker: Yona
content: Then we hang perfect things on perfect moss pile and<U+0097>

speaker: All but Yona
content: You smash it.

speaker: Yona
content: What you think yaks are, barbarians? Moss pile is for special family rituals. Last year, ritual for Yona.

speaker: Yona
content: All yak family gather around Yona and braid Yona hair for first time.

speaker: Gallus

speaker: Silverstream
content: Happy Snilldar to you too, Yona! It's so cool to learn new traditions from new friends!

speaker: Smolder
content: Yeah, well, one of these new friends has gotten us all in trouble. And they'd better confess soon.

speaker: Ocellus
content: Sandbar? Sorry, but they said they want you to go in next.

speaker: Silverstream
content: Why the rush to get home, Smolder? Like you said, dragons don't really have holidays, do they?

speaker: Smolder
content: Meh.

speaker: Ocellus
content: That's so sad! You must do something in the winter for fun.

speaker: Smolder
content: Well, we do have the Feast of Fire. Everydragon gets together and tells stories. The best one wins a pile of gemstones.

speaker: Yona
content: Ooh, what story won last year?

speaker: Smolder
content: It was called "A Dream Come True".

speaker: Silverstream
content: Come on, now you've gotta tell it!

speaker: Smolder
content: Ugh, fine. Once upon a time, there was this sad little dragon.

speaker: Smolder
content: Her name was Scales. She lived alone in the wilderness with nothing to eat.

speaker: Smolder
content: But one night, as she sat alone in a storm, she heard something. It was the Dragon Lord! Scales was scared, but the Dragon Lord told her not to be afraid, that he was taking her to the Dragon Lands for a great feast.

speaker: Smolder
content: Scales sat with the Dragon Lord's family and friends and had the biggest, best dinner of gemstones she'd ever eaten! Then, while the dragons were telling stories, Scales thought it would be so easy to seize power from this feeble and sensitive Dragon Lord. She saw her chance... and took it!

speaker: Smolder
content: She claimed the Bloodstone Scepter and took over the Dragon Lands! And forced the Dragon Lord to live out in the cold, just as she used to!

speaker: Ocellus
content: That's a horrible story!

speaker: Smolder
content: Maybe to you. But dragons like hearing about weak, kind creatures getting defeated.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Silverstream! You're up! Let's go!

speaker: Smolder
content: So, did you tell them you did it?

speaker: Sandbar
content: What?! No way! Why would I say that?

speaker: Smolder
content: You already live in Ponyville. Staying here over break is no big deal.

speaker: Yona
content: School of Friendship good place for pony to have pony holiday.

speaker: Sandbar
content: I'd still rather spend it with my family at home. Oh! That reminds me! I have the best holiday story ever! It's called...

speaker: Sandbar
content: "The Day My Hearth's Warming Doll Almost Fell into the Fire!"

speaker: Sandbar
content: Just before we went to bed, my mom, my dad, and my sister all put our Hearth's Warming Dolls up on the mantel, just like we do every year. But this year, I put my doll too close to the edge, and it fell!

speaker: Sandbar
content: Nooooooo!

speaker: Ocellus
content: And?!

speaker: Sandbar
content: My doll hit the floor. But it could have gone in the fire!

speaker: Smolder
content: That's a great story. And you told it really well.

speaker: Sandbar
content: Yeah. It was a Hearth's Warming miracle.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Next! Smolder, come with me. Yona, Twilight's waiting for you.

speaker: Ocellus
content: The last two. So if neither one of them confesses, that means...

speaker: Silverstream
content: We're never going home!

speaker: Ocellus
content: We'll be here forever!

speaker: Sandbar
content: Beyond forever.

speaker: Silverstream
content: But I can't miss the Three Days of Freedom Celebration!

speaker: Gallus
content: How long does that last?

speaker: Silverstream
content: It used to be only one day, but now to commemorate our escape from the Storm King, we're adding two more days of awesome! See?

speaker: Gallus
content: There's a book?

speaker: Silverstream
content: Mm-hmm! Queen Novo had these made for the Mount Aris board of tourism to explain it all to guests!

speaker: Silverstream
content: We'll spend the first night in Seaquestria, thanking the ocean for protecting us from the Storm King. Sea-dancing, whale-singing, shell-stringing... Lots of "ing"'s.

speaker: Silverstream
content: The second day will be on Mount Aris, with sky-dancing and a wind song in the Harmonizing Heights to celebrate the Storm King's defeat. Then the third day, everycreature will party together, on land and sea! Grandparents and parents and sisters, uncles, brothers, acquaintances, neighbors, and cousins. And at the end of the night, Queen Novo is gonna give out presents!

speaker: Gallus
content: Wait. Hold on. "Cousins"? What are those?

speaker: Ocellus
content: Your aunts and uncles' children. You know, part of your family. Heh. Oh. You're teasing us again, right?

speaker: Sandbar
content: I'm guessing neither one of you confessed.

speaker: Yona
content: Headmare Twilight say wait here.

speaker: Silverstream
content: Maybe they're changing their minds about sending us home.

speaker: Smolder
content: Why would they? Face it. We're stuck here.

speaker: Ocellus
content: But-but-but I have to go home!

speaker: Silverstream
content: My mom makes the best kelp fritters.

speaker: Sandbar
content: How can you be so cool about this?

speaker: Smolder
content: We're mad. We just show it differently.

speaker: Sandbar
content: More like you don't show it at all.

speaker: Yona
content: What pony getting at?

speaker: Silverstream
content: Maybe it wasn't just one prankster. Maybe there were three of you. And you're trying to hide your guilt by not being upset!

speaker: Ocellus
content: It does make sense.

speaker: Gallus
content: Guys, stop it.

speaker: Smolder
content: Or maybe whoever did it is only pretending to be upset to throw us off.

speaker: Ocellus
content: Me?! But I didn't!

speaker: Gallus
content: Come on, let it go.

speaker: Sandbar
content: Come on! Ocellus, you know you did it! Just fess up!

speaker: Gallus
content: I said, stop fighting! That's not what the holidays are about! No matter what you call them or how you celebrate! D-Do you know how lucky you all are? With your stories about sharing and-and kindness and getting together with everycreature that you care about?

speaker: Ocellus
content: But griffons do that too, don't they?

speaker: Smolder
content: Some holiday about a moon?

speaker: Gallus
content: Blue Moon Festival. The one time of year when griffons are nice to each other. Well, as nice as we can be.

speaker: Gallus
content: Families get together to eat and then complain about the food and give each other presents they don't like and mostly just try not to yell at each other.

speaker: Silverstream
content: Well, at least you get to be with your family.

speaker: Gallus
content: No... because I don't have a family.

speaker: Sandbar
content: What about Grampa Gruff?

speaker: Gallus
content: That's just his name. He's not anygriff's actual grandpa. I felt like I never had a place in Griffonstone.

speaker: Gallus
content: Then I came here and, well, met all of you. So I don't want to go home for the break. And that's why... I did it!

speaker: Yona
content: Griffon mess up decorations?!

speaker: Gallus
content: Yeah. It was me. I put goo powder in the Fire of Friendship.

speaker: Sandbar
content: So it wasn't Ocellus?

speaker: Ocellus
content: Why would you ruin things for us?

speaker: Gallus
content: I didn't plan to! I just figured if I made a mess, our teachers would make us stay to clean up. We'd be together a little longer.

speaker: Smolder
content: Well, it worked, didn't it?

speaker: Gallus
content: Better than I thought. And when Headmare Twilight threatened to cancel winter break, that meant I would get to be with all of you through the entire holiday. That's why I didn't confess.

speaker: Sandbar
content: So, why are you admitting this now?

speaker: Gallus
content: I hated seeing all you fighting and-and blaming each other. That's the opposite of what all your holidays mean. Except maybe yours, Smolder. I can't keep all of you from the happiness of your homes and families just because I feel bad. I'm sorry. Don't worry. You won't have to tell our teachers. I will.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You don't have to. We already know.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: We kinda guessed it was you. But we wanted to give you the chance to tell the truth.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm proud that you did, and I'm glad to see you've been paying attention in Professor Applejack's honesty classes. But you're still going to have to make amends and stay over break for extra friendship lessons by yourself.

speaker: Silverstream
content: I'll stay with him.

speaker: Ocellus
content: Me, too!

speaker: Yona
content: Yona stay also!

speaker: Sandbar
content: I'm staying!

speaker: Smolder
content: What? All right. I guess pony holidays can't be that bad.

speaker: Sandbar
content: Now you can finally know what it's like to spend Hearth's Warming with friends who care about you.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Looks like they don't really need any extra lessons.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Since you obviously know that Hearth's Warming is about coming together, I'd be honored if all of you would join my friends as guests at our holiday table.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: After we finish cleaning up.

speaker: Sandbar
content: Hey, this reminds me of another story! "The Time I Almost Spilled Grape Juice on the White Couch"!

speaker: Smolder
content: Does it have a depressing ending?

speaker: Ocellus
content: I'm not sure pony stories work that way.

speaker: Yona
content: Gallus want Yona braid feathers?

speaker: Gallus
content: Uhhh... pass.

speaker: Silverstream
content: Hearth's Warming Eve is here once again!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Dear Twilight, it is difficult to express how grateful I am to you for teaching me the power of friendship.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: You would think after more than a thousand years, there would be nothing left to learn.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: And yet, even a pony as old as I can continue to be surprised by how much there is to know.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "I hope you find these postcards enjoyable, and I look forward to seeing you again, though I can't say when my journey will be complete. Your friend, Star Swirl.

speaker: Rarity
content: It must be gratifying to have your idol writing to you about the friendship lessons he's learning.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm not sure I'll ever get used to it. Of course, if he really wants to learn about friendship, he could just come to our school.

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: Professor Sparkle? The mailpony just came with, uh, a few things.

speaker: Rarity
content: Ooh! The sewing machines I ordered for my class!

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: These came, too. I wasn't sure what to make of them.

speaker: Rarity
content: These machines were costly, but I am quite certain the friendship lessons I can teach my students with them will be invaluable.

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, don't worry, darling. I'll think of something. And I didn't use the school funds to buy these. I made the purchase entirely with my own bits.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: It's not that. It's this!

speaker: Rarity
content: "Why waste your time at a friendship school that's just a school? Learn everything they teach and more at Friendship University"?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Who would open another friendship school?

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, pfft! I'm sure it's nothing to worry about. You're the Princess of Friendship. What could this other school possibly offer?

speaker: Smolder
content: It isn't just another friendship school. It's a university!

speaker: Ocellus
content: It says they teach the same lessons of competing schools in half the time. That's twice the learning!

speaker: Gallus
content: And it's in Las Pegasus? If Professor Rarity lets us skip her sewing class <U+0096> road trip!

speaker: Rarity
content: I think we need to look into this school.

speaker: Rarity
content: I don't like to judge solely on appearances. But... what kind of friendship school is this?

speaker: Student 1
content: Only the best friendship school in the west... and maybe all of Equestria!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: There's more ponies in here than at our whole school. Who is running this place?

speaker: Flim
content: Welcome, friends! You are about to embark on a journey of amazing magnitude! One that will change your lives forever!

speaker: Flam
content: Prepare yourselves to embrace a new path and become students of...

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: Friendship U!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Flim and Flam. Of course.

speaker: Flim
content: If you're alone and you can't make friends We understand your plight

speaker: Flam
content: Until now, there was just one way Your friendships could take flight

speaker: Flim
content: There is a school real far away That'll teach you what to know But if you live here, you couldn't stay

speaker: Flam
content: You'd learn you have to go-o-o-o

speaker: Ponies
content: Awww...

speaker: Flim
content: Now, there is an alternative to all of that adversity

speaker: Flam
content: Not just a school, I'll have you know

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: But a whole university

speaker: Others
content: At Friendship U, our aim is true In a city, not some backwater You'll learn the things you need to know At our new alma mater

speaker: Flim
content: That's it, everypony, you heard correct!

speaker: Flam
content: Friendship U, the one and only university of friendship!

speaker: Flim
content: As you can see, we're a success By any kind of stat

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: That may be so, for all I know But I still smell a rat

speaker: Flam
content: Everypony, lookie here That other school's headmare

speaker: Flim
content: Her presence is a testament To the mutual respect...

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: ...we sha-a-a-are

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What?! No, it isn't!

speaker: Flam
content: It really is the final piece To make our work complete

speaker: Flim
content: To have the Friendship Princess Bless our school is such a treat

speaker: Flam
content: We're so honored!

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: At Friendship U, we teach to you All of our friendship knowledge You'll learn it all in half the time At the one and only friendship college

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How can anypony learn friendship in half the time?

speaker: Flam
content: Our coursework is so accelerated, to take longer would be a crime!

speaker: Flim
content: The lessons that we teach have been Reviewed and checked and edited

speaker: Flam
content: Which might explain why our new school's

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: About to be accredited

speaker: Others
content: At Friendship U, oh, yes, it's true Even the Princess of Friendship agrees The only place in Equestria To give out friendship degrees Yeah!

speaker: Ponies
content: Friendship U! Friendship U! Friendship U!

speaker: Flim
content: That's it, everypony! Let's hear it! Tell us again why it's the best!

speaker: All
content: It's the only university of Friendship U!

speaker: Flim and Flam
content: Yeah!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Accredited?

speaker: Flam
content: It means officially recognized or authorized.

speaker: Rarity
content: We know what it means. But who would accredit this place?

speaker: Chancellor Neighsay
content: Why, the EEA, of course.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Chancellor Neighsay?!

speaker: Chancellor Neighsay
content: The Equestria Educational Association has taken an interest in institutions that teach friendship in a pony-first environment. Surely you didn't think your school has a monopoly on the concept?

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, she did write the book on it.

speaker: Chancellor Neighsay
content: Ah, yes. How to teach friendship to creatures who will one day use it as a weapon against us.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: How could they use friendship as a weapon?!

speaker: Chancellor Neighsay
content: You tell me. It's your book. Meantime, this university appears to be a promising option for ponies who'd prefer to stick to the EEA book on the subject.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You can't be serious. They're obviously up to something. It's Flim and Flam!

speaker: Flim
content: Well, that certainly wasn't friendly.

speaker: Chancellor Neighsay
content: One would think the headmare of a school of friendship <U+0096> albeit an unaccredited one <U+0096> would behave differently. Unless she was trying to undermine the competition? Hmm?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I<U+0097> No! What?! I-I am not!

speaker: Audience Pony
content: I did think the Princess of Friendship would be friendlier.

speaker: Flam
content: Now, now, fillies and gentlecolts. Let's show the princess just how friendly we are by signing up for some classes!

speaker: Flim
content: Why don't I show you around?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm sorry, but approval from the EEA won't convince me that this school is what you promise.

speaker: Flim
content: And what would it take to convince you?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Well, somepony whose opinion I respect, for one.

speaker: Flim
content: Really? Somepony like... this?

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Twilight?

speaker: Rarity
content: Uh-oh.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Star Swirl? What are you doing here?

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Why, studying friendship at Flim and Flam's wonderful school!

speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, please. I think I know a disguise when I see one. Take off that ridiculous beard... Flam!

speaker: Flam
content: How's it going in here?

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: It-It's really me.

speaker: Chancellor Neighsay
content: I'd heard rumors you've returned, but I didn't believe it until now. And if a pony of your stature is studying here, there really isn't anything else I need to see. I, Chancellor Neighsay, hereby confer upon Friendship University complete and unreserved EEA accreditation!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I... I don't understand. Why would you come here and not my school?

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: My travels brought me to Las Pegasus. I didn't come for the school, but Flim and Flam convinced me to try it out.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You can't trust Flim and Flam! They tried to con the Apples out of their farm! They sold fake health tonic! They run a resort in Las Pegasus!

speaker: Flam
content: Technically, our resort is a legitimate business.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: I spent a thousand years thinking the worst of a "bad" pony. You taught me to look for the best in him. Whatever Flim and Flam's past may be, starting this school shows they want to change for the better.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I wish I could believe that.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Besides, what's untrustworthy about opening a school of friendship? They don't even charge for classes.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't know. But I know they're up to something. And until I find out, I'm begging you, come to my school instead.

speaker: Chancellor Neighsay
content: I understand feeling threatened by competition, but my word, Princess. I wonder if the ill manners of the creatures at your school aren't contagious. I think I will take my leave before I become infected.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Twilight, I promise I'll visit your school soon. But for now, perhaps it's best if you return there.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You don't think they're running an actual friendship school, do you?

speaker: Rarity
content: Darling, of course not. Which is why we have to investigate!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But we can't go poking around the school. Everypony'll think I'm still just "threatened by the competition".

speaker: Rarity
content: Only if we do it as ourselves.

speaker: Rarity
content: In these disguises, we could pass as students at out own school.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't know, Rarity.

speaker: Rarity
content: Ah-ah. What did I say about using our real names?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sorry, "Plainity". But I'm pretty sure this isn't enough of a disguise.

speaker: Student 1
content: Hey, strangers! Are you two new here?

speaker: Rarity
content: We sure are. Completely new.

speaker: Student 1
content: Great! See ya in class!

speaker: Rarity
content: Now, I've read enough Shadow Spade to know the key to going undercover is rehearsing your backstory. I'm "Plainity". and I love bland old normal stuff. No frills for me. Okay! Your turn.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: My name's Eyepatch. I have an eye patch.

speaker: Rarity
content: Perfect! Now, how do we start our investigation?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I think we should split up. You enroll in some classes and find out what they're actually teaching. I'll look around and see what I can find, assuming I'm not recognized.

speaker: Flam
content: Welcome, newest students! Let's dive right in, shall we? One of the most important elements of friendship is being thoughtful. True or false?

speaker: Rarity
content: If by "thoughtful" you mean "generous", I'd say true.

speaker: Flam
content: Correct! It was a trick question. Very impressive, Miss...?

speaker: Rarity
content: Plainity.

speaker: Flam
content: Well, well, well, Miss Plainity, keep it up and you'll be ready for our next level in no time!

speaker: Flam
content: Now, let's see if you can demonstrate for the class. What's something generous you could do for... me right now?

speaker: Flam
content: Class, Plainity here is now my star pupil. If any of you want a chance at studying with Star Swirl, I'd take notes on her every action.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hello? The door is open, so I'll just assume it's okay to come in and look around. Unless somepony says it's not. All right, then.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: "The Element of Laughter and its applications." Okay, that seems pretty genuine. "When to support your friends' decisions and when to talk sense." Huh. That's actually kind of interesting. Aha! "Friendship University's true goal... is to help friends become better friends"? Where is the proof that it's all a scam?

speaker: Flam
content: There isn't any!

speaker: Flim
content: Twilight Sparkle! Did you really think an eye patch was enough of a disguise?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No, I didn't!

speaker: Flam
content: Well, then we agree that everypony will recognize the Princess of Friendship in this photo of you sneaking into our office.

speaker: Flim
content: I can see the headline now! "Princess of Jealousy! Twilight Sparkle Bent on Ruining Her Competition!"

speaker: Flam
content: So sad. A news story like that would destroy your reputation. Nopony will want to go to your school after that.

speaker: Flam
content: Just wait until the papers get a hold of this!

speaker: Flim
content: "Princess Unhinged!" It'll be the talk of Equestria!

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: Well, gentleponies, I've finished another stack. The lessons in these worksheets are quite fascinating. Twilight? What's going on here?

speaker: Flim
content: Oh, just your prot<e9>g<e9> getting caught snooping in our office in disguise! Well, sort of.

speaker: Flam
content: Oh, honestly, Princess Twilight, envy does not look good on you.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I'm not envious! I know these two are up to something. I'm just trying to find out what.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: The only pony I see who is up to something is the pony in this picture, and it is not the princess I know.

speaker: Flim
content: Well, it's about to be the princess all of Equestria knows.

speaker: Flam
content: Unless... you decided to drop the whole "uncover the scam" thing.

speaker: Flim
content: Then we'll rip this silly picture up and not let it completely and utterly ruin you and your school.

speaker: Rarity
content: You can be generous with all sorts of things. Gifts, compliments, your time.

speaker: Rarity
content: Hey, Eyepatch! Where's your eye patch? Was your cover blown?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You could say that. Flim and Flam took a picture of me sneaking into their office.

speaker: Rarity
content: Were we wearing our eye patch?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: If I don't stop investigating, they're going to tell everypony that I'm trying to sabotage their school because I'm jealous.

speaker: Rarity
content: But-But-But that's ridiculous!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I don't know. Maybe I am just upset that Star Swirl came here instead of my school. Flim and Flam may have turned over a new leaf. We should probably just go home.

speaker: Rarity
content: Twilight, you are not the kind of pony to let your emotions cloud your judgment. If you think Flim and Flam are up to no good, you can't give up, even if their lessons really are impressive.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wait, what?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Flim and Flam are charging for these?

speaker: Rarity
content: Well, they have to cover expenses, and Flam insists that everything extra goes to improving the school and<U+0097>

speaker: Rarity
content: This is the scam, isn't it?

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Let's find out.

speaker: Star Swirl the Bearded
content: These lessons are so valuable. Are you sure I can't give you more?

speaker: Flam
content: Ah-ah-ah! Unnecessary! Being able to share them with a pony like you is our real reward. Oh, my. And you want to study alongside Star Swirl, hmm?

speaker: Destitute Pony
content: It's all I have.

speaker: Flim
content: Come back for the rest when you can afford it.

speaker: Destitute Pony
content: W-Wait! I'll sell the shirt off my back!

speaker: Flam
content: And that's the kind of determination that'll get you to the next level, student whose... name I know!

speaker: Rarity
content: Twilight, maybe I should take over the investigation. Think of your reputation!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: My reputation isn't worth much if I won't risk it for what I think is right. Besides, I have a plan.

speaker: Flim
content: Well, brother of mine, we've got almost all the bits we need to expand our resort. If we add another level of classes and worksheets, we'll be there.

speaker: Flam
content: Maybe we should add two levels, just to be safe.

content: I saw.

content: Huh?

content: Meeting adjourned!

content: Oh, hey, Scootaloo. I was just in the neighbor<U+0097> Oh! What's this? Did I interrupt your fan club meeting?

content: What is a "The Washouts"?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Stunt troupe?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: "Twenty bajillion"?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: "Boring old flight and formation junk"?!

speaker: Scootaloo

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Only because my brain feels like it's strapped to one of those rockets about to explode.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: So you do get it! Aren't they awesome?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Can you believe she actually said that?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Pfft, well, yeah! Eavesdropping on every meeting is kinda weird.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I mean, she basically said that the Wonderbolts aren't cool! And... And it kinda sounded like she didn't think I was cool either. But, peh, we all know that's crazy! I mean, I'm definitely not worried about her looking up to somepony else. Heh. Nope. Not! At! All!

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, I'd understand if you were. It'd be like if Apple Bloom started lovin' bananas more than apples. Y'all tell me if that ever happens, ya hear?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: But what could the Washouts possibly have that I don't?!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Why don't you find out?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: They're doing a show in Ponyville this weekend?!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wow! They do look pretty amazing... uh, -ly unamazing. Trying so hard to look amazing is what I mean.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Awww. I knew we shoulda lined up last night.

content: Look at this! It's a total Wonderbolts ripoff!

content: What do you mean? The show hasn't even started yet.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Yeah, but look at what we're sitting on.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hello?! The Wonderbolts have bleachers, too! We practically invented sitting on bleachers!

speaker: Rarity
content: Ugh!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And look at that! Popcorn and cotton candy?! Ripoff!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Huh? Yeeeeeeeaaaahhh!

content: This is the time! This is the place! This is the team! This is... the Washouts!

speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Mmmm! Quality confetti cannon work.

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Oh, yeah!

speaker: Announcer
content: Say it with me now, the Washouts' official motto...

speaker: Announcer and Crowd
content: Leap before you look!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: Woo-hoo!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Lame.

speaker: Fanpony
content: Oh!

speaker: Announcer
content: Remember, ponies. While they're amazingly awesome, the Washouts are highly trained professionals in protective fire-proof flight suits! Do NOT try this at home!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Whoa. Come on, come on! She's not gonna make it!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: That... was... insane! Woo-hoo!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: I told you!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I mean... It was pretty cool. Who are these guys?

speaker: Scootaloo
content: I can't just go up and talk to them.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: You can if you're with me. After all, one of the reasons there's a Rainbow Dash fan club is because I'm fearless. Observe.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Hey!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh, so as a fellow aerobatic professional, I really enjoyed your show. Heh. Actually, you might recognize me since I'm a... pause for dramatic effect... a Wonderbolt.

speaker: Rolling Thunder
content: Ha! Join the club.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: O... kay...

speaker: Rolling Thunder
content: No. I mean, literally. Join the club. We're called "The Washouts" because we all used to be Wonderbolts just like you. Heh. Until we "washed out".

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: No way!

content: Yep. Name's Rolling Thunder. I got booted out of Wonderbolt Academy because of "flagrant disregard for hazardous weather". Pfft! If doing barrel rolls through nine hundred million volts of electricity in a raging thunderstorm is wrong, then I don't wanna be right.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Cool!

content: Ha. This 'ere's Short Fuse.

content: Ah, nice to meet you.

content: What's your story?

content: ANGER ISSUES! GET OFF MY BACK!

content: Only the most reckless ex-Wonderbolt of all time.

content: Lightning Dust!

content: Rainbow Dash!

content: Scootaloo. I'm Scootaloo. Hi.

content: Lightning Dust! I should've known you were the brains behind a crazy idea like the Washouts! Or should I say, "lack of brains"!

content: You two really know each other? Oh, my gosh! This is so cool!

content: Your "friend" got me kicked out of the Wonderbolts.

content: Oh. That's, uh, less cool.

content: Yeah, well, I'm still<U+0097>

content: Mad at me? Look, was it wrong of me to endanger the lives of your friends? Yeah. But, hey, now I only endanger these knuckleheads.

content: C'mon, you know you miss me. Me and her, we blew everypony out of the sky.

content: Really?

content: If I remember correctly, I had you beat by half a second.

content: Only because when I went, I cranked up the dizziness factor.

content: Well, we do have safety rules for a reason.

content: Don't listen to her, kid. All their "rules" were just ways of keeping their little club exclusive so they could feel good about themselves.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: It's not about making anypony feel bad. It's about finding the best flyers. The best of the best.

speaker: Lightning Dust
content: I started the Washouts because I believe anypony can be the best of the best. You know, Rolling Thunder is gonna be out for a while.

content: Ah, during the finale, I caught the old hind leg in the Crushinator Jaws of Smashalot! Patent pending.

content: There's a spot on the team if you wanna join up.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I appreciate the offer, but I'm already a Wonderbolt.

content: I'll do it! Can I do it?!

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh, lemme think. No!

content: I wasn't asking you!

speaker: Lightning Dust
content: Awww, you're cute. But technically, you haven't washed out of the Bolts, which is kinda our thing.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: And also, no!

content: Where are we going?

speaker: Rainbow Dash

content: Say hi to Spitfire for me!

content: Ever seen two simultaneous inverse displacement rolls before?

content: Patent pending?

I'm gonna go out there and stunt some tricks with my new friend Lightning Dust!" content: I think she gets the poi<U+0097>

content: I don't<U+0097>

content: Uh-huh...

content: Excellent. Have a hat.

content: Clearing things up is one of my specialties. Now, come on. Let's go rip up all your Washout posters into tiny pieces and throw 'em off a cliff.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I just thought of a great way to raise awareness for your original fan club. You know, the one about me?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: How about a silent auction where every item is just a picture of yours truly? Nah! I'm just kidding.

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: That makes me seem too egotistical, doesn't it? Oh, oh! Maybe if they're framed, it's like, "Wow, she's so humble!" Ya think? Scootaloo?

speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Uh, Scootaloo?

content: Anypony seen Scootalo<U+0097>

content: Ow! My fault, my fault! Sorry, I<U+0097> Twilight?

content: That doesn't even sound like Spitfire.

content: That's it! We're leaving!

content: That's 'cause it's what she'll be doing in the show tonight. Half off for princesses! Bring your friends!

content: I know I was supposed to let you make your own decisions, but that doesn't mean I can't swoop in and save you from time to time.

content: If I'd known you were gonna bail, I would've done the trick myself!

content: Great! So you won't mind how that rope's about to coil around your hoof.

content: Wouldn't have it any other way!

speaker: Scootaloo
content: I'm sorry for joining the Washouts. Lightning Dust wasn't who I thought she was. She didn't care about me being scared or putting me in danger. She only wanted a good show, even if it meant I got hurt. That's not the kind of pony I wanna look up to.

content: I'm the one who should be apologizing for not acting like somepony who deserves a fan club. I've been lucky enough to have somepony who thinks I'm the coolest. content: From what Professor Fossil said, it sounds like Rockhoof just hasn't settled into modern times yet. Our school is the perfect place for that. Plus, we get a new teacher.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: This may be the fastest friendship problem you ever solved.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Dodge! Thrust! Shovel leap! Shovel throw!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Shovel whack! Now you lot be the ursa major. Lots o' growlin', mind?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Maybe classrooms were less breakable in the old days?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Ooh-ooh-ooh! What happened next?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: The huge beastie jumped out of the moonlit mist, her fearsome fangs at my throat! But I rolled clear.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Silverstream
content: Then what?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: She backed me up against a wall, ready to pounce!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: I looked at her. She looked at me. And I say<U+0097>!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Uh, Professor Rockhoof?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Nope! Guess again! Uh, oops.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sorry to interrupt. Class, why don't we go ahead and take lunch early today? Rockhoof, can we take a walk outside?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Our school is about finding your own special way to teach.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But maybe you could do a little less smashing in the classroom?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: I know it's a big change. But I think you're gonna fit in just<U+0097>

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Fire!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rockhoof, wait!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: No time! The building's ablaze! We have to get everypony out!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Professor Rockhoof best teacher ever! Day cannot get better.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Let's get you outside, wee ones!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Day just got better!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Alley-oop!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Rockhoof?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: What are you doing?!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Savin' the school!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Just like fightin' a volcano in the good old days!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rarity
content: Would somepony kindly explain what is the meaning of all this water?!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I'm not sure. But I think it's surf's up! Woo-hoo! Cowabunga!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Sorry, Rarity, but I had to put out the ragin' inferno.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Inferno? Where?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Did you not see the smoke and flame?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Smolder
content: Yeah, that was us. You know, dragons? Having a fire-breathing competition?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: You, uh... what?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: They do it all the time. That's what we were trying to tell you.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: We know you're used to bein' a hero, Rockhoof. Only what we need here is a teacher.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rarity
content: One who doesn't ruin an entire class's friendship quilts. Do you know how hard it is to stitch a pineapple pattern?!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: My deepest apologies. I'm not used to living with dragons or much else in this modern time. Professor Fossil made it clear I'm not welcome back in my old village. Seems I don't belong here either.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: Wheeeee!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: So apparently, finding Rockhoof a new job is a lot harder than we thought. Has anypony had any luck?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: I-I thought you were gonna try him out at the post office.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: We did.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Do you know where I can find Cranky Doodle Donkey?! I need to deliver his medicine! He has a rash in a very embarrassing place!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: I did not need to hear that.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rarity
content: Yup. Rockhoof's time as a spa masseuse didn't work out either.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Now just let me know if this is too much pressure!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: W-Well, at least Rockhoof's really strong. Maybe we could find him a job carrying heavy stuff?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: I tried that already. Zecora needed somepony to help her get supplies, but...

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: I know you said you only needed a few leaves, but I figured why not bring you the whole thing?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rarity
content: Oh, how horrid.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Fluttershy
content: None of the other Pillars seem to be having trouble fitting into the modern world.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Then maybe they can show Rockhoof how they did it. Get him used to livin' in this time.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Great idea! Rockhoof's old friends would be happy to help. And I bet he'd love to visit them.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Even Canterlot looks different from the old days.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Aww. I'm sure once you see your old pal Flash Magnus, you'll feel right at home.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Flash Magnus
content: Trot, two, three, four! Trot, two, three, four! Keep it lively, rookies! Visitors on site! Company, halt! Rockhoof, you old ditch-digger you!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Flash Magnus, as I live and breathe! Is this your squadron?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Flash Magnus
content: After we got out of limbo, I went looking for work for a pony with experience in the Royal Legion. Once a soldier, always a soldier.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Princess Celestia was happy to find a new drill sergeant for her guard!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Uh... that's great. She really put you in a job that big so soon?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Flash Magnus
content: Ho-ho, this is nothing. You should see what Mistmane is up to.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: They made you the royal landscape artist for the Crystal Empire?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Wow...

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Your work is beautiful.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Mistmane
content: Oh, thank you. I've never worked with crystal before, but in my heart, I know I'm where I belong.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: You always could find the beauty in things. But there's not much demand for shovel ponies like me nowadays.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Mistmane
content: Don't give up hope. See Somnambula. She'll help you find your purpose.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Somnambula's a motivational speaker. Bet they didn't even have those back in your time.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Because we didn't need them. Ponies knew what to do with their lives.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Somnambula
content: Focus on my voice and feel yourself unlock your potential. Imagine everything that troubles you as one big cloud. Now let it float away. You are relaxed. Free to do anything you wish.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Guess he wished he could take a nap?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Mage Meadowbrook, your home looks just the same as the old days. Wish I could say the same for mine.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Mage Meabowbrook
content: Well, I've had to expand my clinic a bit. Many creatures need healin' in this modern world. Aww. Looks like you could use some, too. What's got you heartsick, Rockhoof?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Thing is, I can't do my old job like Flash. Or adapt like Mistmane. Or succeed at something new like Somnambula. Or go home, like you.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Mage Meabowbrook
content: Give it time. Even Star Swirl's still learnin' about friendship.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Yeah! And I bet Stygian took plenty o' time to fit in.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hey, look what I found! Me and My Shadow, the third hit novel by former villain Stygian! I'm impressed! He's really thriving!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rockhoof? Where are you going?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: I'm not sure. Maybe I just don't belong in this modern world.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Now this here's a right mash of apples. 'Stead of solvin' Rockhoof's problem, we made him feel even worse.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: I'll tell you the real problem here. We haven't given Rockhoof the chance to be who he really is.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Pinkie Pie
content: A pony with a metal shovel and a heart of gold?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rainbow Dash
content: Ugh. A hero! What we need to do is find him a job that's as epic as he is!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hmm. I might know just the thing.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: I'm honored to serve in the Hippogriff Navy, General Seaspray! I promise I'll prove my worth.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Seaspray
content: Think nothing of it. I know how hard it is to adapt to a new home. After our many years below the waves, land customs seemed strange.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Like you didn't fit in, no matter how hard you tried?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Seaspray
content: As though the world had moved on without us. Never fear, Rockhoof. We shall be as brothers in this bright future above the waves.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Uh, why do the Hippogriffs need ships if they can turn into seaponies?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Maybe they just like cruises?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Hippogriff Sailor
content: General! The fog's too thick to see our way out of the harbor!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Seaspray
content: Heave to, swabbies! Halt the ship and hold her 'til the fog passes!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Wait, General! We can navigate the same way my Coltic ancestors traveled through the Selkie Mists! We'll look to the stars! There in the northwest sky is the constellation O'Bridle's Pelt! Steer the ship toward that!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Seaspray
content: You heard the pony, crew! Make full sail!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Yee-haw! Rockhoof did it!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: But... I don't understand! The stars have always steered me true!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Oh, no. Stars can move slowly over time. They must look different now than over a thousand years ago.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Seaspray
content: It was an honor serving with you, Rockhoof. But it seems our paths lie in different directions.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Hey, mistakes happen. We'll think of something else for you to do.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Oh, there's no need, lass. I already know what I want to do next.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Applejack
content: Really? What?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: I heard there's a statue spell that sends creatures into stone sleep. I want you to cast it. On me.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Yes!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Aye!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: No!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Aye!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Hey, guys. Need me to help you decide something?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Rockhoof wants me to cast a spell to turn him into a statue! The answer is no!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Whoa. I thought you were arguing over ice cream flavors.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The answer is still no! Why would you want to be turned into stone?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Because I'm a relic of a bygone age. I belong in a museum. Safe. Preserved. Untouched. I don't belong in this time. It's up to you to make that right.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But there has to be a better way!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Twilight, please understand. I want to be remembered as the hero I was, not the disappointment I've become.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: But you're not! Rockhoof, wait! Spike, can you teach my class today?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Uh, you're not really going to turn him to stone, are you?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Only because it's temporary. As soon as I think of a new solution, we'll wake Rockhoof up. I know he has more to offer the world as a pony than a statue.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Sandbar
content: Did you hear Rockhoof caught all the bees in the Everfree Forest and gave 'em to Zecora as a gift?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Silverstream
content: Wow! Terramar said Rockhoof called down the stars and sunk the whole Hippogriff Navy!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Smolder
content: He's definitely weird, but in a fun way. You never know what's gonna happen next with him.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Professor Rockhoof best pony!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Hey, class. Welcome to the Theory and Defense of Friendship.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Gallus
content: Another sub? Let me start by telling you we don't get homework and we only do field trips.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Yeeeeah. Nice try. Twilight sent me to tell you she won't be in today 'cause she has to cast a stone sleep spell on Rockhoof.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Ocellus
content: Like Discord?! But why?! Rockhoof isn't a bad guy!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Your instructions are to write an essay on heroism and what it means to you.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: No!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Oh, don't worry. It doesn't have to be a long essay.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Maybe like this? Or on three legs? Hmm. What will give the wee birds fewer places to, uh... decorate?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Professor Rockhoof! Dragon said you want to turn into stone! Yona not believe it!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Aye, I'm afraid it's true, lass.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: But... pony need finish ursa major story for class!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Oh, it's sweet of you to try to get me to stay, Yona. But I'm afraid old stories like mine aren't worth anything in this day and age.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Fine! If pony no want tell Yona story, then Yona tell pony story! From class report! "When Yona come to pony school, Yona not fit in. Pony ways strange. But Yona find friends! Yona meet Professor Rockhoof! Pony brave and strong as yak! Not afraid! Hero! When Yona grow up, Yona want to be just like Professor Rockhoof!"

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Well, uh, since you went to the trouble of writing something that nice, I suppose the least I could do is tell you the rest of the story.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Yona tell whole school Rockhoof is best! Now all want to hear story!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Okay, I have the spell. But will you please reconsider? Rockhoof?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: The ursa major tried to grab me by the gullet! But I ducked her claws!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: She had me cornered. So I look at her. She looks at me.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: And I say, "Sorry you won't be having any dinner tonight, lass! Guess you'll just have to... grin and bear it!"

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: And then I tossed her away with my shovel high into the sky! And she's been a constellation up there ever since! Or so I'm told. And that's the end of my story.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Students
content: One more story! One more story!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: No, no. Thank you for listening. But it's time to say goodbye.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Wait. You said there wasn't anything in this time you were good at. What about telling stories?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: It was just a tall tale.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: One that captured the hearts and imagination of everycreature here.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Plus, pony story super fun!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: As the Princess of Friendship, I'd like to appoint you as Equestria's official keeper of tales!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Spike
content: Can you do that?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Eh.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: I, uh... That's very kind of you. But I still think these old bones are more suited to a museum display.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You are a living record of our history. Your stories can inspire and teach generations to come. If you're a statue, that's all lost.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: But will I ever really belong in your world?

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Yona
content: Rockhoof Yona's friend. So Rockhoof belongs!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: You know... That reminds me of another story. Once, there was a small yak that knew more than a great hero.

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Smolder
content: Hey, don't forget the dragons in this one!

episode: A Rockhoof and a Hard Place
speaker: Rockhoof
content: Aye, there were dragons. And ponies. And plenty of Hippogriffs. Plus a changeling and a griffon...

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: The Tree of Harmony remains one of the most powerful sources of magic known to ponydom. And though it has been at the "root" of magic and friendship from the moment it was planted, its ways are mysterious. Almost as if it has a mind of its own.

speaker: Smolder
content: Mind? It's a tree.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: A tree that grew a castle.

speaker: Silverstream
content: Was that before or after Discord made chocolate rain?

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: After.

speaker: Gallus
content: I'm never gonna learn pony history!

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: You can all show me what you've learned on tomorrow's test <U+0096> "Friendship's Effect on the Course of Equestrian History".

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Remember! Study groups are both fun and effective!

speaker: Sandbar
content: So, who wants to study together?

speaker: Gallus
content: With other students? This is Equestria! If you want the real scoop, there's only one place to go. Hello, oh maaaaagical Equestrian tree! Can you tell me everything I need to know about friendship?

speaker: Smolder
content: The Elements of Harmony grew the Tree?

speaker: Ocellus
content: No! The Pillars grew the Tree.

speaker: Sandbar
content: The Tree grew the Elements, and then the box with six locks.

speaker: Ocellus
content: But our professors found six keys and unlocked the box.

speaker: Gallus
content: I'm so gonna fail.

speaker: Silverstream
content: You guys! Check this out!

speaker: Gallus
content: That's a plumbing diagram on how to fix a sink.

speaker: Sandbar
content: What does that have to do with Equestrian history?

speaker: Silverstream
content: Nothing. I just can't believe that's how sinks work! Where's Yona?

speaker: Smolder
content: Apparently, yaks no love study groups!

speaker: Yona
content: Spider! No!

speaker: Sandbar
content: Hey, Cozy. What are you doing here?

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: I volunteered to help Professor Sparkle organize these books. So, experts on Equestrian history yet?

speaker: Gallus
content: I think I'd be better off studying the plumbing book. This stuff is impossible.

speaker: Ocellus
content: Oh, come on, Gallus! With good friends and solid study habits, anything is possible!

speaker: Smolder
content: How about you just tell us what's on tomorrow's test, professor?

speaker: Ocellus
content: Now, hold on a sec. I can't give y'all a sneak peek. That there wouldn't be honest.

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: Golly, it's so inspiring how relaxed you all are about studying friendship, considering your disadvantage.

speaker: Yona
content: What cute pony mean?

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: Just consider where you all came from. If Sandbar hadn't sacrificed so much of his time to get you up to speed, who knows how behind you'd be?

speaker: Sandbar
content: That's... not what<U+0097>

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: I mean, growing up as a love-starved changeling? Or hiding underwater from an evil king all those years? Trusting anycreature must be so hard for you. And griffons never want to be around anycreature, even other griffons. And dragons are so fierce compared to us. There must be days you can't wait to get away from all us cute ponies. "Everypony know yaks think yaks are best!" Making friends with any other creature must seem like a step down. It's just so impressive how you keep trying to understand friendship, even though it isn't in your nature. Oh! I'll let you borrow my notes! It's what friends do. I'll be right back!

speaker: Silverstream
content: We... should... get back to studying.

speaker: Gallus
content: Could you stop that clicking?! I'm trying to focus!

speaker: Sandbar
content: Dude!

speaker: Gallus
content: What? We have a test. I don't know every detail about every adventure the professors went on like you do.

speaker: Ocellus
content: That's why we're studying together.

speaker: Smolder
content: Right. To help us "disadvantaged" creatures.

speaker: Yona
content: Yona confused. Why we all upset?

speaker: Silverstream
content: I only glanced at that plumbing book, but I'm pretty sure this isn't supposed to be here.

speaker: Ocellus
content: What are you doing?

speaker: Smolder
content: Dragon. Strange magical cave. What do you think I'm doing?

speaker: Silverstream
content: Did we know this was down here?

speaker: Sandbar
content: I don't think anypony knows this is down here.

speaker: Illusion Twilight Sparkle
content: Welcome.

speaker: Sandbar
content: Headmare Twilight? Where are we?

speaker: Illusion Twilight Sparkle
content: Where you need to be.

content: Go away.

speaker: Gallus
content: Hello?!

speaker: Gallus
content: Where are<U+0097>? Whoa!

speaker: Gallus
content: Okay, that's horrifying.

speaker: Gallus
content: It's not real.

content: I'm afraid of being trapped, too! I'm scared of small spaces.

speaker: Silverstream
content: Really?

content: Yeah. And I was stuck in a room that kept shrinking. But I realized I had to face my fear, and I found the way out. This is your test. He isn't really here.

speaker: Gallus

content: Ha-ha! I did it! I told him!

speaker: Ocellus
content: Maybe my past was so horrible, it's still inside me just waiting to come out again.

content: That's ridiculous. That's not who you are anymore. You've changed.

speaker: Ocellus
content: Maybe we can't really change that much.

speaker: Smolder
content: I like cute, silly stuff.

speaker: Ocellus
content: I'm sorry, what?

speaker: Smolder
content: I like cute, silly stuff! But ever since school started, I've realized that sometimes I kinda don't mind cute stuff.

speaker: Smolder
content: If a dragon like me can admit she likes tea parties, that's proof we can change. I was gonna invite you to a top-secret tea party with me, but if you want to stay down here...

speaker: Ocellus
content: Oh! No! I want to come!

speaker: Smolder
content: I thought that might work. Come on, let's go!

speaker: Yona

If I have to give up on them to make you proud, then you aren't the ponies I thought you were. I don't care if I disappoint you. You disappoint me.

content: Did you just tell our professors you were disappointed in them?

speaker: Sandbar
content: Something tells me those weren't actually our professors. Besides, they tried to get between me and my friends.

speaker: Smolder

content: You! You're not Headmare Twilight, are you?

content: You're the Tree of Harmony!

content: The Tree of Harmony turned into a sparkly version of our headmare to talk to us? Did I miss a chapter in class?

content: Like all living things, I change as I grow. As I have grown, so have my abilities.

speaker: Gallus
content: I'm a bit rusty on pony history. But since when does the Tree of Harmony trap creatures in a cave with their biggest fears?!

speaker: Tree of Harmony
content: You chose what you saw in my roots, not me.

speaker: Sandbar
content: Our friendship got us past our fears!

speaker: Tree of Harmony
content: You were more concerned with each other's well-being than your own. You were strong when your friends were weak. You let each other in and showed that you would be there for each other, no matter what. Friendship is in your nature.

speaker: Gallus
content: W-We just learned a friendship lesson from a tree, didn't we?

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: You're all right! I came back with my notes and saw this and didn't know what to think!

speaker: Silverstream
content: We're better than all right! We just got tested by the Tree of Harmony! And we totally passed!

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: The Tree of Harmony? Here?

speaker: Silverstream
content: Yeah! Well, below here. Under the school! We found this and went down and met the Tree, and Gallus was all, "Friendship is not in our nature." And the Tree was like, "Whaaaaat?!" And it tested us!

speaker: Smolder
content: Long story short, friendship is in our nature. The Tree said so.

speaker: Ocellus
content: I guess we should tell somepony there's a giant magical hole in the library.

speaker: Ocellus
content: Or not.

speaker: Sandbar
content: We have to tell our professors about this! They won't believe that<U+0097>!

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: You can't!

content: Why no?

content: Because... it's my fault. You were all getting along so well, and I felt left out. I was jealous. And it upset you so much, the Tree of Harmony had to test you. Oh! I'm gonna get expelled for sure! Please don't tell anypony about this! Especially the professors! Please, please, please<U+0097>!

content: Okay! I'm actually too tired to do anything right now.

content: Yeah, but we can't go to sleep. We'll miss the test.

content: The test! I almost forgot!

speaker: Ocellus
content: We're all gonna fail.

content: I'm just so sorry I caused all of this. You're such good friends. I'm sorry I ever doubted you.

speaker: Cozy Glow
content: You get some rest. Don't give any of this another thought. Just let Cozy take care of everything.

content: Exactly! This is the first time the map has teamed up the same ponies for a second quest!

content: That is special.

content: Aw, it's just a name. It doesn't mean anythin'.

content: Like how Cloudsdale is in the clouds and the Crystal Empire's made of crystal?

content: Fair point. So, what can ya tell us about the place, Twilight?

content: Only what Rockhoof told me. Back in his day, nopony knew much about the Peaks of Peril except for the legend on this ancient shield. It says a group called the Kirin used to live there, known for their kindness and truth-speaking.

speaker: Applejack
content: Now we know why the Map called us.

content: Unfortunately, other creatures also lived there. The Nirik, fearsome beasts of pure fire.

speaker: Twilight Sparkle
content: Sorry, Fluttershy. Flanks don't lie.

content: Guess nopony else is goin' out as far as we are.

content: You really startled us.

content: Oh, it's just that I'm not used to seeing anypony taking the train to... the end of the line. The final destination. The last stop!

content: We get the picture. Why?

content: Well, maybe there's a little somethin' to be scared of.

speaker: Applejack
content: Yah!

content: There. That should be enough flowers to keep your tree cozy.

content: Fluttershy! What are you doin'?! This is no time for visitin' varmints! We're on a friendship quest, remember?!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Yes, but actua<U+0097>

content: Come on! We're burnin' daylight!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I know, but what I found out is that<U+0097>

content: Now, we gotta get up that peak! I figure if we use some rope and elbow grease, we can make it up half<U+0097>

content: Applejack! Can you please listen to me?! What I'm trying to say is the squirrels told me a shortcut they take to the Kirin village.

content: Oh. Sorry, Fluttershy. I suppose I got a little too caught up in the adventure.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: That's all right. If you hadn't come back to get me, I probably would've talked to the squirrels all day. Heh.

speaker: Applejack
content: Show yourself!

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, hi. I'm Applejack, and this here's Fluttershy.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: If you have any friendship problems, we're here to help.

speaker: Applejack
content: Huh. Quiet bunch, ain't they? We're from Equestria, and we're plumb tickled to meet y'all.

speaker: Applejack
content: S-So, uh... what are your names?

speaker: Applejack
content: Ap-ple-jack! Flut-ter-shy! Remember?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Maybe they don't understand us.

speaker: Applejack
content: Do. You. Un-der-stand. Ponish?

content: Oh! But you don't speak?

speaker: Applejack
content: Don't or won't?

content: Will you excuse us for a moment? You have to ask yes-or-no questions, or they won't answer.

speaker: Applejack
content: Like talkin' to Angel Bunny?

content: Not exactly. I can always tell what Angel is feeling. But these Kirin don't show anything.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, how are we gonna solve a friendship problem if none of 'em will tell us what it is?

speaker: Applejack
content: These Kirin are quieter than an apple blossom on snowfall. Still, there's gotta be some way to make 'em speak. Beautiful day, ain't it?

speaker: Applejack
content: Knock, knock! Now you say, "Who's there?"

speaker: Applejack
content: Police. "Police who?" Police say somethin'!

speaker: Applejack
content: Uh-oh! I feel a sneeze comin' on! Aaaa-CHOOOOO!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Gesundheit.

speaker: Applejack
content: Don't any o' y'all talk?!

speaker: Applejack
content: Now we're gettin' somewhere.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: A dark spooky path that leads into unknown territory?

speaker: Applejack
content: Tell you what, sugarcube. You stay and see if you can get anythin' outta these here Kirin. I'll go and try to find one that talks.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Phew! Be careful. And watch out for Niriks!

speaker: Applejack
content: Phew! Oh. Have you seen a Kirin that talks?

speaker: Applejack
content: Any idea where I should look?

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, for the love of Celestia! Can't ya just say somethin'?!

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: Gotcha! Sorry, sorry, but that was too good. Oh, you don't know how much I missed jokes. Hi-larity! Am I pronouncing that right? Some words I haven't said in a will. While! While. Hi, I'm Autumn Blaze. You've just arrived, and perhaps you're tired or hungry or reflective and want to sleep and eat and journal? Which you should do, of course! But first<U+0097> Oh! Oh, what joy to talk with another creature! It's been so long! You must tell me everything about you! There's so much to say, so much to do! Oh, look at me. I'm going on, and you haven't seen<U+0097> I mean, have you seen<U+0097>? W-What am I saying? Of course you haven't. So just<U+0097> I<U+0097> yeah<U+0097> I will j<U+0097> Follow me!

speaker: Applejack
content: That... was somethin', all right.

speaker: Applejack
content: Oh, wow. This... is amazin'.

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: Oh, you think so, too?! The way the light shimmers off everything, like, like it all suddenly woke up the moment you saw it. And you realize maybe the water and the mountains and the forest and the... yes, the rainbow and the stars and the sky are all looking back at you thinking the same thing? That we are a part of the everything. That maybe there's just one thing and we are all it.

speaker: Applejack
content: I was gonna say it's pretty. But yeah.

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: Mmmm! And this is just the first stop on a journey of amazing things to see, smell, tiptoe through. Oh, I haven't been able to share all of this with anypony in forever! Since they all took that vow of silence. So it's a lot for me to pro-cess. Process? Uh, deal with.

speaker: Applejack
content: Whoa there. Vow of silence?

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: That's, uh... That's why they asked me to leave.

speaker: Applejack
content: I hope it's not a sore subject, but... you mind explainin' why y'all went quiet in the first place?

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: It's a long story.

speaker: Applejack
content: You'd rather not talk about it?

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: No.

speaker: Applejack
content: I-I under<U+0097>

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: I'd rather... siiiiiiiiiiiing!

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: La, la-la-la, la-la La-la-la, la-la-la

speaker: Others
content: But then one day, a fight broke out And hurtful words were said Flaring tempers were inflamed Destruction quickly spread

speaker: Others
content: And flaming bred from head to head It even burnt our... bread

speaker: Others
content: Sorry, I forgot how much I love rhyming. Where was I? Oh, right!

content: we quickly learned That words could be a curse

speaker: Others

content: Seriously, there's only so long that Sudoku can keep you entertained!

speaker: Others

speaker: Others

speaker: Others
content: So I came here, but left the couch alone They're hard to move With just the view for company Until ya heard me groove

speaker: Others
content: Take it away, boys!

content: 'Cause rainbows won't light up the sky Unless you let it rain And candles just won't glow until they're burned No, you can't give up your laughter 'Cause you're scared of a little pain It's a lesson that my village never learned

speaker: Others
content: No matter how hard I schooled them Fear of hurt is still what ruled them Sometimes you gotta let it raaaaaaaain!

content: Yeah, sometimes you've gotta let it rain

speaker: Applejack
content: I can't believe it! Nopony should give up feelin'... their feelin's just to keep from gettin' angry!

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: That's what I said! You know, after I started talking again.

speaker: Applejack
content: I bet this here's the problem that Fluttershy and I came to help y'all with!

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: Really? Who's Fluttershy? Oh! Did you name your shadow? Mine's called "Silhouette Gloom of the Sundown Lands".

speaker: Applejack
content: Right... Well, I'm thinkin' if we just go talk to the other Kirin, we can get 'em to welcome you back proper-like. Maybe even convince 'em to take your cure.

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: Oh, yes! Yes, of course! Oh, just one small thing. The antidote from my anecdote? It's gone.

speaker: Applejack
content: There's no cure left?!

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: I used the last of the foal's-breath flowers to make it. And I-I haven't seen them bloom since.

speaker: Applejack
content: Well, this wouldn't be a friendship quest if it was easy. I'm gonna start by gettin' your friends to welcome you back!

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: You know, between you and me, I'm not sure she's gonna convince them. Nope! But... I hope she does.

speaker: Applejack
content: Fluttershy! Guess what!

speaker: Applejack
content: Bet that's a problem the Kirin never have.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: No.

speaker: Applejack
content: Anyhow, we gotta get 'em all talkin' again.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Oh, no-no-no-no-no! We can't ever let that happen!

speaker: Applejack
content: I thought you said you figured out the friendship problem. Was somethin' lost in translation?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: The Kirin are usually peaceful and kind. But when they get mad, they turn into Niriks, creatures made of fire and vengeance!

speaker: Applejack
content: Heh. That seemed less scary when it was in a song.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: The last time they all argued, they got so angry, they accidentally destroyed their whole village. So the Kirin decided to make sure it would never happen again.

speaker: Applejack
content: But that's no reason to stop talkin'.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Yes, it is! Fire is dangerous, especially in a forest like this. Why, think of all the animals it could hurt.

speaker: Applejack
content: Not if they don't turn into fire-breathin' Nirik in the first place.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: And how can you be sure that won't happen?

speaker: Applejack
content: There's gotta be a better way than givin' up all your feelin's!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Applejack! You're not listening!

speaker: Applejack
content: 'Cause you're not talkin' any sense!

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Um, what are they doing?

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Maybe they got worried because we were arguing with each other.

speaker: Applejack
content: Aw, shucks! We were just havin' a normal, civil disagreement! Honest!

speaker: Applejack
content: To the Stream of Silence! If we hit that water, we'll never be able to talk or feel anythin' ever again!

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: Put them down!

speaker: Applejack
content: It's all right. I think I know this one. And she's tryin' to help.

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: Well, yeah! Can't have them silence the only friend who'll speak to me.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: She talks?

speaker: Applejack
content: You have no idea. Fluttershy, meet Autumn Blaze.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Well, thank you for that... um, wall of fire. But I thought Niriks were dangerous when they're angry. How did you know you could control your temper?

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: I didn't. Huh. I guess anger's like other feelings. It's not about having them. It's what you do with them.

speaker: Applejack
content: And givin' up happiness to keep away anger is no kind o' life.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: I never thought of it that way. I can't imagine not being able to talk to my animal friends.

speaker: Autumn Blaze
content: Fern Flare, you used to love to laugh at everything. And Rain Shine, you sung the most beautiful harmonies. Don't you miss it?

speaker: Applejack
content: I know you're worried about fightin'. But friends can disagree without causin' a ruckus.

speaker: Fluttershy
content: Everypony gets mad sometimes. Even Applejack and I argue.

speaker: Applejack
content: What?! When do we ever argue?

speaker: Fluttershy
